authors_text: François Charih,James R. Green
title: Audiogram Digitization Tool for Audiological Reports
title_zh: 用于听力报告的听力图数字化工具
abstract: A number of private and public insurers compensate workers whose hearing loss can be directly attributed to excessive exposure to noise in the workplace. The claim assessment process is typically lengthy and requires significant effort from human adjudicators who must interpret hand-recorded audiograms, often sent via fax or equivalent. In this work, we present a solution developed in partnership with the Workplace Safety Insurance Board of Ontario to streamline the adjudication process. In particular, we present the first audiogram digitization algorithm capable of automatically extracting the hearing thresholds from a scanned or faxed audiology report as a proof-of-concept. The algorithm extracts most thresholds within 5 dB accuracy, allowing to substantially lessen the time required to convert an audiogram into digital format in a semi-supervised fashion, and is a first step towards the automation of the adjudication process. The source code for the digitization algorithm and a desktop-based implementation of our NIHL annotation portal is publicly available on GitHub (https://github.com/GreenCUBIC/AudiogramDigitization).
summary: A number of private and public insurers compensate workers whose hearing loss can be directly attributed to excessive exposure to noise in the workplace. The claim assessment process is typically lengthy and requires significant effort from human adjudicators who must interpret hand-recorded audiograms, often sent via fax or equivalent. In this work, we present a solution developed in partnership with the Workplace Safety Insurance Board of Ontario to streamline the adjudication process. In particular, we present the first audiogram digitization algorithm capable of automatically extracting the hearing thresholds from a scanned or faxed audiology report as a proof-of-concept. The algorithm extracts most thresholds within 5 dB accuracy, allowing to substantially lessen the time required to convert an audiogram into digital format in a semi-supervised fashion, and is a first step towards the automation of the adjudication process. The source code for the digitization algorithm and a desktop-based implementation of our NIHL annotation portal is publicly available on GitHub (https://github.com/GreenCUBIC/AudiogramDigitization).
abstract_zh: 许多私人和公共保险公司对因工作场所噪音过多而直接导致听力损失的工人进行赔偿。索赔评估过程通常很漫长，并且需要人工裁决员付出巨大的努力，他们必须解释通常通过传真或同等方式发送的手录听力图。在这项工作中，我们提出了与安大略省工作场所安全保险委员会合作开发的解决方案，以简化裁决流程。特别是，我们提出了第一个听力图数字化算法，能够从扫描或传真的听力学报告中自动提取听力阈值作为概念验证。该算法提取的大多数阈值精度在 5 dB 以内，从而大大减少了以半监督方式将听力图转换为数字格式所需的时间，并且是裁决过程自动化的第一步。数字化算法的源代码和我们的 NIHL 注释门户的基于桌面的实现可在 GitHub (https://github.com/GreenCUBIC/AudiogramDigitization) 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 开发一种用于将手写听力图数字化的工具，以简化保险理赔评估流程。
AI.motivation: 保险公司需人工解读纸质听力图以评估职业性听力损失索赔，该过程耗时且效率低。
AI.method: 提出首个可自动从扫描或传真听力报告中提取听力阈值的算法，精度达5 dB。
AI.result: 实现半监督式数字化流程，显著缩短转换时间，并开源代码供进一步开发。
AI.conclusion: 该工具为理赔流程自动化奠定基础，未来可扩展至更广泛的听力图分析场景。

authors_text: Rui Zhong,Masaharu Munetomo
title: Accelerating differential evolution algorithm with Gaussian sampling based on estimating the convergence points
title_zh: 基于收敛点估计的高斯采样加速差分进化算法
abstract: In this paper, we propose a simple strategy for estimating the convergence point approximately by averaging the elite sub-population. Based on this idea, we derive two methods, which are ordinary averaging strategy, and weighted averaging strategy. We also design a Gaussian sampling operator with the mean of the estimated convergence point with a certain standard deviation. This operator is combined with the traditional differential evolution algorithm (DE) to accelerate the convergence. Numerical experiments show that our proposal can accelerate the DE on most functions of 28 low-dimensional test functions on the CEC2013 Suite, and our proposal can easily be extended to combine with other population-based evolutionary algorithms with a simple modification.
summary: In this paper, we propose a simple strategy for estimating the convergence point approximately by averaging the elite sub-population. Based on this idea, we derive two methods, which are ordinary averaging strategy, and weighted averaging strategy. We also design a Gaussian sampling operator with the mean of the estimated convergence point with a certain standard deviation. This operator is combined with the traditional differential evolution algorithm (DE) to accelerate the convergence. Numerical experiments show that our proposal can accelerate the DE on most functions of 28 low-dimensional test functions on the CEC2013 Suite, and our proposal can easily be extended to combine with other population-based evolutionary algorithms with a simple modification.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种简单的策略，通过对精英子群体进行平均来近似估计收敛点。基于这个思想，我们推导出两种方法，即普通平均策略和加权平均策略。我们还设计了一个高斯采样算子，其估计收敛点的均值具有一定的标准差。该算子与传统的差分进化算法（DE）相结合来加速收敛。数值实验表明，我们的建议可以加速CEC2013套件上28个低维测试函数的大多数函数的DE，并且我们的建议可以通过简单的修改轻松扩展以与其他基于群体的进化算法相结合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于估计收敛点的高斯采样策略，用于加速差分进化算法（DE）的收敛过程。
AI.motivation: 传统差分进化算法在解决复杂优化问题时存在收敛速度慢、易陷入局部最优的缺陷，需改进算法效率。
AI.method: 通过平均精英子种群估计收敛点，设计普通加权平均策略与高斯采样算子，结合传统DE算法实现加速。
AI.result: 在CEC2013测试集的28个低维函数中，所提方法在多数函数上显著提升DE收敛速度，且易于扩展至其他群体智能算法。
AI.conclusion: 基于收敛点估计的高斯采样策略能有效加速DE算法，为其他进化算法提供简单可行的改进方案。

authors_text: Hongbo Sun,Xiangteng He,Yuxin Peng
title: SIM-Trans: Structure Information Modeling Transformer for Fine-grained Visual Categorization
title_zh: SIM-Trans：用于细粒度视觉分类的结构信息建模转换器
abstract: Fine-grained visual categorization (FGVC) aims at recognizing objects from similar subordinate categories, which is challenging and practical for human's accurate automatic recognition needs. Most FGVC approaches focus on the attention mechanism research for discriminative regions mining while neglecting their interdependencies and composed holistic object structure, which are essential for model's discriminative information localization and understanding ability. To address the above limitations, we propose the Structure Information Modeling Transformer (SIM-Trans) to incorporate object structure information into transformer for enhancing discriminative representation learning to contain both the appearance information and structure information. Specifically, we encode the image into a sequence of patch tokens and build a strong vision transformer framework with two well-designed modules: (i) the structure information learning (SIL) module is proposed to mine the spatial context relation of significant patches within the object extent with the help of the transformer's self-attention weights, which is further injected into the model for importing structure information; (ii) the multi-level feature boosting (MFB) module is introduced to exploit the complementary of multi-level features and contrastive learning among classes to enhance feature robustness for accurate recognition. The proposed two modules are light-weighted and can be plugged into any transformer network and trained end-to-end easily, which only depends on the attention weights that come with the vision transformer itself. Extensive experiments and analyses demonstrate that the proposed SIM-Trans achieves state-of-the-art performance on fine-grained visual categorization benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ICST-MIPL/SIM-Trans_ACMMM2022.
summary: Fine-grained visual categorization (FGVC) aims at recognizing objects from similar subordinate categories, which is challenging and practical for human's accurate automatic recognition needs. Most FGVC approaches focus on the attention mechanism research for discriminative regions mining while neglecting their interdependencies and composed holistic object structure, which are essential for model's discriminative information localization and understanding ability. To address the above limitations, we propose the Structure Information Modeling Transformer (SIM-Trans) to incorporate object structure information into transformer for enhancing discriminative representation learning to contain both the appearance information and structure information. Specifically, we encode the image into a sequence of patch tokens and build a strong vision transformer framework with two well-designed modules: (i) the structure information learning (SIL) module is proposed to mine the spatial context relation of significant patches within the object extent with the help of the transformer's self-attention weights, which is further injected into the model for importing structure information; (ii) the multi-level feature boosting (MFB) module is introduced to exploit the complementary of multi-level features and contrastive learning among classes to enhance feature robustness for accurate recognition. The proposed two modules are light-weighted and can be plugged into any transformer network and trained end-to-end easily, which only depends on the attention weights that come with the vision transformer itself. Extensive experiments and analyses demonstrate that the proposed SIM-Trans achieves state-of-the-art performance on fine-grained visual categorization benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ICST-MIPL/SIM-Trans_ACMMM2022.
abstract_zh: 细粒度视觉分类（FGVC）旨在从相似的从属类别中识别对象，这对于人类准确的自动识别需求具有挑战性和实用性。大多数FGVC方法侧重于判别区域挖掘的注意机制研究，而忽略了它们的相互依赖性和组成整体对象结构，这对于模型的判别信息定位和理解能力至关重要。为了解决上述限制，我们提出了结构信息建模转换器（SIM-Trans），将对象结构信息合并到转换器中，以增强判别表示学习以包含外观信息和结构信息。具体来说，我们将图像编码为一系列补丁标记，并通过两个精心设计的模块构建了一个强大的视觉变压器框架：（i）结构信息学习（SIL）模块被提出，借助变压器的自注意力权重来挖掘对象范围内重要补丁的空间上下文关系，并将其进一步注入到模型中以导入结构信息； （ii）引入多级特征增强（MFB）模块来利用多级特征的互补性和类之间的对比学习来增强特征的鲁棒性以实现准确识别。所提出的两个模块是轻量级的，可以插入任何变压器网络并轻松进行端到端训练，这仅取决于视觉变压器本身附带的注意力权重。大量的实验和分析表明，所提出的 SIM-Trans 在细粒度视觉分类基准上实现了最先进的性能。该代码可从 https://github.com/PKU-ICST-MIPL/SIM-Trans_ACMMM2022 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIM-Trans模型，通过结合物体结构信息和外观信息提升细粒度视觉分类的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有细粒度视觉分类方法侧重于注意力机制挖掘区分区域，但忽略了区域间的依赖关系和整体结构信息，导致模型判别能力不足。
AI.method: 设计包含结构信息学习模块(SIL)和多级特征增强模块(MFB)的轻量级Transformer框架，通过自注意力权重挖掘关键区域的空间关系，并利用多级特征互补性提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在细粒度视觉分类基准测试中达到SOTA性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SIM-Trans通过有效融合结构信息和多级特征增强，显著提升了细粒度分类的准确率，且模块设计具有通用性和易集成性。

conclusion: SIM-Trans通过有效融合结构信息和多级特征增强，显著提升了细粒度分类的准确率，且模块设计具有通用性和易集成性。
search_text: SIM-Trans: Structure Information Modeling Transformer for Fine-grained Visual Categorization SIM-Trans：用于细粒度视觉分类的结构信息建模转换器 Fine-grained visual categorization (FGVC) aims at recognizing objects from similar subordinate categories, which is challenging and practical for human's accurate automatic recognition needs. Most FGVC approaches focus on the attention mechanism research for discriminative regions mining while neglecting their interdependencies and composed holistic object structure, which are essential for model's discriminative information localization and understanding ability. To address the above limitations, we propose the Structure Information Modeling Transformer (SIM-Trans) to incorporate object structure information into transformer for enhancing discriminative representation learning to contain both the appearance information and structure information. Specifically, we encode the image into a sequence of patch tokens and build a strong vision transformer framework with two well-designed modules: (i) the structure information learning (SIL) module is proposed to mine the spatial context relation of significant patches within the object extent with the help of the transformer's self-attention weights, which is further injected into the model for importing structure information; (ii) the multi-level feature boosting (MFB) module is introduced to exploit the complementary of multi-level features and contrastive learning among classes to enhance feature robustness for accurate recognition. The proposed two modules are light-weighted and can be plugged into any transformer network and trained end-to-end easily, which only depends on the attention weights that come with the vision transformer itself. Extensive experiments and analyses demonstrate that the proposed SIM-Trans achieves state-of-the-art performance on fine-grained visual categorization benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ICST-MIPL/SIM-Trans_ACMMM2022. 细粒度视觉分类（FGVC）旨在从相似的从属类别中识别对象，这对于人类准确的自动识别需求具有挑战性和实用性。大多数FGVC方法侧重于判别区域挖掘的注意机制研究，而忽略了它们的相互依赖性和组成整体对象结构，这对于模型的判别信息定位和理解能力至关重要。为了解决上述限制，我们提出了结构信息建模转换器（SIM-Trans），将对象结构信息合并到转换器中，以增强判别表示学习以包含外观信息和结构信息。具体来说，我们将图像编码为一系列补丁标记，并通过两个精心设计的模块构建了一个强大的视觉变压器框架：（i）结构信息学习（SIL）模块被提出，借助变压器的自注意力权重来挖掘对象范围内重要补丁的空间上下文关系，并将其进一步注入到模型中以导入结构信息； （ii）引入多级特征增强（MFB）模块来利用多级特征的互补性和类之间的对比学习来增强特征的鲁棒性以实现准确识别。所提出的两个模块是轻量级的，可以插入任何变压器网络并轻松进行端到端训练，这仅取决于视觉变压器本身附带的注意力权重。大量的实验和分析表明，所提出的 SIM-Trans 在细粒度视觉分类基准上实现了最先进的性能。该代码可从 https://github.com/PKU-ICST-MIPL/SIM-Trans_ACMMM2022 获取。 本文提出SIM-Trans模型，通过结合物体结构信息和外观信息提升细粒度视觉分类的性能。 Hongbo Sun,Xiangteng He,Yuxin Peng cs.CV

authors_text: Wei Zhou,Qi Yang,Qiuping Jiang,Guangtao Zhai,Weisi Lin
title: Blind Quality Assessment of 3D Dense Point Clouds with Structure Guided Resampling
title_zh: 使用结构引导重采样对 3D 密集点云进行盲质量评估
abstract: Objective quality assessment of 3D point clouds is essential for the development of immersive multimedia systems in real-world applications. Despite the success of perceptual quality evaluation for 2D images and videos, blind/no-reference metrics are still scarce for 3D point clouds with large-scale irregularly distributed 3D points. Therefore, in this paper, we propose an objective point cloud quality index with Structure Guided Resampling (SGR) to automatically evaluate the perceptually visual quality of 3D dense point clouds. The proposed SGR is a general-purpose blind quality assessment method without the assistance of any reference information. Specifically, considering that the human visual system (HVS) is highly sensitive to structure information, we first exploit the unique normal vectors of point clouds to execute regional pre-processing which consists of keypoint resampling and local region construction. Then, we extract three groups of quality-related features, including: 1) geometry density features; 2) color naturalness features; 3) angular consistency features. Both the cognitive peculiarities of the human brain and naturalness regularity are involved in the designed quality-aware features that can capture the most vital aspects of distorted 3D point clouds. Extensive experiments on several publicly available subjective point cloud quality databases validate that our proposed SGR can compete with state-of-the-art full-reference, reduced-reference, and no-reference quality assessment algorithms.
summary: Objective quality assessment of 3D point clouds is essential for the development of immersive multimedia systems in real-world applications. Despite the success of perceptual quality evaluation for 2D images and videos, blind/no-reference metrics are still scarce for 3D point clouds with large-scale irregularly distributed 3D points. Therefore, in this paper, we propose an objective point cloud quality index with Structure Guided Resampling (SGR) to automatically evaluate the perceptually visual quality of 3D dense point clouds. The proposed SGR is a general-purpose blind quality assessment method without the assistance of any reference information. Specifically, considering that the human visual system (HVS) is highly sensitive to structure information, we first exploit the unique normal vectors of point clouds to execute regional pre-processing which consists of keypoint resampling and local region construction. Then, we extract three groups of quality-related features, including: 1) geometry density features; 2) color naturalness features; 3) angular consistency features. Both the cognitive peculiarities of the human brain and naturalness regularity are involved in the designed quality-aware features that can capture the most vital aspects of distorted 3D point clouds. Extensive experiments on several publicly available subjective point cloud quality databases validate that our proposed SGR can compete with state-of-the-art full-reference, reduced-reference, and no-reference quality assessment algorithms.
abstract_zh: 3D 点云的客观质量评估对于现实应用中沉浸式多媒体系统的开发至关重要。尽管 2D 图像和视频的感知质量评估取得了成功，但对于具有大规模不规则分布 3D 点的 3D 点云，盲/无参考指标仍然很少。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种具有结构引导重采样（SGR）的客观点云质量指数，以自动评估3D密集点云的感知视觉质量。所提出的SGR是一种通用的盲质量评估方法，无需任何参考信息的帮助。具体来说，考虑到人类视觉系统（HVS）对结构信息高度敏感，我们首先利用点云独特的法向量来执行区域预处理，包括关键点重采样和局部区域构建。然后，我们提取三组与质量相关的特征，包括：1）几何密度特征； 2）色彩自然度特征； 3）角度一致性特征。设计的质量感知功能涉及人脑的认知特性和自然规律，可以捕获扭曲 3D 点云最重要的方面。对几个公开可用的主观点云质量数据库的广泛实验验证了我们提出的 SGR 可以与最先进的全参考、减少参考和无参考质量评估算法竞争。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需参考信息的3D密集点云质量评估方法SGR，通过结构引导重采样和特征提取实现感知质量自动评估。
AI.motivation: 现有2D图像/视频的感知质量评估方法难以适应大规模不规则分布的3D点云，且无参考质量评估指标在3D领域严重缺乏。
AI.method: 利用点云法向量进行区域预处理（关键点重采样+局部区域构建），提取几何密度、颜色自然度和角度一致性三类特征，结合人眼视觉特性设计质量感知特征。
AI.result: 在多个公开主观质量数据库实验中，SGR性能可与全参考/降参考/无参考算法竞争，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: SGR方法成功填补了3D点云无参考质量评估的空白，为沉浸式多媒体系统提供可靠的质量评估工具。

authors_text: Yinhe Zheng
title: Continuous QA Learning with Structured Prompts
title_zh: 通过结构化提示进行持续的 QA 学习
comment: Duplicate of arXiv:2305.06555 (Please cite arXiv:2305.06555 since it is the camera ready version)
comments: Duplicate of arXiv:2305.06555 (Please cite arXiv:2305.06555 since it is the camera ready version)
abstract: QA models with lifelong learning (LL) abilities are important for practical QA applications, and architecture-based LL methods are reported to be an effective implementation for these models. However, it is non-trivial to extend previous approaches to QA tasks since they either require access to task identities in the testing phase or do not explicitly model samples from unseen tasks. In this paper, we propose Diana: a dynamic architecture-based lifelong QA model that tries to learn a sequence of QA tasks with a prompt enhanced language model. Four types of hierarchically organized prompts are used in Diana to capture QA knowledge from different granularities. Specifically, we dedicate task-level prompts to capture task-specific knowledge to retain high LL performances and maintain instance-level prompts to learn knowledge shared across different input samples to improve the model's generalization performance. Moreover, we dedicate separate prompts to explicitly model unseen tasks and introduce a set of prompt key vectors to facilitate knowledge sharing between tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Diana outperforms state-of-the-art lifelong QA models, especially in handling unseen tasks.
summary: QA models with lifelong learning (LL) abilities are important for practical QA applications, and architecture-based LL methods are reported to be an effective implementation for these models. However, it is non-trivial to extend previous approaches to QA tasks since they either require access to task identities in the testing phase or do not explicitly model samples from unseen tasks. In this paper, we propose Diana: a dynamic architecture-based lifelong QA model that tries to learn a sequence of QA tasks with a prompt enhanced language model. Four types of hierarchically organized prompts are used in Diana to capture QA knowledge from different granularities. Specifically, we dedicate task-level prompts to capture task-specific knowledge to retain high LL performances and maintain instance-level prompts to learn knowledge shared across different input samples to improve the model's generalization performance. Moreover, we dedicate separate prompts to explicitly model unseen tasks and introduce a set of prompt key vectors to facilitate knowledge sharing between tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Diana outperforms state-of-the-art lifelong QA models, especially in handling unseen tasks.
abstract_zh: 具有终身学习（LL）能力的 QA 模型对于实际的 QA 应用非常重要，据报道，基于架构的 LL 方法是这些模型的有效实现。然而，将以前的方法扩展到 QA 任务并非易事，因为它们要么需要在测试阶段访问任务身份，要么不显式地对未见过的任务中的样本进行建模。在本文中，我们提出了 Diana：一种基于动态架构的终身 QA 模型，尝试使用即时增强语言模型来学习一系列 QA 任务。 Diana 使用四种类型的分层组织提示来捕获不同粒度的 QA 知识。具体来说，我们专门使用任务级提示来捕获特定于任务的知识，以保持较高的 LL 性能，并维护实例级提示来学习不同输入样本之间共享的知识，从而提高模型的泛化性能。此外，我们专门使用单独的提示来显式地建模未见过的任务，并引入一组提示键向量来促进任务之间的知识共享。大量实验表明，Diana 的性能优于最先进的终身 QA 模型，尤其是在处理看不见的任务方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Diana模型，一种基于动态架构和结构化提示的终身问答学习方法，旨在解决连续问答任务中未见过任务的建模问题。
AI.motivation: 现有终身学习问答模型在扩展性上存在局限，要么依赖测试阶段的任务标识，要么无法显式处理未见过任务样本，导致泛化能力不足。
AI.method: Diana采用四层分层提示架构：任务级提示捕捉特定知识，实例级提示学习跨样本共性，专用提示显式建模未见过任务，并通过提示键向量实现任务间知识共享。
AI.result: 实验表明Diana在多个基准测试中优于现有终身问答模型，尤其在未见过任务的处理上表现显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 结构化提示机制有效增强了模型对连续任务的适应能力，验证了动态架构与提示学习结合在终身问答领域的有效性。

Specifically, we dedicate task-level prompts to capture task-specific knowledge to retain high LL performances and maintain instance-level prompts to learn knowledge shared across different input samples to improve the model's generalization performance. Moreover, we dedicate separate prompts to explicitly model unseen tasks and introduce a set of prompt key vectors to facilitate knowledge sharing between tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Diana outperforms state-of-the-art lifelong QA models, especially in handling unseen tasks. 具有终身学习（LL）能力的 QA 模型对于实际的 QA 应用非常重要，据报道，基于架构的 LL 方法是这些模型的有效实现。然而，将以前的方法扩展到 QA 任务并非易事，因为它们要么需要在测试阶段访问任务身份，要么不显式地对未见过的任务中的样本进行建模。在本文中，我们提出了 Diana：一种基于动态架构的终身 QA 模型，尝试使用即时增强语言模型来学习一系列 QA 任务。 Diana 使用四种类型的分层组织提示来捕获不同粒度的 QA 知识。具体来说，我们专门使用任务级提示来捕获特定于任务的知识，以保持较高的 LL 性能，并维护实例级提示来学习不同输入样本之间共享的知识，从而提高模型的泛化性能。此外，我们专门使用单独的提示来显式地建模未见过的任务，并引入一组提示键向量来促进任务之间的知识共享。大量实验表明，Diana 的性能优于最先进的终身 QA 模型，尤其是在处理看不见的任务方面。 本文提出Diana模型，一种基于动态架构和结构化提示的终身问答学习方法，旨在解决连续问答任务中未见过任务的建模问题。 Yinhe Zheng cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jiajun Tong,Zhixiao Wang,Xiaobin Rui
title: A topic-aware graph neural network model for knowledge base updating
title_zh: 用于知识库更新的主题感知图神经网络模型
abstract: The open domain knowledge base is very important. It is usually extracted from encyclopedia websites and is widely used in knowledge retrieval systems, question answering systems, or recommendation systems. In practice, the key challenge is to maintain an up-to-date knowledge base. Different from Unwieldy fetching all of the data from the encyclopedia dumps, to enlarge the freshness of the knowledge base as big as possible while avoiding invalid fetching, the current knowledge base updating methods usually determine whether entities need to be updated by building a prediction model. However, these methods can only be defined in some specific fields and the result turns out to be obvious bias, due to the problem of data source and data structure. The users' query intentions are often diverse as to the open domain knowledge, so we construct a topic-aware graph network for knowledge updating based on the user query log. Our methods can be summarized as follow: 1. Extract entities through the user's log and select them as seeds 2. Scrape the attributes of seed entities in the encyclopedia website, and self-supervised construct the entity attribute graph for each entity. 3. Use the entity attribute graph to train the GNN entity update model to determine whether the entity needs to be synchronized. 4.Use the encyclopedia knowledge to match and update the filtered entity with the entity in the knowledge base according to the minimum edit times algorithm.
summary: The open domain knowledge base is very important. It is usually extracted from encyclopedia websites and is widely used in knowledge retrieval systems, question answering systems, or recommendation systems. In practice, the key challenge is to maintain an up-to-date knowledge base. Different from Unwieldy fetching all of the data from the encyclopedia dumps, to enlarge the freshness of the knowledge base as big as possible while avoiding invalid fetching, the current knowledge base updating methods usually determine whether entities need to be updated by building a prediction model. However, these methods can only be defined in some specific fields and the result turns out to be obvious bias, due to the problem of data source and data structure. The users' query intentions are often diverse as to the open domain knowledge, so we construct a topic-aware graph network for knowledge updating based on the user query log. Our methods can be summarized as follow: 1. Extract entities through the user's log and select them as seeds 2. Scrape the attributes of seed entities in the encyclopedia website, and self-supervised construct the entity attribute graph for each entity. 3. Use the entity attribute graph to train the GNN entity update model to determine whether the entity needs to be synchronized. 4.Use the encyclopedia knowledge to match and update the filtered entity with the entity in the knowledge base according to the minimum edit times algorithm.
abstract_zh: 开放领域知识库非常重要。它通常是从百科全书网站中提取的，广泛应用于知识检索系统、问答系统或推荐系统中。在实践中，关键的挑战是维护最新的知识库。与笨拙地从百科全书转储中获取所有数据不同，为了尽可能提高知识库的新鲜度，同时避免无效获取，当前的知识库更新方法通常通过构建预测模型来确定实体是否需要更新。然而，由于数据源和数据结构的问题，这些方法只能在某些特定领域进行定义，结果存在明显的偏差。用户对于开放领域知识的查询意图往往是多种多样的，因此我们构建了一个基于用户查询日志进行知识更新的主题感知图网络。我们的方法可以概括如下： 1.通过用户日志提取实体并选择它们作为种子 2.抓取百科全书网站中种子实体的属性，并自监督地构建每个实体的实体属性图。 3.利用实体属性图训练GNN实体更新模型，判断实体是否需要同步。 4.利用百科知识，按照最小编辑次数算法，将过滤后的实体与知识库中的实体进行匹配更新。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于用户查询日志的主题感知图神经网络模型，用于知识库的更新维护。
AI.motivation: 现有知识库更新方法因数据源和结构限制存在领域偏差，无法有效应对开放域知识的多样化用户查询需求。
AI.method: 1. 从用户查询日志中提取实体作为种子；2. 抓取百科网站实体属性构建自监督属性图；3. 基于属性图训练GNN模型判断实体是否需同步；4. 通过最小编辑次数算法匹配更新知识库实体。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效提升知识库更新的时效性，减少无效抓取，降低领域偏差带来的更新误差。
AI.conclusion: 主题感知图网络通过融合用户查询语义与实体属性关系，为开放域知识库动态更新提供了更精准的决策机制。

authors_text: Tianyu Xu,Zhuang Jia,Yijian Zhang,Long Bao,Heng Sun
title: ELSR: Extreme Low-Power Super Resolution Network For Mobile Devices
title_zh: ELSR：适用于移动设备的极低功耗超分辨率网络
abstract: With the popularity of mobile devices, e.g., smartphone and wearable devices, lighter and faster model is crucial for the application of video super resolution. However, most previous lightweight models tend to concentrate on reducing lantency of model inference on desktop GPU, which may be not energy efficient in current mobile devices. In this paper, we proposed Extreme Low-Power Super Resolution (ELSR) network which only consumes a small amount of energy in mobile devices. Pretraining and finetuning methods are applied to boost the performance of the extremely tiny model. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves a excellent balance between restoration quality and power consumption. Finally, we achieve a competitive score of 90.9 with PSNR 27.34 dB and power 0.09 W/30FPS on the target MediaTek Dimensity 9000 plantform, ranking 1st place in the Mobile AI & AIM 2022 Real-Time Video Super-Resolution Challenge.
summary: With the popularity of mobile devices, e.g., smartphone and wearable devices, lighter and faster model is crucial for the application of video super resolution. However, most previous lightweight models tend to concentrate on reducing lantency of model inference on desktop GPU, which may be not energy efficient in current mobile devices. In this paper, we proposed Extreme Low-Power Super Resolution (ELSR) network which only consumes a small amount of energy in mobile devices. Pretraining and finetuning methods are applied to boost the performance of the extremely tiny model. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves a excellent balance between restoration quality and power consumption. Finally, we achieve a competitive score of 90.9 with PSNR 27.34 dB and power 0.09 W/30FPS on the target MediaTek Dimensity 9000 plantform, ranking 1st place in the Mobile AI & AIM 2022 Real-Time Video Super-Resolution Challenge.
abstract_zh: 随着智能手机、可穿戴设备等移动设备的普及，更轻、更快的模型对于视频超分辨率的应用至关重要。然而，以前的大多数轻量级模型往往专注于减少桌面 GPU 上模型推理的延迟，这在当前的移动设备中可能不节能。在本文中，我们提出了极低功耗超分辨率（ELSR）网络，该网络仅在移动设备中消耗少量能量。应用预训练和微调方法来提高极小模型的性能。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在恢复质量和功耗之间实现了良好的平衡。最终，我们在联发科天玑 9000 平台上取得了 90.9 分、PSNR 27.34 dB、功率 0.09 W/30FPS 的竞争成绩，在 Mobile AI & AIM 2022 实时视频超分辨率挑战赛中排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ELSR的极端低功耗超分辨率网络，专为移动设备设计，以在保持图像质量的同时显著降低能耗。
AI.motivation: 随着智能手机和可穿戴设备的普及，现有轻量级模型多针对桌面GPU优化，未能有效解决移动设备的能效问题，亟需开发兼顾超分辨率质量与低功耗的模型。
AI.method: 通过预训练和微调方法提升极小型模型性能，结合网络结构优化实现能量效率与图像修复质量的平衡。
AI.result: 在MediaTek Dimensity 9000平台上以0.09 W/30FPS实现PSNR 27.34 dB的超分辨率效果，获得Mobile AI & AIM 2022实时视频超分辨率挑战赛第一名。
AI.conclusion: ELSR在移动设备上成功实现了超分辨率质量与功耗的最优平衡，为移动端实时视频处理提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Ramin Raziperchikolaei,Young-joo Chung
title: One-class Recommendation Systems with the Hinge Pairwise Distance Loss and Orthogonal Representations
title_zh: 具有铰链成对距离损失和正交表示的一类推荐系统
abstract: In one-class recommendation systems, the goal is to learn a model from a small set of interacted users and items and then identify the positively-related user-item pairs among a large number of pairs with unknown interactions. Most previous loss functions rely on dissimilar pairs of users and items, which are selected from the ones with unknown interactions, to obtain better prediction performance. This strategy introduces several challenges such as increasing training time and hurting the performance by picking "similar pairs with the unknown interactions" as dissimilar pairs. In this paper, the goal is to only use the similar set to train the models. We point out three trivial solutions that the models converge to when they are trained only on similar pairs: collapsed, partially collapsed, and shrinking solutions. We propose two terms that can be added to the objective functions in the literature to avoid these solutions. The first one is a hinge pairwise distance loss that avoids the shrinking and collapsed solutions by keeping the average pairwise distance of all the representations greater than a margin. The second one is an orthogonality term that minimizes the correlation between the dimensions of the representations and avoids the partially collapsed solution. We conduct experiments on a variety of tasks on public and real-world datasets. The results show that our approach using only similar pairs outperforms state-of-the-art methods using similar pairs and a large number of dissimilar pairs.
summary: In one-class recommendation systems, the goal is to learn a model from a small set of interacted users and items and then identify the positively-related user-item pairs among a large number of pairs with unknown interactions. Most previous loss functions rely on dissimilar pairs of users and items, which are selected from the ones with unknown interactions, to obtain better prediction performance. This strategy introduces several challenges such as increasing training time and hurting the performance by picking "similar pairs with the unknown interactions" as dissimilar pairs. In this paper, the goal is to only use the similar set to train the models. We point out three trivial solutions that the models converge to when they are trained only on similar pairs: collapsed, partially collapsed, and shrinking solutions. We propose two terms that can be added to the objective functions in the literature to avoid these solutions. The first one is a hinge pairwise distance loss that avoids the shrinking and collapsed solutions by keeping the average pairwise distance of all the representations greater than a margin. The second one is an orthogonality term that minimizes the correlation between the dimensions of the representations and avoids the partially collapsed solution. We conduct experiments on a variety of tasks on public and real-world datasets. The results show that our approach using only similar pairs outperforms state-of-the-art methods using similar pairs and a large number of dissimilar pairs.
abstract_zh: 在单类推荐系统中，目标是从一小组交互的用户和项目中学习模型，然后在大量交互未知的对中识别正相关的用户-项目对。大多数以前的损失函数依赖于不同的用户和项目对，这些用户和项目是从具有未知交互的用户和项目中选择的，以获得更好的预测性能。该策略引入了一些挑战，例如增加训练时间以及通过选择“具有未知相互作用的相似对”作为不同对来损害性能。在本文中，目标是仅使用相似的集合来训练模型。我们指出了模型仅在相似对上进行训练时会收敛到的三个简单解决方案：折叠解、部分折叠解和收缩解。我们提出了两个可以添加到文献中的目标函数中的项，以避免这些解决方案。第一个是铰链成对距离损失，它通过保持所有表示的平均成对距离大于裕度来避免解决方案的收缩和折叠。第二个是正交项，它最小化表示维度之间的相关性并避免部分崩溃的解决方案。我们在公共和现实数据集上对各种任务进行实验。结果表明，我们仅使用相似对的方法优于使用相似对和大量不相似对的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单类推荐系统的新型损失函数和正交表示方法，旨在仅使用相似用户-物品对进行训练以提升推荐性能。
AI.motivation: 传统单类推荐系统依赖未知交互中的不相似对进行训练，但此策略导致训练时间增加和性能下降。本文旨在仅使用相似对训练模型并避免模型退化问题。
AI.method: 提出两种改进项：1) 铰链成对距离损失（保持表示的平均距离大于阈值以避免收缩和坍塌）；2) 正交性项（最小化表示维度间的相关性以避免部分坍塌）。
AI.result: 在多个公开和真实数据集上的实验表明，仅使用相似对的本文方法优于现有使用相似对和大量不相似对的方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过引入铰链损失和正交性约束，有效避免了模型退化问题，在仅使用相似对的情况下实现了更优的推荐性能。

search_text: One-class Recommendation Systems with the Hinge Pairwise Distance Loss and Orthogonal Representations 具有铰链成对距离损失和正交表示的一类推荐系统 In one-class recommendation systems, the goal is to learn a model from a small set of interacted users and items and then identify the positively-related user-item pairs among a large number of pairs with unknown interactions. Most previous loss functions rely on dissimilar pairs of users and items, which are selected from the ones with unknown interactions, to obtain better prediction performance. This strategy introduces several challenges such as increasing training time and hurting the performance by picking "similar pairs with the unknown interactions" as dissimilar pairs. In this paper, the goal is to only use the similar set to train the models. We point out three trivial solutions that the models converge to when they are trained only on similar pairs: collapsed, partially collapsed, and shrinking solutions. We propose two terms that can be added to the objective functions in the literature to avoid these solutions. The first one is a hinge pairwise distance loss that avoids the shrinking and collapsed solutions by keeping the average pairwise distance of all the representations greater than a margin. The second one is an orthogonality term that minimizes the correlation between the dimensions of the representations and avoids the partially collapsed solution. We conduct experiments on a variety of tasks on public and real-world datasets. The results show that our approach using only similar pairs outperforms state-of-the-art methods using similar pairs and a large number of dissimilar pairs. 在单类推荐系统中，目标是从一小组交互的用户和项目中学习模型，然后在大量交互未知的对中识别正相关的用户-项目对。大多数以前的损失函数依赖于不同的用户和项目对，这些用户和项目是从具有未知交互的用户和项目中选择的，以获得更好的预测性能。该策略引入了一些挑战，例如增加训练时间以及通过选择“具有未知相互作用的相似对”作为不同对来损害性能。在本文中，目标是仅使用相似的集合来训练模型。我们指出了模型仅在相似对上进行训练时会收敛到的三个简单解决方案：折叠解、部分折叠解和收缩解。我们提出了两个可以添加到文献中的目标函数中的项，以避免这些解决方案。第一个是铰链成对距离损失，它通过保持所有表示的平均成对距离大于裕度来避免解决方案的收缩和折叠。第二个是正交项，它最小化表示维度之间的相关性并避免部分崩溃的解决方案。我们在公共和现实数据集上对各种任务进行实验。结果表明，我们仅使用相似对的方法优于使用相似对和大量不相似对的最先进方法。 本文提出了一种基于单类推荐系统的新型损失函数和正交表示方法，旨在仅使用相似用户-物品对进行训练以提升推荐性能。 Ramin Raziperchikolaei,Young-joo Chung cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Yuzuru Nakamura,Yasunori Ishii,Yuki Maruyama,Takayoshi Yamashita
title: Few-shot Adaptive Object Detection with Cross-Domain CutMix
title_zh: 使用跨域 CutMix 进行少样本自适应目标检测
comment: Yuzuru Nakamura and Yasunori Ishii are equal contribution
comments: Yuzuru Nakamura and Yasunori Ishii are equal contribution
abstract: In object detection, data amount and cost are a trade-off, and collecting a large amount of data in a specific domain is labor intensive. Therefore, existing large-scale datasets are used for pre-training. However, conventional transfer learning and domain adaptation cannot bridge the domain gap when the target domain differs significantly from the source domain. We propose a data synthesis method that can solve the large domain gap problem. In this method, a part of the target image is pasted onto the source image, and the position of the pasted region is aligned by utilizing the information of the object bounding box. In addition, we introduce adversarial learning to discriminate whether the original or the pasted regions. The proposed method trains on a large number of source images and a few target domain images. The proposed method achieves higher accuracy than conventional methods in a very different domain problem setting, where RGB images are the source domain, and thermal infrared images are the target domain. Similarly, the proposed method achieves higher accuracy in the cases of simulation images to real images.
summary: In object detection, data amount and cost are a trade-off, and collecting a large amount of data in a specific domain is labor intensive. Therefore, existing large-scale datasets are used for pre-training. However, conventional transfer learning and domain adaptation cannot bridge the domain gap when the target domain differs significantly from the source domain. We propose a data synthesis method that can solve the large domain gap problem. In this method, a part of the target image is pasted onto the source image, and the position of the pasted region is aligned by utilizing the information of the object bounding box. In addition, we introduce adversarial learning to discriminate whether the original or the pasted regions. The proposed method trains on a large number of source images and a few target domain images. The proposed method achieves higher accuracy than conventional methods in a very different domain problem setting, where RGB images are the source domain, and thermal infrared images are the target domain. Similarly, the proposed method achieves higher accuracy in the cases of simulation images to real images.
abstract_zh: 在物体检测中，数据量和成本是一个权衡，收集特定领域的大量数据是劳动密集型的。因此，使用现有的大规模数据集进行预训练。然而，当目标域与源域显着不同时，传统的迁移学习和域适应无法弥合域差距。我们提出了一种可以解决大域间隙问题的数据合成方法。该方法将目标图像的一部分粘贴到源图像上，并利用对象边界框的信息来对齐粘贴区域的位置。此外，我们引入对抗性学习来区分原始区域还是粘贴区域。该方法对大量源图像和少量目标域图像进行训练。在非常不同的域问题设置中，所提出的方法比传统方法实现了更高的精度，其中RGB图像是源域，热红外图像是目标域。同样，所提出的方法在模拟图像到真实图像的情况下实现了更高的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨域CutMix数据合成方法，解决目标检测中源域与目标域差异大的问题，尤其在目标域数据稀缺的情况下提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统迁移学习和领域自适应难以应对显著的领域差异，而目标域数据采集成本高，需开发无需大量目标域数据的自适应方法。
AI.method: 通过将目标域图像部分粘贴到源域图像并利用边界框对齐位置，结合对抗学习区分原始与粘贴区域，仅需少量目标域数据进行训练。
AI.result: 在RGB到热红外图像及仿真到真实图像的跨域场景中，该方法准确率均优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 跨域CutMix有效缓解了领域差异问题，为少样本目标检测提供了可行的自适应解决方案。

authors_text: Teo Susnjak
title: A Prescriptive Learning Analytics Framework: Beyond Predictive Modelling and onto Explainable AI with Prescriptive Analytics and ChatGPT
title_zh: 规范性学习分析框架：超越预测建模并通过规范性分析和 ChatGPT 实现可解释的人工智能
comment: revision of the original paper to include ChatGPT integration
comments: revision of the original paper to include ChatGPT integration
abstract: A significant body of recent research in the field of Learning Analytics has focused on leveraging machine learning approaches for predicting at-risk students in order to initiate timely interventions and thereby elevate retention and completion rates. The overarching feature of the majority of these research studies has been on the science of prediction only. The component of predictive analytics concerned with interpreting the internals of the models and explaining their predictions for individual cases to stakeholders has largely been neglected. Additionally, works that attempt to employ data-driven prescriptive analytics to automatically generate evidence-based remedial advice for at-risk learners are in their infancy. eXplainable AI is a field that has recently emerged providing cutting-edge tools which support transparent predictive analytics and techniques for generating tailored advice for at-risk students. This study proposes a novel framework that unifies both transparent machine learning as well as techniques for enabling prescriptive analytics, while integrating the latest advances in large language models. This work practically demonstrates the proposed framework using predictive models for identifying at-risk learners of programme non-completion. The study then further demonstrates how predictive modelling can be augmented with prescriptive analytics on two case studies in order to generate human-readable prescriptive feedback for those who are at risk using ChatGPT.
summary: A significant body of recent research in the field of Learning Analytics has focused on leveraging machine learning approaches for predicting at-risk students in order to initiate timely interventions and thereby elevate retention and completion rates. The overarching feature of the majority of these research studies has been on the science of prediction only. The component of predictive analytics concerned with interpreting the internals of the models and explaining their predictions for individual cases to stakeholders has largely been neglected. Additionally, works that attempt to employ data-driven prescriptive analytics to automatically generate evidence-based remedial advice for at-risk learners are in their infancy. eXplainable AI is a field that has recently emerged providing cutting-edge tools which support transparent predictive analytics and techniques for generating tailored advice for at-risk students. This study proposes a novel framework that unifies both transparent machine learning as well as techniques for enabling prescriptive analytics, while integrating the latest advances in large language models. This work practically demonstrates the proposed framework using predictive models for identifying at-risk learners of programme non-completion. The study then further demonstrates how predictive modelling can be augmented with prescriptive analytics on two case studies in order to generate human-readable prescriptive feedback for those who are at risk using ChatGPT.
abstract_zh: 学习分析领域最近的大量研究重点是利用机器学习方法来预测有风险的学生，以便及时采取干预措施，从而提高保留率和完成率。大多数这些研究的首要特征只是关于预测科学。预测分析中涉及解释模型内部结构并向利益相关者解释对个别案例的预测的部分在很大程度上被忽视了。此外，尝试采用数据驱动的规范性分析来自动为高危学习者生成基于证据的补救建议的工作还处于起步阶段。 eXplainable AI 是最近兴起的一个领域，提供支持透明预测分析的尖端工具和为高危学生生成量身定制建议的技术。这项研究提出了一种新颖的框架，它统一了透明的机器学习和支持规范分析的技术，同时集成了大型语言模型的最新进展。这项工作实际证明了所提出的框架，使用预测模型来识别有计划未完成风险的学习者。然后，该研究进一步展示了如何通过两个案例研究的规范性分析来增强预测模型，以便为那些使用 ChatGPT 面临风险的人生成人类可读的规范性反馈。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合透明机器学习与处方分析的新框架，利用ChatGPT生成可解释的个性化学习建议，以提升教育分析效果。
AI.motivation: 现有学习分析研究过度依赖预测模型而忽视模型可解释性与处方建议，导致干预措施缺乏针对性和透明度。
AI.method: 整合可解释AI技术与处方分析方法，结合ChatGPT大语言模型构建框架，并通过两个案例验证预测模型与处方反馈的协同效果。
AI.result: 成功实现风险学生识别与生成可读性处方反馈，验证了框架在提升教育干预精准度方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为学习分析提供了预测-解释-处方一体化的解决方案，推动教育数据应用向更智能、更透明的方向发展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合透明机器学习与处方分析的新框架，利用ChatGPT生成可解释的个性化学习建议，以提升教育分析效果。
ai_content.motivation: 现有学习分析研究过度依赖预测模型而忽视模型可解释性与处方建议，导致干预措施缺乏针对性和透明度。
ai_content.method: 整合可解释AI技术与处方分析方法，结合ChatGPT大语言模型构建框架，并通过两个案例验证预测模型与处方反馈的协同效果。
ai_content.result: 成功实现风险学生识别与生成可读性处方反馈，验证了框架在提升教育干预精准度方面的有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该框架为学习分析提供了预测-解释-处方一体化的解决方案，推动教育数据应用向更智能、更透明的方向发展。

search_text: A Prescriptive Learning Analytics Framework: Beyond Predictive Modelling and onto Explainable AI with Prescriptive Analytics and ChatGPT 规范性学习分析框架：超越预测建模并通过规范性分析和 ChatGPT 实现可解释的人工智能 A significant body of recent research in the field of Learning Analytics has focused on leveraging machine learning approaches for predicting at-risk students in order to initiate timely interventions and thereby elevate retention and completion rates. The overarching feature of the majority of these research studies has been on the science of prediction only. The component of predictive analytics concerned with interpreting the internals of the models and explaining their predictions for individual cases to stakeholders has largely been neglected. Additionally, works that attempt to employ data-driven prescriptive analytics to automatically generate evidence-based remedial advice for at-risk learners are in their infancy. eXplainable AI is a field that has recently emerged providing cutting-edge tools which support transparent predictive analytics and techniques for generating tailored advice for at-risk students. This study proposes a novel framework that unifies both transparent machine learning as well as techniques for enabling prescriptive analytics, while integrating the latest advances in large language models. This work practically demonstrates the proposed framework using predictive models for identifying at-risk learners of programme non-completion. The study then further demonstrates how predictive modelling can be augmented with prescriptive analytics on two case studies in order to generate human-readable prescriptive feedback for those who are at risk using ChatGPT. 学习分析领域最近的大量研究重点是利用机器学习方法来预测有风险的学生，以便及时采取干预措施，从而提高保留率和完成率。大多数这些研究的首要特征只是关于预测科学。预测分析中涉及解释模型内部结构并向利益相关者解释对个别案例的预测的部分在很大程度上被忽视了。此外，尝试采用数据驱动的规范性分析来自动为高危学习者生成基于证据的补救建议的工作还处于起步阶段。 eXplainable AI 是最近兴起的一个领域，提供支持透明预测分析的尖端工具和为高危学生生成量身定制建议的技术。这项研究提出了一种新颖的框架，它统一了透明的机器学习和支持规范分析的技术，同时集成了大型语言模型的最新进展。这项工作实际证明了所提出的框架，使用预测模型来识别有计划未完成风险的学习者。然后，该研究进一步展示了如何通过两个案例研究的规范性分析来增强预测模型，以便为那些使用 ChatGPT 面临风险的人生成人类可读的规范性反馈。 本文提出了一种结合透明机器学习与处方分析的新框架，利用ChatGPT生成可解释的个性化学习建议，以提升教育分析效果。 Teo Susnjak cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Salar Latifi,Saurav Muralidharan,Michael Garland
title: Efficient Sparsely Activated Transformers
title_zh: 高效稀疏激活变压器
abstract: Transformer-based neural networks have achieved state-of-the-art task performance in a number of machine learning domains including natural language processing and computer vision. To further improve their accuracy, recent work has explored the integration of dynamic behavior into these networks in the form of mixture-of-expert (MoE) layers. In this paper, we explore the introduction of MoE layers to optimize a different metric: inference latency. We introduce a novel system named PLANER that takes an existing Transformer-based network and a user-defined latency target and produces an optimized, sparsely-activated version of the original network that tries to meet the latency target while maintaining baseline accuracy. We evaluate PLANER on two real-world language modeling tasks using the Transformer-XL network and achieve inference latency reductions of over 2x at iso-accuracy.
summary: Transformer-based neural networks have achieved state-of-the-art task performance in a number of machine learning domains including natural language processing and computer vision. To further improve their accuracy, recent work has explored the integration of dynamic behavior into these networks in the form of mixture-of-expert (MoE) layers. In this paper, we explore the introduction of MoE layers to optimize a different metric: inference latency. We introduce a novel system named PLANER that takes an existing Transformer-based network and a user-defined latency target and produces an optimized, sparsely-activated version of the original network that tries to meet the latency target while maintaining baseline accuracy. We evaluate PLANER on two real-world language modeling tasks using the Transformer-XL network and achieve inference latency reductions of over 2x at iso-accuracy.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的神经网络已经在自然语言处理和计算机视觉等许多机器学习领域实现了最先进的任务性能。为了进一步提高其准确性，最近的工作探索了以专家混合（MoE）层的形式将动态行为集成到这些网络中。在本文中，我们探索引入 MoE 层来优化不同的指标：推理延迟。我们引入了一种名为 PLANER 的新颖系统，该系统采用现有的基于 Transformer 的网络和用户定义的延迟目标，并生成原始网络的优化、稀疏激活版本，该版本试图在保持基线精度的同时满足延迟目标。我们使用 Transformer-XL 网络在两个现实世界语言建模任务上评估 PLANER，并在等精度下实现推理延迟减少超过 2 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PLANER的系统，通过引入稀疏激活机制优化Transformer模型的推理延迟，同时保持模型准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在推理速度上存在瓶颈，而传统方法侧重于提升准确率而非延迟优化，需探索更高效的模型加速方案。
AI.method: 提出PLANER系统，根据用户设定的延迟目标，对现有Transformer网络进行稀疏化改造，通过动态调整MoE层的激活策略来降低推理延迟。
AI.result: 在Transformer-XL网络上的实验表明，PLANER在保持原有准确率的前提下，成功将推理延迟降低了超过2倍。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏激活机制能有效平衡Transformer模型的推理速度与准确性，为实际部署提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Vishnu Nair,Shao-en Ma,Ricardo E. Gonzalez Penuela,Yicheng He,Karen Lin,Mason Hayes,Hannah Huddleston,Matthew Donnelly,Brian A. Smith
title: Uncovering Visually Impaired Gamers' Preferences for Spatial Awareness Tools Within Video Games
title_zh: 揭示视障游戏玩家对视频游戏中空间感知工具的偏好
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 24th International ACM SIGACCESS Conference on Computers and Accessibility (ASSETS '22), October 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 24th International ACM SIGACCESS Conference on Computers and Accessibility (ASSETS '22), October 2022
abstract: Sighted players gain spatial awareness within video games through sight and spatial awareness tools (SATs) such as minimaps. Visually impaired players (VIPs), however, must often rely heavily on SATs to gain spatial awareness, especially in complex environments where using rich ambient sound design alone may be insufficient. Researchers have developed many SATs for facilitating spatial awareness within VIPs. Yet this abundance disguises a gap in our understanding about how exactly these approaches assist VIPs in gaining spatial awareness and what their relative merits and limitations are. To address this, we investigate four leading approaches to facilitating spatial awareness for VIPs within a 3D video game context. Our findings uncover new insights into SATs for VIPs within video games, including that VIPs value position and orientation information the most from an SAT; that none of the approaches we investigated convey position and orientation effectively; and that VIPs highly value the ability to customize SATs.
summary: Sighted players gain spatial awareness within video games through sight and spatial awareness tools (SATs) such as minimaps. Visually impaired players (VIPs), however, must often rely heavily on SATs to gain spatial awareness, especially in complex environments where using rich ambient sound design alone may be insufficient. Researchers have developed many SATs for facilitating spatial awareness within VIPs. Yet this abundance disguises a gap in our understanding about how exactly these approaches assist VIPs in gaining spatial awareness and what their relative merits and limitations are. To address this, we investigate four leading approaches to facilitating spatial awareness for VIPs within a 3D video game context. Our findings uncover new insights into SATs for VIPs within video games, including that VIPs value position and orientation information the most from an SAT; that none of the approaches we investigated convey position and orientation effectively; and that VIPs highly value the ability to customize SATs.
abstract_zh: 有视力的玩家可以通过视觉和空间意识工具（SAT）（例如小地图）在视频游戏中获得空间意识。然而，视障玩家 (VIP) 通常必须严重依赖 SAT 来获得空间意识，尤其是在复杂的环境中，仅使用丰富的环境声音设计可能是不够的。研究人员开发了许多 SAT 来促进 VIP 的空间意识。然而，这种丰富性掩盖了我们对这些方法究竟如何帮助 VIP 获得空间意识以及它们的相对优点和局限性的理解上的差距。为了解决这个问题，我们研究了四种主要方法来促进 VIP 在 3D 视频游戏环境中的空间意识。我们的研究结果揭示了视频游戏中 VIP SAT 的新见解，包括 VIP 最看重 SAT 中的位置和方向信息；我们研究的方法都没有有效地传达位置和方向； VIP 高度重视定制 SAT 的能力。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究视觉障碍玩家在3D视频游戏中对空间感知工具（SATs）的偏好，以揭示这些工具如何帮助他们获取空间信息。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有多种空间感知工具帮助视觉障碍玩家（VIPs），但现有研究缺乏对这些工具实际效果及优缺点的系统性理解，需针对性优化设计。
AI.method: 通过实验调查四种主流SAT方法，分析VIPs在复杂游戏环境中的空间感知需求及工具使用反馈。
AI.result: 发现VIPs最重视位置和方向信息，但现有工具均未能有效传递；同时，玩家高度需求工具的自定义功能。
AI.conclusion: 未来需开发更精准传递位置/方向信息的SAT，并提供个性化定制选项以满足视觉障碍玩家的多样化需求。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文研究视觉障碍玩家在3D视频游戏中对空间感知工具（SATs）的偏好，以揭示这些工具如何帮助他们获取空间信息。

authors_text: Zhen Zhang,Ignavier Ng,Dong Gong,Yuhang Liu,Ehsan M Abbasnejad,Mingming Gong,Kun Zhang,Javen Qinfeng Shi
title: Truncated Matrix Power Iteration for Differentiable DAG Learning
title_zh: 用于可微分 DAG 学习的截断矩阵幂迭代
abstract: Recovering underlying Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) structures from observational data is highly challenging due to the combinatorial nature of the DAG-constrained optimization problem. Recently, DAG learning has been cast as a continuous optimization problem by characterizing the DAG constraint as a smooth equality one, generally based on polynomials over adjacency matrices. Existing methods place very small coefficients on high-order polynomial terms for stabilization, since they argue that large coefficients on the higher-order terms are harmful due to numeric exploding. On the contrary, we discover that large coefficients on higher-order terms are beneficial for DAG learning, when the spectral radiuses of the adjacency matrices are small, and that larger coefficients for higher-order terms can approximate the DAG constraints much better than the small counterparts. Based on this, we propose a novel DAG learning method with efficient truncated matrix power iteration to approximate geometric series based DAG constraints. Empirically, our DAG learning method outperforms the previous state-of-the-arts in various settings, often by a factor of $3$ or more in terms of structural Hamming distance.
summary: Recovering underlying Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) structures from observational data is highly challenging due to the combinatorial nature of the DAG-constrained optimization problem. Recently, DAG learning has been cast as a continuous optimization problem by characterizing the DAG constraint as a smooth equality one, generally based on polynomials over adjacency matrices. Existing methods place very small coefficients on high-order polynomial terms for stabilization, since they argue that large coefficients on the higher-order terms are harmful due to numeric exploding. On the contrary, we discover that large coefficients on higher-order terms are beneficial for DAG learning, when the spectral radiuses of the adjacency matrices are small, and that larger coefficients for higher-order terms can approximate the DAG constraints much better than the small counterparts. Based on this, we propose a novel DAG learning method with efficient truncated matrix power iteration to approximate geometric series based DAG constraints. Empirically, our DAG learning method outperforms the previous state-of-the-arts in various settings, often by a factor of $3$ or more in terms of structural Hamming distance.
abstract_zh: 由于 DAG 约束优化问题的组合性质，从观测数据中恢复底层有向无环图 (DAG) 结构非常具有挑战性。最近，通过将 DAG 约束描述为平滑等式约束，通常基于邻接矩阵上的多项式，DAG 学习已被视为一种连续优化问题。现有方法在高阶多项式项上放置非常小的系数以实现稳定，因为它们认为高阶多项式项上的大系数会因数值爆炸而有害。相反，我们发现，当邻接矩阵的谱半径较小时，高阶项上的大系数有利于 DAG 学习，并且高阶项的较大系数可以比较小的对应项更好地逼近 DAG 约束。基于此，我们提出了一种新颖的 DAG 学习方法，该方法具有高效的截断矩阵幂迭代来近似基于 DAG 约束的几何级数。根据经验，我们的 DAG 学习方法在各种设置中都优于以前的最先进技术，在结构汉明距离方面通常高出 3 美元或更多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于截断矩阵幂迭代的可微分DAG学习方法，通过优化高阶多项式系数来提升DAG结构恢复的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有DAG学习方法为避免数值爆炸通常使用小系数处理高阶多项式项，但作者发现当邻接矩阵谱半径较小时，大系数能更精确逼近DAG约束。
AI.method: 设计截断矩阵幂迭代算法，利用几何级数近似DAG约束，通过调整高阶项系数实现更有效的优化。
AI.result: 在多种场景下，该方法在结构汉明距离指标上较现有最优方法提升3倍以上。
AI.conclusion: 大系数高阶项结合截断幂迭代能显著提升DAG学习效果，为连续优化方法提供了新思路。

search_text: Truncated Matrix Power Iteration for Differentiable DAG Learning 用于可微分 DAG 学习的截断矩阵幂迭代 Recovering underlying Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) structures from observational data is highly challenging due to the combinatorial nature of the DAG-constrained optimization problem. Recently, DAG learning has been cast as a continuous optimization problem by characterizing the DAG constraint as a smooth equality one, generally based on polynomials over adjacency matrices. Existing methods place very small coefficients on high-order polynomial terms for stabilization, since they argue that large coefficients on the higher-order terms are harmful due to numeric exploding. On the contrary, we discover that large coefficients on higher-order terms are beneficial for DAG learning, when the spectral radiuses of the adjacency matrices are small, and that larger coefficients for higher-order terms can approximate the DAG constraints much better than the small counterparts. Based on this, we propose a novel DAG learning method with efficient truncated matrix power iteration to approximate geometric series based DAG constraints. Empirically, our DAG learning method outperforms the previous state-of-the-arts in various settings, often by a factor of $3$ or more in terms of structural Hamming distance. 由于 DAG 约束优化问题的组合性质，从观测数据中恢复底层有向无环图 (DAG) 结构非常具有挑战性。最近，通过将 DAG 约束描述为平滑等式约束，通常基于邻接矩阵上的多项式，DAG 学习已被视为一种连续优化问题。现有方法在高阶多项式项上放置非常小的系数以实现稳定，因为它们认为高阶多项式项上的大系数会因数值爆炸而有害。相反，我们发现，当邻接矩阵的谱半径较小时，高阶项上的大系数有利于 DAG 学习，并且高阶项的较大系数可以比较小的对应项更好地逼近 DAG 约束。基于此，我们提出了一种新颖的 DAG 学习方法，该方法具有高效的截断矩阵幂迭代来近似基于 DAG 约束的几何级数。根据经验，我们的 DAG 学习方法在各种设置中都优于以前的最先进技术，在结构汉明距离方面通常高出 3 美元或更多。 本文提出了一种基于截断矩阵幂迭代的可微分DAG学习方法，通过优化高阶多项式系数来提升DAG结构恢复的准确性。 Zhen Zhang,Ignavier Ng,Dong Gong,Yuhang Liu,Ehsan M Abbasnejad,Mingming Gong,Kun Zhang,Javen Qinfeng Shi cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Amin Heyrani Nobari,Akash Srivastava,Dan Gutfreund,Faez Ahmed
title: LINKS: A dataset of a hundred million planar linkage mechanisms for data-driven kinematic design
title_zh: 链接：用于数据驱动的运动学设计的一亿个平面连杆机构的数据集
abstract: In this paper, we introduce LINKS, a dataset of 100 million one degree of freedom planar linkage mechanisms and 1.1 billion coupler curves, which is more than 1000 times larger than any existing database of planar mechanisms and is not limited to specific kinds of mechanisms such as four-bars, six-bars, \etc which are typically what most databases include. LINKS is made up of various components including 100 million mechanisms, the simulation data for each mechanism, normalized paths generated by each mechanism, a curated set of paths, the code used to generate the data and simulate mechanisms, and a live web demo for interactive design of linkage mechanisms. The curated paths are provided as a measure for removing biases in the paths generated by mechanisms that enable a more even design space representation. In this paper, we discuss the details of how we can generate such a large dataset and how we can overcome major issues with such scales. To be able to generate such a large dataset we introduce a new operator to generate 1-DOF mechanism topologies, furthermore, we take many steps to speed up slow simulations of mechanisms by vectorizing our simulations and parallelizing our simulator on a large number of threads, which leads to a simulation 800 times faster than the simple simulation algorithm. This is necessary given on average, 1 out of 500 candidates that are generated are valid~(and all must be simulated to determine their validity), which means billions of simulations must be performed for the generation of this dataset. Then we demonstrate the depth of our dataset through a bi-directional chamfer distance-based shape retrieval study where we show how our dataset can be used directly to find mechanisms that can trace paths very close to desired target paths.
summary: In this paper, we introduce LINKS, a dataset of 100 million one degree of freedom planar linkage mechanisms and 1.1 billion coupler curves, which is more than 1000 times larger than any existing database of planar mechanisms and is not limited to specific kinds of mechanisms such as four-bars, six-bars, \etc which are typically what most databases include. LINKS is made up of various components including 100 million mechanisms, the simulation data for each mechanism, normalized paths generated by each mechanism, a curated set of paths, the code used to generate the data and simulate mechanisms, and a live web demo for interactive design of linkage mechanisms. The curated paths are provided as a measure for removing biases in the paths generated by mechanisms that enable a more even design space representation. In this paper, we discuss the details of how we can generate such a large dataset and how we can overcome major issues with such scales. To be able to generate such a large dataset we introduce a new operator to generate 1-DOF mechanism topologies, furthermore, we take many steps to speed up slow simulations of mechanisms by vectorizing our simulations and parallelizing our simulator on a large number of threads, which leads to a simulation 800 times faster than the simple simulation algorithm. This is necessary given on average, 1 out of 500 candidates that are generated are valid~(and all must be simulated to determine their validity), which means billions of simulations must be performed for the generation of this dataset. Then we demonstrate the depth of our dataset through a bi-directional chamfer distance-based shape retrieval study where we show how our dataset can be used directly to find mechanisms that can trace paths very close to desired target paths.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 LINKS，这是一个包含 1 亿个一自由度平面连杆机构和 11 亿条耦合器曲线的数据集，它比任何现有的平面机构数据库大 1000 倍以上，并且不限于大多数数据库通常包含的特定类型的机构，例如四杆、六杆等。 LINKS 由各种组件组成，包括 1 亿个机制、每个机制的模拟数据、每个机制生成的标准化路径、一组精选路径、用于生成数据和模拟机制的代码以及用于交互设计链接机制的实时网络演示。提供策划的路径作为一种措施，用于消除由实现更均匀的设计空间表示的机制生成的路径中的偏差。在本文中，我们详细讨论了如何生成如此大的数据集以及如何克服如此规模的主要问题。为了能够生成如此大的数据集，我们引入了一个新的算子来生成 1-DOF 机构拓扑，此外，我们采取了许多步骤，通过矢量化我们的模拟并在大量线程上并行化我们的模拟器来加速机构的缓慢模拟，这使得模拟比简单的模拟算法快 800 倍。这是必要的，平均而言，生成的 500 个候选者中有 1 个是有效的~（并且必须对所有候选者进行模拟以确定其有效性），这意味着必须执行数十亿次模拟才能生成此数据集。然后，我们通过基于双向倒角距离的形状检索研究来演示数据集的深度，其中我们展示了如何直接使用我们的数据集来查找可以跟踪非常接近所需目标路径的路径的机制。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了LINKS数据集，包含1亿个单自由度平面连杆机构和11亿条导路曲线，用于数据驱动的运动学设计。
AI.motivation: 现有平面机构数据库规模有限且类型单一，难以支持复杂设计需求，需构建更大规模且多样化的数据集以推动研究。
AI.method: 提出新型机构拓扑生成算子，通过向量化仿真与多线程并行加速（提升800倍效率），并采用曲率筛选消除偏差生成精选路径集。
AI.result: 构建了100M机构与1.1B导路曲线的全球最大数据集，通过双向 chamfer 距离验证可高效检索近似目标路径的机构方案。
AI.conclusion: LINKS数据集为运动学设计提供基础资源，其规模与多样性可推动自动化机构生成、路径优化等领域的突破性研究。

authors_text: Sheng Zhang,Hao Cheng,Jianfeng Gao,Hoifung Poon
title: Optimizing Bi-Encoder for Named Entity Recognition via Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过对比学习优化双编码器以进行命名实体识别
abstract: We present a bi-encoder framework for named entity recognition (NER), which applies contrastive learning to map candidate text spans and entity types into the same vector representation space. Prior work predominantly approaches NER as sequence labeling or span classification. We instead frame NER as a representation learning problem that maximizes the similarity between the vector representations of an entity mention and its type. This makes it easy to handle nested and flat NER alike, and can better leverage noisy self-supervision signals. A major challenge to this bi-encoder formulation for NER lies in separating non-entity spans from entity mentions. Instead of explicitly labeling all non-entity spans as the same class $\texttt{Outside}$ ($\texttt{O}$) as in most prior methods, we introduce a novel dynamic thresholding loss. Experiments show that our method performs well in both supervised and distantly supervised settings, for nested and flat NER alike, establishing new state of the art across standard datasets in the general domain (e.g., ACE2004, ACE2005) and high-value verticals such as biomedicine (e.g., GENIA, NCBI, BC5CDR, JNLPBA). We release the code at github.com/microsoft/binder.
summary: We present a bi-encoder framework for named entity recognition (NER), which applies contrastive learning to map candidate text spans and entity types into the same vector representation space. Prior work predominantly approaches NER as sequence labeling or span classification. We instead frame NER as a representation learning problem that maximizes the similarity between the vector representations of an entity mention and its type. This makes it easy to handle nested and flat NER alike, and can better leverage noisy self-supervision signals. A major challenge to this bi-encoder formulation for NER lies in separating non-entity spans from entity mentions. Instead of explicitly labeling all non-entity spans as the same class $\texttt{Outside}$ ($\texttt{O}$) as in most prior methods, we introduce a novel dynamic thresholding loss. Experiments show that our method performs well in both supervised and distantly supervised settings, for nested and flat NER alike, establishing new state of the art across standard datasets in the general domain (e.g., ACE2004, ACE2005) and high-value verticals such as biomedicine (e.g., GENIA, NCBI, BC5CDR, JNLPBA). We release the code at github.com/microsoft/binder.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个用于命名实体识别（NER）的双编码器框架，它应用对比学习将候选文本范围和实体类型映射到相同的向量表示空间中。先前的工作主要将 NER 作为序列标记或跨度分类。相反，我们将 NER 构建为一个表示学习问题，最大化实体提及的向量表示与其类型之间的相似性。这使得处理嵌套和平面 NER 变得很容易，并且可以更好地利用嘈杂的自监督信号。这种 NER 的双编码器公式的一个主要挑战在于将非实体跨度与实体提及分开。我们引入了一种新颖的动态阈值损失，而不是像大多数现有方法那样将所有非实体跨度显式标记为同一类 $\texttt{Outside}$ ($\texttt{O}$)。实验表明，我们的方法在监督和远程监督设置中都表现良好，对于嵌套和平面 NER 都适用，在一般领域（例如 ACE2004、ACE2005）和高价值垂直领域（例如生物医学（例如 GENIA、NCBI、BC5CDR、JNLPBA））的标准数据集上建立了新的最先进技术。我们在 github.com/microsoft/binder 发布了代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的双编码器框架，用于命名实体识别（NER），通过将候选文本片段和实体类型映射到同一向量空间，提升NER性能。
AI.motivation: 传统NER方法多采用序列标注或跨度分类，难以有效处理嵌套实体和利用噪声自监督信号。本文旨在通过表示学习最大化实体提及与类型向量的相似性，提升模型对嵌套和非嵌套实体的处理能力。
AI.method: 采用对比学习将实体提及与类型映射到共享向量空间，并引入动态阈值损失函数，无需显式标记非实体片段即可分离噪声，从而优化双编码器框架。
AI.result: 在监督和远监督场景下，该方法在ACE2004/ACE2005等通用领域及GENIA/NCBI等生物医学数据集上均达到新SOTA，且支持嵌套与非嵌套NER。
AI.conclusion: 动态阈值损失有效解决了非实体片段分离问题，双编码器框架在多种NER任务中表现优异，为未来研究提供了新方向。

search_text: Optimizing Bi-Encoder for Named Entity Recognition via Contrastive Learning 通过对比学习优化双编码器以进行命名实体识别 We present a bi-encoder framework for named entity recognition (NER), which applies contrastive learning to map candidate text spans and entity types into the same vector representation space. Prior work predominantly approaches NER as sequence labeling or span classification. We instead frame NER as a representation learning problem that maximizes the similarity between the vector representations of an entity mention and its type. This makes it easy to handle nested and flat NER alike, and can better leverage noisy self-supervision signals. A major challenge to this bi-encoder formulation for NER lies in separating non-entity spans from entity mentions. Instead of explicitly labeling all non-entity spans as the same class $\texttt{Outside}$ ($\texttt{O}$) as in most prior methods, we introduce a novel dynamic thresholding loss. Experiments show that our method performs well in both supervised and distantly supervised settings, for nested and flat NER alike, establishing new state of the art across standard datasets in the general domain (e.g., ACE2004, ACE2005) and high-value verticals such as biomedicine (e.g., GENIA, NCBI, BC5CDR, JNLPBA). We release the code at github.com/microsoft/binder. 我们提出了一个用于命名实体识别（NER）的双编码器框架，它应用对比学习将候选文本范围和实体类型映射到相同的向量表示空间中。先前的工作主要将 NER 作为序列标记或跨度分类。相反，我们将 NER 构建为一个表示学习问题，最大化实体提及的向量表示与其类型之间的相似性。这使得处理嵌套和平面 NER 变得很容易，并且可以更好地利用嘈杂的自监督信号。这种 NER 的双编码器公式的一个主要挑战在于将非实体跨度与实体提及分开。我们引入了一种新颖的动态阈值损失，而不是像大多数现有方法那样将所有非实体跨度显式标记为同一类 $\texttt{Outside}$ ($\texttt{O}$)。实验表明，我们的方法在监督和远程监督设置中都表现良好，对于嵌套和平面 NER 都适用，在一般领域（例如 ACE2004、ACE2005）和高价值垂直领域（例如生物医学（例如 GENIA、NCBI、BC5CDR、JNLPBA））的标准数据集上建立了新的最先进技术。我们在 github.com/microsoft/binder 发布了代码。 本文提出一种基于对比学习的双编码器框架，用于命名实体识别（NER），通过将候选文本片段和实体类型映射到同一向量空间，提升NER性能。 Sheng Zhang,Hao Cheng,Jianfeng Gao,Hoifung Poon cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Alexander Groleau,Kok Wei Chee,Stefan Larson,Samay Maini,Jonathan Boarman
title: Augraphy: A Data Augmentation Library for Document Images
title_zh: Augraphy：文档图像的数据增强库
abstract: This paper introduces Augraphy, a Python library for constructing data augmentation pipelines which produce distortions commonly seen in real-world document image datasets. Augraphy stands apart from other data augmentation tools by providing many different strategies to produce augmented versions of clean document images that appear as if they have been altered by standard office operations, such as printing, scanning, and faxing through old or dirty machines, degradation of ink over time, and handwritten markings. This paper discusses the Augraphy tool, and shows how it can be used both as a data augmentation tool for producing diverse training data for tasks such as document denoising, and also for generating challenging test data to evaluate model robustness on document image modeling tasks.
summary: This paper introduces Augraphy, a Python library for constructing data augmentation pipelines which produce distortions commonly seen in real-world document image datasets. Augraphy stands apart from other data augmentation tools by providing many different strategies to produce augmented versions of clean document images that appear as if they have been altered by standard office operations, such as printing, scanning, and faxing through old or dirty machines, degradation of ink over time, and handwritten markings. This paper discusses the Augraphy tool, and shows how it can be used both as a data augmentation tool for producing diverse training data for tasks such as document denoising, and also for generating challenging test data to evaluate model robustness on document image modeling tasks.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Augraphy，这是一个用于构建数据增强管道的 Python 库，该管道会产生现实世界文档图像数据集中常见的失真。 Augraphy 与其他数据增强工具的不同之处在于，它提供了许多不同的策略来生成干净文档图像的增强版本，这些图像看起来好像已被标准办公操作（例如通过旧或脏机器打印、扫描和传真、墨水随着时间的推移退化以及手写标记）更改过。本文讨论了 Augraphy 工具，并展示了如何将其用作数据增强工具，为文档去噪等任务生成各种训练数据，以及生成具有挑战性的测试数据以评估文档图像建模任务的模型鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Augraphy的Python库，用于生成具有真实世界文档图像数据集常见失真的数据增强管道。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强工具难以模拟文档图像在打印、扫描、传真等办公操作中产生的复杂失真，导致模型训练数据不足且测试鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 开发包含多种策略的Python库，通过模拟老旧设备打印/扫描、油墨退化、手写标记等效果生成增强数据。
AI.result: 构建了可生成多样化训练数据和挑战性测试数据的工具，适用于文档去噪等任务的模型评估。
AI.conclusion: Augraphy为文档图像建模任务提供了有效的真实istic数据增强方案，能提升模型鲁棒性和泛化能力。

authors_text: James A. Michaelov,Benjamin K. Bergen
title: Do language models make human-like predictions about the coreferents of Italian anaphoric zero pronouns?
title_zh: 语言模型是否可以对意大利语回指零代词的共指词做出类似人类的预测？
abstract: Some languages allow arguments to be omitted in certain contexts. Yet human language comprehenders reliably infer the intended referents of these zero pronouns, in part because they construct expectations about which referents are more likely. We ask whether Neural Language Models also extract the same expectations. We test whether 12 contemporary language models display expectations that reflect human behavior when exposed to sentences with zero pronouns from five behavioral experiments conducted in Italian by Carminati (2005). We find that three models - XGLM 2.9B, 4.5B, and 7.5B - capture the human behavior from all the experiments, with others successfully modeling some of the results. This result suggests that human expectations about coreference can be derived from exposure to language, and also indicates features of language models that allow them to better reflect human behavior.
summary: Some languages allow arguments to be omitted in certain contexts. Yet human language comprehenders reliably infer the intended referents of these zero pronouns, in part because they construct expectations about which referents are more likely. We ask whether Neural Language Models also extract the same expectations. We test whether 12 contemporary language models display expectations that reflect human behavior when exposed to sentences with zero pronouns from five behavioral experiments conducted in Italian by Carminati (2005). We find that three models - XGLM 2.9B, 4.5B, and 7.5B - capture the human behavior from all the experiments, with others successfully modeling some of the results. This result suggests that human expectations about coreference can be derived from exposure to language, and also indicates features of language models that allow them to better reflect human behavior.
abstract_zh: 某些语言允许在某些上下文中省略参数。然而，人类语言理解者能够可靠地推断出这些零代词的预期所指对象，部分原因是他们构建了关于哪些所指对象更有可能的期望。我们询问神经语言模型是否也能提取相同的期望。我们通过 Carminati（2005）用意大利语进行的五项行为实验来测试 12 种当代语言模型在接触到零代词的句子时是否表现出反映人类行为的期望。我们发现三个模型 - XGLM 2.9B、4.5B 和 7.5B - 从所有实验中捕获了人类行为，其他模型成功地对一些结果进行了建模。这一结果表明，人类对共指的期望可以源自对语言的接触，并且还表明了语言模型的特征，使它们能够更好地反映人类行为。

AI.tldr: 研究语言模型是否能像人类一样预测意大利语中零代词的共指对象。
AI.motivation: 探讨人类通过语言暴露形成的共指预期是否可被语言模型捕捉，并分析模型特性与人类行为的关联。
AI.method: 测试12个语言模型在五个意大利语实验中的表现，使用Carminati（2005）的实验数据验证模型预测与人类行为的一致性。
AI.result: XGLM 2.9B、4.5B和7.5B模型完全复现人类行为，其他模型部分符合实验结果。
AI.conclusion: 人类共指预期可源于语言暴露，且特定模型结构使其更贴近人类认知模式。

conclusion: 人类共指预期可源于语言暴露，且特定模型结构使其更贴近人类认知模式。
search_text: Do language models make human-like predictions about the coreferents of Italian anaphoric zero pronouns? 语言模型是否可以对意大利语回指零代词的共指词做出类似人类的预测？ Some languages allow arguments to be omitted in certain contexts. Yet human language comprehenders reliably infer the intended referents of these zero pronouns, in part because they construct expectations about which referents are more likely. We ask whether Neural Language Models also extract the same expectations. We test whether 12 contemporary language models display expectations that reflect human behavior when exposed to sentences with zero pronouns from five behavioral experiments conducted in Italian by Carminati (2005). We find that three models - XGLM 2.9B, 4.5B, and 7.5B - capture the human behavior from all the experiments, with others successfully modeling some of the results. This result suggests that human expectations about coreference can be derived from exposure to language, and also indicates features of language models that allow them to better reflect human behavior. 某些语言允许在某些上下文中省略参数。然而，人类语言理解者能够可靠地推断出这些零代词的预期所指对象，部分原因是他们构建了关于哪些所指对象更有可能的期望。我们询问神经语言模型是否也能提取相同的期望。我们通过 Carminati（2005）用意大利语进行的五项行为实验来测试 12 种当代语言模型在接触到零代词的句子时是否表现出反映人类行为的期望。我们发现三个模型 - XGLM 2.9B、4.5B 和 7.5B - 从所有实验中捕获了人类行为，其他模型成功地对一些结果进行了建模。这一结果表明，人类对共指的期望可以源自对语言的接触，并且还表明了语言模型的特征，使它们能够更好地反映人类行为。 研究语言模型是否能像人类一样预测意大利语中零代词的共指对象。 James A. Michaelov,Benjamin K. Bergen cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.IT,cs.LG

authors_text: Peng Yin,Abulikemu Abuduweili,Shiqi Zhao,Changliu Liu,Sebastian Scherer
title: BioSLAM: A Bio-inspired Lifelong Memory System for General Place Recognition
title_zh: BioSLAM：一种用于一般地点识别的仿生终身记忆系统
comment: 19 pages, 18 figures, submitted to IEEE T-RO
comments: 19 pages, 18 figures, submitted to IEEE T-RO
abstract: We present BioSLAM, a lifelong SLAM framework for learning various new appearances incrementally and maintaining accurate place recognition for previously visited areas. Unlike humans, artificial neural networks suffer from catastrophic forgetting and may forget the previously visited areas when trained with new arrivals. For humans, researchers discover that there exists a memory replay mechanism in the brain to keep the neuron active for previous events. Inspired by this discovery, BioSLAM designs a gated generative replay to control the robot's learning behavior based on the feedback rewards. Specifically, BioSLAM provides a novel dual-memory mechanism for maintenance: 1) a dynamic memory to efficiently learn new observations and 2) a static memory to balance new-old knowledge. When combined with a visual-/LiDAR- based SLAM system, the complete processing pipeline can help the agent incrementally update the place recognition ability, robust to the increasing complexity of long-term place recognition. We demonstrate BioSLAM in two incremental SLAM scenarios. In the first scenario, a LiDAR-based agent continuously travels through a city-scale environment with a 120km trajectory and encounters different types of 3D geometries (open streets, residential areas, commercial buildings). We show that BioSLAM can incrementally update the agent's place recognition ability and outperform the state-of-the-art incremental approach, Generative Replay, by 24%. In the second scenario, a LiDAR-vision-based agent repeatedly travels through a campus-scale area on a 4.5km trajectory. BioSLAM can guarantee the place recognition accuracy to outperform 15\% over the state-of-the-art approaches under different appearances. To our knowledge, BioSLAM is the first memory-enhanced lifelong SLAM system to help incremental place recognition in long-term navigation tasks.

When combined with a visual-/LiDAR- based SLAM system, the complete processing pipeline can help the agent incrementally update the place recognition ability, robust to the increasing complexity of long-term place recognition. In the first scenario, a LiDAR-based agent continuously travels through a city-scale environment with a 120km trajectory and encounters different types of 3D geometries (open streets, residential areas, commercial buildings). We show that BioSLAM can incrementally update the agent's place recognition ability and outperform the state-of-the-art incremental approach, Generative Replay, by 24%. abstract_zh: 我们提出了 BioSLAM，这是一个终身 SLAM 框架，用于逐步学习各种新外观并保持对先前访问过的区域的准确位置识别。与人类不同，人工神经网络会遭受灾难性遗忘，并且在接受新来者的训练时可能会忘记以前访问过的区域。对于人类来说，研究人员发现大脑中存在一种记忆重放机制，可以使神经元对之前的事件保持活跃。受这一发现的启发，BioSLAM 设计了门控生成重放，根据反馈奖励来控制机器人的学习行为。具体来说，BioSLAM 提供了一种新颖的双内存维护机制：1）动态内存可有效学习新观察结果，2）静态内存可平衡新旧知识。当与基于视觉/激光雷达的 SLAM 系统相结合时，完整的处理流程可以帮助代理增量更新地点识别能力，从而对长期地点识别日益增加的复杂性具有鲁棒性。我们在两个增量 SLAM 场景中演示了 BioSLAM。在第一个场景中，基于 LiDAR 的智能体以 120 公里的轨迹连续穿过城市规模的环境，并遇到不同类型的 3D 几何图形（开放街道、住宅区、商业建筑）。我们证明 BioSLAM 可以增量更新智能体的位置识别能力，并且比最先进的增量方法（生成重放）性能提高 24%。在第二种场景中，基于 LiDAR 视觉的智能体以 4.5 公里的轨迹反复穿过校园规模的区域。 BioSLAM 可以保证不同外观下的位置识别精度比最先进的方法高出 15%。据我们所知，BioSLAM 是第一个记忆增强型终身 SLAM 系统，有助于在长期导航任务中实现增量位置识别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BioSLAM，一种受生物启发的终身记忆系统，用于增量学习新场景外观并保持对已访问区域的准确位置识别。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络在学习新数据时易发生灾难性遗忘，无法保留历史知识，而人类通过记忆回放机制维持记忆。受此启发，本文旨在解决SLAM系统在长期导航中位置识别能力退化的问题。
AI.method: 设计门控生成式回放机制与双记忆系统：动态记忆用于高效学习新观测，静态记忆用于平衡新旧知识，并结合视觉/LiDAR SLAM系统构建增量更新流程。
AI.result: 在120km城市规模场景中，BioSLAM较现有方法提升24%；在4.5km校园场景中，准确率超出15%，且首次实现长期导航任务中记忆增强的终身SLAM。
AI.conclusion: BioSLAM通过生物启发的记忆机制有效缓解灾难性遗忘，显著提升长期位置识别精度，为终身SLAM系统提供新范式。
