authors_text: Soufiane Belharbi,Ismail Ben Ayed,Luke McCaffrey,Eric Granger
title: TCAM: Temporal Class Activation Maps for Object Localization in Weakly-Labeled Unconstrained Videos
title_zh: TCAM：弱标记无约束视频中对象定位的时间类激活图
abstract: Weakly supervised video object localization (WSVOL) allows locating object in videos using only global video tags such as object class. State-of-art methods rely on multiple independent stages, where initial spatio-temporal proposals are generated using visual and motion cues, then prominent objects are identified and refined. Localization is done by solving an optimization problem over one or more videos, and video tags are typically used for video clustering. This requires a model per-video or per-class making for costly inference. Moreover, localized regions are not necessary discriminant because of unsupervised motion methods like optical flow, or because video tags are discarded from optimization. In this paper, we leverage the successful class activation mapping (CAM) methods, designed for WSOL based on still images. A new Temporal CAM (TCAM) method is introduced to train a discriminant deep learning (DL) model to exploit spatio-temporal information in videos, using an aggregation mechanism, called CAM-Temporal Max Pooling (CAM-TMP), over consecutive CAMs. In particular, activations of regions of interest (ROIs) are collected from CAMs produced by a pretrained CNN classifier to build pixel-wise pseudo-labels for training the DL model. In addition, a global unsupervised size constraint, and local constraint such as CRF are used to yield more accurate CAMs. Inference over single independent frames allows parallel processing of a clip of frames, and real-time localization. Extensive experiments on two challenging YouTube-Objects datasets for unconstrained videos, indicate that CAM methods (trained on independent frames) can yield decent localization accuracy. Our proposed TCAM method achieves a new state-of-art in WSVOL accuracy, and visual results suggest that it can be adapted for subsequent tasks like visual object tracking and detection. Code is publicly available.
summary: Weakly supervised video object localization (WSVOL) allows locating object in videos using only global video tags such as object class. State-of-art methods rely on multiple independent stages, where initial spatio-temporal proposals are generated using visual and motion cues, then prominent objects are identified and refined. Localization is done by solving an optimization problem over one or more videos, and video tags are typically used for video clustering. This requires a model per-video or per-class making for costly inference. Moreover, localized regions are not necessary discriminant because of unsupervised motion methods like optical flow, or because video tags are discarded from optimization. In this paper, we leverage the successful class activation mapping (CAM) methods, designed for WSOL based on still images. A new Temporal CAM (TCAM) method is introduced to train a discriminant deep learning (DL) model to exploit spatio-temporal information in videos, using an aggregation mechanism, called CAM-Temporal Max Pooling (CAM-TMP), over consecutive CAMs. In particular, activations of regions of interest (ROIs) are collected from CAMs produced by a pretrained CNN classifier to build pixel-wise pseudo-labels for training the DL model. In addition, a global unsupervised size constraint, and local constraint such as CRF are used to yield more accurate CAMs. Inference over single independent frames allows parallel processing of a clip of frames, and real-time localization. Extensive experiments on two challenging YouTube-Objects datasets for unconstrained videos, indicate that CAM methods (trained on independent frames) can yield decent localization accuracy. Our proposed TCAM method achieves a new state-of-art in WSVOL accuracy, and visual results suggest that it can be adapted for subsequent tasks like visual object tracking and detection. Code is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 弱监督视频对象定位（WSVOL）允许仅使用全局视频标签（例如对象类）来定位视频中的对象。最先进的方法依赖于多个独立的阶段，其中使用视觉和运动线索生成初始时空建议，然后识别和细化突出的对象。本地化是通过解决一个或多个视频的优化问题来完成的，视频标签通常用于视频聚类。这需要为每个视频或每个类创建一个模型，以进行昂贵的推理。此外，由于诸如光流之类的无监督运动方法，或者因为视频标签在优化中被丢弃，局部区域不一定具有判别性。在本文中，我们利用了为基于静态图像的 WSOL 设计的成功的类激活映射 (CAM) 方法。引入了一种新的时间 CAM (TCAM) 方法来训练判别式深度学习 (DL) 模型，以在连续 CAM 上使用称为 CAM-时间最大池化 (CAM-TMP) 的聚合机制来利用视频中的时空信息。特别是，从预训练的 CNN 分类器生成的 CAM 中收集感兴趣区域 (ROI) 的激活，以构建用于训练 DL 模型的像素级伪标签。此外，全局无监督尺寸约束和局部约束（例如 CRF）用于产生更准确的 CAM。对单个独立帧的推理允许并行处理帧剪辑和实时定位。对两个具有挑战性的无约束视频 YouTube-Objects 数据集进行的广泛实验表明，CAM 方法（在独立帧上训练）可以产生不错的定位精度。我们提出的 TCAM 方法在 WSVOL 精度方面达到了新的最先进水平，视觉结果表明它可以适用于视觉对象跟踪和检测等后续任务。代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TCAM方法，通过时空信息聚合实现弱标注视频中的目标定位。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖多阶段流程且计算成本高，定位区域缺乏判别性，无法有效利用视频标签和运动信息。
AI.method: 引入CAM-Temporal Max Pooling机制聚合连续帧的类激活图，结合预训练CNN生成伪标签，并通过全局约束和CRF优化提升定位精度。
AI.result: 在YouTube-Objects数据集上达到WSVOL新SOTA，支持实时单帧并行处理，可视化结果适用于跟踪与检测任务。
AI.conclusion: TCAM通过时空特征融合和约束优化显著提升弱标注视频目标定位性能，为后续任务提供有效基础。

tldr: 本文提出TCAM方法，通过时空信息聚合实现弱标注视频中的目标定位。
motivation: 现有方法依赖多阶段流程且计算成本高，定位区域缺乏判别性，无法有效利用视频标签和运动信息。
method: 引入CAM-Temporal Max Pooling机制聚合连续帧的类激活图，结合预训练CNN生成伪标签，并通过全局约束和CRF优化提升定位精度。
result: 在YouTube-Objects数据集上达到WSVOL新SOTA，支持实时单帧并行处理，可视化结果适用于跟踪与检测任务。
conclusion: TCAM通过时空特征融合和约束优化显著提升弱标注视频目标定位性能，为后续任务提供有效基础。
search_text: TCAM: Temporal Class Activation Maps for Object Localization in Weakly-Labeled Unconstrained Videos TCAM：弱标记无约束视频中对象定位的时间类激活图 Weakly supervised video object localization (WSVOL) allows locating object in videos using only global video tags such as object class. State-of-art methods rely on multiple independent stages, where initial spatio-temporal proposals are generated using visual and motion cues, then prominent objects are identified and refined. Localization is done by solving an optimization problem over one or more videos, and video tags are typically used for video clustering. This requires a model per-video or per-class making for costly inference. Moreover, localized regions are not necessary discriminant because of unsupervised motion methods like optical flow, or because video tags are discarded from optimization. In this paper, we leverage the successful class activation mapping (CAM) methods, designed for WSOL based on still images. A new Temporal CAM (TCAM) method is introduced to train a discriminant deep learning (DL) model to exploit spatio-temporal information in videos, using an aggregation mechanism, called CAM-Temporal Max Pooling (CAM-TMP), over consecutive CAMs. In particular, activations of regions of interest (ROIs) are collected from CAMs produced by a pretrained CNN classifier to build pixel-wise pseudo-labels for training the DL model. In addition, a global unsupervised size constraint, and local constraint such as CRF are used to yield more accurate CAMs. Inference over single independent frames allows parallel processing of a clip of frames, and real-time localization. Extensive experiments on two challenging YouTube-Objects datasets for unconstrained videos, indicate that CAM methods (trained on independent frames) can yield decent localization accuracy. Our proposed TCAM method achieves a new state-of-art in WSVOL accuracy, and visual results suggest that it can be adapted for subsequent tasks like visual object tracking and detection. Code is publicly available. 弱监督视频对象定位（WSVOL）允许仅使用全局视频标签（例如对象类）来定位视频中的对象。最先进的方法依赖于多个独立的阶段，其中使用视觉和运动线索生成初始时空建议，然后识别和细化突出的对象。本地化是通过解决一个或多个视频的优化问题来完成的，视频标签通常用于视频聚类。这需要为每个视频或每个类创建一个模型，以进行昂贵的推理。此外，由于诸如光流之类的无监督运动方法，或者因为视频标签在优化中被丢弃，局部区域不一定具有判别性。在本文中，我们利用了为基于静态图像的 WSOL 设计的成功的类激活映射 (CAM) 方法。引入了一种新的时间 CAM (TCAM) 方法来训练判别式深度学习 (DL) 模型，以在连续 CAM 上使用称为 CAM-时间最大池化 (CAM-TMP) 的聚合机制来利用视频中的时空信息。特别是，从预训练的 CNN 分类器生成的 CAM 中收集感兴趣区域 (ROI) 的激活，以构建用于训练 DL 模型的像素级伪标签。此外，全局无监督尺寸约束和局部约束（例如 CRF）用于产生更准确的 CAM。对单个独立帧的推理允许并行处理帧剪辑和实时定位。对两个具有挑战性的无约束视频 YouTube-Objects 数据集进行的广泛实验表明，CAM 方法（在独立帧上训练）可以产生不错的定位精度。我们提出的 TCAM 方法在 WSVOL 精度方面达到了新的最先进水平，视觉结果表明它可以适用于视觉对象跟踪和检测等后续任务。代码是公开的。 本文提出TCAM方法，通过时空信息聚合实现弱标注视频中的目标定位。 Soufiane Belharbi,Ismail Ben Ayed,Luke McCaffrey,Eric Granger cs.CV

authors_text: Jueqi Wang,Derek Berger,Erin Mazerolle,Jean-Alexis Delamer,Jacob Levman
title: Lesion-Specific Prediction with Discriminator-Based Supervised Guided Attention Module Enabled GANs in Multiple Sclerosis
title_zh: 使用基于判别器的监督引导注意力模块进行特定病变预测，使 GAN 在多发性硬化症中发挥作用
abstract: Multiple Sclerosis (MS) is a chronic neurological condition characterized by the development of lesions in the white matter of the brain. T2-fluid attenuated inversion recovery (FLAIR) brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) provides superior visualization and characterization of MS lesions, relative to other MRI modalities. Follow-up brain FLAIR MRI in MS provides helpful information for clinicians towards monitoring disease progression. In this study, we propose a novel modification to generative adversarial networks (GANs) to predict future lesion-specific FLAIR MRI for MS at fixed time intervals. We use supervised guided attention and dilated convolutions in the discriminator, which supports making an informed prediction of whether the generated images are real or not based on attention to the lesion area, which in turn has potential to help improve the generator to predict the lesion area of future examinations more accurately. We compared our method to several baselines and one state-of-art CF-SAGAN model [1]. In conclusion, our results indicate that the proposed method achieves higher accuracy and reduces the standard deviation of the prediction errors in the lesion area compared with other models with similar overall performance.
summary: Multiple Sclerosis (MS) is a chronic neurological condition characterized by the development of lesions in the white matter of the brain. T2-fluid attenuated inversion recovery (FLAIR) brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) provides superior visualization and characterization of MS lesions, relative to other MRI modalities. Follow-up brain FLAIR MRI in MS provides helpful information for clinicians towards monitoring disease progression. In this study, we propose a novel modification to generative adversarial networks (GANs) to predict future lesion-specific FLAIR MRI for MS at fixed time intervals. We use supervised guided attention and dilated convolutions in the discriminator, which supports making an informed prediction of whether the generated images are real or not based on attention to the lesion area, which in turn has potential to help improve the generator to predict the lesion area of future examinations more accurately. We compared our method to several baselines and one state-of-art CF-SAGAN model [1]. In conclusion, our results indicate that the proposed method achieves higher accuracy and reduces the standard deviation of the prediction errors in the lesion area compared with other models with similar overall performance.
abstract_zh: 多发性硬化症 (MS) 是一种慢性神经系统疾病，其特征是大脑白质出现病变。相对于其他 MRI 模式，T2 流体衰减反转恢复 (FLAIR) 脑磁共振成像 (MRI) 可提供更出色的 MS 病变可视化和表征。 MS 的后续脑部 FLAIR MRI 为临床医生监测疾病进展提供了有用的信息。在这项研究中，我们提出了对生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的一种新颖修改，以预测固定时间间隔内 MS 的未来病变特异性 FLAIR MRI。我们在鉴别器中使用监督引导注意力和扩张卷积，它支持基于对病变区域的注意力来对生成的图像是否真实进行明智的预测，这反过来又有可能帮助改进生成器以更准确地预测未来检查的病变区域。我们将我们的方法与几个基线和一个最先进的 CF-SAGAN 模型进行了比较 [1]。总之，我们的结果表明，与具有类似整体性能的其他模型相比，所提出的方法具有更高的准确性，并降低了病变区域预测误差的标准偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于判别器的监督引导注意力模块的生成对抗网络（GAN），用于预测多发性硬化症（MS）患者的未来病变特异性FLAIR MRI图像。
AI.motivation: 多发性硬化症的病变监测依赖于FLAIR MRI，但现有方法在预测未来病变区域时准确性不足，需改进模型以更精确地捕捉病变特征。
AI.method: 通过在判别器中引入监督引导注意力机制和空洞卷积，使模型能够关注病变区域并指导生成器更准确地预测未来病变区域的MRI图像。
AI.result: 与基线模型及先进模型CF-SAGAN相比，该方法在病变区域的预测准确率更高，且预测误差的标准差更小。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在病变特异性预测任务中表现出更高的准确性和稳定性，为多发性硬化症的临床监测提供了有效工具。

authors_text: Ion Matei,Wiktor Piotrowski,Alexandre Perez,Johan de Kleer,Jorge Tierno,Wendy Mungovan,Vance Turnewitsch
title: System Resilience through Health Monitoring and Reconfiguration
title_zh: 通过健康监控和重新配置实现系统弹性
abstract: We demonstrate an end-to-end framework to improve the resilience of man-made systems to unforeseen events. The framework is based on a physics-based digital twin model and three modules tasked with real-time fault diagnosis, prognostics and reconfiguration. The fault diagnosis module uses model-based diagnosis algorithms to detect and isolate faults and generates interventions in the system to disambiguate uncertain diagnosis solutions. We scale up the fault diagnosis algorithm to the required real-time performance through the use of parallelization and surrogate models of the physics-based digital twin. The prognostics module tracks the fault progressions and trains the online degradation models to compute remaining useful life of system components. In addition, we use the degradation models to assess the impact of the fault progression on the operational requirements. The reconfiguration module uses PDDL-based planning endowed with semantic attachments to adjust the system controls so that the fault impact on the system operation is minimized. We define a resilience metric and use the example of a fuel system model to demonstrate how the metric improves with our framework.
summary: We demonstrate an end-to-end framework to improve the resilience of man-made systems to unforeseen events. The framework is based on a physics-based digital twin model and three modules tasked with real-time fault diagnosis, prognostics and reconfiguration. The fault diagnosis module uses model-based diagnosis algorithms to detect and isolate faults and generates interventions in the system to disambiguate uncertain diagnosis solutions. We scale up the fault diagnosis algorithm to the required real-time performance through the use of parallelization and surrogate models of the physics-based digital twin. The prognostics module tracks the fault progressions and trains the online degradation models to compute remaining useful life of system components. In addition, we use the degradation models to assess the impact of the fault progression on the operational requirements. The reconfiguration module uses PDDL-based planning endowed with semantic attachments to adjust the system controls so that the fault impact on the system operation is minimized. We define a resilience metric and use the example of a fuel system model to demonstrate how the metric improves with our framework.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了一个端到端框架，以提高人造系统对不可预见事件的恢复能力。该框架基于基于物理的数字孪生模型和三个负责实时故障诊断、预测和重新配置的模块。故障诊断模块使用基于模型的诊断算法来检测和隔离故障，并在系统中生成干预措施以消除不确定的诊断解决方案的歧义。我们通过使用基于物理的数字孪生的并行化和代理模型，将故障诊断算法扩展到所需的实时性能。预测模块跟踪故障进展并训练在线退化模型以计算系统组件的剩余使用寿命。此外，我们使用退化模型来评估故障进展对操作要求的影响。重构模块使用基于PDDL并赋予语义附件的规划来调整系统控制，从而最大限度地减少故障对系统运行的影响。我们定义了一个弹性指标，并使用燃料系统模型的示例来演示该指标如何通过我们的框架得到改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于物理数字孪生模型的端到端框架，通过实时故障诊断、预测和系统重构模块提升人造系统的韧性。
AI.motivation: 现有系统在应对突发故障时缺乏动态调整能力，需通过实时监控与重构机制提升系统鲁棒性以满足关键基础设施的可靠性需求。
AI.method: 构建包含物理数字孪生模型的框架，集成基于模型的故障诊断算法（结合并行计算与代理模型）、在线退化模型预测剩余寿命，以及基于PDDL语义规划的重构模块。
AI.result: 通过燃料系统案例验证，所提框架有效提升了系统韧性指标，证明了模块化方法在故障应对中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过融合诊断-预测-重构的闭环机制，为复杂系统提供了量化韧性评估和动态适应的新范式。

The fault diagnosis module uses model-based diagnosis algorithms to detect and isolate faults and generates interventions in the system to disambiguate uncertain diagnosis solutions. We scale up the fault diagnosis algorithm to the required real-time performance through the use of parallelization and surrogate models of the physics-based digital twin. The prognostics module tracks the fault progressions and trains the online degradation models to compute remaining useful life of system components. In addition, we use the degradation models to assess the impact of the fault progression on the operational requirements. The reconfiguration module uses PDDL-based planning endowed with semantic attachments to adjust the system controls so that the fault impact on the system operation is minimized. We define a resilience metric and use the example of a fuel system model to demonstrate how the metric improves with our framework. 我们展示了一个端到端框架，以提高人造系统对不可预见事件的恢复能力。该框架基于基于物理的数字孪生模型和三个负责实时故障诊断、预测和重新配置的模块。故障诊断模块使用基于模型的诊断算法来检测和隔离故障，并在系统中生成干预措施以消除不确定的诊断解决方案的歧义。我们通过使用基于物理的数字孪生的并行化和代理模型，将故障诊断算法扩展到所需的实时性能。预测模块跟踪故障进展并训练在线退化模型以计算系统组件的剩余使用寿命。此外，我们使用退化模型来评估故障进展对操作要求的影响。重构模块使用基于PDDL并赋予语义附件的规划来调整系统控制，从而最大限度地减少故障对系统运行的影响。我们定义了一个弹性指标，并使用燃料系统模型的示例来演示该指标如何通过我们的框架得到改进。 本文提出一个基于物理数字孪生模型的端到端框架，通过实时故障诊断、预测和系统重构模块提升人造系统的韧性。 Ion Matei,Wiktor Piotrowski,Alexandre Perez,Johan de Kleer,Jorge Tierno,Wendy Mungovan,Vance Turnewitsch cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Shenglian Lu,Xiaoyu Liu,Zixaun He,Wenbo Liu,Xin Zhang,Manoj Karkee
title: Swin-transformer-yolov5 For Real-time Wine Grape Bunch Detection
title_zh: Swin-transformer-yolov5 用于实时酿酒葡萄串检测
comment: 30 pages; 15 figures;Corresponding author: Xin Zhang Department of Agricultural and Biological Engineering Mississippi State University Mississippi State, MS 39762, USA (xzhang@abe.msstate.edu)
comments: 30 pages; 15 figures;Corresponding author: Xin Zhang Department of Agricultural and Biological Engineering Mississippi State University Mississippi State, MS 39762, USA (xzhang@abe.msstate.edu)
abstract: In this research, an integrated detection model, Swin-transformer-YOLOv5 or Swin-T-YOLOv5, was proposed for real-time wine grape bunch detection to inherit the advantages from both YOLOv5 and Swin-transformer. The research was conducted on two different grape varieties of Chardonnay (always white berry skin) and Merlot (white or white-red mix berry skin when immature; red when matured) from July to September in 2019. To verify the superiority of Swin-T-YOLOv5, its performance was compared against several commonly used/competitive object detectors, including Faster R-CNN, YOLOv3, YOLOv4, and YOLOv5. All models were assessed under different test conditions, including two different weather conditions (sunny and cloudy), two different berry maturity stages (immature and mature), and three different sunlight directions/intensities (morning, noon, and afternoon) for a comprehensive comparison. Additionally, the predicted number of grape bunches by Swin-T-YOLOv5 was further compared with ground truth values, including both in-field manual counting and manual labeling during the annotation process. Results showed that the proposed Swin-T-YOLOv5 outperformed all other studied models for grape bunch detection, with up to 97% of mean Average Precision (mAP) and 0.89 of F1-score when the weather was cloudy. This mAP was approximately 44%, 18%, 14%, and 4% greater than Faster R-CNN, YOLOv3, YOLOv4, and YOLOv5, respectively. Swin-T-YOLOv5 achieved its lowest mAP (90%) and F1-score (0.82) when detecting immature berries, where the mAP was approximately 40%, 5%, 3%, and 1% greater than the same. Furthermore, Swin-T-YOLOv5 performed better on Chardonnay variety with achieved up to 0.91 of R2 and 2.36 root mean square error (RMSE) when comparing the predictions with ground truth. However, it underperformed on Merlot variety with achieved only up to 0.70 of R2 and 3.30 of RMSE.

Results showed that the proposed Swin-T-YOLOv5 outperformed all other studied models for grape bunch detection, with up to 97% of mean Average Precision (mAP) and 0.89 of F1-score when the weather was cloudy. Swin-T-YOLOv5 achieved its lowest mAP (90%) and F1-score (0.82) when detecting immature berries, where the mAP was approximately 40%, 5%, 3%, and 1% greater than the same. Furthermore, Swin-T-YOLOv5 performed better on Chardonnay variety with achieved up to 0.91 of R2 and 2.36 root mean square error (RMSE) when comparing the predictions with ground truth. abstract_zh: 在本研究中，继承了YOLOv5和Swin-transformer的优点，提出了一种用于实时酿酒葡萄串检测的集成检测模型Swin-transformer-YOLOv5或Swin-T-YOLOv5。该研究于 2019 年 7 月至 9 月对霞多丽（始终为白色浆果皮）和梅洛（未成熟时为白色或白红色混合浆果皮；成熟时为红色）两种不同的葡萄品种进行了研究。为了验证 Swin-T-YOLOv5 的优越性，将其性能与几种常用/竞争对象检测器（包括 Faster R-CNN、YOLOv3、YOLOv4 和 YOLOv5）进行了比较。所有模型均在不同的测试条件下进行评估，包括两种不同的天气条件（晴天和阴天）、两种不同的浆果成熟阶段（未成熟和成熟）以及三种不同的阳光方向/强度（上午、中午和下午）进行综合比较。此外，Swin-T-YOLOv5 预测的葡萄串数量还与地面真实值进行了进一步比较，包括现场手动计数和注释过程中的手动标记。结果表明，所提出的 Swin-T-YOLOv5 优于所有其他研究的葡萄串检测模型，平均精度 (mAP) 高达 97%，天气多云时 F1 分数为 0.89。该 mAP 分别比 Faster R-CNN、YOLOv3、YOLOv4 和 YOLOv5 高出约 44%、18%、14% 和 4%。 Swin-T-YOLOv5 在检测未成熟浆果时实现了最低的 mAP (90%) 和 F1 分数 (0.82)，其中 mAP 比相同浆果高约 40%、5%、3% 和 1%。此外，Swin-T-YOLOv5 在霞多丽品种上表现更好，在将预测与真实情况进行比较时，R2 高达 0.91，均方根误差 (RMSE) 高达 2.36。然而，它在梅洛品种上表现不佳，R2 仅为 0.70，RMSE 为 3.30。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Swin Transformer和YOLOv5的实时葡萄酒葡萄串检测模型Swin-T-YOLOv5。
AI.motivation: 为解决传统目标检测模型在复杂光照、成熟度变化等场景下葡萄串检测精度不足的问题，融合Swin Transformer的全局特征提取能力和YOLOv5的实时性优势。
AI.method: 在两种葡萄品种（霞多丽和梅洛）上进行实验，对比Faster R-CNN、YOLOv3-5等模型，通过天气、成熟度、光照条件等多维度测试，并与人工计数结果对比验证。
AI.result: Swin-T-YOLOv5在阴天条件下达到97% mAP和0.89 F1-score，较其他模型提升44%-4%；对霞多丽品种R²达0.91，但对梅洛品种R²仅0.70。
AI.conclusion: Swin-T-YOLOv5在葡萄串检测中表现优异，尤其适用于霞多丽品种，但需进一步优化梅洛品种的检测性能。

authors_text: Nithin Babu,Petar Popovski,Constantinos B. Papadias
title: Cost-Efficient Deployment of a Reliable Multi-UAV Unmanned Aerial System
title_zh: 经济高效地部署可靠的多无人机无人机系统
abstract: In this work, we study the trade-off between the reliability and the investment cost of an unmanned aerial system (UAS) consisting of a set of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) carrying radio access nodes, called portable access points (PAPs)), deployed to serve a set of ground nodes (GNs). Using the proposed algorithm, a given geographical region is equivalently represented as a set of circular regions, where each circle represents the coverage region of a PAP. Then, the steady-state availability of the UAS is analytically derived by modelling it as a continuous time birth-death Markov decision process (MDP). Numerical evaluations show that the investment cost to guarantee a given steady-state availability to a set of GNs can be reduced by considering the traffic demand and distribution of GNs.
summary: In this work, we study the trade-off between the reliability and the investment cost of an unmanned aerial system (UAS) consisting of a set of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) carrying radio access nodes, called portable access points (PAPs)), deployed to serve a set of ground nodes (GNs). Using the proposed algorithm, a given geographical region is equivalently represented as a set of circular regions, where each circle represents the coverage region of a PAP. Then, the steady-state availability of the UAS is analytically derived by modelling it as a continuous time birth-death Markov decision process (MDP). Numerical evaluations show that the investment cost to guarantee a given steady-state availability to a set of GNs can be reduced by considering the traffic demand and distribution of GNs.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了无人机系统（UAS）的可靠性和投资成本之间的权衡，该系统由一组携带无线电接入节点（称为便携式接入点（PAP））的无人机（UAV）组成，部署为一组地面节点（GN）提供服务。使用所提出的算法，给定的地理区域等效地表示为一组圆形区域，其中每个圆圈代表 PAP 的覆盖区域。然后，通过将 UAS 建模为连续时间生死马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP)，分析推导 UAS 的稳态可用性。数值评估表明，通过考虑流量需求和 GN 的分布，可以降低保证一组 GN 的给定稳态可用性的投资成本。

AI.tldr: 研究多无人机无人系统在可靠性与投资成本之间的权衡，提出一种高效部署方法。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机系统在满足地面节点需求时，难以平衡系统可靠性与部署成本，尤其在不同业务需求场景下优化不足。
AI.method: 通过算法将地理区域划分为圆形覆盖区，建立连续时间生灭马尔可夫决策过程模型，分析系统稳态可用性。
AI.result: 数值评估表明，考虑地面节点流量需求和分布特性可降低保证特定可用性的投资成本。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效优化多无人机系统部署，在保障可靠性的同时实现成本节约。

Using the proposed algorithm, a given geographical region is equivalently represented as a set of circular regions, where each circle represents the coverage region of a PAP. Then, the steady-state availability of the UAS is analytically derived by modelling it as a continuous time birth-death Markov decision process (MDP). Numerical evaluations show that the investment cost to guarantee a given steady-state availability to a set of GNs can be reduced by considering the traffic demand and distribution of GNs. 在这项工作中，我们研究了无人机系统（UAS）的可靠性和投资成本之间的权衡，该系统由一组携带无线电接入节点（称为便携式接入点（PAP））的无人机（UAV）组成，部署为一组地面节点（GN）提供服务。使用所提出的算法，给定的地理区域等效地表示为一组圆形区域，其中每个圆圈代表 PAP 的覆盖区域。然后，通过将 UAS 建模为连续时间生死马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP)，分析推导 UAS 的稳态可用性。数值评估表明，通过考虑流量需求和 GN 的分布，可以降低保证一组 GN 的给定稳态可用性的投资成本。 研究多无人机无人系统在可靠性与投资成本之间的权衡，提出一种高效部署方法。 Nithin Babu,Petar Popovski,Constantinos B. Papadias eess.SP,cs.ET,cs.IT,cs.RO

authors_text: Rushiv Arora,Bruno Castro da Silva,Eliot Moss
title: Model-Based Reinforcement Learning with SINDy
title_zh: 使用 SINDy 进行基于模型的强化学习
comment: 8 pages, 1 figure, 1 table, 1 algorithm, presented at the Decision Awareness in Reinforcement Learning workshop held at the International Conference on Machine Learning, 22 July 2022, Baltimore MD, USA
comments: 8 pages, 1 figure, 1 table, 1 algorithm, presented at the Decision Awareness in Reinforcement Learning workshop held at the International Conference on Machine Learning, 22 July 2022, Baltimore MD, USA
abstract: We draw on the latest advancements in the physics community to propose a novel method for discovering the governing non-linear dynamics of physical systems in reinforcement learning (RL). We establish that this method is capable of discovering the underlying dynamics using significantly fewer trajectories (as little as one rollout with $\leq 30$ time steps) than state of the art model learning algorithms. Further, the technique learns a model that is accurate enough to induce near-optimal policies given significantly fewer trajectories than those required by model-free algorithms. It brings the benefits of model-based RL without requiring a model to be developed in advance, for systems that have physics-based dynamics. To establish the validity and applicability of this algorithm, we conduct experiments on four classic control tasks. We found that an optimal policy trained on the discovered dynamics of the underlying system can generalize well. Further, the learned policy performs well when deployed on the actual physical system, thus bridging the model to real system gap. We further compare our method to state-of-the-art model-based and model-free approaches, and show that our method requires fewer trajectories sampled on the true physical system compared other methods. Additionally, we explored approximate dynamics models and found that they also can perform well.
summary: We draw on the latest advancements in the physics community to propose a novel method for discovering the governing non-linear dynamics of physical systems in reinforcement learning (RL). We establish that this method is capable of discovering the underlying dynamics using significantly fewer trajectories (as little as one rollout with $\leq 30$ time steps) than state of the art model learning algorithms. Further, the technique learns a model that is accurate enough to induce near-optimal policies given significantly fewer trajectories than those required by model-free algorithms. It brings the benefits of model-based RL without requiring a model to be developed in advance, for systems that have physics-based dynamics. To establish the validity and applicability of this algorithm, we conduct experiments on four classic control tasks. We found that an optimal policy trained on the discovered dynamics of the underlying system can generalize well. Further, the learned policy performs well when deployed on the actual physical system, thus bridging the model to real system gap. We further compare our method to state-of-the-art model-based and model-free approaches, and show that our method requires fewer trajectories sampled on the true physical system compared other methods. Additionally, we explored approximate dynamics models and found that they also can perform well.
abstract_zh: 我们利用物理学界的最新进展，提出了一种新方法，用于发现强化学习（RL）中物理系统的非线性动力学控制。我们确定，与最先进的模型学习算法相比，该方法能够使用更少的轨迹（只需 $\leq 30$ 时间步长的一次推出）来发现潜在的动态。此外，该技术学习的模型足够准确，可以在给定比无模型算法所需的轨迹少得多的轨迹的情况下诱导出接近最优的策略。对于具有基于物理动力学的系统，它带来了基于模型的强化学习的优势，而无需提前开发模型。为了验证该算法的有效性和适用性，我们对四个经典控制任务进行了实验。我们发现，根据发现的底层系统动态进行训练的最优策略可以很好地泛化。此外，学习到的策略在部署到实际物理系统上时表现良好，从而弥补了模型与实际系统之间的差距。我们进一步将我们的方法与最先进的基于模型和无模型的方法进行比较，并表明与其他方法相比，我们的方法需要在真实物理系统上采样的轨迹更少。此外，我们探索了近似动力学模型，发现它们也可以表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于SINDy的模型强化学习方法，通过少量轨迹数据发现物理系统的非线性动态模型，并生成近优策略。
AI.motivation: 传统模型学习算法需要大量轨迹数据且依赖先验模型，而模型自由算法效率低下。本文旨在开发一种无需先验模型、数据效率高的模型学习方法。
AI.method: 结合SINDy（稀疏识别非线性动力学）技术，从少量轨迹中稀疏回归出物理系统的微分方程模型，并基于该模型进行策略优化。
AI.result: 在四个经典控制任务中，该方法以最少轨迹数（≤30步）学习到的模型可生成泛化性良好的策略，且在真实系统部署时表现优于现有模型基和模型自由方法。
AI.conclusion: SINDy驱动的模型强化学习方法能以极低数据成本学习物理系统动态，有效弥合模型与真实系统的差距，且近似动态模型同样具有实用价值。

authors_text: Johann Frei,Frank Kramer
title: Annotated Dataset Creation through General Purpose Language Models for non-English Medical NLP
title_zh: 通过非英语医学 NLP 通用语言模型创建带注释的数据集
abstract: Obtaining text datasets with semantic annotations is an effortful process, yet crucial for supervised training in natural language processsing (NLP). In general, developing and applying new NLP pipelines in domain-specific contexts for tasks often requires custom designed datasets to address NLP tasks in supervised machine learning fashion. When operating in non-English languages for medical data processing, this exposes several minor and major, interconnected problems such as lack of task-matching datasets as well as task-specific pre-trained models. In our work we suggest to leverage pretrained language models for training data acquisition in order to retrieve sufficiently large datasets for training smaller and more efficient models for use-case specific tasks. To demonstrate the effectiveness of your approach, we create a custom dataset which we use to train a medical NER model for German texts, GPTNERMED, yet our method remains language-independent in principle. Our obtained dataset as well as our pre-trained models are publicly available at: https://github.com/frankkramer-lab/GPTNERMED
summary: Obtaining text datasets with semantic annotations is an effortful process, yet crucial for supervised training in natural language processsing (NLP). In general, developing and applying new NLP pipelines in domain-specific contexts for tasks often requires custom designed datasets to address NLP tasks in supervised machine learning fashion. When operating in non-English languages for medical data processing, this exposes several minor and major, interconnected problems such as lack of task-matching datasets as well as task-specific pre-trained models. In our work we suggest to leverage pretrained language models for training data acquisition in order to retrieve sufficiently large datasets for training smaller and more efficient models for use-case specific tasks. To demonstrate the effectiveness of your approach, we create a custom dataset which we use to train a medical NER model for German texts, GPTNERMED, yet our method remains language-independent in principle. Our obtained dataset as well as our pre-trained models are publicly available at: https://github.com/frankkramer-lab/GPTNERMED
abstract_zh: 获取带有语义注释的文本数据集是一个费力的过程，但对于自然语言处理 (NLP) 的监督训练至关重要。一般来说，在特定领域的任务环境中开发和应用新的 NLP 管道通常需要定制设计的数据集来以监督机器学习的方式解决 NLP 任务。当使用非英语语言进行医疗数据处理时，这会暴露出几个或大或小的、相互关联的问题，例如缺乏任务匹配数据集以及特定于任务的预训练模型。在我们的工作中，我们建议利用预训练的语言模型进行训练数据采集，以便检索足够大的数据集，以便为用例特定任务训练更小、更高效的模型。为了证明您的方法的有效性，我们创建了一个自定义数据集，用于训练德语文本的医学 NER 模型 GPTNERMED，但我们的方法原则上仍然与语言无关。我们获得的数据集以及预训练模型可在以下位置公开获取：https://github.com/frankkramer-lab/GPTNERMED

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用通用语言模型生成非英语医学NLP任务的注释数据集，以解决领域特定数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 非英语医学领域缺乏任务匹配的数据集和预训练模型，导致NLP应用受限，需开发通用方法解决数据获取难题。
AI.method: 通过预训练语言模型自动获取和标注医学文本，构建自定义数据集并训练轻量级任务模型（如德语GPTNERMED），方法具有语言无关性。
AI.result: 成功创建医学实体识别数据集并训练出有效模型，公开数据集和预训练模型验证了方法的可行性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为非英语医学NLP提供了可复用的数据生成框架，降低了领域适应成本，且资源公开促进社区研究。

authors_text: Joao Monteiro,Pau Rodriguez,Pierre-Andre Noel,Issam Laradji,David Vazquez
title: Constraining Representations Yields Models That Know What They Don't Know
title_zh: 约束表示产生知道他们不知道什么的模型
abstract: A well-known failure mode of neural networks is that they may confidently return erroneous predictions. Such unsafe behaviour is particularly frequent when the use case slightly differs from the training context, and/or in the presence of an adversary. This work presents a novel direction to address these issues in a broad, general manner: imposing class-aware constraints on a model's internal activation patterns. Specifically, we assign to each class a unique, fixed, randomly-generated binary vector - hereafter called class code - and train the model so that its cross-depths activation patterns predict the appropriate class code according to the input sample's class. The resulting predictors are dubbed Total Activation Classifiers (TAC), and TACs may either be trained from scratch, or used with negligible cost as a thin add-on on top of a frozen, pre-trained neural network. The distance between a TAC's activation pattern and the closest valid code acts as an additional confidence score, besides the default unTAC'ed prediction head's. In the add-on case, the original neural network's inference head is completely unaffected (so its accuracy remains the same) but we now have the option to use TAC's own confidence and prediction when determining which course of action to take in an hypothetical production workflow. In particular, we show that TAC strictly improves the value derived from models allowed to reject/defer. We provide further empirical evidence that TAC works well on multiple types of architectures and data modalities and that it is at least as good as state-of-the-art alternative confidence scores derived from existing models.

Such unsafe behaviour is particularly frequent when the use case slightly differs from the training context, and/or in the presence of an adversary. The resulting predictors are dubbed Total Activation Classifiers (TAC), and TACs may either be trained from scratch, or used with negligible cost as a thin add-on on top of a frozen, pre-trained neural network. The distance between a TAC's activation pattern and the closest valid code acts as an additional confidence score, besides the default unTAC'ed prediction head's. In the add-on case, the original neural network's inference head is completely unaffected (so its accuracy remains the same) but we now have the option to use TAC's own confidence and prediction when determining which course of action to take in an hypothetical production workflow. In particular, we show that TAC strictly improves the value derived from models allowed to reject/defer. We provide further empirical evidence that TAC works well on multiple types of architectures and data modalities and that it is at least as good as state-of-the-art alternative confidence scores derived from existing models.
abstract_zh: 神经网络的一个众所周知的失败模式是它们可能会自信地返回错误的预测。当用例与训练环境略有不同和/或存在对手时，这种不安全行为尤其频繁。这项工作提出了一个以广泛、通用的方式解决这些问题的新方向：对模型的内部激活模式施加类感知约束。具体来说，我们为每个类别分配一个唯一的、固定的、随机生成的二进制向量（以下称为类别代码）并训练模型，使其跨深度激活模式根据输入样本的类别预测适当的类别代码。由此产生的预测器被称为总激活分类器 (TAC)，TAC 可以从头开始训练，也可以作为冻结的预训练神经网络之上的一个薄附加组件以可忽略的成本使用。除了默认的未 TAC 预测头之外，TAC 的激活模式与最近的有效代码之间的距离充当附加置信度分数。在附加案例中，原始神经网络的推理头完全不受影响（因此其准确性保持不变），但我们现在可以选择使用 TAC 自己的置信度和预测来确定在假设的生产工作流程中采取哪种行动。特别是，我们表明 TAC 严格提高了从允许拒绝/推迟的模型中得出的价值。我们提供了进一步的经验证据，表明 TAC 在多种类型的架构和数据模式上运行良好，并且它至少与从现有模型派生的最先进的替代置信度得分一样好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过约束神经网络内部激活模式来提升模型对未知输入的识别能力，避免其过度自信地输出错误预测。
AI.motivation: 神经网络在训练分布外或存在对抗样本时易产生过度自信的错误预测，现有置信度评估方法难以有效应对这一问题。
AI.method: 为每个类别分配唯一随机二进制向量（类代码），训练模型使其激活模式与类代码匹配，并通过激活模式与最近有效代码的距离生成额外置信度评分。
AI.result: TAC方法在多种架构和数据模态上表现优异，显著提升模型拒绝/延迟决策的价值，且可作为轻量级附加模块部署于预训练模型之上。
AI.conclusion: TAC通过激活模式约束有效增强模型不确定性感知能力，为安全关键场景提供可靠决策依据。

search_text: Constraining Representations Yields Models That Know What They Don't Know 约束表示产生知道他们不知道什么的模型 A well-known failure mode of neural networks is that they may confidently return erroneous predictions. Such unsafe behaviour is particularly frequent when the use case slightly differs from the training context, and/or in the presence of an adversary. This work presents a novel direction to address these issues in a broad, general manner: imposing class-aware constraints on a model's internal activation patterns. Specifically, we assign to each class a unique, fixed, randomly-generated binary vector - hereafter called class code - and train the model so that its cross-depths activation patterns predict the appropriate class code according to the input sample's class. The resulting predictors are dubbed Total Activation Classifiers (TAC), and TACs may either be trained from scratch, or used with negligible cost as a thin add-on on top of a frozen, pre-trained neural network. The distance between a TAC's activation pattern and the closest valid code acts as an additional confidence score, besides the default unTAC'ed prediction head's. In the add-on case, the original neural network's inference head is completely unaffected (so its accuracy remains the same) but we now have the option to use TAC's own confidence and prediction when determining which course of action to take in an hypothetical production workflow. In particular, we show that TAC strictly improves the value derived from models allowed to reject/defer. We provide further empirical evidence that TAC works well on multiple types of architectures and data modalities and that it is at least as good as state-of-the-art alternative confidence scores derived from existing models. 神经网络的一个众所周知的失败模式是它们可能会自信地返回错误的预测。当用例与训练环境略有不同和/或存在对手时，这种不安全行为尤其频繁。这项工作提出了一个以广泛、通用的方式解决这些问题的新方向：对模型的内部激活模式施加类感知约束。具体来说，我们为每个类别分配一个唯一的、固定的、随机生成的二进制向量（以下称为类别代码）并训练模型，使其跨深度激活模式根据输入样本的类别预测适当的类别代码。由此产生的预测器被称为总激活分类器 (TAC)，TAC 可以从头开始训练，也可以作为冻结的预训练神经网络之上的一个薄附加组件以可忽略的成本使用。除了默认的未 TAC 预测头之外，TAC 的激活模式与最近的有效代码之间的距离充当附加置信度分数。在附加案例中，原始神经网络的推理头完全不受影响（因此其准确性保持不变），但我们现在可以选择使用 TAC 自己的置信度和预测来确定在假设的生产工作流程中采取哪种行动。特别是，我们表明 TAC 严格提高了从允许拒绝/推迟的模型中得出的价值。我们提供了进一步的经验证据，表明 TAC 在多种类型的架构和数据模式上运行良好，并且它至少与从现有模型派生的最先进的替代置信度得分一样好。 本文提出通过约束神经网络内部激活模式来提升模型对未知输入的识别能力，避免其过度自信地输出错误预测。 Joao Monteiro,Pau Rodriguez,Pierre-Andre Noel,Issam Laradji,David Vazquez cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Matthew L. Ginsberg
title: Unbalancing Binary Trees
title_zh: 不平衡二叉树
abstract: Assuming Zipf's Law to be accurate, we show that existing techniques for partially optimizing binary trees produce results that are approximately 10% worse than true optimal. We present a new approximate optimization technique that runs in O(n log n) time and produces trees approximately 1% worse than optimal. The running time is comparable to that of the Garsia-Wachs algorithm but the technique can be applied to the more useful case where the node being searched for is expected to be contained in the tree as opposed to outside of it.
summary: Assuming Zipf's Law to be accurate, we show that existing techniques for partially optimizing binary trees produce results that are approximately 10% worse than true optimal. We present a new approximate optimization technique that runs in O(n log n) time and produces trees approximately 1% worse than optimal. The running time is comparable to that of the Garsia-Wachs algorithm but the technique can be applied to the more useful case where the node being searched for is expected to be contained in the tree as opposed to outside of it.
abstract_zh: 假设齐普夫定律是准确的，我们表明现有的部分优化二叉树技术产生的结果比真正的最优结果差大约 10%。我们提出了一种新的近似优化技术，该技术在 O(n log n) 时间内运行，生成的树比最佳树大约差 1%。运行时间与 Garsia-Wachs 算法相当，但该技术可以应用于更有用的情况，其中所搜索的节点预计包含在树中而不是在树之外。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的二叉树近似优化方法，在节点存在于树中的场景下提升优化效果。
AI.motivation: 现有二叉树优化技术在齐普夫定律假设下存在约10%的优化差距，且无法有效处理实际应用中节点存在于树内的场景。
AI.method: 设计O(n log n)时间复杂度的近似优化算法，改进Garsia-Wachs算法以适应节点存在于树内的搜索场景。
AI.result: 新方法优化结果仅比理论最优差1%，时间效率与Garsia-Wachs算法相当，且适用于实际搜索场景。
AI.conclusion: 提出的优化方法在保持时间效率的同时显著提升实际应用效果，优于现有部分优化技术。

authors_text: Adi Eliahu,Rotem Ben-Hur,Ronny Ronen,Shahar Kvatinsky
title: abstractPIM: A Technology Backward-Compatible Compilation Flow for Processing-In-Memory
title_zh: AbstractPIM：用于内存处理的技术向后兼容的编译流程
comment: Link to the book chapter in Springer: https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-030-81641-4_16
comments: Link to the book chapter in Springer: https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-030-81641-4_16
abstract: The von Neumann architecture, in which the memory and the computation units are separated, demands massive data traffic between the memory and the CPU. To reduce data movement, new technologies and computer architectures have been explored. The use of memristors, which are devices with both memory and computation capabilities, has been considered for different processing-in-memory (PIM) solutions, including using memristive stateful logic for a programmable digital PIM system. Nevertheless, all previous work has focused on a specific stateful logic family, and on optimizing the execution for a certain target machine. These solutions require new compiler and compilation when changing the target machine, and provide no backward compatibility with other target machines. In this chapter, we present abstractPIM, a new compilation concept and flow which enables executing any function within the memory, using different stateful logic families and different instruction set architectures (ISAs). By separating the code generation into two independent components, intermediate representation of the code using target independent ISA and then microcode generation for a specific target machine, we provide a flexible flow with backward compatibility and lay foundations for a PIM compiler. Using abstractPIM, we explore various logic technologies and ISAs and how they impact each other, and discuss the challenges associated with it, such as the increase in execution time.
summary: The von Neumann architecture, in which the memory and the computation units are separated, demands massive data traffic between the memory and the CPU. To reduce data movement, new technologies and computer architectures have been explored. The use of memristors, which are devices with both memory and computation capabilities, has been considered for different processing-in-memory (PIM) solutions, including using memristive stateful logic for a programmable digital PIM system. Nevertheless, all previous work has focused on a specific stateful logic family, and on optimizing the execution for a certain target machine. These solutions require new compiler and compilation when changing the target machine, and provide no backward compatibility with other target machines. In this chapter, we present abstractPIM, a new compilation concept and flow which enables executing any function within the memory, using different stateful logic families and different instruction set architectures (ISAs). By separating the code generation into two independent components, intermediate representation of the code using target independent ISA and then microcode generation for a specific target machine, we provide a flexible flow with backward compatibility and lay foundations for a PIM compiler. Using abstractPIM, we explore various logic technologies and ISAs and how they impact each other, and discuss the challenges associated with it, such as the increase in execution time.
abstract_zh: 冯·诺依曼架构中内存和计算单元是分离的，需要内存和CPU之间有大量的数据流量。为了减少数据移动，人们探索了新技术和计算机架构。忆阻器是一种兼具内存和计算能力的器件，已被考虑用于不同的内存处理 (PIM) 解决方案，包括将忆阻状态逻辑用于可编程数字 PIM 系统。尽管如此，之前的所有工作都集中在特定的有状态逻辑系列，以及优化特定目标机器的执行。这些解决方案在改变目标机器时需要新的编译器和编译，并且不提供与其他目标机器的向后兼容性。在本章中，我们将介绍abstractPIM，这是一种新的编译概念和流程，可以使用不同的状态逻辑系列和不同的指令集架构（ISA）在内存中执行任何功能。通过将代码生成分为两个独立的组件，使用与目标无关的 ISA 进行代码的中间表示，然后为特定目标机器生成微代码，我们提供了具有向后兼容性的灵活流程，并为 PIM 编译器奠定了基础。使用abstractPIM，我们探索各种逻辑技术和ISA以及它们如何相互影响，并讨论与之相关的挑战，例如执行时间的增加。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为abstractPIM的新编译概念和流程，旨在通过分离代码生成的两个独立组件，实现不同状态逻辑家族和指令集架构（ISA）下的内存内计算（PIM）功能执行。
AI.motivation: 传统冯·诺依曼架构因内存与计算单元分离导致数据传输开销大，而现有PIM解决方案局限于特定状态逻辑家族和目标机器，缺乏跨平台兼容性与灵活性。
AI.method: 通过将代码生成分为两部分：基于目标无关ISA的中间表示，以及针对特定目标机器的微码生成，实现代码生成的解耦，从而提供向后兼容性与灵活的编译流程。
AI.result: 验证了abstractPIM框架在多种逻辑技术与ISA间的兼容性，探索了其相互影响及挑战（如执行时间增加），为PIM编译器奠定了基础。
AI.conclusion: abstractPIM为PIM提供了灵活的编译框架，支持跨不同逻辑技术和ISA的兼容执行，尽管面临执行时间增加等挑战，但为未来PIM系统设计提供了新方向。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为abstractPIM的新编译概念和流程，旨在通过分离代码生成的两个独立组件，实现不同状态逻辑家族和指令集架构（ISA）下的内存内计算（PIM）功能执行。
motivation: 传统冯·诺依曼架构因内存与计算单元分离导致数据传输开销大，而现有PIM解决方案局限于特定状态逻辑家族和目标机器，缺乏跨平台兼容性与灵活性。
method: 通过将代码生成分为两部分：基于目标无关ISA的中间表示，以及针对特定目标机器的微码生成，实现代码生成的解耦，从而提供向后兼容性与灵活的编译流程。
result: 验证了abstractPIM框架在多种逻辑技术与ISA间的兼容性，探索了其相互影响及挑战（如执行时间增加），为PIM编译器奠定了基础。
conclusion: abstractPIM为PIM提供了灵活的编译框架，支持跨不同逻辑技术和ISA的兼容执行，尽管面临执行时间增加等挑战，但为未来PIM系统设计提供了新方向。
search_text: abstractPIM: A Technology Backward-Compatible Compilation Flow for Processing-In-Memory AbstractPIM：用于内存处理的技术向后兼容的编译流程 The von Neumann architecture, in which the memory and the computation units are separated, demands massive data traffic between the memory and the CPU. To reduce data movement, new technologies and computer architectures have been explored. The use of memristors, which are devices with both memory and computation capabilities, has been considered for different processing-in-memory (PIM) solutions, including using memristive stateful logic for a programmable digital PIM system. Nevertheless, all previous work has focused on a specific stateful logic family, and on optimizing the execution for a certain target machine. These solutions require new compiler and compilation when changing the target machine, and provide no backward compatibility with other target machines. In this chapter, we present abstractPIM, a new compilation concept and flow which enables executing any function within the memory, using different stateful logic families and different instruction set architectures (ISAs). By separating the code generation into two independent components, intermediate representation of the code using target independent ISA and then microcode generation for a specific target machine, we provide a flexible flow with backward compatibility and lay foundations for a PIM compiler. Using abstractPIM, we explore various logic technologies and ISAs and how they impact each other, and discuss the challenges associated with it, such as the increase in execution time. 冯·诺依曼架构中内存和计算单元是分离的，需要内存和CPU之间有大量的数据流量。为了减少数据移动，人们探索了新技术和计算机架构。忆阻器是一种兼具内存和计算能力的器件，已被考虑用于不同的内存处理 (PIM) 解决方案，包括将忆阻状态逻辑用于可编程数字 PIM 系统。尽管如此，之前的所有工作都集中在特定的有状态逻辑系列，以及优化特定目标机器的执行。这些解决方案在改变目标机器时需要新的编译器和编译，并且不提供与其他目标机器的向后兼容性。在本章中，我们将介绍abstractPIM，这是一种新的编译概念和流程，可以使用不同的状态逻辑系列和不同的指令集架构（ISA）在内存中执行任何功能。通过将代码生成分为两个独立的组件，使用与目标无关的 ISA 进行代码的中间表示，然后为特定目标机器生成微代码，我们提供了具有向后兼容性的灵活流程，并为 PIM 编译器奠定了基础。使用abstractPIM，我们探索各种逻辑技术和ISA以及它们如何相互影响，并讨论与之相关的挑战，例如执行时间的增加。 本文提出了一种名为abstractPIM的新编译概念和流程，旨在通过分离代码生成的两个独立组件，实现不同状态逻辑家族和指令集架构（ISA）下的内存内计算（PIM）功能执行。 Adi Eliahu,Rotem Ben-Hur,Ronny Ronen,Shahar Kvatinsky cs.ET

authors_text: Zhengqi Gao,Xiangfeng Chen,Zhengxing Zhang,Uttara Chakraborty,Wim Bogaerts,Duane S. Boning
title: Automatic Synthesis of Light Processing Functions for Programmable Photonics: Theory and Realization
title_zh: 可编程光子学光处理函数的自动合成：理论与实现
comment: 16 pages, accepted by Photonics Research (DOI will be added when available)
comments: 16 pages, accepted by Photonics Research (DOI will be added when available)
abstract: Linear light processing functions (e.g., routing, splitting, filtering) are key functions requiring configuration to implement on a programmable photonic integrated circuit (PPIC). In recirculating waveguide meshes (which include loop-backs), this is usually done manually. Some previous results describe explorations to perform this task automatically, but their efficiency or applicability is still limited. In this paper, we propose an efficient method that can automatically realize configurations for many light processing functions on a square-mesh PPIC. At its heart is an automatic differentiation subroutine built upon analytical expressions of scattering matrices, that enables gradient descent optimization for functional circuit synthesis. Similar to the state-of-the-art synthesis techniques, our method can realize configurations for a wide range of light processing functions, and multiple functions on the same PPIC simultaneously. However, we do not need to separate the functions spatially into different subdomains of the mesh, and the resulting optimum can have multiple functions using the same part of the mesh. Furthermore, compared to non-gradient or numerical differentiation based methods, our proposed approach achieves 3x time reduction in computational cost.
summary: Linear light processing functions (e.g., routing, splitting, filtering) are key functions requiring configuration to implement on a programmable photonic integrated circuit (PPIC). In recirculating waveguide meshes (which include loop-backs), this is usually done manually. Some previous results describe explorations to perform this task automatically, but their efficiency or applicability is still limited. In this paper, we propose an efficient method that can automatically realize configurations for many light processing functions on a square-mesh PPIC. At its heart is an automatic differentiation subroutine built upon analytical expressions of scattering matrices, that enables gradient descent optimization for functional circuit synthesis. Similar to the state-of-the-art synthesis techniques, our method can realize configurations for a wide range of light processing functions, and multiple functions on the same PPIC simultaneously. However, we do not need to separate the functions spatially into different subdomains of the mesh, and the resulting optimum can have multiple functions using the same part of the mesh. Furthermore, compared to non-gradient or numerical differentiation based methods, our proposed approach achieves 3x time reduction in computational cost.
abstract_zh: 线性光处理功能（例如路由、分离、滤波）是需要配置才能在可编程光子集成电路（PPIC）上实现的关键功能。在循环波导网格（包括环回）中，这通常是手动完成的。之前的一些结果描述了自动执行此任务的探索，但它们的效率或适用性仍然有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的方法，可以在方形网格 PPIC 上自动实现许多光处理功能的配置。其核心是一个基于散射矩阵解析表达式的自动微分子程序，可实现功能电路综合的梯度下降优化。与最先进的合成技术类似，我们的方法可以实现多种光处理功能的配置，并在同一 PPIC 上同时实现多种功能。然而，我们不需要将函数在空间上分离到网格的不同子域中，并且得到的最优值可以使用网格的同一部分具有多个函数。此外，与基于非梯度或数值微分的方法相比，我们提出的方法实现了计算成本减少 3 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度下降优化的自动微分方法，用于在可编程光子集成电路（PPIC）的方形网格中高效实现多种光处理功能的配置。
AI.motivation: 传统方法手动配置光处理功能效率低下，现有自动方法存在效率和适用性限制，需开发更高效的自动配置技术以支持复杂功能实现。
AI.method: 通过构建基于散射矩阵解析表达式的自动微分子程序，结合梯度下降优化算法，在方形网格PPIC中实现多功能配置，无需空间分离不同功能区域。
AI.result: 相比非梯度或数值微分方法，计算成本降低3倍，可同时实现多种光处理功能且无需空间隔离，适用范围更广。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升了PPIC功能配置的效率与灵活性，为可编程光子学的自动化设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhaoguang Yi,Zhou Chen,Yunjie Yang
title: A Learning-Based 3D EIT Image Reconstruction Method
title_zh: 一种基于学习的3D EIT图像重建方法
comment: ef:Proceedings of the International Conference of Bioelectromagnetism, Electrical Bioimpedance, and Electrical Impedance Tomography. June 28 to July 1, 2022 Kyung Hee University, Seoul, Korea
comments: ef:Proceedings of the International Conference of Bioelectromagnetism, Electrical Bioimpedance, and Electrical Impedance Tomography. June 28 to July 1, 2022 Kyung Hee University, Seoul, Korea
abstract: Deep learning has been widely employed to solve the Electrical Impedance Tomography (EIT) image reconstruction problem. Most existing physical model-based and learning-based approaches focus on 2D EIT image reconstruction. However, when they are directly extended to the 3D domain, the reconstruction performance in terms of image quality and noise robustness is hardly guaranteed mainly due to the significant increase in dimensionality. This paper presents a learning-based approach for 3D EIT image reconstruction, which is named Transposed convolution with Neurons Network (TN-Net). Simulation and experimental results show the superior performance and generalization ability of TN-Net compared with prevailing 3D EIT image reconstruction algorithms.
summary: Deep learning has been widely employed to solve the Electrical Impedance Tomography (EIT) image reconstruction problem. Most existing physical model-based and learning-based approaches focus on 2D EIT image reconstruction. However, when they are directly extended to the 3D domain, the reconstruction performance in terms of image quality and noise robustness is hardly guaranteed mainly due to the significant increase in dimensionality. This paper presents a learning-based approach for 3D EIT image reconstruction, which is named Transposed convolution with Neurons Network (TN-Net). Simulation and experimental results show the superior performance and generalization ability of TN-Net compared with prevailing 3D EIT image reconstruction algorithms.
abstract_zh: 深度学习已被广​​泛应用于解决电阻抗断层扫描（EIT）图像重建问题。大多数现有的基于物理模型和基于学习的方法都专注于 2D EIT 图像重建。然而，当它们直接扩展到3D域时，由于维度的显着增加，在图像质量和噪声鲁棒性方面的重建性能很难得到保证。本文提出了一种基于学习的 3D EIT 图像重建方法，称为神经元网络转置卷积 (TN-Net)。仿真和实验结果表明，与主流的3D EIT图像重建算法相比，TN-Net具有优越的性能和泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的三维电阻抗断层扫描（EIT）图像重建方法TN-Net，解决现有方法在3D领域性能不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有2D EIT重建方法直接扩展到3D时，因维度增加导致图像质量下降和抗噪能力不足，需探索更有效的3D重建方案。
AI.method: 设计名为TN-Net的神经网络架构，结合转置卷积层与神经元网络，专门针对3D EIT数据特征进行优化。
AI.result: 仿真与实验表明，TN-Net在图像重建质量与噪声鲁棒性方面优于现有主流3D EIT算法，且具备良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: TN-Net有效解决了3D EIT重建的维度挑战，为临床和工业应用提供了更可靠的图像重建方案。

authors_text: Hongzhi Hua,Guixuan Wen,Kaigui Wu
title: A further exploration of deep Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Hybrid Action Space
title_zh: 混合动作空间深度多智能体强化学习的进一步探索
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2206.05108
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2206.05108
abstract: The research of extending deep reinforcement learning (drl) to multi-agent field has solved many complicated problems and made great achievements. However, almost all these studies only focus on discrete or continuous action space and there are few works having ever used multi-agent deep reinforcement learning to real-world environment problems which mostly have a hybrid action space. Therefore, in this paper, we propose two algorithms: deep multi-agent hybrid soft actor-critic (MAHSAC) and multi-agent hybrid deep deterministic policy gradients (MAHDDPG) to fill this gap. This two algorithms follow the centralized training and decentralized execution (CTDE) paradigm and could handle hybrid action space problems. Our experiences are running on multi-agent particle environment which is an easy multi-agent particle world, along with some basic simulated physics. The experimental results show that these algorithms have good performances.
summary: The research of extending deep reinforcement learning (drl) to multi-agent field has solved many complicated problems and made great achievements. However, almost all these studies only focus on discrete or continuous action space and there are few works having ever used multi-agent deep reinforcement learning to real-world environment problems which mostly have a hybrid action space. Therefore, in this paper, we propose two algorithms: deep multi-agent hybrid soft actor-critic (MAHSAC) and multi-agent hybrid deep deterministic policy gradients (MAHDDPG) to fill this gap. This two algorithms follow the centralized training and decentralized execution (CTDE) paradigm and could handle hybrid action space problems. Our experiences are running on multi-agent particle environment which is an easy multi-agent particle world, along with some basic simulated physics. The experimental results show that these algorithms have good performances.
abstract_zh: 将深度强化学习（drl）扩展到多智能体领域的研究解决了许多复杂的问题并取得了巨大的成就。然而，几乎所有这些研究都只关注离散或连续的动作空间，很少有作品将多智能体深度强化学习用于现实世界的环境问题，这些问题大多具有混合动作空间。因此，在本文中，我们提出了两种算法：深度多智能体混合软演员评论家（MAHSAC）和多智能体混合深度确定性策略梯度（MAHDDPG）来填补这一空白。这两种算法遵循集中训练和分散执行（CTDE）范式，可以处理混合动作空间问题。我们的经验是在多智能体粒子环境上运行的，这是一个简单的多智能体粒子世界，以及一些基本的模拟物理。实验结果表明这些算法具有良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探索深度多智能体强化学习在混合动作空间中的应用，并提出两种新算法以解决实际环境中的复杂问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多集中于离散或连续动作空间，而现实问题常涉及混合动作空间，缺乏适用于此类场景的多智能体深度强化学习方法。
AI.method: 提出两种算法：基于集中训练分散执行（CTDE）范式的深度多智能体混合软演员-评论家（MAHSAC）和多智能体混合深度确定性策略梯度（MAHDDPG），以处理混合动作空间问题。
AI.result: 在多智能体粒子环境及基础物理模拟中实验验证，结果表明所提算法具有良好的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 两种算法有效填补了混合动作空间多智能体强化学习的空白，展示了在复杂现实场景中的应用潜力。

authors_text: Zahra Riahi Samani,Drew Parker,Hamed Akbari,Spyridon Bakas,Ronald L. Wolf,Steven Brem,Ragini Verma
title: Artificial intelligence-based locoregional markers of brain peritumoral microenvironment
title_zh: 基于人工智能的脑瘤周微环境局部区域标记
abstract: In malignant primary brain tumors, cancer cells infiltrate into the peritumoral brain structures which results in inevitable recurrence. Quantitative assessment of infiltrative heterogeneity in the peritumoral region, the area where biopsy or resection can be hazardous, is important for clinical decision making. Previous work on characterizing the infiltrative heterogeneity in the peritumoral region used various imaging modalities, but information of extracellular free water movement restriction has been limitedly explored. Here, we derive a unique set of Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based markers capturing the heterogeneity of tumor infiltration, by characterizing free water movement restriction in the peritumoral region using Diffusion Tensor Imaging (DTI)-based free water volume fraction maps. A novel voxel-wise deep learning-based peritumoral microenvironment index (PMI) is first extracted by leveraging the widely different water diffusivity properties of glioblastomas and brain metastases as regions with and without infiltrations in the peritumoral tissue. Descriptive characteristics of locoregional hubs of uniformly high PMI values are extracted as AI-based markers to capture distinct aspects of infiltrative heterogeneity. The proposed markers are applied to two clinical use cases on an independent population of 275 adult-type diffuse gliomas (CNS WHO grade 4), analyzing the duration of survival among Isocitrate-Dehydrogenase 1 (IDH1)-wildtypes and the differences with IDH1-mutants. Our findings provide a panel of markers as surrogates of infiltration that captures unique insight about underlying biology of peritumoral microstructural heterogeneity, establishing them as biomarkers of prognosis pertaining to survival and molecular stratification, with potential applicability in clinical decision making.

Quantitative assessment of infiltrative heterogeneity in the peritumoral region, the area where biopsy or resection can be hazardous, is important for clinical decision making. The proposed markers are applied to two clinical use cases on an independent population of 275 adult-type diffuse gliomas (CNS WHO grade 4), analyzing the duration of survival among Isocitrate-Dehydrogenase 1 (IDH1)-wildtypes and the differences with IDH1-mutants. abstract_zh: 在恶性原发性脑肿瘤中，癌细胞浸润到瘤周脑结构中，导致不可避免的复发。肿瘤周围区域（活检或切除可能存在危险的区域）的浸润异质性的定量评估对于临床决策非常重要。先前关于描述肿瘤周围区域浸润异质性的工作使用了各种成像方式，但细胞外自由水运动限制的信息探索有限。在这里，我们通过使用基于扩散张量成像（DTI）的自由水体积分数图来表征肿瘤周围区域的自由水运动限制，得出一组独特的基于人工智能（AI）的标记物，捕获肿瘤浸润的异质性。首先利用胶质母细胞瘤和脑转移瘤作为肿瘤周围组织中有或没有浸润的区域的广泛不同的水扩散特性来提取基于体素深度学习的新型肿瘤周围微环境指数（PMI）。提取具有统一高 PMI 值的局部区域中心的描述性特征作为基于 AI 的标记，以捕获渗透异质性的不同方面。所提出的标记物应用于 275 个成人型弥漫性神经胶质瘤（CNS WHO 4 级）的独立群体的两个临床用例，分析异柠檬酸脱氢酶 1 (IDH1) 野生型的生存持续时间以及与 IDH1 突变体的差异。我们的研究结果提供了一组作为浸润替代物的标记物，捕获了关于瘤周微结构异质性的潜在生物学的独特见解，将它们确立为与生存和分子分层有关的预后的生物标记物，并在临床决策中具有潜在的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于人工智能的新型生物标志物，通过扩散张量成像（DTI）量化脑肿瘤周围微环境的浸润异质性，用于预后评估和分子分型。
AI.motivation: 恶性脑肿瘤周围浸润性异质性难以通过传统影像学准确评估，且现有方法未充分探索细胞外自由水运动限制信息，亟需开发新型影像生物标志物辅助临床决策。
AI.method: 利用DTI自由水体积分数图构建像素级深度学习模型，提取肿瘤周围微环境指数（PMI），通过分析275例弥漫性胶质瘤的IDH1野生型与突变型生存差异，验证AI标志物的预后价值。
AI.result: 成功开发出反映肿瘤浸润异质性的AI标志物，可区分IDH1基因型患者的生存期差异，揭示肿瘤微结构异质性与分子特征的关联。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为脑肿瘤浸润性异质性提供了可量化的影像生物标志物，有望成为预后评估和分子分型的重要临床工具。

authors_text: Cheng-Yen Hsieh,Chih-Jung Chang,Fu-En Yang,Yu-Chiang Frank Wang
title: Self-Supervised Pyramid Representation Learning for Multi-Label Visual Analysis and Beyond
title_zh: 用于多标签视觉分析及其他的自监督金字塔表示学习
abstract: While self-supervised learning has been shown to benefit a number of vision tasks, existing techniques mainly focus on image-level manipulation, which may not generalize well to downstream tasks at patch or pixel levels. Moreover, existing SSL methods might not sufficiently describe and associate the above representations within and across image scales. In this paper, we propose a Self-Supervised Pyramid Representation Learning (SS-PRL) framework. The proposed SS-PRL is designed to derive pyramid representations at patch levels via learning proper prototypes, with additional learners to observe and relate inherent semantic information within an image. In particular, we present a cross-scale patch-level correlation learning in SS-PRL, which allows the model to aggregate and associate information learned across patch scales. We show that, with our proposed SS-PRL for model pre-training, one can easily adapt and fine-tune the models for a variety of applications including multi-label classification, object detection, and instance segmentation.
summary: While self-supervised learning has been shown to benefit a number of vision tasks, existing techniques mainly focus on image-level manipulation, which may not generalize well to downstream tasks at patch or pixel levels. Moreover, existing SSL methods might not sufficiently describe and associate the above representations within and across image scales. In this paper, we propose a Self-Supervised Pyramid Representation Learning (SS-PRL) framework. The proposed SS-PRL is designed to derive pyramid representations at patch levels via learning proper prototypes, with additional learners to observe and relate inherent semantic information within an image. In particular, we present a cross-scale patch-level correlation learning in SS-PRL, which allows the model to aggregate and associate information learned across patch scales. We show that, with our proposed SS-PRL for model pre-training, one can easily adapt and fine-tune the models for a variety of applications including multi-label classification, object detection, and instance segmentation.
abstract_zh: 虽然自监督学习已被证明有益于许多视觉任务，但现有技术主要集中于图像级操作，这可能无法很好地推广到补丁或像素级的下游任务。此外，现有的 SSL 方法可能无法充分描述和关联图像尺度内和跨图像尺度的上述表示。在本文中，我们提出了一种自监督金字塔表示学习（SS-PRL）框架。所提出的 SS-PRL 旨在通过学习适当的原型来导出补丁级别的金字塔表示，并使用额外的学习者来观察和关联图像中的固有语义信息。特别是，我们在 SS-PRL 中提出了跨尺度的斑块级相关学习，它允许模型聚合和关联跨斑块尺度学到的信息。我们表明，通过我们提出的用于模型预训练的 SS-PRL，人们可以轻松地针对各种应用（包括多标签分类、对象检测和实例分割）调整和微调模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自监督金字塔表示学习框架，用于多标签视觉分析及更广泛的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法主要关注图像级操作，难以泛化到块或像素级别任务，且未能充分关联不同尺度的表示。
AI.method: 提出SS-PRL框架，通过学习原型生成块级金字塔表示，并引入跨尺度块级关联学习以聚合不同尺度信息。
AI.result: 预训练模型可轻松适应多标签分类、目标检测和实例分割等多种任务，提升性能。
AI.conclusion: SS-PRL有效解决了现有方法在尺度关联和泛化能力上的不足，为多尺度视觉任务提供新解决方案。

search_text: Self-Supervised Pyramid Representation Learning for Multi-Label Visual Analysis and Beyond 用于多标签视觉分析及其他的自监督金字塔表示学习 While self-supervised learning has been shown to benefit a number of vision tasks, existing techniques mainly focus on image-level manipulation, which may not generalize well to downstream tasks at patch or pixel levels. Moreover, existing SSL methods might not sufficiently describe and associate the above representations within and across image scales. In this paper, we propose a Self-Supervised Pyramid Representation Learning (SS-PRL) framework. The proposed SS-PRL is designed to derive pyramid representations at patch levels via learning proper prototypes, with additional learners to observe and relate inherent semantic information within an image. In particular, we present a cross-scale patch-level correlation learning in SS-PRL, which allows the model to aggregate and associate information learned across patch scales. We show that, with our proposed SS-PRL for model pre-training, one can easily adapt and fine-tune the models for a variety of applications including multi-label classification, object detection, and instance segmentation. 虽然自监督学习已被证明有益于许多视觉任务，但现有技术主要集中于图像级操作，这可能无法很好地推广到补丁或像素级的下游任务。此外，现有的 SSL 方法可能无法充分描述和关联图像尺度内和跨图像尺度的上述表示。在本文中，我们提出了一种自监督金字塔表示学习（SS-PRL）框架。所提出的 SS-PRL 旨在通过学习适当的原型来导出补丁级别的金字塔表示，并使用额外的学习者来观察和关联图像中的固有语义信息。特别是，我们在 SS-PRL 中提出了跨尺度的斑块级相关学习，它允许模型聚合和关联跨斑块尺度学到的信息。我们表明，通过我们提出的用于模型预训练的 SS-PRL，人们可以轻松地针对各种应用（包括多标签分类、对象检测和实例分割）调整和微调模型。 提出一种自监督金字塔表示学习框架，用于多标签视觉分析及更广泛的应用。 Cheng-Yen Hsieh,Chih-Jung Chang,Fu-En Yang,Yu-Chiang Frank Wang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Bencheng Liao,Shaoyu Chen,Xinggang Wang,Tianheng Cheng,Qian Zhang,Wenyu Liu,Chang Huang
title: MapTR: Structured Modeling and Learning for Online Vectorized HD Map Construction
title_zh: MapTR：在线矢量化高精地图构建的结构化建模和学习
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2023 as Spotlight Presentation. Code&demos: https://github.com/hustvl/MapTR
comments: Accepted to ICLR 2023 as Spotlight Presentation. Code&demos: https://github.com/hustvl/MapTR
abstract: High-definition (HD) map provides abundant and precise environmental information of the driving scene, serving as a fundamental and indispensable component for planning in autonomous driving system. We present MapTR, a structured end-to-end Transformer for efficient online vectorized HD map construction. We propose a unified permutation-equivalent modeling approach, i.e., modeling map element as a point set with a group of equivalent permutations, which accurately describes the shape of map element and stabilizes the learning process. We design a hierarchical query embedding scheme to flexibly encode structured map information and perform hierarchical bipartite matching for map element learning. MapTR achieves the best performance and efficiency with only camera input among existing vectorized map construction approaches on nuScenes dataset. In particular, MapTR-nano runs at real-time inference speed ($25.1$ FPS) on RTX 3090, $8\times$ faster than the existing state-of-the-art camera-based method while achieving $5.0$ higher mAP. Even compared with the existing state-of-the-art multi-modality method, MapTR-nano achieves $0.7$ higher mAP, and MapTR-tiny achieves $13.5$ higher mAP and $3\times$ faster inference speed. Abundant qualitative results show that MapTR maintains stable and robust map construction quality in complex and various driving scenes. MapTR is of great application value in autonomous driving. Code and more demos are available at \url{https://github.com/hustvl/MapTR}.
summary: High-definition (HD) map provides abundant and precise environmental information of the driving scene, serving as a fundamental and indispensable component for planning in autonomous driving system. We present MapTR, a structured end-to-end Transformer for efficient online vectorized HD map construction. We propose a unified permutation-equivalent modeling approach, i.e., modeling map element as a point set with a group of equivalent permutations, which accurately describes the shape of map element and stabilizes the learning process. We design a hierarchical query embedding scheme to flexibly encode structured map information and perform hierarchical bipartite matching for map element learning. MapTR achieves the best performance and efficiency with only camera input among existing vectorized map construction approaches on nuScenes dataset. In particular, MapTR-nano runs at real-time inference speed ($25.1$ FPS) on RTX 3090, $8\times$ faster than the existing state-of-the-art camera-based method while achieving $5.0$ higher mAP. Even compared with the existing state-of-the-art multi-modality method, MapTR-nano achieves $0.7$ higher mAP, and MapTR-tiny achieves $13.5$ higher mAP and $3\times$ faster inference speed. Abundant qualitative results show that MapTR maintains stable and robust map construction quality in complex and various driving scenes. MapTR is of great application value in autonomous driving. Code and more demos are available at \url{https://github.com/hustvl/MapTR}.
abstract_zh: 高清地图提供了丰富且精确的驾驶场景环境信息，是自动驾驶系统规划中不可或缺的基础组成部分。我们推出了 MapTR，这是一种结构化的端到端 Transformer，用于高效的在线矢量化高清地图构建。我们提出了一种统一的排列等效建模方法，即将图元建模为具有一组等效排列的点集，它准确地描述了图元的形状并稳定了学习过程。我们设计了一种分层查询嵌入方案来灵活地编码结构化地图信息并为地图元素学习执行分层二分匹配。在 nuScenes 数据集上现有的矢量化地图构建方法中，MapTR 仅通过摄像头输入即可实现最佳性能和效率。特别是，MapTR-nano 在 RTX 3090 上以实时推理速度（25.1 美元 FPS）运行，比现有最先进的基于相机的方法快 8 倍，同时实现高 5.0 美元的 mAP。即使与现有最先进的多模态方法相比，MapTR-nano 的 mAP 提高了 0.7 美元，MapTR-tiny 的 mAP 提高了 13.5 美元，推理速度提高了 3 倍。大量的定性结果表明，MapTR在复杂多样的驾驶场景中保持稳定、鲁棒的地图构建质量。 MapTR在自动驾驶方面具有巨大的应用价值。代码和更多演示可在 \url{https://github.com/hustvl/MapTR} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MapTR，一种基于结构化Transformer的在线矢量化高精地图构建方法，旨在提升自动驾驶系统的环境感知效率与精度。
AI.motivation: 高精地图是自动驾驶规划的关键，但传统方法依赖多传感器且成本高，需开发高效、单目相机输入的在线地图构建方案。
AI.method: 提出统一的置换等效建模方法，将地图元素建模为可置换点集，并设计分层查询嵌入方案与分层二分图匹配机制，实现结构化地图信息编码与学习。
AI.result: MapTR-nano在RTX 3090上以25.1 FPS实时推理，较最佳相机方法快8倍且mAP高5.0；较多模态方法mAP高0.7，MapTR-tiny更达13.5 mAP提升与3倍加速。
AI.conclusion: MapTR在复杂场景中展现稳定鲁棒性，为自动驾驶提供高效低成本的高精地图构建方案，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Tianjia Zhang,Yuen-Fui Lau,Qifeng Chen
title: A Portable Multiscopic Camera for Novel View and Time Synthesis in Dynamic Scenes
title_zh: 用于动态场景中新颖视图和时间合成的便携式多视场相机
abstract: We present a portable multiscopic camera system with a dedicated model for novel view and time synthesis in dynamic scenes. Our goal is to render high-quality images for a dynamic scene from any viewpoint at any time using our portable multiscopic camera. To achieve such novel view and time synthesis, we develop a physical multiscopic camera equipped with five cameras to train a neural radiance field (NeRF) in both time and spatial domains for dynamic scenes. Our model maps a 6D coordinate (3D spatial position, 1D temporal coordinate, and 2D viewing direction) to view-dependent and time-varying emitted radiance and volume density. Volume rendering is applied to render a photo-realistic image at a specified camera pose and time. To improve the robustness of our physical camera, we propose a camera parameter optimization module and a temporal frame interpolation module to promote information propagation across time. We conduct experiments on both real-world and synthetic datasets to evaluate our system, and the results show that our approach outperforms alternative solutions qualitatively and quantitatively. Our code and dataset are available at https://yuenfuilau.github.io.
summary: We present a portable multiscopic camera system with a dedicated model for novel view and time synthesis in dynamic scenes. Our goal is to render high-quality images for a dynamic scene from any viewpoint at any time using our portable multiscopic camera. To achieve such novel view and time synthesis, we develop a physical multiscopic camera equipped with five cameras to train a neural radiance field (NeRF) in both time and spatial domains for dynamic scenes. Our model maps a 6D coordinate (3D spatial position, 1D temporal coordinate, and 2D viewing direction) to view-dependent and time-varying emitted radiance and volume density. Volume rendering is applied to render a photo-realistic image at a specified camera pose and time. To improve the robustness of our physical camera, we propose a camera parameter optimization module and a temporal frame interpolation module to promote information propagation across time. We conduct experiments on both real-world and synthetic datasets to evaluate our system, and the results show that our approach outperforms alternative solutions qualitatively and quantitatively. Our code and dataset are available at https://yuenfuilau.github.io.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种便携式多视场相机系统，具有专用模型，可在动态场景中实现新颖的视图和时间合成。我们的目标是使用我们的便携式多视场相机随时从任何角度渲染动态场景的高质量图像。为了实现这种新颖的视图和时间合成，我们开发了一种配备五个摄像机的物理多视场摄像机，用于在动态场景的时间和空间域上训练神经辐射场（NeRF）。我们的模型将 6D 坐标（3D 空间位置、1D 时间坐标和 2D 观察方向）映射到与视图相关且随时间变化的发射辐射亮度和体积密度。体积渲染用于在指定的相机姿势和时间渲染逼真的图像。为了提高物理相机的鲁棒性，我们提出了相机参数优化模块和时间帧插值模块来促进跨时间的信息传播。我们对现实世界和合成数据集进行实验来评估我们的系统，结果表明我们的方法在质量和数量上都优于替代解决方案。我们的代码和数据集可在 https://yuenfuilau.github.io 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种便携式多视角相机系统，用于动态场景中的新视角和时间合成，通过神经辐射场（NeRF）实现高质量图像渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在动态场景中同时实现任意视角和时间的高质量图像合成，需解决时空信息建模与渲染的挑战。
AI.method: 设计搭载五摄像头的物理多视角相机，结合6D坐标映射（3D空间+1D时间+2D视角）的NeRF模型，并引入相机参数优化与时间帧插值模块增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在真实与合成数据集上均优于现有方法，定性与定量结果验证了系统有效性，代码与数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过物理相机与NeRF的结合，为动态场景的时空合成提供了高效解决方案，展示了多模态信息融合的潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种便携式多视角相机系统，用于动态场景中的新视角和时间合成，通过神经辐射场（NeRF）实现高质量图像渲染。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法难以在动态场景中同时实现任意视角和时间的高质量图像合成，需解决时空信息建模与渲染的挑战。
ai_content.method: 设计搭载五摄像头的物理多视角相机，结合6D坐标映射（3D空间+1D时间+2D视角）的NeRF模型，并引入相机参数优化与时间帧插值模块增强鲁棒性。
ai_content.result: 在真实与合成数据集上均优于现有方法，定性与定量结果验证了系统有效性，代码与数据集已开源。
ai_content.conclusion: 该系统通过物理相机与NeRF的结合，为动态场景的时空合成提供了高效解决方案，展示了多模态信息融合的潜力。

search_text: A Portable Multiscopic Camera for Novel View and Time Synthesis in Dynamic Scenes 用于动态场景中新颖视图和时间合成的便携式多视场相机 We present a portable multiscopic camera system with a dedicated model for novel view and time synthesis in dynamic scenes. Our goal is to render high-quality images for a dynamic scene from any viewpoint at any time using our portable multiscopic camera. To achieve such novel view and time synthesis, we develop a physical multiscopic camera equipped with five cameras to train a neural radiance field (NeRF) in both time and spatial domains for dynamic scenes. Our model maps a 6D coordinate (3D spatial position, 1D temporal coordinate, and 2D viewing direction) to view-dependent and time-varying emitted radiance and volume density. Volume rendering is applied to render a photo-realistic image at a specified camera pose and time. To improve the robustness of our physical camera, we propose a camera parameter optimization module and a temporal frame interpolation module to promote information propagation across time. We conduct experiments on both real-world and synthetic datasets to evaluate our system, and the results show that our approach outperforms alternative solutions qualitatively and quantitatively. Our code and dataset are available at https://yuenfuilau.github.io. 我们提出了一种便携式多视场相机系统，具有专用模型，可在动态场景中实现新颖的视图和时间合成。我们的目标是使用我们的便携式多视场相机随时从任何角度渲染动态场景的高质量图像。为了实现这种新颖的视图和时间合成，我们开发了一种配备五个摄像机的物理多视场摄像机，用于在动态场景的时间和空间域上训练神经辐射场（NeRF）。我们的模型将 6D 坐标（3D 空间位置、1D 时间坐标和 2D 观察方向）映射到与视图相关且随时间变化的发射辐射亮度和体积密度。体积渲染用于在指定的相机姿势和时间渲染逼真的图像。为了提高物理相机的鲁棒性，我们提出了相机参数优化模块和时间帧插值模块来促进跨时间的信息传播。我们对现实世界和合成数据集进行实验来评估我们的系统，结果表明我们的方法在质量和数量上都优于替代解决方案。我们的代码和数据集可在 https://yuenfuilau.github.io 获取。 本文提出一种便携式多视角相机系统，用于动态场景中的新视角和时间合成，通过神经辐射场（NeRF）实现高质量图像渲染。 Tianjia Zhang,Yuen-Fui Lau,Qifeng Chen cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Bettina Könighofer,Roderick Bloem,Rüdiger Ehlers,Christian Pek
title: Correct-by-Construction Runtime Enforcement in AI -- A Survey
title_zh: 人工智能中的构造修正运行时执行——一项调查
abstract: Runtime enforcement refers to the theories, techniques, and tools for enforcing correct behavior with respect to a formal specification of systems at runtime. In this paper, we are interested in techniques for constructing runtime enforcers for the concrete application domain of enforcing safety in AI. We discuss how safety is traditionally handled in the field of AI and how more formal guarantees on the safety of a self-learning agent can be given by integrating a runtime enforcer. We survey a selection of work on such enforcers, where we distinguish between approaches for discrete and continuous action spaces. The purpose of this paper is to foster a better understanding of advantages and limitations of different enforcement techniques, focusing on the specific challenges that arise due to their application in AI. Finally, we present some open challenges and avenues for future work.
summary: Runtime enforcement refers to the theories, techniques, and tools for enforcing correct behavior with respect to a formal specification of systems at runtime. In this paper, we are interested in techniques for constructing runtime enforcers for the concrete application domain of enforcing safety in AI. We discuss how safety is traditionally handled in the field of AI and how more formal guarantees on the safety of a self-learning agent can be given by integrating a runtime enforcer. We survey a selection of work on such enforcers, where we distinguish between approaches for discrete and continuous action spaces. The purpose of this paper is to foster a better understanding of advantages and limitations of different enforcement techniques, focusing on the specific challenges that arise due to their application in AI. Finally, we present some open challenges and avenues for future work.
abstract_zh: 运行时强制是指在运行时强制执行系统正式规范的正确行为的理论、技术和工具。在本文中，我们感兴趣的是为人工智能中强制安全的具体应用领域构建运行时强制器的技术。我们讨论了人工智能领域传统上如何处理安全性，以及如何通过集成运行时执行器来对自学习代理的安全性提供更正式的保证。我们调查了有关此类执行者的一系列工作，其中我们区分了离散和连续行动空间的方法。本文的目的是促进人们更好地理解不同执法技术的优点和局限性，重点关注它们在人工智能中的应用所带来的具体挑战。最后，我们提出了一些未来工作的开放挑战和途径。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了在人工智能领域中通过运行时强制技术确保系统安全性的方法，重点分析离散和连续动作空间的强制技术，并探讨其挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 传统AI安全机制缺乏形式化保证，需通过运行时强制器为自学习代理提供可验证的安全性保障。
AI.method: 系统梳理现有运行时强制技术，按动作空间类型（离散/连续）分类比较不同方法的实现机制与适用场景。
AI.result: 明确了各类强制技术的优缺点，指出了AI应用中实时性、动态适应性等独特挑战，并提出需加强跨学科方法融合的未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 运行时强制是提升AI安全性的关键途径，需进一步解决技术局限性以实现更可靠的安全保障机制。

authors_text: E. O. Rodrigues,A. Conci,T. B. Borchartt,A. C. Paiva,A. C. Silva,T. MacHenry
title: Comparing Results of Thermographic Images Based Diagnosis for Breast Diseases
title_zh: 比较基于热成像图像的乳腺疾病诊断结果
abstract: This paper examines the potential contribution of infrared (IR) imaging in breast diseases detection. It compares obtained results using some algorithms for detection of malignant breast conditions such as Support Vector Machine (SVM) regarding the consistency of different approaches when applied to public data. Moreover, in order to avail the actual IR imaging's capability as a complement on clinical trials and to promote researches using high-resolution IR imaging we deemed the use of a public database revised by confidently trained breast physicians as essential. Only the static acquisition protocol is regarded in our work. We used lO2 IR single breast images from the Pro Engenharia (PROENG) public database (54 normal and 48 with some finding). These images were collected from Universidade Federal de Pernambuco (UFPE) University's Hospital. We employed the same features proposed by the authors of the work that presented the best results and achieved an accuracy of 61.7 % and Youden index of 0.24 using the Sequential Minimal Optimization (SMO) classifier.
summary: This paper examines the potential contribution of infrared (IR) imaging in breast diseases detection. It compares obtained results using some algorithms for detection of malignant breast conditions such as Support Vector Machine (SVM) regarding the consistency of different approaches when applied to public data. Moreover, in order to avail the actual IR imaging's capability as a complement on clinical trials and to promote researches using high-resolution IR imaging we deemed the use of a public database revised by confidently trained breast physicians as essential. Only the static acquisition protocol is regarded in our work. We used lO2 IR single breast images from the Pro Engenharia (PROENG) public database (54 normal and 48 with some finding). These images were collected from Universidade Federal de Pernambuco (UFPE) University's Hospital. We employed the same features proposed by the authors of the work that presented the best results and achieved an accuracy of 61.7 % and Youden index of 0.24 using the Sequential Minimal Optimization (SMO) classifier.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了红外 (IR) 成像在乳腺疾病检测中的潜在贡献。它比较了使用一些用于检测恶性乳腺疾病的算法（例如支持向量机（SVM））获得的结果，以了解应用于公共数据时不同方法的一致性。此外，为了利用实际红外成像的功能作为临床试验的补充，并促进使用高分辨率红外成像的研究，我们认为使用由经过培训的乳腺医生自信地修改的公共数据库至关重要。我们的工作中只考虑静态采集协议。我们使用来自 Pro Engenharia (PROENG) 公共数据库的 102 个 IR 单乳腺图像（54 张正常图像，48 张有一些发现）。这些图像是从伯南布哥联邦大学 (UFPE) 大学医院收集的。我们采用了该工作作者提出的相同特征，使用顺序最小优化 (SMO) 分类器呈现了最佳结果，并实现了 61.7% 的准确率和 0.24 的 Youden 指数。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了红外热成像技术在乳腺疾病诊断中的应用潜力，并比较了不同算法（如SVM）在公共数据集上的诊断一致性。
AI.motivation: 红外成像作为临床试验的补充手段，需通过公共数据库验证其有效性，以推动高分辨率红外成像技术的研究。
AI.method: 使用PROENG数据库中的102张静态乳腺红外图像（54正常/48异常），应用文献中最佳特征提取方法，采用SMO分类器进行分类。
AI.result: SMO分类器实现61.7%的准确率和0.24的Youden指数，表明红外热成像在乳腺疾病检测中存在一定潜力但需优化。
AI.conclusion: 红外热成像可作为乳腺疾病诊断的辅助工具，但需进一步改进算法和数据质量以提高诊断准确性。
