authors_text: Ayoosh Bansal,Hunmin Kim,Simon Yu,Bo Li,Naira Hovakimyan,Marco Caccamo,Lui Sha
title: Verifiable Obstacle Detection
title_zh: 可验证的障碍物检测
abstract: Perception of obstacles remains a critical safety concern for autonomous vehicles. Real-world collisions have shown that the autonomy faults leading to fatal collisions originate from obstacle existence detection. Open source autonomous driving implementations show a perception pipeline with complex interdependent Deep Neural Networks. These networks are not fully verifiable, making them unsuitable for safety-critical tasks. In this work, we present a safety verification of an existing LiDAR based classical obstacle detection algorithm. We establish strict bounds on the capabilities of this obstacle detection algorithm. Given safety standards, such bounds allow for determining LiDAR sensor properties that would reliably satisfy the standards. Such analysis has as yet been unattainable for neural network based perception systems. We provide a rigorous analysis of the obstacle detection system with empirical results based on real-world sensor data.
summary: Perception of obstacles remains a critical safety concern for autonomous vehicles. Real-world collisions have shown that the autonomy faults leading to fatal collisions originate from obstacle existence detection. Open source autonomous driving implementations show a perception pipeline with complex interdependent Deep Neural Networks. These networks are not fully verifiable, making them unsuitable for safety-critical tasks. In this work, we present a safety verification of an existing LiDAR based classical obstacle detection algorithm. We establish strict bounds on the capabilities of this obstacle detection algorithm. Given safety standards, such bounds allow for determining LiDAR sensor properties that would reliably satisfy the standards. Such analysis has as yet been unattainable for neural network based perception systems. We provide a rigorous analysis of the obstacle detection system with empirical results based on real-world sensor data.
abstract_zh: 对障碍物的感知仍然是自动驾驶汽车的一个关键安全问题。现实世界的碰撞表明，导致致命碰撞的自主故障源于障碍物存在检测。开源自动驾驶实现展示了具有复杂的相互依赖的深度神经网络的感知管道。这些网络无法完全验证，因此不适合安全关键任务。在这项工作中，我们对现有的基于激光雷达的经典障碍物检测算法进行了安全验证。我们对该障碍物检测算法的功能建立了严格的限制。给定安全标准，这样的界限允许确定能够可靠地满足标准的 LiDAR 传感器属性。对于基于神经网络的感知系统来说，这种分析尚无法实现。我们根据真实世界的传感器数据提供了对障碍物检测系统的严格分析和实证结果。

AI.tldr: 本文针对自动驾驶中的障碍物检测问题，提出对经典LiDAR算法进行可验证性安全分析，以确保其满足安全标准。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶系统依赖不可验证的深度神经网络，导致安全风险；需通过可验证方法确保障碍物检测可靠性。
AI.method: 对传统LiDAR障碍物检测算法建立严格能力边界，结合安全标准分析传感器参数，通过真实数据验证有效性。
AI.result: 确定了满足安全标准的LiDAR传感器参数范围，验证了经典算法的可靠性，而神经网络方法尚未实现此类分析。
AI.conclusion: 经典算法可通过形式化验证满足安全要求，为自动驾驶提供更可信的感知基础，相比神经网络更具安全性。

authors_text: Kristina Gligorić,Irena Đorđević,Robert West
title: Biased Bytes: On the Validity of Estimating Food Consumption from Digital Traces
title_zh: 有偏差的字节：论根据数字痕迹估算食物消耗量的有效性
abstract: Given that measuring food consumption at a population scale is a challenging task, researchers have begun to explore digital traces (e.g., from social media or from food-tracking applications) as potential proxies. However, it remains unclear to what extent digital traces reflect real food consumption. The present study aims to bridge this gap by quantifying the link between dietary behaviors as captured via social media (Twitter) v.s. a food-tracking application (MyFoodRepo). We focus on the case of Switzerland and contrast images of foods collected through the two platforms, by designing and deploying a novel crowdsourcing framework for estimating biases with respect to nutritional properties and appearance. We find that the food type distributions in social media v.s. food tracking diverge; e.g., bread is 2.5 times more frequent among consumed and tracked foods than on Twitter, whereas cake is 12 times more frequent on Twitter. Controlling for the different food type distributions, we contrast consumed and tracked foods of a given type with foods shared on Twitter. Across food types, food posted on Twitter is perceived as tastier, more caloric, less healthy, less likely to have been consumed at home, more complex, and larger-portioned, compared to consumed and tracked foods. The fact that there is a divergence between food consumption as measured via the two platforms implies that at least one of the two is not a faithful representation of the true food consumption in the general Swiss population. Thus, researchers should be attentive and aim to establish evidence of validity before using digital traces as a proxy for the true food consumption of a general population. We conclude by discussing the potential sources of these biases and their implications, outlining pitfalls and threats to validity, and proposing actionable ways for overcoming them.

The fact that there is a divergence between food consumption as measured via the two platforms implies that at least one of the two is not a faithful representation of the true food consumption in the general Swiss population. abstract_zh: 鉴于测量人口规模的食物消费是一项具有挑战性的任务，研究人员已开始探索数字痕迹（例如来自社交媒体或食物跟踪应用程序）作为潜在的代理。然而，目前尚不清楚数字痕迹在多大程度上反映了真实的食品消费。本研究旨在通过量化社交媒体（Twitter）与社交媒体捕获的饮食行为之间的联系来缩小这一差距。食品跟踪应用程序 (MyFoodRepo)。我们重点关注瑞士的案例，通过设计和部署一个新颖的众包框架来估计营养特性和外观方面的偏差，并对比通过两个平台收集的食品图像。我们发现社交媒体中的食物类型分布与社交媒体中的食物类型分布不同。食品追踪出现分歧；例如，面包在 Twitter 上被消费和跟踪的食物频率是 Twitter 上的 2.5 倍，而蛋糕在 Twitter 上的频率是 Twitter 的 12 倍。控制不同食物类型的分布，我们将消费和跟踪的特定类型的食物与 Twitter 上分享的食物进行对比。在各种食物类型中，与消费和追踪的食物相比，推特上发布的食物被认为更美味、热量更高、不太健康、不太可能在家里食用、更复杂、份量更大。通过两个平台衡量的食品消费量之间存在差异这一事实意味着，两个平台中至少有一个不能忠实代表瑞士普通人口的真实食品消费量。因此，研究人员在使用数字痕迹作为一般人群真实食物消费的替代指标之前，应该小心并致力于建立有效性证据。最后，我们讨论了这些偏见的潜在来源及其影响，概述了有效性的陷阱和威胁，并提出了克服它们的可行方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究通过数字痕迹（如社交媒体和食物追踪应用）估计食物消费的有效性，发现两者存在显著偏差。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以大规模测量食物消费，数字痕迹被提出作为替代方案，但其准确性尚未明确验证。
AI.method: 对比瑞士社交媒体（Twitter）与食物追踪应用（MyFoodRepo）的食物数据，设计众包框架分析营养属性与外观的偏差。
AI.result: 社交媒体与食物追踪数据中食物类型分布差异显著（如面包在追踪数据中更常见，蛋糕在社交媒体中更常见），且社交媒体食物被感知为更美味、更高热量但更不健康。
AI.conclusion: 数字痕迹无法准确反映真实食物消费，需谨慎验证其有效性，并需关注偏差来源及改进方法。

authors_text: Fatemeh Lotfi,Omid Semiari,Fatemeh Afghah
title: Evolutionary Deep Reinforcement Learning for Dynamic Slice Management in O-RAN
title_zh: O-RAN 中动态切片管理的进化深度强化学习
comment: This paper has been accepted for the 2022 IEEE Globecom Workshops (GC Wkshps)
comments: This paper has been accepted for the 2022 IEEE Globecom Workshops (GC Wkshps)
abstract: The next-generation wireless networks are required to satisfy a variety of services and criteria concurrently. To address upcoming strict criteria, a new open radio access network (O-RAN) with distinguishing features such as flexible design, disaggregated virtual and programmable components, and intelligent closed-loop control was developed. O-RAN slicing is being investigated as a critical strategy for ensuring network quality of service (QoS) in the face of changing circumstances. However, distinct network slices must be dynamically controlled to avoid service level agreement (SLA) variation caused by rapid changes in the environment. Therefore, this paper introduces a novel framework able to manage the network slices through provisioned resources intelligently. Due to diverse heterogeneous environments, intelligent machine learning approaches require sufficient exploration to handle the harshest situations in a wireless network and accelerate convergence. To solve this problem, a new solution is proposed based on evolutionary-based deep reinforcement learning (EDRL) to accelerate and optimize the slice management learning process in the radio access network's (RAN) intelligent controller (RIC) modules. To this end, the O-RAN slicing is represented as a Markov decision process (MDP) which is then solved optimally for resource allocation to meet service demand using the EDRL approach. In terms of reaching service demands, simulation results show that the proposed approach outperforms the DRL baseline by 62.2%.

Due to diverse heterogeneous environments, intelligent machine learning approaches require sufficient exploration to handle the harshest situations in a wireless network and accelerate convergence. To solve this problem, a new solution is proposed based on evolutionary-based deep reinforcement learning (EDRL) to accelerate and optimize the slice management learning process in the radio access network's (RAN) intelligent controller (RIC) modules. To this end, the O-RAN slicing is represented as a Markov decision process (MDP) which is then solved optimally for resource allocation to meet service demand using the EDRL approach. In terms of reaching service demands, simulation results show that the proposed approach outperforms the DRL baseline by 62.2%.
abstract_zh: 下一代无线网络需要同时满足多种服务和标准。为了满足即将到来的严格标准，开发了一种新型开放式无线接入网络（O-RAN），其具有灵活设计、分解虚拟和可编程组件以及智能闭环控制等显着特点。 O-RAN 切片正在被研究作为在不断变化的情况下确保网络服务质量 (QoS) 的关键策略。然而，必须动态控制不同的网络切片，以避免环境快速变化引起的服务级别协议（SLA）变化。因此，本文引入了一种新颖的框架，能够通过配置的资源智能地管理网络切片。由于异构环境多样化，智能机器学习方法需要充分探索才能处理无线网络中最恶劣的情况并加速融合。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种基于进化的深度强化学习（EDRL）的新解决方案，以加速和优化无线接入网络（RAN）智能控制器（RIC）模块中的切片管理学习过程。为此，O-RAN 切片被表示为马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP)，然后使用 EDRL 方法优化资源分配以满足服务需求。在满足服务需求方面，仿真结果表明，所提出的方法比 DRL 基线高出 62.2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于进化深度强化学习（EDRL）的框架，用于在O-RAN中动态管理网络切片。
AI.motivation: 下一代无线网络需要满足多种服务和标准，而O-RAN切片是确保服务质量的关键策略，但需要动态控制以避免服务等级协议（SLA）的变化。
AI.method: 本文将O-RAN切片建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并采用进化深度强化学习（EDRL）方法优化资源分配。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该方法在满足服务需求方面比深度强化学习（DRL）基线方法提高了62.2%。
AI.conclusion: 基于进化深度强化学习的框架能够有效优化O-RAN中的网络切片管理，提高资源分配效率和服务质量。

authors_text: Kristina Gligorić,Justyna Częstochowska,Ashton Anderson,Robert West
title: Anticipated versus Actual Effects of Platform Design Change: A Case Study of Twitter's Character Limit
title_zh: 平台设计变更的预期效果与实际效果：Twitter 字符限制案例研究
abstract: The design of online platforms is both critically important and challenging, as any changes may lead to unintended consequences, and it can be hard to predict how users will react. Here we conduct a case study of a particularly important real-world platform design change: Twitter's decision to double the character limit from 140 to 280 characters to soothe users' need to ''cram'' or ''squeeze'' their tweets, informed by modeling of historical user behavior. In our analysis, we contrast Twitter's anticipated pre-intervention predictions about user behavior with actual post-intervention user behavior: Did the platform design change lead to the intended user behavior shifts, or did a gap between anticipated and actual behavior emerge? Did different user groups react differently? We find that even though users do not ''cram'' as much under 280 characters as they used to under 140 characters, emergent ``cramming'' at the new limit seems to not have been taken into account when designing the platform change. Furthermore, investigating textual features, we find that, although post-intervention ''crammed'' tweets are longer, their syntactic and semantic characteristics remain similar and indicative of ''squeezing''. Applying the same approach as Twitter policy-makers, we create updated counterfactual estimates and find that the character limit would need to be increased further to reduce cramming that re-emerged at the new limit. We contribute to the rich literature studying online user behavior with an empirical study that reveals a dynamic interaction between platform design and user behavior, with immediate policy and practical implications for the design of socio-technical systems.
summary: The design of online platforms is both critically important and challenging, as any changes may lead to unintended consequences, and it can be hard to predict how users will react. Here we conduct a case study of a particularly important real-world platform design change: Twitter's decision to double the character limit from 140 to 280 characters to soothe users' need to ''cram'' or ''squeeze'' their tweets, informed by modeling of historical user behavior. In our analysis, we contrast Twitter's anticipated pre-intervention predictions about user behavior with actual post-intervention user behavior: Did the platform design change lead to the intended user behavior shifts, or did a gap between anticipated and actual behavior emerge? Did different user groups react differently? We find that even though users do not ''cram'' as much under 280 characters as they used to under 140 characters, emergent ``cramming'' at the new limit seems to not have been taken into account when designing the platform change. Furthermore, investigating textual features, we find that, although post-intervention ''crammed'' tweets are longer, their syntactic and semantic characteristics remain similar and indicative of ''squeezing''. Applying the same approach as Twitter policy-makers, we create updated counterfactual estimates and find that the character limit would need to be increased further to reduce cramming that re-emerged at the new limit. We contribute to the rich literature studying online user behavior with an empirical study that reveals a dynamic interaction between platform design and user behavior, with immediate policy and practical implications for the design of socio-technical systems.
abstract_zh: 在线平台的设计既至关重要又具有挑战性，因为任何变化都可能导致意想不到的后果，并且很难预测用户将如何反应。在这里，我们对现实世界中一个特别重要的平台设计变化进行了案例研究：Twitter 决定将字符限制从 140 个字符增加一倍到 280 个字符，以缓解用户“临时抱佛脚”或“挤压”其推文的需要，这是通过对历史用户行为进行建模而得出的结论。在我们的分析中，我们将 Twitter 对用户行为的预期干预前预测与干预后的实际用户行为进行了对比：平台设计的变化是否导致了预期的用户行为发生变化，或者预期行为与实际行为之间是否出现了差距？ Did different user groups react differently?我们发现，尽管用户在 280 个字符以下“临时抱佛脚”的次数不像过去在 140 个字符以下的情况那么多，但在设计平台变更时似乎没有考虑到新限制下的紧急“临时抱佛脚”。此外，通过调查文本特征，我们发现，尽管干预后“塞满”的推文更长，但它们的句法和语义特征仍然相似，并表明“挤压”。采用与 Twitter 政策制定者相同的方法，我们创建了更新的反事实估计，并发现字符限制需要进一步增加，以减少在新限制下重新出现的填鸭式行为。我们通过实证研究为研究在线用户行为的丰富文献做出了贡献，该研究揭示了平台设计和用户行为之间的动态交互，对社会技术系统的设计具有直接的政策和实际意义。

AI.tldr: 本文通过案例研究分析Twitter字符限制调整前后的用户行为变化，探讨平台设计变更的预期效果与实际效果之间的差异。
AI.motivation: 在线平台设计变更可能带来不可预见的后果，本文旨在验证Twitter增加字符限制是否有效减少用户‘压缩’行为，并揭示设计决策与用户行为的动态关系。
AI.method: 基于历史用户行为建模预测干预前的用户行为，对比调整后实际用户行为数据，分析文本特征并构建反事实估计模型。
AI.result: 用户确实在280字符限制下减少压缩行为，但新限制未被充分考虑导致压缩行为再次出现；文本特征显示‘压缩’语义未改变，需进一步增加字符限制以减少压缩。
AI.conclusion: 平台设计与用户行为存在动态交互，设计变更需持续评估和调整，为社会技术系统设计提供实践启示。

authors_text: É. O. Rodrigues,L. Torok,P. Liatsis,J. Viterbo,A. Conci
title: k-MS: A novel clustering algorithm based on morphological reconstruction
title_zh: k-MS：一种基于形态重建的新型聚类算法
abstract: This work proposes a clusterization algorithm called k-Morphological Sets (k-MS), based on morphological reconstruction and heuristics. k-MS is faster than the CPU-parallel k-Means in worst case scenarios and produces enhanced visualizations of the dataset as well as very distinct clusterizations. It is also faster than similar clusterization methods that are sensitive to density and shapes such as Mitosis and TRICLUST. In addition, k-MS is deterministic and has an intrinsic sense of maximal clusters that can be created for a given input sample and input parameters, differing from k-Means and other clusterization algorithms. In other words, given a constant k, a structuring element and a dataset, k-MS produces k or less clusters without using random/ pseudo-random functions. Finally, the proposed algorithm also provides a straightforward means for removing noise from images or datasets in general.
summary: This work proposes a clusterization algorithm called k-Morphological Sets (k-MS), based on morphological reconstruction and heuristics. k-MS is faster than the CPU-parallel k-Means in worst case scenarios and produces enhanced visualizations of the dataset as well as very distinct clusterizations. It is also faster than similar clusterization methods that are sensitive to density and shapes such as Mitosis and TRICLUST. In addition, k-MS is deterministic and has an intrinsic sense of maximal clusters that can be created for a given input sample and input parameters, differing from k-Means and other clusterization algorithms. In other words, given a constant k, a structuring element and a dataset, k-MS produces k or less clusters without using random/ pseudo-random functions. Finally, the proposed algorithm also provides a straightforward means for removing noise from images or datasets in general.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种基于形态重建和启发式的聚类算法，称为 k-形态集 (k-MS)。在最坏的情况下，k-MS 比 CPU 并行 k-Means 更快，并产生增强的数据集可视化以及非常独特的聚类。它也比对密度和形状敏感的类似聚类方法（例如有丝分裂和 TRICLUST）更快。此外，k-MS 是确定性的，并且具有可以为给定输入样本和输入参数创建的最大聚类的内在意义，这与 k-Means 和其他聚类算法不同。换句话说，给定常数 k、结构元素和数据集，k-MS 无需使用随机/伪随机函数即可生成 k 个或更少的簇。最后，所提出的算法还提供了一种从图像或数据集中消除噪声的简单方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于形态学重构和启发式的新型聚类算法k-MS，旨在改进传统聚类方法的效率和确定性。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类算法如k-Means在处理复杂数据集时存在速度慢、对密度和形状敏感以及依赖随机函数等问题，需开发更高效且确定的聚类方法。
AI.method: 结合形态学重构技术与启发式规则设计k-MS算法，通过结构元素和参数确定最大聚类数，无需随机函数即可生成k个或更少的聚类。
AI.result: k-MS在最坏情况下比CPU并行k-Means更快，且优于Mitosis和TRICLUST等密度敏感算法，同时能有效去噪并生成更清晰的数据可视化结果。
AI.conclusion: k-MS作为一种确定性聚类算法，不仅提升了聚类效率，还提供了内在的最大聚类数限制和噪声去除能力，为数据集分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xiaoming Sun,Jialin Zhang,Shuo Zhang,Zhijie Zhang
title: Improved Deterministic Algorithms for Non-monotone Submodular Maximization
title_zh: 非单调子模最大化的改进确定性算法
comment: 25 pages; added a new result about the linear packing constraints
comments: 25 pages; added a new result about the linear packing constraints
abstract: Submodular maximization is one of the central topics in combinatorial optimization. It has found numerous applications in the real world. In the past decades, a series of algorithms have been proposed for this problem. However, most of the state-of-the-art algorithms are randomized. There remain non-negligible gaps with respect to approximation ratios between deterministic and randomized algorithms in submodular maximization. In this paper, we propose deterministic algorithms with improved approximation ratios for non-monotone submodular maximization. Specifically, for the matroid constraint, we provide a deterministic $0.283-o(1)$ approximation algorithm, while the previous best deterministic algorithm only achieves a $1/4$ approximation ratio. For the knapsack constraint, we provide a deterministic $1/4$ approximation algorithm, while the previous best deterministic algorithm only achieves a $1/6$ approximation ratio. For the linear packing constraints with large widths, we provide a deterministic $1/6-ε$ approximation algorithm. To the best of our knowledge, there is currently no deterministic approximation algorithm for the constraints.
summary: Submodular maximization is one of the central topics in combinatorial optimization. It has found numerous applications in the real world. In the past decades, a series of algorithms have been proposed for this problem. However, most of the state-of-the-art algorithms are randomized. There remain non-negligible gaps with respect to approximation ratios between deterministic and randomized algorithms in submodular maximization. In this paper, we propose deterministic algorithms with improved approximation ratios for non-monotone submodular maximization. Specifically, for the matroid constraint, we provide a deterministic $0.283-o(1)$ approximation algorithm, while the previous best deterministic algorithm only achieves a $1/4$ approximation ratio. For the knapsack constraint, we provide a deterministic $1/4$ approximation algorithm, while the previous best deterministic algorithm only achieves a $1/6$ approximation ratio. For the linear packing constraints with large widths, we provide a deterministic $1/6-ε$ approximation algorithm. To the best of our knowledge, there is currently no deterministic approximation algorithm for the constraints.
abstract_zh: 子模最大化是组合优化的中心主题之一。它在现实世界中得到了广泛的应用。在过去的几十年里，针对这个问题提出了一系列算法。然而，大多数最先进的算法都是随机的。子模最大化中确定性算法和随机算法之间的近似比仍然存在不可忽略的差距。在本文中，我们提出了具有改进的非单调子模最大化近似率的确定性算法。具体来说，对于拟阵约束，我们提供了确定性的 $0.283-o(1)$ 近似算法，而之前的最佳确定性算法仅实现了 $1/4$ 近似率。对于背包约束，我们提供了确定性的$1/4$近似算法，而之前最好的确定性算法仅达到了$1/6$的近似比。对于大宽度的线性堆积约束，我们提供了确定性的$1/6-ε$近似算法。据我们所知，目前还没有针对约束的确定性近似算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的确定性算法，用于解决非单调子模最大化问题，并在不同约束条件下提升了近似比。
AI.motivation: 现有最先进的子模最大化算法多为随机化方法，确定性算法在近似比上存在明显差距，需改进确定性算法以缩小这一差距。
AI.method: 设计针对不同约束（如matroid、knapsack、线性填充）的确定性算法，通过优化算法结构提升近似比。
AI.result: 在matroid约束下实现0.283-o(1)近似比，在knapsack约束下提升至1/4，在宽线性填充约束下达到1/6-ε近似比。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的确定性算法显著提升了非单调子模最大化问题的近似比，部分约束条件下达到当前最优水平。

authors_text: Sk Imran Hossain,Jocelyn de Goër de Herve,David Abrial,Richard Emillion,Isabelle Lebertb,Yann Frendo,Delphine Martineau,Olivier Lesens,Engelbert Mephu Nguifo
title: Expert Opinion Elicitation for Assisting Deep Learning based Lyme Disease Classifier with Patient Data
title_zh: 利用患者数据辅助基于深度学习的莱姆病分类器的专家意见征求
abstract: Diagnosing erythema migrans (EM) skin lesion, the most common early symptom of Lyme disease using deep learning techniques can be effective to prevent long-term complications. Existing works on deep learning based EM recognition only utilizes lesion image due to the lack of a dataset of Lyme disease related images with associated patient data. Physicians rely on patient information about the background of the skin lesion to confirm their diagnosis. In order to assist the deep learning model with a probability score calculated from patient data, this study elicited opinion from fifteen doctors. For the elicitation process, a questionnaire with questions and possible answers related to EM was prepared. Doctors provided relative weights to different answers to the questions. We converted doctors evaluations to probability scores using Gaussian mixture based density estimation. For elicited probability model validation, we exploited formal concept analysis and decision tree. The elicited probability scores can be utilized to make image based deep learning Lyme disease pre-scanners robust.
summary: Diagnosing erythema migrans (EM) skin lesion, the most common early symptom of Lyme disease using deep learning techniques can be effective to prevent long-term complications. Existing works on deep learning based EM recognition only utilizes lesion image due to the lack of a dataset of Lyme disease related images with associated patient data. Physicians rely on patient information about the background of the skin lesion to confirm their diagnosis. In order to assist the deep learning model with a probability score calculated from patient data, this study elicited opinion from fifteen doctors. For the elicitation process, a questionnaire with questions and possible answers related to EM was prepared. Doctors provided relative weights to different answers to the questions. We converted doctors evaluations to probability scores using Gaussian mixture based density estimation. For elicited probability model validation, we exploited formal concept analysis and decision tree. The elicited probability scores can be utilized to make image based deep learning Lyme disease pre-scanners robust.
abstract_zh: 使用深度学习技术诊断游走性红斑 (EM) 皮肤病变（莱姆病最常见的早期症状）可以有效预防长期并发症。由于缺乏莱姆病相关图像和相关患者数据的数据集，现有基于深度学习的 EM 识别工作仅利用病变图像。医生依靠患者有关皮肤病变背景的信息来确认他们的诊断。为了通过根据患者数据计算出的概率评分来辅助深度学习模型，本研究征求了 15 名医生的意见。对于启发过程，准备了一份包含与 EM 相关的问题和可能答案的调查问卷。医生对问题的不同答案给出了相对权重。我们使用基于高斯混合的密度估计将医生的评估转换为概率分数。为了验证引出的概率模型，我们利用了形式概念分析和决策树。得出的概率分数可用于使基于图像的深度学习莱姆病预扫描仪变得稳健。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过收集医生对莱姆病患者数据的专家意见，生成概率分数以增强基于深度学习的皮肤病变分类模型。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型仅依赖病变图像进行莱姆病诊断，缺乏结合患者背景信息的能力，而医生实际诊断时需综合患者数据。
AI.method: 设计问卷收集15位医生对莱姆病相关问题的回答权重，利用高斯混合密度估计转化为概率分数，并通过形式概念分析和决策树验证模型有效性。
AI.result: 生成的专家概率分数可提升深度学习模型在患者数据辅助下的诊断鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 整合医生经验与患者数据的混合模型能有效改进深度学习在莱姆病早期诊断中的应用。

motivation: 现有深度学习模型仅依赖病变图像进行莱姆病诊断，缺乏结合患者背景信息的能力，而医生实际诊断时需综合患者数据。
method: 设计问卷收集15位医生对莱姆病相关问题的回答权重，利用高斯混合密度估计转化为概率分数，并通过形式概念分析和决策树验证模型有效性。
result: 生成的专家概率分数可提升深度学习模型在患者数据辅助下的诊断鲁棒性。
conclusion: 整合医生经验与患者数据的混合模型能有效改进深度学习在莱姆病早期诊断中的应用。
search_text: Expert Opinion Elicitation for Assisting Deep Learning based Lyme Disease Classifier with Patient Data 利用患者数据辅助基于深度学习的莱姆病分类器的专家意见征求 Diagnosing erythema migrans (EM) skin lesion, the most common early symptom of Lyme disease using deep learning techniques can be effective to prevent long-term complications. Existing works on deep learning based EM recognition only utilizes lesion image due to the lack of a dataset of Lyme disease related images with associated patient data. Physicians rely on patient information about the background of the skin lesion to confirm their diagnosis. In order to assist the deep learning model with a probability score calculated from patient data, this study elicited opinion from fifteen doctors. For the elicitation process, a questionnaire with questions and possible answers related to EM was prepared. Doctors provided relative weights to different answers to the questions. We converted doctors evaluations to probability scores using Gaussian mixture based density estimation. For elicited probability model validation, we exploited formal concept analysis and decision tree. The elicited probability scores can be utilized to make image based deep learning Lyme disease pre-scanners robust. 使用深度学习技术诊断游走性红斑 (EM) 皮肤病变（莱姆病最常见的早期症状）可以有效预防长期并发症。由于缺乏莱姆病相关图像和相关患者数据的数据集，现有基于深度学习的 EM 识别工作仅利用病变图像。医生依靠患者有关皮肤病变背景的信息来确认他们的诊断。为了通过根据患者数据计算出的概率评分来辅助深度学习模型，本研究征求了 15 名医生的意见。对于启发过程，准备了一份包含与 EM 相关的问题和可能答案的调查问卷。医生对问题的不同答案给出了相对权重。我们使用基于高斯混合的密度估计将医生的评估转换为概率分数。为了验证引出的概率模型，我们利用了形式概念分析和决策树。得出的概率分数可用于使基于图像的深度学习莱姆病预扫描仪变得稳健。 本研究通过收集医生对莱姆病患者数据的专家意见，生成概率分数以增强基于深度学习的皮肤病变分类模型。 Sk Imran Hossain,Jocelyn de Goër de Herve,David Abrial,Richard Emillion,Isabelle Lebertb,Yann Frendo,Delphine Martineau,Olivier Lesens,Engelbert Mephu Nguifo cs.AI,eess.IV

authors_text: Yuchen Liang,Dmitry Krotov,Mohammed J. Zaki
title: Associative Learning for Network Embedding
title_zh: 网络嵌入的联想学习
comment: Accepted at the Eighth International Workshop on Deep Learning on Graphs: Methods and Applications (DLG-KDD 2022), Washington DC
comments: Accepted at the Eighth International Workshop on Deep Learning on Graphs: Methods and Applications (DLG-KDD 2022), Washington DC
abstract: The network embedding task is to represent the node in the network as a low-dimensional vector while incorporating the topological and structural information. Most existing approaches solve this problem by factorizing a proximity matrix, either directly or implicitly. In this work, we introduce a network embedding method from a new perspective, which leverages Modern Hopfield Networks (MHN) for associative learning. Our network learns associations between the content of each node and that node's neighbors. These associations serve as memories in the MHN. The recurrent dynamics of the network make it possible to recover the masked node, given that node's neighbors. Our proposed method is evaluated on different downstream tasks such as node classification and linkage prediction. The results show competitive performance compared to the common matrix factorization techniques and deep learning based methods.
summary: The network embedding task is to represent the node in the network as a low-dimensional vector while incorporating the topological and structural information. Most existing approaches solve this problem by factorizing a proximity matrix, either directly or implicitly. In this work, we introduce a network embedding method from a new perspective, which leverages Modern Hopfield Networks (MHN) for associative learning. Our network learns associations between the content of each node and that node's neighbors. These associations serve as memories in the MHN. The recurrent dynamics of the network make it possible to recover the masked node, given that node's neighbors. Our proposed method is evaluated on different downstream tasks such as node classification and linkage prediction. The results show competitive performance compared to the common matrix factorization techniques and deep learning based methods.
abstract_zh: 网络嵌入任务是将网络中的节点表示为低维向量，同时结合拓扑和结构信息。大多数现有方法通过直接或隐式分解邻近矩阵来解决这个问题。在这项工作中，我们从一个新的角度引入了一种网络嵌入方法，该方法利用现代霍普菲尔德网络（MHN）进行联想学习。我们的网络学习每个节点的内容和该节点的邻居之间的关联。这些关联充当 MHN 中的记忆。考虑到该节点的邻居，网络的循环动态使得恢复被屏蔽的节点成为可能。我们提出的方法在不同的下游任务（例如节点分类和链接预测）上进行评估。与常见的矩阵分解技术和基于深度学习的方法相比，结果显示出具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于联想学习的网络嵌入方法，利用现代霍普菲尔德网络（MHN）学习节点与邻居的关联关系，实现节点表示。
AI.motivation: 传统网络嵌入方法依赖邻近矩阵分解，难以有效捕捉节点间的复杂关联，需探索新范式提升表示能力。
AI.method: 通过MHN实现关联学习，将节点内容与邻居关联编码为记忆，利用网络递归动态恢复被遮蔽节点，生成低维嵌入表示。
AI.result: 在节点分类和链接预测任务中，该方法性能与矩阵分解及深度学习方法相当，展现出竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 联想学习为网络嵌入提供了新视角，验证了MHN在捕捉节点关联性方面的有效性，为后续研究奠定基础。

authors_text: E. O. Rodrigues,L. O. Rodrigues,L. S. N. Oliveira,A. Conci,P. Liatsis
title: Automated recognition of the pericardium contour on processed CT images using genetic algorithms
title_zh: 使用遗传算法在处理后的 CT 图像上自动识别心包轮廓
comment: ef:Computers in Biology and Medicine, Volume 87, 2017, Pages 38-45, ISSN 0010-4825
comments: ef:Computers in Biology and Medicine, Volume 87, 2017, Pages 38-45, ISSN 0010-4825
abstract: This work proposes the use of Genetic Algorithms (GA) in tracing and recognizing the pericardium contour of the human heart using Computed Tomography (CT) images. We assume that each slice of the pericardium can be modelled by an ellipse, the parameters of which need to be optimally determined. An optimal ellipse would be one that closely follows the pericardium contour and, consequently, separates appropriately the epicardial and mediastinal fats of the human heart. Tracing and automatically identifying the pericardium contour aids in medical diagnosis. Usually, this process is done manually or not done at all due to the effort required. Besides, detecting the pericardium may improve previously proposed automated methodologies that separate the two types of fat associated to the human heart. Quantification of these fats provides important health risk marker information, as they are associated with the development of certain cardiovascular pathologies. Finally, we conclude that GA offers satisfiable solutions in a feasible amount of processing time.
summary: This work proposes the use of Genetic Algorithms (GA) in tracing and recognizing the pericardium contour of the human heart using Computed Tomography (CT) images. We assume that each slice of the pericardium can be modelled by an ellipse, the parameters of which need to be optimally determined. An optimal ellipse would be one that closely follows the pericardium contour and, consequently, separates appropriately the epicardial and mediastinal fats of the human heart. Tracing and automatically identifying the pericardium contour aids in medical diagnosis. Usually, this process is done manually or not done at all due to the effort required. Besides, detecting the pericardium may improve previously proposed automated methodologies that separate the two types of fat associated to the human heart. Quantification of these fats provides important health risk marker information, as they are associated with the development of certain cardiovascular pathologies. Finally, we conclude that GA offers satisfiable solutions in a feasible amount of processing time.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出使用遗传算法（GA）通过计算机断层扫描（CT）图像来追踪和识别人类心脏的心包轮廓。我们假设心包的每个切片都可以用椭圆建模，需要优化确定其参数。最佳的椭圆是紧密贴合心包轮廓的椭圆，因此能够适当地分离人类心脏的心外膜和纵隔脂肪。追踪并自动识别心包轮廓有助于医学诊断。通常，此过程是手动完成的，或者由于需要付出努力而根本不完成。此外，检测心包可以改进先前提出的分离与人类心脏相关的两种类型脂肪的自动化方法。这些脂肪的定量提供了重要的健康风险标记信息，因为它们与某些心血管病理的发展相关。最后，我们得出结论，遗传算法在可行的处理时间内提供了令人满意的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出使用遗传算法在处理后的CT图像中自动识别人的心包轮廓。
AI.motivation: 手动识别心包轮廓耗时且易出错，而自动检测可提高诊断效率并量化心外膜与纵隔脂肪，为心血管疾病预测提供关键指标。
AI.method: 假设每层心包轮廓可由椭圆建模，通过遗传算法优化椭圆参数以最佳拟合实际轮廓，实现自动分割。
AI.result: 遗传算法在合理计算时间内提供了满足需求的心包轮廓识别方案。
AI.conclusion: 遗传算法能够有效且可行地解决心包轮廓自动识别问题，为相关医学影像分析提供新方法。

authors_text: É. O. Rodrigues,V. H. A. Pinheiro,P. Liatsis,A. Conci
title: Machine learning in the prediction of cardiac epicardial and mediastinal fat volumes
title_zh: 机器学习预测心脏心外膜和纵隔脂肪量
comment: ef:Computers in Biology and Medicine, Volume 89, 2017, Pages 520-529, ISSN 0010-4825,
comments: ef:Computers in Biology and Medicine, Volume 89, 2017, Pages 520-529, ISSN 0010-4825,
abstract: We propose a methodology to predict the cardiac epicardial and mediastinal fat volumes in computed tomography images using regression algorithms. The obtained results indicate that it is feasible to predict these fats with a high degree of correlation, thus alleviating the requirement for manual or automatic segmentation of both fat volumes. Instead, segmenting just one of them suffices, while the volume of the other may be predicted fairly precisely. The correlation coefficient obtained by the Rotation Forest algorithm using MLP Regressor for predicting the mediastinal fat based on the epicardial fat was 0.9876, with a relative absolute error of 14.4% and a root relative squared error of 15.7%. The best correlation coefficient obtained in the prediction of the epicardial fat based on the mediastinal was 0.9683 with a relative absolute error of 19.6% and a relative squared error of 24.9%. Moreover, we analysed the feasibility of using linear regressors, which provide an intuitive interpretation of the underlying approximations. In this case, the obtained correlation coefficient was 0.9534 for predicting the mediastinal fat based on the epicardial, with a relative absolute error of 31.6% and a root relative squared error of 30.1%. On the prediction of the epicardial fat based on the mediastinal fat, the correlation coefficient was 0.8531, with a relative absolute error of 50.43% and a root relative squared error of 52.06%. In summary, it is possible to speed up general medical analyses and some segmentation and quantification methods that are currently employed in the state-of-the-art by using this prediction approach, which consequently reduces costs and therefore enables preventive treatments that may lead to a reduction of health problems.
summary: We propose a methodology to predict the cardiac epicardial and mediastinal fat volumes in computed tomography images using regression algorithms. The obtained results indicate that it is feasible to predict these fats with a high degree of correlation, thus alleviating the requirement for manual or automatic segmentation of both fat volumes. Instead, segmenting just one of them suffices, while the volume of the other may be predicted fairly precisely. The correlation coefficient obtained by the Rotation Forest algorithm using MLP Regressor for predicting the mediastinal fat based on the epicardial fat was 0.9876, with a relative absolute error of 14.4% and a root relative squared error of 15.7%. The best correlation coefficient obtained in the prediction of the epicardial fat based on the mediastinal was 0.9683 with a relative absolute error of 19.6% and a relative squared error of 24.9%. Moreover, we analysed the feasibility of using linear regressors, which provide an intuitive interpretation of the underlying approximations. In this case, the obtained correlation coefficient was 0.9534 for predicting the mediastinal fat based on the epicardial, with a relative absolute error of 31.6% and a root relative squared error of 30.1%. On the prediction of the epicardial fat based on the mediastinal fat, the correlation coefficient was 0.8531, with a relative absolute error of 50.43% and a root relative squared error of 52.06%. In summary, it is possible to speed up general medical analyses and some segmentation and quantification methods that are currently employed in the state-of-the-art by using this prediction approach, which consequently reduces costs and therefore enables preventive treatments that may lead to a reduction of health problems.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用回归算法预测计算机断层扫描图像中心脏心外膜和纵隔脂肪体积的方法。获得的结果表明，预测这些具有高度相关性的脂肪是可行的，从而减轻了对两种脂肪体积进行手动或自动分割的要求。相反，仅分割其中一个就足够了，而另一个的体积可以相当精确地预测。使用MLP回归器根据心外膜脂肪预测纵隔脂肪的旋转森林算法得到的相关系数为0.9876，相对绝对误差为14.4%，根相对平方误差为15.7%。基于纵隔预测心外膜脂肪的最佳相关系数为0.9683，相对绝对误差为19.6%，相对平方误差为24.9%。此外，我们分析了使用线性回归器的可行性，它提供了对基本近似值的直观解释。本例中，根据心外膜预测纵隔脂肪，得到的相关系数为0.9534，相对绝对误差为31.6%，相对平方根误差为30.1%。根据纵隔脂肪预测心外膜脂肪，相关系数为0.8531，相对绝对误差为50.43%，根相对平方误差为52.06%。总之，通过使用这种预测方法，可以加速一般医学分析以及目前最先进的一些分割和量化方法，从而降低成本，从而实现可能导致减少健康问题的预防性治疗。

AI.motivation: 减少医学影像分析中手动或自动分割脂肪体积的时间成本，提高效率并降低医疗费用。
AI.method: 采用回归算法（如Rotation Forest与MLP回归器、线性回归器），通过预测一种脂肪体积来推算另一种脂肪体积，建立两者间的强相关性模型。
AI.result: Rotation Forest算法在心外膜脂肪预测纵隔脂肪时达到0.9876的相关系数（相对绝对误差14.4%），线性回归器相关系数为0.9534（相对绝对误差31.6%）。反向预测中，最佳相关系数为0.9683（相对绝对误差19.6%）。
AI.conclusion: 该预测方法可加速医学分析流程，降低分割与量化成本，为预防性治疗提供支持，从而减少健康问题。

search_text: Machine learning in the prediction of cardiac epicardial and mediastinal fat volumes 机器学习预测心脏心外膜和纵隔脂肪量 We propose a methodology to predict the cardiac epicardial and mediastinal fat volumes in computed tomography images using regression algorithms. The obtained results indicate that it is feasible to predict these fats with a high degree of correlation, thus alleviating the requirement for manual or automatic segmentation of both fat volumes. Instead, segmenting just one of them suffices, while the volume of the other may be predicted fairly precisely. The correlation coefficient obtained by the Rotation Forest algorithm using MLP Regressor for predicting the mediastinal fat based on the epicardial fat was 0.9876, with a relative absolute error of 14.4% and a root relative squared error of 15.7%. The best correlation coefficient obtained in the prediction of the epicardial fat based on the mediastinal was 0.9683 with a relative absolute error of 19.6% and a relative squared error of 24.9%. Moreover, we analysed the feasibility of using linear regressors, which provide an intuitive interpretation of the underlying approximations. In this case, the obtained correlation coefficient was 0.9534 for predicting the mediastinal fat based on the epicardial, with a relative absolute error of 31.6% and a root relative squared error of 30.1%. On the prediction of the epicardial fat based on the mediastinal fat, the correlation coefficient was 0.8531, with a relative absolute error of 50.43% and a root relative squared error of 52.06%. In summary, it is possible to speed up general medical analyses and some segmentation and quantification methods that are currently employed in the state-of-the-art by using this prediction approach, which consequently reduces costs and therefore enables preventive treatments that may lead to a reduction of health problems. 我们提出了一种使用回归算法预测计算机断层扫描图像中心脏心外膜和纵隔脂肪体积的方法。获得的结果表明，预测这些具有高度相关性的脂肪是可行的，从而减轻了对两种脂肪体积进行手动或自动分割的要求。相反，仅分割其中一个就足够了，而另一个的体积可以相当精确地预测。使用MLP回归器根据心外膜脂肪预测纵隔脂肪的旋转森林算法得到的相关系数为0.9876，相对绝对误差为14.4%，根相对平方误差为15.7%。基于纵隔预测心外膜脂肪的最佳相关系数为0.9683，相对绝对误差为19.6%，相对平方误差为24.9%。此外，我们分析了使用线性回归器的可行性，它提供了对基本近似值的直观解释。本例中，根据心外膜预测纵隔脂肪，得到的相关系数为0.9534，相对绝对误差为31.6%，相对平方根误差为30.1%。根据纵隔脂肪预测心外膜脂肪，相关系数为0.8531，相对绝对误差为50.43%，根相对平方误差为52.06%。总之，通过使用这种预测方法，可以加速一般医学分析以及目前最先进的一些分割和量化方法，从而降低成本，从而实现可能导致减少健康问题的预防性治疗。 本文提出了一种利用回归算法预测心脏心外膜和纵隔脂肪体积的方法，无需手动或自动分割两种脂肪体积。 É. authors_text: Partha Das,Sezer Karaoglu,Arjan Gijsenij,Theo Gevers
title: SIGNet: Intrinsic Image Decomposition by a Semantic and Invariant Gradient Driven Network for Indoor Scenes
title_zh: SIGNet：室内场景的语义和不变梯度驱动网络的本征图像分解
abstract: Intrinsic image decomposition (IID) is an under-constrained problem. Therefore, traditional approaches use hand crafted priors to constrain the problem. However, these constraints are limited when coping with complex scenes. Deep learning-based approaches learn these constraints implicitly through the data, but they often suffer from dataset biases (due to not being able to include all possible imaging conditions). In this paper, a combination of the two is proposed. Component specific priors like semantics and invariant features are exploited to obtain semantically and physically plausible reflectance transitions. These transitions are used to steer a progressive CNN with implicit homogeneity constraints to decompose reflectance and shading maps. An ablation study is conducted showing that the use of the proposed priors and progressive CNN increase the IID performance. State of the art performance on both our proposed dataset and the standard real-world IIW dataset shows the effectiveness of the proposed method. Code is made available at https://github.com/Morpheus3000/SIGNet
summary: Intrinsic image decomposition (IID) is an under-constrained problem. Therefore, traditional approaches use hand crafted priors to constrain the problem. However, these constraints are limited when coping with complex scenes. Deep learning-based approaches learn these constraints implicitly through the data, but they often suffer from dataset biases (due to not being able to include all possible imaging conditions). In this paper, a combination of the two is proposed. Component specific priors like semantics and invariant features are exploited to obtain semantically and physically plausible reflectance transitions. These transitions are used to steer a progressive CNN with implicit homogeneity constraints to decompose reflectance and shading maps. An ablation study is conducted showing that the use of the proposed priors and progressive CNN increase the IID performance. State of the art performance on both our proposed dataset and the standard real-world IIW dataset shows the effectiveness of the proposed method. Code is made available at https://github.com/Morpheus3000/SIGNet
abstract_zh: 本征图像分解（IID）是一个欠约束问题。因此，传统方法使用手工设计的先验来约束问题。然而，在应对复杂场景时，这些限制是有限的。基于深度学习的方法通过数据隐式学习这些约束，但它们经常受到数据集偏差的影响（由于无法包含所有可能的成像条件）。本文提出了两者的结合。利用诸如语义和不变特征之类的组件特定先验来获得语义和物理上合理的反射率转换。这些转换用于引导具有隐式同质性约束的渐进式 CNN，以分解反射率和着色图。进行的消融研究表明，使用所提出的先验和渐进式 CNN 提高了 IID 性能。我们提出的数据集和标准现实世界 IIW 数据集的最新性能表明了所提出方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/Morpheus3000/SIGNet 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIGNet，一种结合语义和不变梯度驱动的卷积神经网络，用于室内场景的内在图像分解。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖手工设计先验存在局限，深度学习方法受数据集偏差影响，需结合两者优势以提升复杂场景分解效果。
AI.method: 利用语义和不变特征先验生成合理反射过渡，引导渐进式CNN通过隐式同质性约束分解反射与阴影图。
AI.result: 在作者提出的室内数据集和标准IIW数据集上均达到SOTA性能，消融实验证实方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 融合语义先验与深度学习的渐进式网络显著提升内在图像分解效果，代码已开源。

authors_text: Shuanglin Yan,Hao Tang,Liyan Zhang,Jinhui Tang
title: Image-Specific Information Suppression and Implicit Local Alignment for Text-based Person Search
title_zh: 基于文本的人物搜索的图像特定信息抑制和隐式局部对齐
abstract: Text-based person search (TBPS) is a challenging task that aims to search pedestrian images with the same identity from an image gallery given a query text. In recent years, TBPS has made remarkable progress and state-of-the-art methods achieve superior performance by learning local fine-grained correspondence between images and texts. However, most existing methods rely on explicitly generated local parts to model fine-grained correspondence between modalities, which is unreliable due to the lack of contextual information or the potential introduction of noise. Moreover, existing methods seldom consider the information inequality problem between modalities caused by image-specific information. To address these limitations, we propose an efficient joint Multi-level Alignment Network (MANet) for TBPS, which can learn aligned image/text feature representations between modalities at multiple levels, and realize fast and effective person search. Specifically, we first design an image-specific information suppression module, which suppresses image background and environmental factors by relation-guided localization and channel attention filtration respectively. This module effectively alleviates the information inequality problem and realizes the alignment of information volume between images and texts. Secondly, we propose an implicit local alignment module to adaptively aggregate all pixel/word features of image/text to a set of modality-shared semantic topic centers and implicitly learn the local fine-grained correspondence between modalities without additional supervision and cross-modal interactions. And a global alignment is introduced as a supplement to the local perspective. The cooperation of global and local alignment modules enables better semantic alignment between modalities. Extensive experiments on multiple databases demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our MANet.
summary: Text-based person search (TBPS) is a challenging task that aims to search pedestrian images with the same identity from an image gallery given a query text. In recent years, TBPS has made remarkable progress and state-of-the-art methods achieve superior performance by learning local fine-grained correspondence between images and texts. However, most existing methods rely on explicitly generated local parts to model fine-grained correspondence between modalities, which is unreliable due to the lack of contextual information or the potential introduction of noise. Moreover, existing methods seldom consider the information inequality problem between modalities caused by image-specific information. To address these limitations, we propose an efficient joint Multi-level Alignment Network (MANet) for TBPS, which can learn aligned image/text feature representations between modalities at multiple levels, and realize fast and effective person search. Specifically, we first design an image-specific information suppression module, which suppresses image background and environmental factors by relation-guided localization and channel attention filtration respectively. This module effectively alleviates the information inequality problem and realizes the alignment of information volume between images and texts. Secondly, we propose an implicit local alignment module to adaptively aggregate all pixel/word features of image/text to a set of modality-shared semantic topic centers and implicitly learn the local fine-grained correspondence between modalities without additional supervision and cross-modal interactions. And a global alignment is introduced as a supplement to the local perspective. The cooperation of global and local alignment modules enables better semantic alignment between modalities. Extensive experiments on multiple databases demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our MANet.
abstract_zh: 基于文本的行人搜索（TBPS）是一项具有挑战性的任务，旨在从给定查询文本的图像库中搜索具有相同身份的行人图像。近年来，TBPS 取得了显着的进步，最先进的方法通过学习图像和文本之间的局部细粒度对应关系实现了卓越的性能。然而，大多数现有方法依赖于显式生成的局部部分来对模态之间的细粒度对应关系进行建模，由于缺乏上下文信息或可能引入噪声，这是不可靠的。 Moreover, existing methods seldom consider the information inequality problem between modalities caused by image-specific information.为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种用于 TBPS 的高效联合多级对齐网络（MANet），它可以学习多个级别模态之间对齐的图像/文本特征表示，并实现快速有效的人员搜索。具体来说，我们首先设计了一个图像特定信息抑制模块，该模块分别通过关系引导定位和通道注意过滤来抑制图像背景和环境因素。 This module effectively alleviates the information inequality problem and realizes the alignment of information volume between images and texts.其次，我们提出了一种隐式局部对齐模块，可以自适应地将图像/文本的所有像素/单词特征聚合到一组模态共享的语义主题中心，并隐式学习模态之间的局部细粒度对应关系，而无需额外的监督和跨模态交互。并引入全球一致性作为对本地视角的补充。全局和局部对齐模块的合作可以实现模态之间更好的语义对齐。 Extensive experiments on multiple databases demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our MANet.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多级对齐网络（MANet）的文本驱动人物搜索方法，通过抑制图像特定信息和隐式局部对齐来解决跨模态信息不均衡及细粒度对应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖显式生成的局部部件建模跨模态对应关系，但易受上下文信息缺失或噪声干扰，且忽视了图像与文本间的模态信息不均衡问题。
AI.method: 设计了图像特定信息抑制模块（通过关系引导定位和通道注意力过滤背景信息）与隐式局部对齐模块（自适应聚合像素/词特征至共享语义主题中心），结合全局对齐实现跨模态语义对齐。
AI.result: 在多个数据库上的实验验证了MANet在文本驱动人物搜索任务中的有效性与优越性。
AI.conclusion: MANet通过抑制图像冗余信息与隐式局部对齐机制，有效解决了跨模态信息不均衡及细粒度对应问题，提升了文本驱动人物搜索性能。

search_text: Image-Specific Information Suppression and Implicit Local Alignment for Text-based Person Search 基于文本的人物搜索的图像特定信息抑制和隐式局部对齐 Text-based person search (TBPS) is a challenging task that aims to search pedestrian images with the same identity from an image gallery given a query text. In recent years, TBPS has made remarkable progress and state-of-the-art methods achieve superior performance by learning local fine-grained correspondence between images and texts. However, most existing methods rely on explicitly generated local parts to model fine-grained correspondence between modalities, which is unreliable due to the lack of contextual information or the potential introduction of noise. Moreover, existing methods seldom consider the information inequality problem between modalities caused by image-specific information. To address these limitations, we propose an efficient joint Multi-level Alignment Network (MANet) for TBPS, which can learn aligned image/text feature representations between modalities at multiple levels, and realize fast and effective person search. Specifically, we first design an image-specific information suppression module, which suppresses image background and environmental factors by relation-guided localization and channel attention filtration respectively. This module effectively alleviates the information inequality problem and realizes the alignment of information volume between images and texts. Secondly, we propose an implicit local alignment module to adaptively aggregate all pixel/word features of image/text to a set of modality-shared semantic topic centers and implicitly learn the local fine-grained correspondence between modalities without additional supervision and cross-modal interactions. And a global alignment is introduced as a supplement to the local perspective. The cooperation of global and local alignment modules enables better semantic alignment between modalities. Extensive experiments on multiple databases demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our MANet. 基于文本的行人搜索（TBPS）是一项具有挑战性的任务，旨在从给定查询文本的图像库中搜索具有相同身份的行人图像。近年来，TBPS 取得了显着的进步，最先进的方法通过学习图像和文本之间的局部细粒度对应关系实现了卓越的性能。然而，大多数现有方法依赖于显式生成的局部部分来对模态之间的细粒度对应关系进行建模，由于缺乏上下文信息或可能引入噪声，这是不可靠的。 Moreover, existing methods seldom consider the information inequality problem between modalities caused by image-specific information.为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种用于 TBPS 的高效联合多级对齐网络（MANet），它可以学习多个级别模态之间对齐的图像/文本特征表示，并实现快速有效的人员搜索。具体来说，我们首先设计了一个图像特定信息抑制模块，该模块分别通过关系引导定位和通道注意过滤来抑制图像背景和环境因素。 This module effectively alleviates the information inequality problem and realizes the alignment of information volume between images and texts.其次，我们提出了一种隐式局部对齐模块，可以自适应地将图像/文本的所有像素/单词特征聚合到一组模态共享的语义主题中心，并隐式学习模态之间的局部细粒度对应关系，而无需额外的监督和跨模态交互。并引入全球一致性作为对本地视角的补充。全局和局部对齐模块的合作可以实现模态之间更好的语义对齐。 Extensive experiments on multiple databases demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our MANet. 本文提出了一种基于多级对齐网络（MANet）的文本驱动人物搜索方法，通过抑制图像特定信息和隐式局部对齐来解决跨模态信息不均衡及细粒度对应问题。 Shuanglin Yan,Hao Tang,Liyan Zhang,Jinhui Tang cs.CV

authors_text: Nicholas Roberts,Xintong Li,Tzu-Heng Huang,Dyah Adila,Spencer Schoenberg,Cheng-Yu Liu,Lauren Pick,Haotian Ma,Aws Albarghouthi,Frederic Sala
title: AutoWS-Bench-101: Benchmarking Automated Weak Supervision with 100 Labels
title_zh: AutoWS-Bench-101：使用 100 个标签对自动弱监督进行基准测试
abstract: Weak supervision (WS) is a powerful method to build labeled datasets for training supervised models in the face of little-to-no labeled data. It replaces hand-labeling data with aggregating multiple noisy-but-cheap label estimates expressed by labeling functions (LFs). While it has been used successfully in many domains, weak supervision's application scope is limited by the difficulty of constructing labeling functions for domains with complex or high-dimensional features. To address this, a handful of methods have proposed automating the LF design process using a small set of ground truth labels. In this work, we introduce AutoWS-Bench-101: a framework for evaluating automated WS (AutoWS) techniques in challenging WS settings -- a set of diverse application domains on which it has been previously difficult or impossible to apply traditional WS techniques. While AutoWS is a promising direction toward expanding the application-scope of WS, the emergence of powerful methods such as zero-shot foundation models reveals the need to understand how AutoWS techniques compare or cooperate with modern zero-shot or few-shot learners. This informs the central question of AutoWS-Bench-101: given an initial set of 100 labels for each task, we ask whether a practitioner should use an AutoWS method to generate additional labels or use some simpler baseline, such as zero-shot predictions from a foundation model or supervised learning. We observe that in many settings, it is necessary for AutoWS methods to incorporate signal from foundation models if they are to outperform simple few-shot baselines, and AutoWS-Bench-101 promotes future research in this direction. We conclude with a thorough ablation study of AutoWS methods.
summary: Weak supervision (WS) is a powerful method to build labeled datasets for training supervised models in the face of little-to-no labeled data. It replaces hand-labeling data with aggregating multiple noisy-but-cheap label estimates expressed by labeling functions (LFs). While it has been used successfully in many domains, weak supervision's application scope is limited by the difficulty of constructing labeling functions for domains with complex or high-dimensional features. To address this, a handful of methods have proposed automating the LF design process using a small set of ground truth labels. In this work, we introduce AutoWS-Bench-101: a framework for evaluating automated WS (AutoWS) techniques in challenging WS settings -- a set of diverse application domains on which it has been previously difficult or impossible to apply traditional WS techniques. While AutoWS is a promising direction toward expanding the application-scope of WS, the emergence of powerful methods such as zero-shot foundation models reveals the need to understand how AutoWS techniques compare or cooperate with modern zero-shot or few-shot learners. This informs the central question of AutoWS-Bench-101: given an initial set of 100 labels for each task, we ask whether a practitioner should use an AutoWS method to generate additional labels or use some simpler baseline, such as zero-shot predictions from a foundation model or supervised learning. We observe that in many settings, it is necessary for AutoWS methods to incorporate signal from foundation models if they are to outperform simple few-shot baselines, and AutoWS-Bench-101 promotes future research in this direction. We conclude with a thorough ablation study of AutoWS methods.
abstract_zh: 弱监督（WS）是一种构建标记数据集的强大方法，用于在面对很少或没有标记数据的情况下训练监督模型。它通过聚合由标记函数 (LF) 表示的多个嘈杂但廉价的标签估计来取代手工标记数据。虽然它已在许多领域得到成功使用，但弱监督的应用范围由于难以为具有复杂或高维特征的领域构建标记函数而受到限制。为了解决这个问题，一些方法提出了使用一小组真实标签来自动化 LF 设计过程。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 AutoWS-Bench-101：一个用于在具有挑战性的 WS 设置（一组以前很难或不可能应用传统 WS 技术的不同应用程序域）中评估自动化 WS (AutoWS) 技术的框架。虽然 AutoWS 是扩大 WS 应用范围的一个有前途的方向，但零样本基础模型等强大方法的出现表明需要了解 AutoWS 技术如何与现代零样本或少样本学习器进行比较或合作。这说明了 AutoWS-Bench-101 的核心问题：给定每个任务的初始 100 个标签集，我们询问从业者是否应该使用 AutoWS 方法来生成附加标签或使用一些更简单的基线，例如来自基础模型或监督学习的零样本预测。我们观察到，在许多设置中，如果 AutoWS 方法要优于简单的少样本基线，则 AutoWS 方法有必要合并来自基础模型的信号，并且 AutoWS-Bench-101 促进了这一方向的未来研究。最后我们对 AutoWS 方法进行了彻底的消融研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoWS-Bench-101框架，用于评估自动化弱监督（AutoWS）技术在复杂领域的性能，并比较其与零样本学习等方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统弱监督方法在处理复杂或高维特征领域时面临标注函数设计困难，而新兴的零样本模型等方法可能提供更优解决方案，需系统比较不同方法的优劣。
AI.method: 构建包含多样化应用场景的基准测试集，每个任务提供100个真实标签，对比AutoWS方法与零样本预测、监督学习等基线方法，并进行消融实验。
AI.result: AutoWS方法需结合基础模型信号才能超越简单少样本基线，在多个任务中验证了该结论。
AI.conclusion: AutoWS技术需与基础模型协同以提升性能，该基准为未来研究提供了方向和实验平台。

authors_text: Mostafa Mehdipour Ghazi,Mads Nielsen
title: FAST-AID Brain: Fast and Accurate Segmentation Tool using Artificial Intelligence Developed for Brain
title_zh: FAST-AID Brain：利用专为大脑开发的人工智能快速准确的分割工具
abstract: Medical images used in clinical practice are heterogeneous and not the same quality as scans studied in academic research. Preprocessing breaks down in extreme cases when anatomy, artifacts, or imaging parameters are unusual or protocols are different. Methods robust to these variations are most needed. A novel deep learning method is proposed for fast and accurate segmentation of the human brain into 132 regions. The proposed model uses an efficient U-Net-like network and benefits from the intersection points of different views and hierarchical relations for the fusion of the orthogonal 2D planes and brain labels during the end-to-end training. Weakly supervised learning is deployed to take the advantage of partially labeled data for the whole brain segmentation and estimation of the intracranial volume (ICV). Moreover, data augmentation is used to expand the magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) data by generating realistic brain scans with high variability for robust training of the model while preserving data privacy. The proposed method can be applied to brain MRI data including skull or any other artifacts without preprocessing the images or a drop in performance. Several experiments using different atlases are conducted to evaluate the segmentation performance of the trained model compared to the state-of-the-art, and the results show higher segmentation accuracy and robustness of the proposed model compared to the existing methods across different intra- and inter-domain datasets.
summary: Medical images used in clinical practice are heterogeneous and not the same quality as scans studied in academic research. Preprocessing breaks down in extreme cases when anatomy, artifacts, or imaging parameters are unusual or protocols are different. Methods robust to these variations are most needed. A novel deep learning method is proposed for fast and accurate segmentation of the human brain into 132 regions. The proposed model uses an efficient U-Net-like network and benefits from the intersection points of different views and hierarchical relations for the fusion of the orthogonal 2D planes and brain labels during the end-to-end training. Weakly supervised learning is deployed to take the advantage of partially labeled data for the whole brain segmentation and estimation of the intracranial volume (ICV). Moreover, data augmentation is used to expand the magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) data by generating realistic brain scans with high variability for robust training of the model while preserving data privacy. The proposed method can be applied to brain MRI data including skull or any other artifacts without preprocessing the images or a drop in performance. Several experiments using different atlases are conducted to evaluate the segmentation performance of the trained model compared to the state-of-the-art, and the results show higher segmentation accuracy and robustness of the proposed model compared to the existing methods across different intra- and inter-domain datasets.
abstract_zh: 临床实践中使用的医学图像是异质的，并且与学术研究中研究的扫描质量不同。在极端情况下，当解剖结构、伪影或成像参数不寻常或协议不同时，预处理会失败。最需要对这些变化具有鲁棒性的方法。提出了一种新颖的深度学习方法，可将人脑快速准确地分割为 132 个区域。所提出的模型使用高效的类似 U-Net 的网络，并受益于不同视图的交叉点和层次关系，以便在端到端训练期间融合正交 2D 平面和大脑标签。弱监督学习的目的是利用部分标记的数据进行全脑分割和颅内体积（ICV）估计。此外，数据增强用于通过生成具有高可变性的真实脑部扫描来扩展磁共振成像（MRI）数据，以对模型进行稳健训练，同时保护数据隐私。所提出的方法可应用于包括头骨或任何其他伪影在内的脑部 MRI 数据，无需对图像进行预处理或性能下降。使用不同图集进行了多次实验，以评估训练模型与最先进模型相比的分割性能，结果表明，与不同域内和域间数据集的现有方法相比，所提出的模型具有更高的分割精度和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的FAST-AID Brain工具，用于快速准确分割人脑MRI图像，解决临床医学图像异质性带来的分割挑战。
AI.motivation: 临床医学图像存在质量不均、协议差异等问题，传统预处理方法在极端情况下失效，亟需鲁棒性强的分割方法应对异质性数据。
AI.method: 设计高效U-Net网络架构，结合多视角交点与层次关系融合正交平面信息；采用弱监督学习处理部分标注数据，通过数据增强生成多样化MRI数据以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个不同领域数据集上实验表明，该方法较现有技术分割准确率提升，且无需预处理即可处理含颅骨或伪影的MRI数据。
AI.conclusion: FAST-AID Brain通过创新网络结构与弱监督策略，在保证分割精度的同时显著提升模型鲁棒性，适用于复杂临床场景的脑部分割任务。

search_text: FAST-AID Brain: Fast and Accurate Segmentation Tool using Artificial Intelligence Developed for Brain FAST-AID Brain：利用专为大脑开发的人工智能快速准确的分割工具 Medical images used in clinical practice are heterogeneous and not the same quality as scans studied in academic research. Preprocessing breaks down in extreme cases when anatomy, artifacts, or imaging parameters are unusual or protocols are different. Methods robust to these variations are most needed. A novel deep learning method is proposed for fast and accurate segmentation of the human brain into 132 regions. The proposed model uses an efficient U-Net-like network and benefits from the intersection points of different views and hierarchical relations for the fusion of the orthogonal 2D planes and brain labels during the end-to-end training. Weakly supervised learning is deployed to take the advantage of partially labeled data for the whole brain segmentation and estimation of the intracranial volume (ICV). Moreover, data augmentation is used to expand the magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) data by generating realistic brain scans with high variability for robust training of the model while preserving data privacy. The proposed method can be applied to brain MRI data including skull or any other artifacts without preprocessing the images or a drop in performance. Several experiments using different atlases are conducted to evaluate the segmentation performance of the trained model compared to the state-of-the-art, and the results show higher segmentation accuracy and robustness of the proposed model compared to the existing methods across different intra- and inter-domain datasets. 临床实践中使用的医学图像是异质的，并且与学术研究中研究的扫描质量不同。在极端情况下，当解剖结构、伪影或成像参数不寻常或协议不同时，预处理会失败。最需要对这些变化具有鲁棒性的方法。提出了一种新颖的深度学习方法，可将人脑快速准确地分割为 132 个区域。所提出的模型使用高效的类似 U-Net 的网络，并受益于不同视图的交叉点和层次关系，以便在端到端训练期间融合正交 2D 平面和大脑标签。弱监督学习的目的是利用部分标记的数据进行全脑分割和颅内体积（ICV）估计。此外，数据增强用于通过生成具有高可变性的真实脑部扫描来扩展磁共振成像（MRI）数据，以对模型进行稳健训练，同时保护数据隐私。所提出的方法可应用于包括头骨或任何其他伪影在内的脑部 MRI 数据，无需对图像进行预处理或性能下降。使用不同图集进行了多次实验，以评估训练模型与最先进模型相比的分割性能，结果表明，与不同域内和域间数据集的现有方法相比，所提出的模型具有更高的分割精度和鲁棒性。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的FAST-AID Brain工具，用于快速准确分割人脑MRI图像，解决临床医学图像异质性带来的分割挑战。 Mostafa Mehdipour Ghazi,Mads Nielsen eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Tianyuan Yao,Chang Qu,Jun Long,Quan Liu,Ruining Deng,Yuanhan Tian,Jiachen Xu,Aadarsh Jha,Zuhayr Asad,Shunxing Bao,Mengyang Zhao,Agnes B. Fogo,Bennett A. Landman,Haichun Yang,Catie Chang,Yuankai Huo
title: Compound Figure Separation of Biomedical Images: Mining Large Datasets for Self-supervised Learning
title_zh: 生物医学图像的复合图形分离：挖掘大型数据集以进行自我监督学习
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://www.melba-journal.org/papers/2022:025.html. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.08650
comments: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://www.melba-journal.org/papers/2022:025.html. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.08650
abstract: With the rapid development of self-supervised learning (e.g., contrastive learning), the importance of having large-scale images (even without annotations) for training a more generalizable AI model has been widely recognized in medical image analysis. However, collecting large-scale task-specific unannotated data at scale can be challenging for individual labs. Existing online resources, such as digital books, publications, and search engines, provide a new resource for obtaining large-scale images. However, published images in healthcare (e.g., radiology and pathology) consist of a considerable amount of compound figures with subplots. In order to extract and separate compound figures into usable individual images for downstream learning, we propose a simple compound figure separation (SimCFS) framework without using the traditionally required detection bounding box annotations, with a new loss function and a hard case simulation. Our technical contribution is four-fold: (1) we introduce a simulation-based training framework that minimizes the need for resource extensive bounding box annotations; (2) we propose a new side loss that is optimized for compound figure separation; (3) we propose an intra-class image augmentation method to simulate hard cases; and (4) to the best of our knowledge, this is the first study that evaluates the efficacy of leveraging self-supervised learning with compound image separation. From the results, the proposed SimCFS achieved state-of-the-art performance on the ImageCLEF 2016 Compound Figure Separation Database. The pretrained self-supervised learning model using large-scale mined figures improved the accuracy of downstream image classification tasks with a contrastive learning algorithm. The source code of SimCFS is made publicly available at https://github.com/hrlblab/ImageSeperation.
summary: With the rapid development of self-supervised learning (e.g., contrastive learning), the importance of having large-scale images (even without annotations) for training a more generalizable AI model has been widely recognized in medical image analysis. However, collecting large-scale task-specific unannotated data at scale can be challenging for individual labs. Existing online resources, such as digital books, publications, and search engines, provide a new resource for obtaining large-scale images. However, published images in healthcare (e.g., radiology and pathology) consist of a considerable amount of compound figures with subplots. In order to extract and separate compound figures into usable individual images for downstream learning, we propose a simple compound figure separation (SimCFS) framework without using the traditionally required detection bounding box annotations, with a new loss function and a hard case simulation. Our technical contribution is four-fold: (1) we introduce a simulation-based training framework that minimizes the need for resource extensive bounding box annotations; (2) we propose a new side loss that is optimized for compound figure separation; (3) we propose an intra-class image augmentation method to simulate hard cases; and (4) to the best of our knowledge, this is the first study that evaluates the efficacy of leveraging self-supervised learning with compound image separation. From the results, the proposed SimCFS achieved state-of-the-art performance on the ImageCLEF 2016 Compound Figure Separation Database. The pretrained self-supervised learning model using large-scale mined figures improved the accuracy of downstream image classification tasks with a contrastive learning algorithm. The source code of SimCFS is made publicly available at https://github.com/hrlblab/ImageSeperation.
abstract_zh: 随着自监督学习（例如对比学习）的快速发展，拥有大规模图像（即使没有注释）对于训练更通用的人工智能模型的重要性在医学图像分析中已得到广泛认可。然而，大规模收集大规模特定任务的未注释数据对于单个实验室来说可能具有挑战性。现有的在线资源，例如数字图书、出版物和搜索引擎，为获取大规模图像提供了新的资源。然而，已发表的医疗保健图像（例如放射学和病理学）由大量带有子图的复合图形组成。为了将复合图形提取并分离成可用的单个图像以供下游学习，我们提出了一种简单的复合图形分离（SimCFS）框架，无需使用传统上所需的检测边界框注释，并具有新的损失函数和硬案例模拟。我们的技术贡献有四个方面：（1）我们引入了基于模拟的训练框架，最大限度地减少了对资源丰富的边界框注释的需求； (2)我们提出了一种新的侧损失，针对复合图形分离进行了优化； （3）我们提出了一种类内图像增强方法来模拟困难情况； (4) 据我们所知，这是第一项评估利用自我监督学习与复合图像分离的效果的研究。从结果来看，所提出的 SimCFS 在 ImageCLEF 2016 复合图形分离数据库上实现了最先进的性能。使用大规模挖掘图形的预训练自监督学习模型通过对比学习算法提高了下游图像分类任务的准确性。 SimCFS 的源代码已在 https://github.com/hrlblab/ImageSeperation 上公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标注的复合图像分离框架SimCFS，用于从生物医学图像中提取可单独使用的子图，以支持自监督学习。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像分析中自监督学习需要大规模无标注数据，但复合图像（含多个子图）的分离缺乏高效方法，传统方法依赖标注的边界框，获取成本高。
AI.method: 提出SimCFS框架，包含四方面创新：基于模拟的训练框架减少标注需求、新的侧边损失函数、类内图像增强模拟困难案例，以及首次将自监督学习与复合图像分离结合。
AI.result: SimCFS在ImageCLEF 2016数据集上达到SOTA性能，预训练模型通过对比学习提升下游图像分类任务准确率，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SimCFS有效解决了复合图像分离难题，为利用大规模无标注医疗图像进行自监督学习提供了可行方案，推动了通用AI模型的训练。

authors_text: Chang-Bin Jeon,Kyogu Lee
title: Towards robust music source separation on loud commercial music
title_zh: 针对响亮的商业音乐实现稳健的音乐源分离
abstract: Nowadays, commercial music has extreme loudness and heavily compressed dynamic range compared to the past. Yet, in music source separation, these characteristics have not been thoroughly considered, resulting in the domain mismatch between the laboratory and the real world. In this paper, we confirmed that this domain mismatch negatively affect the performance of the music source separation networks. To this end, we first created the out-of-domain evaluation datasets, musdb-L and XL, by mimicking the music mastering process. Then, we quantitatively verify that the performance of the state-of-the-art algorithms significantly deteriorated in our datasets. Lastly, we proposed LimitAug data augmentation method to reduce the domain mismatch, which utilizes an online limiter during the training data sampling process. We confirmed that it not only alleviates the performance degradation on our out-of-domain datasets, but also results in higher performance on in-domain data.
summary: Nowadays, commercial music has extreme loudness and heavily compressed dynamic range compared to the past. Yet, in music source separation, these characteristics have not been thoroughly considered, resulting in the domain mismatch between the laboratory and the real world. In this paper, we confirmed that this domain mismatch negatively affect the performance of the music source separation networks. To this end, we first created the out-of-domain evaluation datasets, musdb-L and XL, by mimicking the music mastering process. Then, we quantitatively verify that the performance of the state-of-the-art algorithms significantly deteriorated in our datasets. Lastly, we proposed LimitAug data augmentation method to reduce the domain mismatch, which utilizes an online limiter during the training data sampling process. We confirmed that it not only alleviates the performance degradation on our out-of-domain datasets, but also results in higher performance on in-domain data.
abstract_zh: 如今，与过去相比，商业音乐具有极大的响度和严重压缩的动态范围。然而，在音乐源分离中，这些特征没有得到充分考虑，导致实验室与现实世界的领域不匹配。在本文中，我们证实这种域不匹配会对音乐源分离网络的性能产生负面影响。为此，我们首先通过模仿音乐母带处理过程创建了域外评估数据集 musdb-L 和 XL。然后，我们定量验证了最先进算法的性能在我们的数据集中显着恶化。最后，我们提出了 LimitAug 数据增强方法来减少域不匹配，该方法在训练数据采样过程中利用在线限制器。我们确认，它不仅减轻了域外数据集的性能下降，而且还提高了域内数据的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过解决领域差异问题，提升音乐源分离在高响度商业音乐中的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前商业音乐具有极高响度和压缩动态范围，但现有音乐源分离方法未充分考虑这一特性，导致实验室与真实场景间的领域差异。
AI.method: 构建模拟母带处理过程的out-of-domain数据集musdb-L/XL，并提出LimitAug数据增强方法，在训练过程中使用在线限制器模拟响度压缩。
AI.result: LimitAug有效缓解了算法在out-of-domain数据集上的性能下降，同时提升了in-domain数据的分离效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过领域适配的数据增强方法可显著提升音乐源分离模型在真实商业音乐场景中的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Érick Oliveira Rodrigues,Felipe Fernandes Cordeiro de Morais,Aura Conci
title: On the Automated Segmentation of Epicardial and Mediastinal Cardiac Adipose Tissues Using Classification Algorithms
title_zh: 利用分类算法自动分割心外膜和纵隔心脏脂肪组织
abstract: The quantification of fat depots on the surroundings of the heart is an accurate procedure for evaluating health risk factors correlated with several diseases. However, this type of evaluation is not widely employed in clinical practice due to the required human workload. This work proposes a novel technique for the automatic segmentation of cardiac fat pads. The technique is based on applying classification algorithms to the segmentation of cardiac CT images. Furthermore, we extensively evaluate the performance of several algorithms on this task and discuss which provided better predictive models. Experimental results have shown that the mean accuracy for the classification of epicardial and mediastinal fats has been 98.4% with a mean true positive rate of 96.2%. On average, the Dice similarity index, regarding the segmented patients and the ground truth, was equal to 96.8%. Therfore, our technique has achieved the most accurate results for the automatic segmentation of cardiac fats, to date.
summary: The quantification of fat depots on the surroundings of the heart is an accurate procedure for evaluating health risk factors correlated with several diseases. However, this type of evaluation is not widely employed in clinical practice due to the required human workload. This work proposes a novel technique for the automatic segmentation of cardiac fat pads. The technique is based on applying classification algorithms to the segmentation of cardiac CT images. Furthermore, we extensively evaluate the performance of several algorithms on this task and discuss which provided better predictive models. Experimental results have shown that the mean accuracy for the classification of epicardial and mediastinal fats has been 98.4% with a mean true positive rate of 96.2%. On average, the Dice similarity index, regarding the segmented patients and the ground truth, was equal to 96.8%. Therfore, our technique has achieved the most accurate results for the automatic segmentation of cardiac fats, to date.
abstract_zh: 心脏周围脂肪库的量化是评估与多种疾病相关的健康风险因素的准确程序。然而，由于所需的人力工作量，这种类型的评估并未广泛应用于临床实践。这项工作提出了一种用于心脏脂肪垫自动分割的新技术。该技术基于将分类算法应用于心脏 CT 图像的分割。此外，我们广泛评估了几种算法在此任务上的性能，并讨论了哪些算法提供了更好的预测模型。实验结果表明，心外膜和纵隔脂肪分类的平均准确率为98.4%，平均真阳性率为96.2%。平均而言，关于分段患者和真实情况的 Dice 相似度指数等于 96.8%。因此，迄今为止，我们的技术在心脏脂肪自动分割方面取得了最准确的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分类算法的自动分割方法，用于分割心脏周围的心外膜和纵隔脂肪组织。
AI.motivation: 心脏周围脂肪定量评估对疾病风险分析至关重要，但传统人工评估因工作量大而难以在临床广泛应用，需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 采用分类算法处理心脏CT图像，通过对比多种算法性能，构建最优预测模型实现脂肪组织自动分割。
AI.result: 分类准确率达98.4%，真阳性率96.2%，Dice相似指数达96.8%，为当前最精确的心脏脂肪自动分割技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升心脏脂肪分割的自动化水平和准确性，具有重要的临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Peiling Lu,Xu Tan,Botao Yu,Tao Qin,Sheng Zhao,Tie-Yan Liu
title: MeloForm: Generating Melody with Musical Form based on Expert Systems and Neural Networks
title_zh: MeloForm：基于专家系统和神经网络以音乐形式生成旋律
abstract: Human usually composes music by organizing elements according to the musical form to express music ideas. However, for neural network-based music generation, it is difficult to do so due to the lack of labelled data on musical form. In this paper, we develop MeloForm, a system that generates melody with musical form using expert systems and neural networks. Specifically, 1) we design an expert system to generate a melody by developing musical elements from motifs to phrases then to sections with repetitions and variations according to pre-given musical form; 2) considering the generated melody is lack of musical richness, we design a Transformer based refinement model to improve the melody without changing its musical form. MeloForm enjoys the advantages of precise musical form control by expert systems and musical richness learning via neural models. Both subjective and objective experimental evaluations demonstrate that MeloForm generates melodies with precise musical form control with 97.79% accuracy, and outperforms baseline systems in terms of subjective evaluation score by 0.75, 0.50, 0.86 and 0.89 in structure, thematic, richness and overall quality, without any labelled musical form data. Besides, MeloForm can support various kinds of forms, such as verse and chorus form, rondo form, variational form, sonata form, etc.
summary: Human usually composes music by organizing elements according to the musical form to express music ideas. However, for neural network-based music generation, it is difficult to do so due to the lack of labelled data on musical form. In this paper, we develop MeloForm, a system that generates melody with musical form using expert systems and neural networks. Specifically, 1) we design an expert system to generate a melody by developing musical elements from motifs to phrases then to sections with repetitions and variations according to pre-given musical form; 2) considering the generated melody is lack of musical richness, we design a Transformer based refinement model to improve the melody without changing its musical form. MeloForm enjoys the advantages of precise musical form control by expert systems and musical richness learning via neural models. Both subjective and objective experimental evaluations demonstrate that MeloForm generates melodies with precise musical form control with 97.79% accuracy, and outperforms baseline systems in terms of subjective evaluation score by 0.75, 0.50, 0.86 and 0.89 in structure, thematic, richness and overall quality, without any labelled musical form data. Besides, MeloForm can support various kinds of forms, such as verse and chorus form, rondo form, variational form, sonata form, etc.
abstract_zh: 人类通常通过按照音乐形式组织元素来表达音乐思想来创作音乐。然而，对于基于神经网络的音乐生成来说，由于缺乏音乐形式的标记数据，很难做到这一点。在本文中，我们开发了 MeloForm，这是一个使用专家系统和神经网络生成具有音乐形式的旋律的系统。具体来说，1）我们设计了一个专家系统，通过根据预先给定的音乐形式开发从主题到短语再到具有重复和变化的部分的音乐元素来生成旋律； 2）考虑到生成的旋律缺乏音乐丰富性，我们设计了一个基于Transformer的细化模型来改进旋律而不改变其音乐形式。 MeloForm 具有专家系统精确的音乐形式控制和通过神经模型学习音乐丰富性的优势。主观和客观实验评估表明，在没有任何标记的曲式数据的情况下，MeloForm 生成的旋律具有精确的曲式控制，准确率高达 97.79%，并且在结构、主题、丰富度和整体质量方面的主观评价得分比基线系统高出 0.75、0.50、0.86 和 0.89。此外，MeloForm可以支持多种形式，例如主歌和合唱形式、回旋曲形式、变奏形式、奏鸣曲形式等。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MeloForm系统，结合专家系统与神经网络生成符合音乐形式的旋律。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络音乐生成难以精确控制音乐形式，因缺乏带标签的音乐形式数据，导致生成旋律结构松散。
AI.method: 1) 设计专家系统按预设音乐形式（如主歌-副歌、奏鸣曲式等）生成旋律；2) 使用Transformer模型在不改变形式的前提下提升旋律丰富性。
AI.result: 形式控制准确率达97.79%，主观评价在结构、主题、丰富度和整体质量上分别超越基线0.75/0.50/0.86/0.89分，无需音乐形式标注数据。
AI.conclusion: MeloForm通过专家系统与神经网络的结合，在无需标注数据的情况下实现了结构精确且富有表现力的旋律生成，支持多种音乐形式。
