search_text: Boosting Night-time Scene Parsing with Learnable Frequency 以可学习的频率促进夜间场景解析 Night-Time Scene Parsing (NTSP) is essential to many vision applications, especially for autonomous driving. Most of the existing methods are proposed for day-time scene parsing. They rely on modeling pixel intensity-based spatial contextual cues under even illumination. Hence, these methods do not perform well in night-time scenes as such spatial contextual cues are buried in the over-/under-exposed regions in night-time scenes. In this paper, we first conduct an image frequency-based statistical experiment to interpret the day-time and night-time scene discrepancies. We find that image frequency distributions differ significantly between day-time and night-time scenes, and understanding such frequency distributions is critical to NTSP problem. Based on this, we propose to exploit the image frequency distributions for night-time scene parsing. First, we propose a Learnable Frequency Encoder (LFE) to model the relationship between different frequency coefficients to measure all frequency components dynamically. Second, we propose a Spatial Frequency Fusion module (SFF) that fuses both spatial and frequency information to guide the extraction of spatial context features. Extensive experiments show that our method performs favorably against the state-of-the-art methods on the NightCity, NightCity+ and BDD100K-night datasets. In addition, we demonstrate that our method can be applied to existing day-time scene parsing methods and boost their performance on night-time scenes. 夜间场景解析（NTSP）对于许多视觉应用至关重要，尤其是自动驾驶。大多数现有方法都是针对白天场景解析提出的。他们依赖于在均匀照明下对基于像素强度的空间上下文线索进行建模。因此，这些方法在夜间场景中表现不佳，因为此类空间上下文线索被隐藏在夜间场景中曝光过度/曝光不足的区域中。在本文中，我们首先进行基于图像频率的统计实验来解释白天和夜间场景的差异。我们发现白天和夜间场景之间的图像频率分布存在显着差异，理解这种频率分布对于 NTSP 问题至关重要。基于此，我们建议利用图像频率分布进行夜间场景解析。首先，我们提出了一种可学习频率编码器（LFE）来对不同频率系数之间的关系进行建模，以动态测量所有频率分量。其次，我们提出了一个空间频率融合模块（SFF），它融合空间和频率信息来指导空间上下文特征的提取。大量实验表明，我们的方法在 NightCity、NightCity+ 和 BDD100K-night 数据集上的性能优于最先进的方法。此外，我们还证明了我们的方法可以应用于现有的白天场景解析方法，并提高其在夜间场景上的性能。 本文提出一种基于可学习频率的夜间场景解析方法，通过建模图像频率分布提升夜间场景理解性能。 Zhifeng Xie,Sen Wang,Ke Xu,Zhizhong Zhang,Xin Tan,Yuan Xie,Lizhuang Ma cs.CV

authors_text: Espen Haugsdal,Erlend Aune,Massimiliano Ruocco
title: Persistence Initialization: A novel adaptation of the Transformer architecture for Time Series Forecasting
title_zh: 持久性初始化：时间序列预测的 Transformer 架构的新颖改编
abstract: Time series forecasting is an important problem, with many real world applications. Ensembles of deep neural networks have recently achieved impressive forecasting accuracy, but such large ensembles are impractical in many real world settings. Transformer models been successfully applied to a diverse set of challenging problems. We propose a novel adaptation of the original Transformer architecture focusing on the task of time series forecasting, called Persistence Initialization. The model is initialized as a naive persistence model by using a multiplicative gating mechanism combined with a residual skip connection. We use a decoder Transformer with ReZero normalization and Rotary positional encodings, but the adaptation is applicable to any auto-regressive neural network model. We evaluate our proposed architecture on the challenging M4 dataset, achieving competitive performance compared to ensemble based methods. We also compare against existing recently proposed Transformer models for time series forecasting, showing superior performance on the M4 dataset. Extensive ablation studies show that Persistence Initialization leads to better performance and faster convergence. As the size of the model increases, only the models with our proposed adaptation gain in performance. We also perform an additional ablation study to determine the importance of the choice of normalization and positional encoding, and find both the use of Rotary encodings and ReZero normalization to be essential for good forecasting performance.
summary: Time series forecasting is an important problem, with many real world applications. Ensembles of deep neural networks have recently achieved impressive forecasting accuracy, but such large ensembles are impractical in many real world settings. Transformer models been successfully applied to a diverse set of challenging problems. We propose a novel adaptation of the original Transformer architecture focusing on the task of time series forecasting, called Persistence Initialization. The model is initialized as a naive persistence model by using a multiplicative gating mechanism combined with a residual skip connection. We use a decoder Transformer with ReZero normalization and Rotary positional encodings, but the adaptation is applicable to any auto-regressive neural network model. We evaluate our proposed architecture on the challenging M4 dataset, achieving competitive performance compared to ensemble based methods. We also compare against existing recently proposed Transformer models for time series forecasting, showing superior performance on the M4 dataset. Extensive ablation studies show that Persistence Initialization leads to better performance and faster convergence. As the size of the model increases, only the models with our proposed adaptation gain in performance. We also perform an additional ablation study to determine the importance of the choice of normalization and positional encoding, and find both the use of Rotary encodings and ReZero normalization to be essential for good forecasting performance.
abstract_zh: 时间序列预测是一个重要的问题，在现实世界中有许多应用。深度神经网络集成最近取得了令人印象深刻的预测精度，但如此大的集成在许多现实世界环境中是不切实际的。 Transformer 模型已成功应用于各种具有挑战性的问题。我们提出了一种对原始 Transformer 架构的新颖改造，专注于时间序列预测的任务，称为持久初始化。通过使用乘法门控机制与残差跳跃连接相结合，该模型被初始化为朴素持久性模型。我们使用具有 ReZero 归一化和旋转位置编码的解码器 Transformer，但该调整适用于任何自回归神经网络模型。我们在具有挑战性的 M4 数据集上评估我们提出的架构，与基于集成的方法相比，实现了有竞争力的性能。我们还与最近提出的用于时间序列预测的现有 Transformer 模型进行比较，显示出在 M4 数据集上的卓越性能。广泛的消融研究表明，持久初始化可以带来更好的性能和更快的收敛。随着模型规模的增加，只有具有我们提出的适应能力的模型才能获得性能提升。我们还进行了一项额外的消融研究，以确定选择归一化和位置编码的重要性，并发现旋转编码和 ReZero 归一化的使用对于良好的预测性能至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Persistence Initialization的新方法，通过改进Transformer架构以提升时间序列预测性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度神经网络集成在时间序列预测中表现优异，但实际应用中常因计算资源限制而难以部署。传统Transformer模型未针对时间序列任务进行优化，需探索更高效的架构适应方案。
AI.method: 通过乘法门控机制与残差连接将模型初始化为朴素持续性模型，结合ReZero归一化和旋转位置编码的解码器Transformer架构，适用于任何自回归神经网络。
AI.result: 在M4数据集上表现优于集成方法及现有Transformer模型，模型规模增大时性能提升显著，消融实验验证了旋转编码与ReZero归一化的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: Persistence Initialization能有效提升时间序列预测的收敛速度与模型性能，其核心在于归一化策略与位置编码的选择优化。

authors_text: Seoyoung Hong,Heejoo Shin,Jeongwhan Choi,Noseong Park
title: Prediction-based One-shot Dynamic Parking Pricing
title_zh: 基于预测的一次性动态停车定价
abstract: Many U.S. metropolitan cities are notorious for their severe shortage of parking spots. To this end, we present a proactive prediction-driven optimization framework to dynamically adjust parking prices. We use state-of-the-art deep learning technologies such as neural ordinary differential equations (NODEs) to design our future parking occupancy rate prediction model given historical occupancy rates and price information. Owing to the continuous and bijective characteristics of NODEs, in addition, we design a one-shot price optimization method given a pre-trained prediction model, which requires only one iteration to find the optimal solution. In other words, we optimize the price input to the pre-trained prediction model to achieve targeted occupancy rates in the parking blocks. We conduct experiments with the data collected in San Francisco and Seattle for years. Our prediction model shows the best accuracy in comparison with various temporal or spatio-temporal forecasting models. Our one-shot optimization method greatly outperforms other black-box and white-box search methods in terms of the search time and always returns the optimal price solution.
summary: Many U.S. metropolitan cities are notorious for their severe shortage of parking spots. To this end, we present a proactive prediction-driven optimization framework to dynamically adjust parking prices. We use state-of-the-art deep learning technologies such as neural ordinary differential equations (NODEs) to design our future parking occupancy rate prediction model given historical occupancy rates and price information. Owing to the continuous and bijective characteristics of NODEs, in addition, we design a one-shot price optimization method given a pre-trained prediction model, which requires only one iteration to find the optimal solution. In other words, we optimize the price input to the pre-trained prediction model to achieve targeted occupancy rates in the parking blocks. We conduct experiments with the data collected in San Francisco and Seattle for years. Our prediction model shows the best accuracy in comparison with various temporal or spatio-temporal forecasting models. Our one-shot optimization method greatly outperforms other black-box and white-box search methods in terms of the search time and always returns the optimal price solution.
abstract_zh: 美国许多大都市因停车位严重短缺而臭名昭著。为此，我们提出了一个主动预测驱动的优化框架来动态调整停车价格。我们使用最先进的深度学习技术，例如神经常微分方程（NODE），根据历史占用率和价格信息来设计未来的停车占用率预测模型。此外，由于节点的连续和双射特性，我们在给定预训练的预测模型的情况下设计了一种一次性价格优化方法，该方法只需要一次迭代即可找到最优解。换句话说，我们优化预训练预测模型的价格输入，以实现停车场的目标占用率。我们利用多年来在旧金山和西雅图收集的数据进行实验。与各种时间或时空预测模型相比，我们的预测模型显示出最佳的准确性。我们的一次性优化方法在搜索时间方面远远优于其他黑盒和白盒搜索方法，并且始终返回最优价格解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预测的动态停车定价框架，通过深度学习模型预测停车占用率并优化定价策略。
AI.motivation: 美国大城市面临停车位短缺问题，传统定价方法难以实时响应需求变化，需更高效的动态定价方案。
AI.method: 采用神经常微分方程（NODEs）构建预测模型，结合一次性优化方法快速求解最优定价，仅需单次迭代即可达到目标占用率。
AI.result: 在旧金山和西雅图的实验中，预测模型准确率优于其他时空预测方法，优化算法在搜索时间和解的质量上显著优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过预测驱动的定价优化有效缓解停车供需矛盾，为智能城市停车管理提供高效解决方案。

search_text: Prediction-based One-shot Dynamic Parking Pricing 基于预测的一次性动态停车定价 Many U.S. metropolitan cities are notorious for their severe shortage of parking spots. To this end, we present a proactive prediction-driven optimization framework to dynamically adjust parking prices. We use state-of-the-art deep learning technologies such as neural ordinary differential equations (NODEs) to design our future parking occupancy rate prediction model given historical occupancy rates and price information. Owing to the continuous and bijective characteristics of NODEs, in addition, we design a one-shot price optimization method given a pre-trained prediction model, which requires only one iteration to find the optimal solution. In other words, we optimize the price input to the pre-trained prediction model to achieve targeted occupancy rates in the parking blocks. We conduct experiments with the data collected in San Francisco and Seattle for years. Our prediction model shows the best accuracy in comparison with various temporal or spatio-temporal forecasting models. Our one-shot optimization method greatly outperforms other black-box and white-box search methods in terms of the search time and always returns the optimal price solution. 美国许多大都市因停车位严重短缺而臭名昭著。为此，我们提出了一个主动预测驱动的优化框架来动态调整停车价格。我们使用最先进的深度学习技术，例如神经常微分方程（NODE），根据历史占用率和价格信息来设计未来的停车占用率预测模型。此外，由于节点的连续和双射特性，我们在给定预训练的预测模型的情况下设计了一种一次性价格优化方法，该方法只需要一次迭代即可找到最优解。换句话说，我们优化预训练预测模型的价格输入，以实现停车场的目标占用率。我们利用多年来在旧金山和西雅图收集的数据进行实验。与各种时间或时空预测模型相比，我们的预测模型显示出最佳的准确性。我们的一次性优化方法在搜索时间方面远远优于其他黑盒和白盒搜索方法，并且始终返回最优价格解决方案。 本文提出一种基于预测的动态停车定价框架，通过深度学习模型预测停车占用率并优化定价策略。 Seoyoung Hong,Heejoo Shin,Jeongwhan Choi,Noseong Park cs.LG,cs.AI,math.OC

authors_text: Jiahui Chen,Xu Guo,Wensheng Gan,Shichen Wan,Philip S. Yu
title: A Generic Algorithm for Top-K On-Shelf Utility Mining
title_zh: Top-K 现成效用挖矿的通用算法
abstract: On-shelf utility mining (OSUM) is an emerging research direction in data mining. It aims to discover itemsets that have high relative utility in their selling time period. Compared with traditional utility mining, OSUM can find more practical and meaningful patterns in real-life applications. However, there is a major drawback to traditional OSUM. For normal users, it is hard to define a minimum threshold minutil for mining the right amount of on-shelf high utility itemsets. On one hand, if the threshold is set too high, the number of patterns would not be enough. On the other hand, if the threshold is set too low, too many patterns will be discovered and cause an unnecessary waste of time and memory consumption. To address this issue, the user usually directly specifies a parameter k, where only the top-k high relative utility itemsets would be considered. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a generic algorithm named TOIT for mining Top-k On-shelf hIgh-utility paTterns to solve this problem. TOIT applies a novel strategy to raise the minutil based on the on-shelf datasets. Besides, two novel upper-bound strategies named subtree utility and local utility are applied to prune the search space. By adopting the strategies mentioned above, the TOIT algorithm can narrow the search space as early as possible, improve the mining efficiency, and reduce the memory consumption, so it can obtain better performance than other algorithms. A series of experiments have been conducted on real datasets with different styles to compare the effects with the state-of-the-art KOSHU algorithm. The experimental results showed that TOIT outperforms KOSHU in both running time and memory consumption.

Compared with traditional utility mining, OSUM can find more practical and meaningful patterns in real-life applications. However, there is a major drawback to traditional OSUM. For normal users, it is hard to define a minimum threshold minutil for mining the right amount of on-shelf high utility itemsets. On one hand, if the threshold is set too high, the number of patterns would not be enough. On the other hand, if the threshold is set too low, too many patterns will be discovered and cause an unnecessary waste of time and memory consumption. To address this issue, the user usually directly specifies a parameter k, where only the top-k high relative utility itemsets would be considered. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a generic algorithm named TOIT for mining Top-k On-shelf hIgh-utility paTterns to solve this problem. TOIT applies a novel strategy to raise the minutil based on the on-shelf datasets. Besides, two novel upper-bound strategies named subtree utility and local utility are applied to prune the search space. By adopting the strategies mentioned above, the TOIT algorithm can narrow the search space as early as possible, improve the mining efficiency, and reduce the memory consumption, so it can obtain better performance than other algorithms. A series of experiments have been conducted on real datasets with different styles to compare the effects with the state-of-the-art KOSHU algorithm. The experimental results showed that TOIT outperforms KOSHU in both running time and memory consumption.
abstract_zh: 货架效用挖掘（OSUM）是数据挖掘中的一个新兴研究方向。它的目的是发现在销售时间段内具有较高相对效用的项目集。与传统的效用挖掘相比，OSUM可以在现实应用中找到更实用、更有意义的模式。然而，传统的 OSUM 有一个重大缺点。对于普通用户来说，很难定义一个最小阈值 minutil 来挖掘适量的现成高效用项集。一方面，如果阈值设置得太高，模式的数量就会不够。另一方面，如果阈值设置得太低，则会发现太多模式并导致不必要的时间浪费和内存消耗。为了解决这个问题，用户通常直接指定一个参数k，其中仅考虑前k个高相对效用项集。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 TOIT 的通用算法来挖掘 Top-k On-shelf 高效用模式来解决这个问题。 TOIT 采用了一种新颖的策略来根据现有数据集提高 minutil。此外，还应用了两种新颖的上限策略，即子树效用和局部效用来修剪搜索空间。通过采用上述策略，TOIT算法可以尽早缩小搜索空间，提高挖掘效率，减少内存消耗，从而获得比其他算法更好的性能。我们在不同风格的真实数据集上进行了一系列实验，以与最先进的 KOSHU 算法进行效果比较。实验结果表明，TOIT 在运行时间和内存消耗方面均优于 KOSHU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TOIT的通用算法，用于解决传统货架效用挖掘（OSUM）中因阈值设置不当导致的模式数量不均衡问题，通过挖掘Top-K高相对效用项集提升效率。
AI.motivation: 传统OSUM需用户预设最小效用阈值（minutil），但阈值过高导致模式不足，过低则浪费资源，难以平衡实际需求与计算开销。
AI.method: TOIT算法动态调整minutil，并引入子树效用和局部效用两种上界策略剪枝搜索空间，从而减少计算量和内存消耗。
AI.result: 在多类真实数据集上的实验表明，TOIT在运行时间和内存消耗上均优于现有KOSHU算法。
AI.conclusion: TOIT通过自适应阈值调整和高效剪枝策略，有效解决了OSUM的阈值设定难题，显著提升了挖掘效率和实用性。

authors_text: Midhun Vayyat,Jaswin Kasi,Anuraag Bhattacharya,Shuaib Ahmed,Rahul Tallamraju
title: CLUDA : Contrastive Learning in Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: CLUDA：语义分割无监督域适应中的对比学习
abstract: In this work, we propose CLUDA, a simple, yet novel method for performing unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) for semantic segmentation by incorporating contrastive losses into a student-teacher learning paradigm, that makes use of pseudo-labels generated from the target domain by the teacher network. More specifically, we extract a multi-level fused-feature map from the encoder, and apply contrastive loss across different classes and different domains, via source-target mixing of images. We consistently improve performance on various feature encoder architectures and for different domain adaptation datasets in semantic segmentation. Furthermore, we introduce a learned-weighted contrastive loss to improve upon on a state-of-the-art multi-resolution training approach in UDA. We produce state-of-the-art results on GTA $\rightarrow$ Cityscapes (74.4 mIOU, +0.6) and Synthia $\rightarrow$ Cityscapes (67.2 mIOU, +1.4) datasets. CLUDA effectively demonstrates contrastive learning in UDA as a generic method, which can be easily integrated into any existing UDA for semantic segmentation tasks. Please refer to the supplementary material for the details on implementation.
summary: In this work, we propose CLUDA, a simple, yet novel method for performing unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) for semantic segmentation by incorporating contrastive losses into a student-teacher learning paradigm, that makes use of pseudo-labels generated from the target domain by the teacher network. More specifically, we extract a multi-level fused-feature map from the encoder, and apply contrastive loss across different classes and different domains, via source-target mixing of images. We consistently improve performance on various feature encoder architectures and for different domain adaptation datasets in semantic segmentation. Furthermore, we introduce a learned-weighted contrastive loss to improve upon on a state-of-the-art multi-resolution training approach in UDA. We produce state-of-the-art results on GTA $\rightarrow$ Cityscapes (74.4 mIOU, +0.6) and Synthia $\rightarrow$ Cityscapes (67.2 mIOU, +1.4) datasets. CLUDA effectively demonstrates contrastive learning in UDA as a generic method, which can be easily integrated into any existing UDA for semantic segmentation tasks. Please refer to the supplementary material for the details on implementation.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 CLUDA，一种简单而新颖的方法，通过将对比损失纳入学生-教师学习范式，利用教师网络从目标域生成的伪标签来执行语义分割的无监督域适应（UDA）。更具体地说，我们从编码器中提取多级融合特征图，并通过图像的源目标混合在不同类别和不同领域应用对比损失。我们不断提高各种特征编码器架构和语义分割中不同领域适应数据集的性能。此外，我们引入了学习加权对比损失来改进 UDA 中最先进的多分辨率训练方法。我们在 GTA $\rightarrow$ Cityscapes (74.4 mIOU, +0.6) 和 Synthia $\rightarrow$ Cityscapes (67.2 mIOU, +1.4) 数据集上产生了最先进的结果。 CLUDA 有效地展示了 UDA 中的对比学习作为一种通用方法，可以轻松集成到任何现有的用于语义分割任务的 UDA 中。具体实施细则请参阅补充材料。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CLUDA的无监督域适应方法，用于语义分割任务，通过引入对比损失到学生-教师学习框架中。
AI.motivation: 在无监督域适应中，如何有效利用目标域的伪标签并提升模型的泛化能力是一个重要挑战。
AI.method: 该方法通过从编码器中提取多级融合特征图，并在不同类别和不同域之间应用对比损失，利用源域和目标域图像的混合来提升性能。
AI.result: CLUDA在GTA→Cityscapes和Synthia→Cityscapes数据集上取得了最先进的结果，分别达到了74.4 mIOU和67.2 mIOU。
AI.conclusion: CLUDA作为一种通用方法，可以轻松集成到任何现有的无监督域适应语义分割任务中，有效展示了对比学习在UDA中的应用。

search_text: CLUDA : Contrastive Learning in Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Semantic Segmentation CLUDA：语义分割无监督域适应中的对比学习 In this work, we propose CLUDA, a simple, yet novel method for performing unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) for semantic segmentation by incorporating contrastive losses into a student-teacher learning paradigm, that makes use of pseudo-labels generated from the target domain by the teacher network. More specifically, we extract a multi-level fused-feature map from the encoder, and apply contrastive loss across different classes and different domains, via source-target mixing of images. We consistently improve performance on various feature encoder architectures and for different domain adaptation datasets in semantic segmentation. Furthermore, we introduce a learned-weighted contrastive loss to improve upon on a state-of-the-art multi-resolution training approach in UDA. We produce state-of-the-art results on GTA $\rightarrow$ Cityscapes (74.4 mIOU, +0.6) and Synthia $\rightarrow$ Cityscapes (67.2 mIOU, +1.4) datasets. CLUDA effectively demonstrates contrastive learning in UDA as a generic method, which can be easily integrated into any existing UDA for semantic segmentation tasks. Please refer to the supplementary material for the details on implementation. 在这项工作中，我们提出了 CLUDA，一种简单而新颖的方法，通过将对比损失纳入学生-教师学习范式，利用教师网络从目标域生成的伪标签来执行语义分割的无监督域适应（UDA）。更具体地说，我们从编码器中提取多级融合特征图，并通过图像的源目标混合在不同类别和不同领域应用对比损失。我们不断提高各种特征编码器架构和语义分割中不同领域适应数据集的性能。此外，我们引入了学习加权对比损失来改进 UDA 中最先进的多分辨率训练方法。我们在 GTA $\rightarrow$ Cityscapes (74.4 mIOU, +0.6) 和 Synthia $\rightarrow$ Cityscapes (67.2 mIOU, +1.4) 数据集上产生了最先进的结果。 CLUDA 有效地展示了 UDA 中的对比学习作为一种通用方法，可以轻松集成到任何现有的用于语义分割任务的 UDA 中。具体实施细则请参阅补充材料。 本文提出了一种名为CLUDA的无监督域适应方法，用于语义分割任务，通过引入对比损失到学生-教师学习框架中。 Midhun Vayyat,Jaswin Kasi,Anuraag Bhattacharya,Shuaib Ahmed,Rahul Tallamraju cs.CV

authors_text: Daichi Amagata,Yusuke Arai,Sumio Fujita,Takahiro Hara
title: Learned k-NN Distance Estimation
title_zh: 学习 k-NN 距离估计
abstract: Big data mining is well known to be an important task for data science, because it can provide useful observations and new knowledge hidden in given large datasets. Proximity-based data analysis is particularly utilized in many real-life applications. In such analysis, the distances to k nearest neighbors are usually employed, thus its main bottleneck is derived from data retrieval. Much efforts have been made to improve the efficiency of these analyses. However, they still incur large costs, because they essentially need many data accesses. To avoid this issue, we propose a machine-learning technique that quickly and accurately estimates the k-NN distances (i.e., distances to the k nearest neighbors) of a given query. We train a fully connected neural network model and utilize pivots to achieve accurate estimation. Our model is designed to have useful advantages: it infers distances to the k-NNs at a time, its inference time is O(1) (no data accesses are incurred), but it keeps high accuracy. Our experimental results and case studies on real datasets demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of our solution.
summary: Big data mining is well known to be an important task for data science, because it can provide useful observations and new knowledge hidden in given large datasets. Proximity-based data analysis is particularly utilized in many real-life applications. In such analysis, the distances to k nearest neighbors are usually employed, thus its main bottleneck is derived from data retrieval. Much efforts have been made to improve the efficiency of these analyses. However, they still incur large costs, because they essentially need many data accesses. To avoid this issue, we propose a machine-learning technique that quickly and accurately estimates the k-NN distances (i.e., distances to the k nearest neighbors) of a given query. We train a fully connected neural network model and utilize pivots to achieve accurate estimation. Our model is designed to have useful advantages: it infers distances to the k-NNs at a time, its inference time is O(1) (no data accesses are incurred), but it keeps high accuracy. Our experimental results and case studies on real datasets demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of our solution.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，大数据挖掘是数据科学的一项重要任务，因为它可以提供隐藏在给定大型数据集中的有用观察结果和新知识。基于邻近度的数据分析特别适用于许多现实生活中的应用。在这种分析中，通常采用到k个最近邻的距离，因此其主要瓶颈来自于数据检索。为了提高这些分析的效率，人们付出了很多努力。然而，它们仍然会产生大量成本，因为它们本质上需要许多数据访问。为了避免这个问题，我们提出了一种机器学习技术，可以快速准确地估计给定查询的 k-NN 距离（即到 k 个最近邻居的距离）。我们训练一个完全连接的神经网络模型并利用枢轴来实现准确的估计。我们的模型被设计为具有有用的优点：它一次推断到 k-NN 的距离，其推断时间为 O(1)（不会产生数据访问），但它保持高精度。我们对真实数据集的实验结果和案例研究证明了我们解决方案的效率和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于机器学习的k近邻距离估计方法，通过神经网络和枢轴点实现快速准确的距离预测。
AI.motivation: 传统k近邻分析因需要频繁数据访问导致计算成本高昂，现有优化方法仍难以有效降低检索开销。
AI.method: 训练全连接神经网络模型结合枢轴点机制，在无需数据访问的情况下实现O(1)时间复杂度的k近邻距离批量估计。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验验证了该方法在保持高精度的同时显著提升了计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的机器学习框架为大规模数据的近邻分析提供了低开销解决方案，平衡了精度与计算效率的矛盾。

authors_text: Shuqiang Cao,Weixin Luo,Bairui Wang,Wei Zhang,Lin Ma
title: A Circular Window-based Cascade Transformer for Online Action Detection
title_zh: 用于在线动作检测的基于圆形窗口的级联变压器
abstract: Online action detection aims at the accurate action prediction of the current frame based on long historical observations. Meanwhile, it demands real-time inference on online streaming videos. In this paper, we advocate a novel and efficient principle for online action detection. It merely updates the latest and oldest historical representations in one window but reuses the intermediate ones, which have been already computed. Based on this principle, we introduce a window-based cascade Transformer with a circular historical queue, where it conducts multi-stage attentions and cascade refinement on each window. We also explore the association between online action detection and its counterpart offline action segmentation as an auxiliary task. We find that such an extra supervision helps discriminative history clustering and acts as feature augmentation for better training the classifier and cascade refinement. Our proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art performances on three challenging datasets THUMOS'14, TVSeries, and HDD. Codes will be available after acceptance.
summary: Online action detection aims at the accurate action prediction of the current frame based on long historical observations. Meanwhile, it demands real-time inference on online streaming videos. In this paper, we advocate a novel and efficient principle for online action detection. It merely updates the latest and oldest historical representations in one window but reuses the intermediate ones, which have been already computed. Based on this principle, we introduce a window-based cascade Transformer with a circular historical queue, where it conducts multi-stage attentions and cascade refinement on each window. We also explore the association between online action detection and its counterpart offline action segmentation as an auxiliary task. We find that such an extra supervision helps discriminative history clustering and acts as feature augmentation for better training the classifier and cascade refinement. Our proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art performances on three challenging datasets THUMOS'14, TVSeries, and HDD. Codes will be available after acceptance.
abstract_zh: 在线动作检测旨在基于长期历史观察准确预测当前帧的动作。同时，它需要对在线流媒体视频进行实时推理。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖且有效的在线动作检测原理。它仅更新一个窗口中最新和最旧的历史表示，但重用已经计算过的中间表示。基于这个原理，我们引入了一个基于窗口的级联 Transformer，具有循环历史队列，它对每个窗口进行多阶段关注和级联细化。我们还探索在线动作检测与其对应的离线动作分割之间的关联作为辅助任务。我们发现这种额外的监督有助于区分历史聚类，并作为特征增强，以更好地训练分类器和级联细化。我们提出的方法在三个具有挑战性的数据集 THUMOS'14、TVSeries 和 HDD 上实现了最先进的性能。代码将在接受后可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于循环窗口级联Transformer的在线动作检测方法，通过高效利用历史信息提升实时视频流的动作预测性能。
AI.motivation: 在线动作检测需在实时视频流中准确预测当前帧动作，同时依赖长期历史观测。传统方法存在冗余计算和效率不足的问题，需设计更高效的表示更新机制。
AI.method: 采用循环窗口级联Transformer架构，仅更新窗口内最新和最旧的历史表示并复用中间结果；结合多阶段注意力机制与级联精炼模块，并引入离线动作分割作为辅助任务增强特征学习。
AI.result: 在THUMOS'14、TVSeries和HDD三个数据集上达到当时最先进的检测性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的循环窗口级联Transformer框架通过高效的历史表示复用和辅助任务设计，为在线动作检测提供了兼具实时性与准确性的解决方案。

authors_text: Nilanjan Chattopadhyay,Shiv Gehlot,Nitin Singhal
title: FUSION: Fully Unsupervised Test-Time Stain Adaptation via Fused Normalization Statistics
title_zh: FUSION：通过融合归一化统计进行完全无监督的测试时染色适应
comment: Accepted in European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022 Workshop: AI-enabled medical image analysis (AIMIA)
comments: Accepted in European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022 Workshop: AI-enabled medical image analysis (AIMIA)
abstract: Staining reveals the micro structure of the aspirate while creating histopathology slides. Stain variation, defined as a chromatic difference between the source and the target, is caused by varying characteristics during staining, resulting in a distribution shift and poor performance on the target. The goal of stain normalization is to match the target's chromatic distribution to that of the source. However, stain normalisation causes the underlying morphology to distort, resulting in an incorrect diagnosis. We propose FUSION, a new method for promoting stain-adaption by adjusting the model to the target in an unsupervised test-time scenario, eliminating the necessity for significant labelling at the target end. FUSION works by altering the target's batch normalization statistics and fusing them with source statistics using a weighting factor. The algorithm reduces to one of two extremes based on the weighting factor. Despite the lack of training or supervision, FUSION surpasses existing equivalent algorithms for classification and dense predictions (segmentation), as demonstrated by comprehensive experiments on two public datasets.

The algorithm reduces to one of two extremes based on the weighting factor. abstract_zh: 染色可揭示抽吸物的微观结构，同时制作组织病理学载玻片。染色变化定义为源和目标之间的色度差异，是由染色过程中的不同特性引起的，导致分布变化和目标上的性能不佳。染色归一化的目标是将目标的色度分布与源的色度分布相匹配。然而，染色标准化会导致潜在的形态扭曲，从而导致错误的诊断。我们提出了 FUSION，这是一种通过在无监督的测试时间场景中将模型调整到目标来促进染色适应的新方法，消除了在目标端进行显着标记的必要性。 FUSION 的工作原理是更改目标的批量归一化统计数据，并使用权重因子将它们与源统计数据融合。该算法根据权重因子减少到两个极端之一。尽管缺乏训练或监督，FUSION 仍然超越了现有的分类和密集预测（分割）的等效算法，正如对两个公共数据集的综合实验所证明的那样。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FUSION的方法，用于在无监督测试时通过融合归一化统计信息来实现染色适应。
AI.motivation: 染色变化会导致目标数据集的分布偏移，从而影响模型性能。传统染色归一化方法可能会扭曲组织形态，导致诊断错误。因此，需要一种无需大量标注即可适应目标数据集的方法。
AI.method: FUSION方法通过调整目标数据的批量归一化统计信息，并使用加权因子将其与源数据统计信息融合，从而实现染色适应。
AI.result: 实验表明，FUSION在两个公开数据集上超越了现有算法，在分类和密集预测任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: FUSION提供了一种在无监督测试时适应染色变化的新方法，无需大量标注即可提高模型性能。

search_text: FUSION: Fully Unsupervised Test-Time Stain Adaptation via Fused Normalization Statistics FUSION：通过融合归一化统计进行完全无监督的测试时染色适应 Staining reveals the micro structure of the aspirate while creating histopathology slides. Stain variation, defined as a chromatic difference between the source and the target, is caused by varying characteristics during staining, resulting in a distribution shift and poor performance on the target. The goal of stain normalization is to match the target's chromatic distribution to that of the source. However, stain normalisation causes the underlying morphology to distort, resulting in an incorrect diagnosis. FUSION works by altering the target's batch normalization statistics and fusing them with source statistics using a weighting factor. The algorithm reduces to one of two extremes based on the weighting factor. authors_text: Hongkai Chen,Zixin Luo,Lei Zhou,Yurun Tian,Mingmin Zhen,Tian Fang,David Mckinnon,Yanghai Tsin,Long Quan
title: ASpanFormer: Detector-Free Image Matching with Adaptive Span Transformer
title_zh: ASpanFormer：使用自适应跨度变压器进行无探测器图像匹配
comment: Accepted to ECCV2022, project page at https://aspanformer.github.io/
comments: Accepted to ECCV2022, project page at https://aspanformer.github.io/
abstract: Generating robust and reliable correspondences across images is a fundamental task for a diversity of applications. To capture context at both global and local granularity, we propose ASpanFormer, a Transformer-based detector-free matcher that is built on hierarchical attention structure, adopting a novel attention operation which is capable of adjusting attention span in a self-adaptive manner. To achieve this goal, first, flow maps are regressed in each cross attention phase to locate the center of search region. Next, a sampling grid is generated around the center, whose size, instead of being empirically configured as fixed, is adaptively computed from a pixel uncertainty estimated along with the flow map. Finally, attention is computed across two images within derived regions, referred to as attention span. By these means, we are able to not only maintain long-range dependencies, but also enable fine-grained attention among pixels of high relevance that compensates essential locality and piece-wise smoothness in matching tasks. State-of-the-art accuracy on a wide range of evaluation benchmarks validates the strong matching capability of our method.
summary: Generating robust and reliable correspondences across images is a fundamental task for a diversity of applications. To capture context at both global and local granularity, we propose ASpanFormer, a Transformer-based detector-free matcher that is built on hierarchical attention structure, adopting a novel attention operation which is capable of adjusting attention span in a self-adaptive manner. To achieve this goal, first, flow maps are regressed in each cross attention phase to locate the center of search region. Next, a sampling grid is generated around the center, whose size, instead of being empirically configured as fixed, is adaptively computed from a pixel uncertainty estimated along with the flow map. Finally, attention is computed across two images within derived regions, referred to as attention span. By these means, we are able to not only maintain long-range dependencies, but also enable fine-grained attention among pixels of high relevance that compensates essential locality and piece-wise smoothness in matching tasks. State-of-the-art accuracy on a wide range of evaluation benchmarks validates the strong matching capability of our method.
abstract_zh: 跨图像生成强大且可靠的对应关系是各种应用程序的一项基本任务。为了捕获全局和局部粒度的上下文，我们提出了 ASpanFormer，一种基于 Transformer 的无检测器匹配器，它建立在分层注意力结构上，采用一种新颖的注意力操作，能够以自适应方式调整注意力跨度。为了实现这一目标，首先，在每个交叉注意阶段对流图进行回归以定位搜索区域的中心。接下来，围绕中心生成采样网格，其大小不是根据经验配置为固定的，而是根据与流图一起估计的像素不确定性自适应计算。最后，在派生区域内的两个图像上计算注意力，称为注意力跨度。通过这些方式，我们不仅能够保持远程依赖性，而且能够在高相关性的像素之间进行细粒度的关注，从而补偿匹配任务中的基本局部性和分段平滑性。各种评估基准的最先进的准确性验证了我们方法的强大匹配能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需检测器的图像匹配方法ASpanFormer，通过自适应注意力机制实现跨图像的鲁棒对应关系生成。
AI.motivation: 传统图像匹配方法依赖检测器提取特征点，存在计算复杂度高和匹配鲁棒性不足的问题，需探索更高效的端到端匹配方案。
AI.method: 基于分层注意力结构设计自适应跨度Transformer，通过回归流图定位搜索区域中心，结合像素不确定性自适应生成采样网格，并在双图像区域间计算注意力跨度以保持长程依赖与局部细节。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到最先进精度，验证了方法在保持长距离依赖的同时有效捕捉高相关性局部特征的能力。
AI.conclusion: ASpanFormer通过自适应注意力跨度机制，在无需检测器的前提下实现了更精确的图像匹配，为端到端视觉任务提供了新思路。

search_text: ASpanFormer: Detector-Free Image Matching with Adaptive Span Transformer ASpanFormer：使用自适应跨度变压器进行无探测器图像匹配 Generating robust and reliable correspondences across images is a fundamental task for a diversity of applications. To capture context at both global and local granularity, we propose ASpanFormer, a Transformer-based detector-free matcher that is built on hierarchical attention structure, adopting a novel attention operation which is capable of adjusting attention span in a self-adaptive manner. To achieve this goal, first, flow maps are regressed in each cross attention phase to locate the center of search region. Next, a sampling grid is generated around the center, whose size, instead of being empirically configured as fixed, is adaptively computed from a pixel uncertainty estimated along with the flow map. Finally, attention is computed across two images within derived regions, referred to as attention span. By these means, we are able to not only maintain long-range dependencies, but also enable fine-grained attention among pixels of high relevance that compensates essential locality and piece-wise smoothness in matching tasks. State-of-the-art accuracy on a wide range of evaluation benchmarks validates the strong matching capability of our method. 跨图像生成强大且可靠的对应关系是各种应用程序的一项基本任务。为了捕获全局和局部粒度的上下文，我们提出了 ASpanFormer，一种基于 Transformer 的无检测器匹配器，它建立在分层注意力结构上，采用一种新颖的注意力操作，能够以自适应方式调整注意力跨度。为了实现这一目标，首先，在每个交叉注意阶段对流图进行回归以定位搜索区域的中心。接下来，围绕中心生成采样网格，其大小不是根据经验配置为固定的，而是根据与流图一起估计的像素不确定性自适应计算。最后，在派生区域内的两个图像上计算注意力，称为注意力跨度。通过这些方式，我们不仅能够保持远程依赖性，而且能够在高相关性的像素之间进行细粒度的关注，从而补偿匹配任务中的基本局部性和分段平滑性。各种评估基准的最先进的准确性验证了我们方法的强大匹配能力。 本文提出一种无需检测器的图像匹配方法ASpanFormer，通过自适应注意力机制实现跨图像的鲁棒对应关系生成。 Hongkai Chen,Zixin Luo,Lei Zhou,Yurun Tian,Mingmin Zhen,Tian Fang,David Mckinnon,Yanghai Tsin,Long Quan cs.CV

authors_text: Adam Thelen,Xiaoge Zhang,Olga Fink,Yan Lu,Sayan Ghosh,Byeng D. Youn,Michael D. Todd,Sankaran Mahadevan,Chao Hu,Zhen Hu
title: A Comprehensive Review of Digital Twin -- Part 1: Modeling and Twinning Enabling Technologies
title_zh: 数字孪生的全面回顾 - 第 1 部分：建模和孪生支持技术
abstract: As an emerging technology in the era of Industry 4.0, digital twin is gaining unprecedented attention because of its promise to further optimize process design, quality control, health monitoring, decision and policy making, and more, by comprehensively modeling the physical world as a group of interconnected digital models. In a two-part series of papers, we examine the fundamental role of different modeling techniques, twinning enabling technologies, and uncertainty quantification and optimization methods commonly used in digital twins. This first paper presents a thorough literature review of digital twin trends across many disciplines currently pursuing this area of research. Then, digital twin modeling and twinning enabling technologies are further analyzed by classifying them into two main categories: physical-to-virtual, and virtual-to-physical, based on the direction in which data flows. Finally, this paper provides perspectives on the trajectory of digital twin technology over the next decade, and introduces a few emerging areas of research which will likely be of great use in future digital twin research. In part two of this review, the role of uncertainty quantification and optimization are discussed, a battery digital twin is demonstrated, and more perspectives on the future of digital twin are shared.
summary: As an emerging technology in the era of Industry 4.0, digital twin is gaining unprecedented attention because of its promise to further optimize process design, quality control, health monitoring, decision and policy making, and more, by comprehensively modeling the physical world as a group of interconnected digital models. In a two-part series of papers, we examine the fundamental role of different modeling techniques, twinning enabling technologies, and uncertainty quantification and optimization methods commonly used in digital twins. This first paper presents a thorough literature review of digital twin trends across many disciplines currently pursuing this area of research. Then, digital twin modeling and twinning enabling technologies are further analyzed by classifying them into two main categories: physical-to-virtual, and virtual-to-physical, based on the direction in which data flows. Finally, this paper provides perspectives on the trajectory of digital twin technology over the next decade, and introduces a few emerging areas of research which will likely be of great use in future digital twin research. In part two of this review, the role of uncertainty quantification and optimization are discussed, a battery digital twin is demonstrated, and more perspectives on the future of digital twin are shared.
abstract_zh: 作为工业4.0时代的一项新兴技术，数字孪生正受到前所未有的关注，因为它有望通过将物理世界全面建模为一组互连的数字模型来进一步优化流程设计、质量控制、健康监测、决策和政策制定等。在由两部分组成的系列论文中，我们研究了数字孪生中常用的不同建模技术、孪生支持技术以及不确定性量化和优化方法的基本作用。第一篇论文对目前从事该研究领域的许多学科的数字孪生趋势进行了全面的文献综述。然后，根据数据流动的方向，将数字孪生建模和孪生支持技术分为两大类：物理到虚拟和虚拟到物理，进一步分析。最后，本文对未来十年数字孪生技术的发展轨迹进行了展望，并介绍了一些可能在未来数字孪生研究中大有用处的新兴研究领域。在本综述的第二部分中，讨论了不确定性量化和优化的作用，演示了电池数字孪生，并分享了关于数字孪生未来的更多观点。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾了数字孪生技术中的建模方法与双向映射技术，分类分析其技术方向并展望未来发展趋势。
AI.motivation: 数字孪生作为工业4.0的核心技术，其建模与双向映射技术对优化工业流程和决策具有重要意义，但现有研究缺乏系统性梳理。
AI.method: 通过跨学科文献综述，将数字孪生技术分为物理到虚拟与虚拟到物理两类方向，结合案例分析与趋势预测方法进行研究。
AI.result: 明确了数字孪生技术的分类框架，识别出当前研究热点与技术瓶颈，并提出未来十年在不确定性量化等领域的研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 数字孪生技术将深度整合多学科方法，其发展需突破数据交互与模型精度瓶颈，为工业智能化提供关键支撑。

search_text: A Comprehensive Review of Digital Twin -- Part 1: Modeling and Twinning Enabling Technologies 数字孪生的全面回顾 - 第 1 部分：建模和孪生支持技术 As an emerging technology in the era of Industry 4.0, digital twin is gaining unprecedented attention because of its promise to further optimize process design, quality control, health monitoring, decision and policy making, and more, by comprehensively modeling the physical world as a group of interconnected digital models. In a two-part series of papers, we examine the fundamental role of different modeling techniques, twinning enabling technologies, and uncertainty quantification and optimization methods commonly used in digital twins. This first paper presents a thorough literature review of digital twin trends across many disciplines currently pursuing this area of research. Then, digital twin modeling and twinning enabling technologies are further analyzed by classifying them into two main categories: physical-to-virtual, and virtual-to-physical, based on the direction in which data flows. Finally, this paper provides perspectives on the trajectory of digital twin technology over the next decade, and introduces a few emerging areas of research which will likely be of great use in future digital twin research. In part two of this review, the role of uncertainty quantification and optimization are discussed, a battery digital twin is demonstrated, and more perspectives on the future of digital twin are shared. 作为工业4.0时代的一项新兴技术，数字孪生正受到前所未有的关注，因为它有望通过将物理世界全面建模为一组互连的数字模型来进一步优化流程设计、质量控制、健康监测、决策和政策制定等。在由两部分组成的系列论文中，我们研究了数字孪生中常用的不同建模技术、孪生支持技术以及不确定性量化和优化方法的基本作用。第一篇论文对目前从事该研究领域的许多学科的数字孪生趋势进行了全面的文献综述。然后，根据数据流动的方向，将数字孪生建模和孪生支持技术分为两大类：物理到虚拟和虚拟到物理，进一步分析。最后，本文对未来十年数字孪生技术的发展轨迹进行了展望，并介绍了一些可能在未来数字孪生研究中大有用处的新兴研究领域。在本综述的第二部分中，讨论了不确定性量化和优化的作用，演示了电池数字孪生，并分享了关于数字孪生未来的更多观点。 本文系统回顾了数字孪生技术中的建模方法与双向映射技术，分类分析其技术方向并展望未来发展趋势。 Adam Thelen,Xiaoge Zhang,Olga Fink,Yan Lu,Sayan Ghosh,Byeng D. Youn,Michael D. Todd,Sankaran Mahadevan,Chao Hu,Zhen Hu cs.CE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Silvio Galesso,Maria Alejandra Bravo,Mehdi Naouar,Thomas Brox
title: Probing Contextual Diversity for Dense Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: 探测密集分布外检测的上下文多样性
comment: Safe Artificial Intelligence for Automated Driving Workshop, ECCV 2022
comments: Safe Artificial Intelligence for Automated Driving Workshop, ECCV 2022
abstract: Detection of out-of-distribution (OoD) samples in the context of image classification has recently become an area of interest and active study, along with the topic of uncertainty estimation, to which it is closely related. In this paper we explore the task of OoD segmentation, which has been studied less than its classification counterpart and presents additional challenges. Segmentation is a dense prediction task for which the model's outcome for each pixel depends on its surroundings. The receptive field and the reliance on context play a role for distinguishing different classes and, correspondingly, for spotting OoD entities. We introduce MOoSe, an efficient strategy to leverage the various levels of context represented within semantic segmentation models and show that even a simple aggregation of multi-scale representations has consistently positive effects on OoD detection and uncertainty estimation.
summary: Detection of out-of-distribution (OoD) samples in the context of image classification has recently become an area of interest and active study, along with the topic of uncertainty estimation, to which it is closely related. In this paper we explore the task of OoD segmentation, which has been studied less than its classification counterpart and presents additional challenges. Segmentation is a dense prediction task for which the model's outcome for each pixel depends on its surroundings. The receptive field and the reliance on context play a role for distinguishing different classes and, correspondingly, for spotting OoD entities. We introduce MOoSe, an efficient strategy to leverage the various levels of context represented within semantic segmentation models and show that even a simple aggregation of multi-scale representations has consistently positive effects on OoD detection and uncertainty estimation.
abstract_zh: 图像分类背景下的分布外（OoD）样本检测以及与之密切相关的不确定性估计主题最近已成为一个令人感兴趣和活跃的研究领域。在本文中，我们探讨了 OoD 分割任务，该任务的研究少于其分类任务，并且提出了额外的挑战。分割是一项密集预测任务，每个像素的模型结果取决于其周围环境。感受野和对上下文的依赖在区分不同类别以及相应地发现 OoD 实体方面发挥着重要作用。我们引入了 MOoSe，这是一种有效的策略，可以利用语义分割模型中表示的各个级别的上下文，并表明即使是多尺度表示的简单聚合也对 OoD 检测和不确定性估计始终具有积极的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究图像分割任务中分布外样本（OoD）的检测问题，提出利用多尺度上下文信息提升检测效果的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有OoD检测研究多集中于分类任务，而分割任务因依赖上下文信息且研究较少，面临更大挑战，需探索如何有效利用上下文多样性进行检测。
AI.method: 提出MOoSe方法，通过聚合语义分割模型中多尺度特征表示，利用不同层次的上下文信息提升OoD检测与不确定性估计能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个数据集上均能有效提升OoD检测性能，验证了多尺度上下文聚合策略的普适性。
AI.conclusion: 上下文多样性对OoD分割至关重要，MOoSe方法通过简单有效的多尺度特征融合策略，为该领域提供了新的研究方向。

authors_text: Lichen Jia,Bowen Tang,Chenggang Wu,Zhe Wang,Zihan Jiang,Yuanming Lai,Yan Kang,Ning Liu,Jingfeng Zhang
title: FuncFooler: A Practical Black-box Attack Against Learning-based Binary Code Similarity Detection Methods
title_zh: FuncFooler：针对基于学习的二进制代码相似性检测方法的实用黑盒攻击
abstract: The binary code similarity detection (BCSD) method measures the similarity of two binary executable codes. Recently, the learning-based BCSD methods have achieved great success, outperforming traditional BCSD in detection accuracy and efficiency. However, the existing studies are rather sparse on the adversarial vulnerability of the learning-based BCSD methods, which cause hazards in security-related applications. To evaluate the adversarial robustness, this paper designs an efficient and black-box adversarial code generation algorithm, namely, FuncFooler. FuncFooler constrains the adversarial codes 1) to keep unchanged the program's control flow graph (CFG), and 2) to preserve the same semantic meaning. Specifically, FuncFooler consecutively 1) determines vulnerable candidates in the malicious code, 2) chooses and inserts the adversarial instructions from the benign code, and 3) corrects the semantic side effect of the adversarial code to meet the constraints. Empirically, our FuncFooler can successfully attack the three learning-based BCSD models, including SAFE, Asm2Vec, and jTrans, which calls into question whether the learning-based BCSD is desirable.
summary: The binary code similarity detection (BCSD) method measures the similarity of two binary executable codes. Recently, the learning-based BCSD methods have achieved great success, outperforming traditional BCSD in detection accuracy and efficiency. However, the existing studies are rather sparse on the adversarial vulnerability of the learning-based BCSD methods, which cause hazards in security-related applications. To evaluate the adversarial robustness, this paper designs an efficient and black-box adversarial code generation algorithm, namely, FuncFooler. FuncFooler constrains the adversarial codes 1) to keep unchanged the program's control flow graph (CFG), and 2) to preserve the same semantic meaning. Specifically, FuncFooler consecutively 1) determines vulnerable candidates in the malicious code, 2) chooses and inserts the adversarial instructions from the benign code, and 3) corrects the semantic side effect of the adversarial code to meet the constraints. Empirically, our FuncFooler can successfully attack the three learning-based BCSD models, including SAFE, Asm2Vec, and jTrans, which calls into question whether the learning-based BCSD is desirable.
abstract_zh: 二进制代码相似性检测（BCSD）方法测量两个二进制可执行代码的相似性。最近，基于学习的BCSD方法取得了巨大成功，在检测精度和效率方面优于传统BCSD。然而，现有的关于基于学习的 BCSD 方法的对抗漏洞的研究相当稀疏，这在安全相关的应用中造成了危险。为了评估对抗性的鲁棒性，本文设计了一种高效的黑盒对抗性代码生成算法，即 FuncFooler。 FuncFooler 约束对抗性代码 1）保持程序的控制流图（CFG）不变，2）保留相同的语义。具体来说，FuncFooler 连续 1）确定恶意代码中的易受攻击的候选者，2）从良性代码中选择并插入对抗性指令，3）纠正对抗性代码的语义副作用以满足约束。根据经验，我们的 FuncFooler 可以成功攻击三种基于学习的 BCSD 模型，包括 SAFE、Asm2Vec 和 jTrans，这让人质疑基于学习的 BCSD 是否可取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FuncFooler的黑盒对抗攻击方法，用于针对基于学习的二进制代码相似性检测方法。
AI.motivation: 基于学习的二进制代码相似性检测方法在准确性和效率上优于传统方法，但其对抗性漏洞的研究较少，这在安全相关应用中可能带来隐患。
AI.method: FuncFooler通过保持程序控制流图不变和保留语义意义，依次确定恶意代码中的脆弱候选、从良性代码中选择并插入对抗指令，并修正对抗代码的语义副作用。
AI.result: FuncFooler成功攻击了三种基于学习的二进制代码相似性检测模型，包括SAFE、Asm2Vec和jTrans。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，基于学习的二进制代码相似性检测方法可能存在安全风险，其可靠性值得质疑。

FuncFooler constrains the adversarial codes 1) to keep unchanged the program's control flow graph (CFG), and 2) to preserve the same semantic meaning. Specifically, FuncFooler consecutively 1) determines vulnerable candidates in the malicious code, 2) chooses and inserts the adversarial instructions from the benign code, and 3) corrects the semantic side effect of the adversarial code to meet the constraints. Empirically, our FuncFooler can successfully attack the three learning-based BCSD models, including SAFE, Asm2Vec, and jTrans, which calls into question whether the learning-based BCSD is desirable. 二进制代码相似性检测（BCSD）方法测量两个二进制可执行代码的相似性。最近，基于学习的BCSD方法取得了巨大成功，在检测精度和效率方面优于传统BCSD。然而，现有的关于基于学习的 BCSD 方法的对抗漏洞的研究相当稀疏，这在安全相关的应用中造成了危险。为了评估对抗性的鲁棒性，本文设计了一种高效的黑盒对抗性代码生成算法，即 FuncFooler。 FuncFooler 约束对抗性代码 1）保持程序的控制流图（CFG）不变，2）保留相同的语义。具体来说，FuncFooler 连续 1）确定恶意代码中的易受攻击的候选者，2）从良性代码中选择并插入对抗性指令，3）纠正对抗性代码的语义副作用以满足约束。根据经验，我们的 FuncFooler 可以成功攻击三种基于学习的 BCSD 模型，包括 SAFE、Asm2Vec 和 jTrans，这让人质疑基于学习的 BCSD 是否可取。 本文提出了一种名为FuncFooler的黑盒对抗攻击方法，用于针对基于学习的二进制代码相似性检测方法。 Lichen Jia,Bowen Tang,Chenggang Wu,Zhe Wang,Zihan Jiang,Yuanming Lai,Yan Kang,Ning Liu,Jingfeng Zhang cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Riki Kimura,Shunsuke Tanaka,Naoki Wakui,Naoki Kodama,Shohei Yano
title: A Study on the relationship between the geometrical shapes and the biometrical acoustic characteristics of human ear canal
title_zh: 人耳道几何形状与生物声学特性关系的研究
abstract: Ear acoustic authentication is a new biometrics method and it utilizes the differences in acoustic characteristics of the ear canal between users. However, there have been few reports on the factors that cause differences in the acoustic characteristics. We investigate the relationship between ear canal shapes and acoustic characteristics in terms of user-to-user similarity. We used magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) to measure ear canal geometry. As a result, the correlation coefficient between shape similarity and acoustic characteristic similarity is higher than 0.7 and the coefficient of determination is higher than 0.5. This suggests that the difference in the shape of the ear canal is one of the important factors.
summary: Ear acoustic authentication is a new biometrics method and it utilizes the differences in acoustic characteristics of the ear canal between users. However, there have been few reports on the factors that cause differences in the acoustic characteristics. We investigate the relationship between ear canal shapes and acoustic characteristics in terms of user-to-user similarity. We used magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) to measure ear canal geometry. As a result, the correlation coefficient between shape similarity and acoustic characteristic similarity is higher than 0.7 and the coefficient of determination is higher than 0.5. This suggests that the difference in the shape of the ear canal is one of the important factors.
abstract_zh: 耳声认证是一种新的生物识别方法，它利用用户耳道声学特性的差异。然而，关于造成声学特性差异的因素却鲜有报道。我们根据用户之间的相似性研究耳道形状与声学特征之间的关系。我们使用磁共振成像 (MRI) 来测量耳道几何形状。结果，形状相似度与声学特征相似度之间的相关系数高于0.7，判定系数高于0.5。这表明耳道形状的差异是重要因素之一。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨人耳耳道几何形状与生物声学特征之间的关系，以验证耳道形状差异是否为声学特征差异的重要因素。
AI.motivation: 现有耳声学认证技术缺乏对导致用户间声学特征差异关键因素的系统研究，需明确耳道几何形状的影响。
AI.method: 通过磁共振成像（MRI）测量耳道几何结构，分析形状相似性与声学特征相似性的相关性及决定系数。
AI.result: 形状相似性与声学特征相似性的相关系数超过0.7，决定系数超过0.5，表明耳道形状是显著影响因素。
AI.conclusion: 耳道几何形状差异是导致用户间声学特征差异的关键因素之一，为生物声学认证提供了形态学依据。

authors_text: Daria Trinitatova,Miguel Altamirano Cabrera,Polina Ponomareva,Aleksey Fedoseev,Dzmitry Tsetserukou
title: Exploring the Role of Electro-Tactile and Kinesthetic Feedback in Telemanipulation Task
title_zh: 探索电触觉和动觉反馈在远程操作任务中的作用
comment: Accepted paper in IEEE CASE (International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering) 2022, IEEE copyrigh
comments: Accepted paper in IEEE CASE (International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering) 2022, IEEE copyrigh
abstract: Teleoperation of robotic systems for precise and delicate object grasping requires high-fidelity haptic feedback to obtain comprehensive real-time information about the grasp. In such cases, the most common approach is to use kinesthetic feedback. However, a single contact point information is insufficient to detect the dynamically changing shape of soft objects. This paper proposes a novel telemanipulation system that provides kinesthetic and cutaneous stimuli to the user's hand to achieve accurate liquid dispensing by dexterously manipulating the deformable object (i.e., pipette). The experimental results revealed that the proposed approach to provide the user with multimodal haptic feedback considerably improves the quality of dosing with a remote pipette. Compared with pure visual feedback, the relative dosing error decreased by 66\% and task execution time decreased by 18\% when users manipulated the deformable pipette with a multimodal haptic interface in combination with visual feedback. The proposed technology can be potentially implemented in delicate dosing procedures during the antibody tests for COVID-19, chemical experiments, operation with organic materials, and telesurgery.
summary: Teleoperation of robotic systems for precise and delicate object grasping requires high-fidelity haptic feedback to obtain comprehensive real-time information about the grasp. In such cases, the most common approach is to use kinesthetic feedback. However, a single contact point information is insufficient to detect the dynamically changing shape of soft objects. This paper proposes a novel telemanipulation system that provides kinesthetic and cutaneous stimuli to the user's hand to achieve accurate liquid dispensing by dexterously manipulating the deformable object (i.e., pipette). The experimental results revealed that the proposed approach to provide the user with multimodal haptic feedback considerably improves the quality of dosing with a remote pipette. Compared with pure visual feedback, the relative dosing error decreased by 66\% and task execution time decreased by 18\% when users manipulated the deformable pipette with a multimodal haptic interface in combination with visual feedback. The proposed technology can be potentially implemented in delicate dosing procedures during the antibody tests for COVID-19, chemical experiments, operation with organic materials, and telesurgery.
abstract_zh: 用于精确和精致物体抓取的机器人系统的远程操作需要高保真触觉反馈以获得有关抓取的全面实时信息。在这种情况下，最常见的方法是使用动觉反馈。然而，单个接触点信息不足以检测软物体的动态变化形状。本文提出了一种新颖的远程操作系统，该系统向用户的手提供动觉和皮肤刺激，通过灵巧地操作可变形物体（即移液器）来实现精确的液体分配。实验结果表明，所提出的为用户提供多模式触觉反馈的方法大大提高了远程移液器的给药质量。与纯视觉反馈相比，当用户通过多模态触觉界面结合视觉反馈操作可变形移液器时，相对剂量误差减少了 66%，任务执行时间减少了 18%。所提出的技术有可能在 COVID-19 抗体测试、化学实验、有机材料操作和远程手术期间的精细剂量程序中实施。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合动觉与电触觉反馈的远程操作系统，用于提高可变形物体（如移液管）的精确操控，以实现液体分配任务。
AI.motivation: 传统单点接触反馈难以检测软体物体动态形状变化，而纯视觉反馈在精密操作中存在误差和效率问题，需多模态触觉反馈提升操作精度。
AI.method: 设计融合动觉（力反馈）与电触觉（皮肤刺激）的多模态反馈接口，结合视觉信息，通过远程操作移液管进行液体分配实验。
AI.result: 多模态反馈使剂量相对误差降低66%，任务耗时减少18%，显著优于纯视觉反馈组。
AI.conclusion: 多模态触觉反馈可有效提升远程精密操作性能，未来可应用于新冠抗体检测、化学实验及远程手术等场景。

authors_text: Fabian Herzog,Junpeng Chen,Torben Teepe,Johannes Gilg,Stefan Hörmann,Gerhard Rigoll
title: Synthehicle: Multi-Vehicle Multi-Camera Tracking in Virtual Cities
title_zh: Synthehicle：虚拟城市中的多车辆多摄像头跟踪
abstract: Smart City applications such as intelligent traffic routing or accident prevention rely on computer vision methods for exact vehicle localization and tracking. Due to the scarcity of accurately labeled data, detecting and tracking vehicles in 3D from multiple cameras proves challenging to explore. We present a massive synthetic dataset for multiple vehicle tracking and segmentation in multiple overlapping and non-overlapping camera views. Unlike existing datasets, which only provide tracking ground truth for 2D bounding boxes, our dataset additionally contains perfect labels for 3D bounding boxes in camera- and world coordinates, depth estimation, and instance, semantic and panoptic segmentation. The dataset consists of 17 hours of labeled video material, recorded from 340 cameras in 64 diverse day, rain, dawn, and night scenes, making it the most extensive dataset for multi-target multi-camera tracking so far. We provide baselines for detection, vehicle re-identification, and single- and multi-camera tracking. Code and data are publicly available.
summary: Smart City applications such as intelligent traffic routing or accident prevention rely on computer vision methods for exact vehicle localization and tracking. Due to the scarcity of accurately labeled data, detecting and tracking vehicles in 3D from multiple cameras proves challenging to explore. We present a massive synthetic dataset for multiple vehicle tracking and segmentation in multiple overlapping and non-overlapping camera views. Unlike existing datasets, which only provide tracking ground truth for 2D bounding boxes, our dataset additionally contains perfect labels for 3D bounding boxes in camera- and world coordinates, depth estimation, and instance, semantic and panoptic segmentation. The dataset consists of 17 hours of labeled video material, recorded from 340 cameras in 64 diverse day, rain, dawn, and night scenes, making it the most extensive dataset for multi-target multi-camera tracking so far. We provide baselines for detection, vehicle re-identification, and single- and multi-camera tracking. Code and data are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 智能交通路由或事故预防等智能城市应用依靠计算机视觉方法来实现精确的车辆定位和跟踪。由于缺乏准确标记的数据，从多个摄像头检测和跟踪 3D 车辆具有挑战性。我们提供了一个大规模的合成数据集，用于在多个重叠和非重叠摄像机视图中进行多车辆跟踪和分割。与仅提供 2D 边界框跟踪地面实况的现有数据集不同，我们的数据集还包含相机和世界坐标、深度估计以及实例、语义和全景分割中 3D 边界框的完美标签。该数据集由 17 小时的标记视频素材组成，由 340 个摄像机在 64 个不同的白天、雨天、黎明和夜间场景中记录，使其成为迄今为止最广泛的多目标多摄像机跟踪数据集。我们提供检测、车辆重新识别以及单摄像头和多摄像头跟踪的基线。代码和数据是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Synthehicle数据集，用于解决多摄像头虚拟城市中多车辆跟踪的难题，包含精确的3D标注和多种场景数据。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏多摄像头环境下准确的3D车辆跟踪标注，限制了智能交通等应用的发展。
AI.method: 通过合成技术生成包含340个摄像头、64种场景的17小时标注视频数据，提供3D框、深度估计及分割标签。
AI.result: 构建了目前最大的多目标多摄像头跟踪数据集，并提供检测、重识别及跟踪的基准模型。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集有效缓解了多摄像头3D跟踪数据稀缺问题，为相关算法研究提供了重要基础。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Synthehicle数据集，用于解决多摄像头虚拟城市中多车辆跟踪的难题，包含精确的3D标注和多种场景数据。
ai_content.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏多摄像头环境下准确的3D车辆跟踪标注，限制了智能交通等应用的发展。

ai_content.result: 构建了目前最大的多目标多摄像头跟踪数据集，并提供检测、重识别及跟踪的基准模型。
ai_content.conclusion: 该数据集有效缓解了多摄像头3D跟踪数据稀缺问题，为相关算法研究提供了重要基础。

search_text: Synthehicle: Multi-Vehicle Multi-Camera Tracking in Virtual Cities Synthehicle：虚拟城市中的多车辆多摄像头跟踪 Smart City applications such as intelligent traffic routing or accident prevention rely on computer vision methods for exact vehicle localization and tracking. Due to the scarcity of accurately labeled data, detecting and tracking vehicles in 3D from multiple cameras proves challenging to explore. We present a massive synthetic dataset for multiple vehicle tracking and segmentation in multiple overlapping and non-overlapping camera views. Unlike existing datasets, which only provide tracking ground truth for 2D bounding boxes, our dataset additionally contains perfect labels for 3D bounding boxes in camera- and world coordinates, depth estimation, and instance, semantic and panoptic segmentation. The dataset consists of 17 hours of labeled video material, recorded from 340 cameras in 64 diverse day, rain, dawn, and night scenes, making it the most extensive dataset for multi-target multi-camera tracking so far. We provide baselines for detection, vehicle re-identification, and single- and multi-camera tracking. Code and data are publicly available. 智能交通路由或事故预防等智能城市应用依靠计算机视觉方法来实现精确的车辆定位和跟踪。由于缺乏准确标记的数据，从多个摄像头检测和跟踪 3D 车辆具有挑战性。我们提供了一个大规模的合成数据集，用于在多个重叠和非重叠摄像机视图中进行多车辆跟踪和分割。与仅提供 2D 边界框跟踪地面实况的现有数据集不同，我们的数据集还包含相机和世界坐标、深度估计以及实例、语义和全景分割中 3D 边界框的完美标签。该数据集由 17 小时的标记视频素材组成，由 340 个摄像机在 64 个不同的白天、雨天、黎明和夜间场景中记录，使其成为迄今为止最广泛的多目标多摄像机跟踪数据集。我们提供检测、车辆重新识别以及单摄像头和多摄像头跟踪的基线。代码和数据是公开的。 本文提出Synthehicle数据集，用于解决多摄像头虚拟城市中多车辆跟踪的难题，包含精确的3D标注和多种场景数据。 Fabian Herzog,Junpeng Chen,Torben Teepe,Johannes Gilg,Stefan Hörmann,Gerhard Rigoll cs.CV

authors_text: Anyi Huang,Qian Xie,Zhoutao Wang,Dening Lu,Mingqiang Wei,Jun Wang
title: MODNet: Multi-offset Point Cloud Denoising Network Customized for Multi-scale Patches
title_zh: MODNet：为多尺度补丁定制的多偏移点云去噪网络
abstract: The intricacy of 3D surfaces often results cutting-edge point cloud denoising (PCD) models in surface degradation including remnant noise, wrongly-removed geometric details. Although using multi-scale patches to encode the geometry of a point has become the common wisdom in PCD, we find that simple aggregation of extracted multi-scale features can not adaptively utilize the appropriate scale information according to the geometric information around noisy points. It leads to surface degradation, especially for points close to edges and points on complex curved surfaces. We raise an intriguing question -- if employing multi-scale geometric perception information to guide the network to utilize multi-scale information, can eliminate the severe surface degradation problem? To answer it, we propose a Multi-offset Denoising Network (MODNet) customized for multi-scale patches. First, we extract the low-level feature of three scales patches by patch feature encoders. Second, a multi-scale perception module is designed to embed multi-scale geometric information for each scale feature and regress multi-scale weights to guide a multi-offset denoising displacement. Third, a multi-offset decoder regresses three scale offsets, which are guided by the multi-scale weights to predict the final displacement by weighting them adaptively. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance on both synthetic and real-scanned datasets.
summary: The intricacy of 3D surfaces often results cutting-edge point cloud denoising (PCD) models in surface degradation including remnant noise, wrongly-removed geometric details. Although using multi-scale patches to encode the geometry of a point has become the common wisdom in PCD, we find that simple aggregation of extracted multi-scale features can not adaptively utilize the appropriate scale information according to the geometric information around noisy points. It leads to surface degradation, especially for points close to edges and points on complex curved surfaces. We raise an intriguing question -- if employing multi-scale geometric perception information to guide the network to utilize multi-scale information, can eliminate the severe surface degradation problem? To answer it, we propose a Multi-offset Denoising Network (MODNet) customized for multi-scale patches. First, we extract the low-level feature of three scales patches by patch feature encoders. Second, a multi-scale perception module is designed to embed multi-scale geometric information for each scale feature and regress multi-scale weights to guide a multi-offset denoising displacement. Third, a multi-offset decoder regresses three scale offsets, which are guided by the multi-scale weights to predict the final displacement by weighting them adaptively. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance on both synthetic and real-scanned datasets.
abstract_zh: 3D 表面的复杂性通常会导致尖端点云去噪 (PCD) 模型出现表面退化，包括残余噪声、错误删除的几何细节。尽管使用多尺度补丁来编码点的几何形状已成为PCD中的常识，但我们发现提取的多尺度特征的简单聚合不能根据噪声点周围的几何信息自适应地利用适当的尺度信息。它会导致表面退化，特别是对于靠近边缘的点和复杂曲面上的点。我们提出一个有趣的问题——如果采用多尺度几何感知信息来引导网络利用多尺度信息，是否可以消除严重的表面退化问题？为了回答这个问题，我们提出了一种为多尺度补丁定制的多偏移去噪网络（MODNet）。首先，我们通过补丁特征编码器提取三个尺度补丁的低级特征。其次，设计多尺度感知模块，为每个尺度特征嵌入多尺度几何信息，并回归多尺度权重以指导多偏移去噪位移。第三，多偏移解码器回归三个尺度偏移，这些偏移由多尺度权重引导，通过自适应加权来预测最终位移。实验表明，我们的方法在合成数据集和真实扫描数据集上都实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MODNet，一种针对多尺度补丁定制的多偏移点云去噪网络，以解决现有方法在复杂几何区域的表面退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有点云去噪模型在处理边缘和复杂曲面时，因无法根据几何信息自适应选择多尺度特征而导致表面退化。
AI.method: 通过多尺度感知模块嵌入几何信息并回归权重，结合多偏移解码器自适应加权预测位移，实现多尺度特征的智能融合。
AI.result: 在合成与真实扫描数据集上均达到最先进的去噪性能，显著减少表面退化现象。
AI.conclusion: MODNet通过几何感知引导的多尺度信息自适应利用，有效解决了复杂几何区域的点云去噪难题。

authors_text: Ewa Duda
title: Building the Learning Environment for Sustainable Development: a Co-creation approach
title_zh: 构建可持续发展的学习环境：共同创造的方法
abstract: Education for sustainable development supports the improvement of knowledge, skills, attitudes and behaviors related to global challenges such as climate change, global warming and environmental degradation, among others. It is increasingly taking place through projects based on information and communication technologies. The effectiveness of the actions taken depends not only on the quality of the project activities or the sophistication of the innovative tools used. Social commitment also depends on the beliefs and moral judgements manifested by potential recipients of educational activities on environmental issues. This study aimed to identify the beliefs and moral judgements that may facilitate or hinder the implementation of educational activities based on information and communication technology, shaping pro-environmental attitudes and behavior among city dwellers. Based on the co-creation workshops conducted, five general categories emerged: responsibility, sense of empowerment, local leadership, real eco-approach, and eco-knowledge. The research findings may contribute to the design of educational activities dedicated to shaping the pro-environmental behavior of city dwellers.
summary: Education for sustainable development supports the improvement of knowledge, skills, attitudes and behaviors related to global challenges such as climate change, global warming and environmental degradation, among others. It is increasingly taking place through projects based on information and communication technologies. The effectiveness of the actions taken depends not only on the quality of the project activities or the sophistication of the innovative tools used. Social commitment also depends on the beliefs and moral judgements manifested by potential recipients of educational activities on environmental issues. This study aimed to identify the beliefs and moral judgements that may facilitate or hinder the implementation of educational activities based on information and communication technology, shaping pro-environmental attitudes and behavior among city dwellers. Based on the co-creation workshops conducted, five general categories emerged: responsibility, sense of empowerment, local leadership, real eco-approach, and eco-knowledge. The research findings may contribute to the design of educational activities dedicated to shaping the pro-environmental behavior of city dwellers.
abstract_zh: 可持续发展教育支持提高与气候变化、全球变暖和环境退化等全球挑战相关的知识、技能、态度和行为。它越来越多地通过基于信息和通信技术的项目来实现。所采取行动的有效性不仅取决于项目活动的质量或所使用的创新工具的复杂程度。社会承诺还取决于环境问题教育活动的潜在接受者所表现出的信念和道德判断。本研究旨在确定可能促进或阻碍基于信息和通信技术的教育活动实施的信念和道德判断，从而塑造城市居民的环保态度和行为。根据举办的共创研讨会，出现了五个大类：责任感、赋权感、地方领导力、真正的生态方法和生态知识。研究结果可能有助于设计旨在塑造城市居民环保行为的教育活动。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过共創工作坊探討資訊通信技術（ICT）基礎的教育活動如何塑造城市居民的環境正向行為，並識別影響其成效的信念與道德判斷因素。
AI.motivation: 現有ICT教育項目成效不僅取決於活動品質與工具創新，更需考量學習者對環境議題的信念與道德觀，以有效促進永續發展。
AI.method: 採用共創工作坊方法，分析參與者對環境教育的信念與道德判斷，歸納出五類關鍵因素。
AI.result: 歸納出五項核心類別：責任感、賦權感、地方領導力、真實生態方法與生態知識，作為設計教育活動的參考框架。
AI.conclusion: 研究結果可協助設計更符合城市居民價值觀的環境教育方案，強化其參與永續行動的動機與行為轉變。

The research findings may contribute to the design of educational activities dedicated to shaping the pro-environmental behavior of city dwellers. 可持续发展教育支持提高与气候变化、全球变暖和环境退化等全球挑战相关的知识、技能、态度和行为。它越来越多地通过基于信息和通信技术的项目来实现。所采取行动的有效性不仅取决于项目活动的质量或所使用的创新工具的复杂程度。社会承诺还取决于环境问题教育活动的潜在接受者所表现出的信念和道德判断。本研究旨在确定可能促进或阻碍基于信息和通信技术的教育活动实施的信念和道德判断，从而塑造城市居民的环保态度和行为。根据举办的共创研讨会，出现了五个大类：责任感、赋权感、地方领导力、真正的生态方法和生态知识。研究结果可能有助于设计旨在塑造城市居民环保行为的教育活动。 本文旨在通过共創工作坊探討資訊通信技術（ICT）基礎的教育活動如何塑造城市居民的環境正向行為，並識別影響其成效的信念與道德判斷因素。 Ewa Duda cs.CY,cs.HC

authors_text: Miguel Altamirano Cabrera,Jonathan Tirado,Juan Heredia,Dzmitry Tsetserukou
title: LinkGlide-S: A Wearable Multi-Contact Tactile Display Aimed at Rendering Object Softness at the Palm with Impedance Control in VR and Telemanipulation
title_zh: LinkGlide-S：一款可穿戴多触点触觉显示器，旨在通过 VR 和遥控操作中的阻抗控制来渲染手掌上的物体柔软度
comment: Accepted paper in IEEE CASE (International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering) 2022, IEEE copyrigh
comments: Accepted paper in IEEE CASE (International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering) 2022, IEEE copyrigh
abstract: LinkGlide-S is a novel wearable hand-worn tactile display to deliver multi-contact and multi-modal stimuli at the user's palm.} The array of inverted five-bar linkages generates three independent contact points to cover the whole palm area. \textcolor{black} {The independent contact points generate various tactile patterns at the user's hand, providing multi-contact tactile feedback. An impedance control delivers the stiffness of objects according to different parameters. Three experiments were performed to evaluate the perception of patterns, investigate the realistic perception of object interaction in Virtual Reality, and assess the users' softness perception by the impedance control. The experimental results revealed a high recognition rate for the generated patterns. These results confirm that the performance of LinkGlide-S is adequate to detect and manipulate virtual objects with different stiffness. This novel haptic device can potentially achieve a highly immersive VR experience and more interactive applications during telemanipulation.
summary: LinkGlide-S is a novel wearable hand-worn tactile display to deliver multi-contact and multi-modal stimuli at the user's palm.} The array of inverted five-bar linkages generates three independent contact points to cover the whole palm area. \textcolor{black} {The independent contact points generate various tactile patterns at the user's hand, providing multi-contact tactile feedback. An impedance control delivers the stiffness of objects according to different parameters. Three experiments were performed to evaluate the perception of patterns, investigate the realistic perception of object interaction in Virtual Reality, and assess the users' softness perception by the impedance control. The experimental results revealed a high recognition rate for the generated patterns. These results confirm that the performance of LinkGlide-S is adequate to detect and manipulate virtual objects with different stiffness. This novel haptic device can potentially achieve a highly immersive VR experience and more interactive applications during telemanipulation.
abstract_zh: LinkGlide-S 是一款新颖的可穿戴式手戴式触觉显示器，可在用户手掌处提供多接触和多模式刺激。}倒置五连杆阵列产生三个独立的接触点，覆盖整个手掌区域。 \textcolor{black} {独立的接触点在用户的手上产生各种触觉图案，提供多接触触觉反馈。阻抗控制根据不同的参数提供物体的刚度。进行了三个实验来评估模式的感知，研究虚拟现实中对象交互的真实感知，并通过阻抗控制评估用户的柔软度感知。实验结果表明生成的模式具有很高的识别率。这些结果证实 LinkGlide-S 的性能足以检测和操纵具有不同刚度的虚拟物体。这种新颖的触觉设备有可能在远程操作过程中实现高度沉浸式的 VR 体验和更多交互应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型可穿戴触觉显示设备LinkGlide-S，通过多接触点和阻抗控制在虚拟现实和远程操作中呈现物体柔软度。
AI.motivation: 现有触觉反馈设备难以在手掌区域提供多模态、多接触点的触觉刺激，限制了虚拟现实和远程操作中对物体真实交互感的呈现。
AI.method: 采用倒置五连杆机构阵列生成三个独立接触点覆盖手掌区域，结合阻抗控制技术调节物体刚度参数，通过三组实验验证触觉感知效果。
AI.result: 实验表明设备能以高识别率生成触觉图案，用户能准确感知虚拟物体的软硬差异，验证了设备在不同刚度物体交互中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LinkGlide-S通过多接触点触觉反馈和阻抗控制技术，为虚拟现实和远程操作提供了更沉浸式和交互性的触觉体验。

authors_text: Xin Li,Jian Li,Zhihong Jeff Xia,Nikolaos Georgakarakos
title: Large-step neural network for learning the symplectic evolution from partitioned data
title_zh: 用于从分区数据学习辛演化的大步长神经网络
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures, accepted for publication in MNRAS
comments: 13 pages, 7 figures, accepted for publication in MNRAS
abstract: In this study, we focus on learning Hamiltonian systems, which involves predicting the coordinate (q) and momentum (p) variables generated by a symplectic mapping. Based on Chen & Tao (2021), the symplectic mapping is represented by a generating function. To extend the prediction time period, we develop a new learning scheme by splitting the time series (q_i, p_i) into several partitions. We then train a large-step neural network (LSNN) to approximate the generating function between the first partition (i.e. the initial condition) and each one of the remaining partitions. This partition approach makes our LSNN effectively suppress the accumulative error when predicting the system evolution. Then we train the LSNN to learn the motions of the 2:3 resonant Kuiper belt objects for a long time period of 25000 yr. The results show that there are two significant improvements over the neural network constructed in our previous work (Li et al. 2022): (1) the conservation of the Jacobi integral, and (2) the highly accurate predictions of the orbital evolution. Overall, we propose that the designed LSNN has the potential to considerably improve predictions of the long-term evolution of more general Hamiltonian systems.
summary: In this study, we focus on learning Hamiltonian systems, which involves predicting the coordinate (q) and momentum (p) variables generated by a symplectic mapping. Based on Chen & Tao (2021), the symplectic mapping is represented by a generating function. To extend the prediction time period, we develop a new learning scheme by splitting the time series (q_i, p_i) into several partitions. We then train a large-step neural network (LSNN) to approximate the generating function between the first partition (i.e. the initial condition) and each one of the remaining partitions. This partition approach makes our LSNN effectively suppress the accumulative error when predicting the system evolution. Then we train the LSNN to learn the motions of the 2:3 resonant Kuiper belt objects for a long time period of 25000 yr. The results show that there are two significant improvements over the neural network constructed in our previous work (Li et al. 2022): (1) the conservation of the Jacobi integral, and (2) the highly accurate predictions of the orbital evolution. Overall, we propose that the designed LSNN has the potential to considerably improve predictions of the long-term evolution of more general Hamiltonian systems.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们专注于学习哈密顿系统，其中涉及预测辛映射生成的坐标（q）和动量（p）变量。基于Chen＆Tao（2021），辛映射由生成函数表示。为了延长预测时间段，我们通过将时间序列（q_i，p_i）分成几个分区来开发一种新的学习方案。然后，我们训练一个大步长神经网络（LSNN）来近似第一个分区（即初始条件）和其余每个分区之间的生成函数。这种划分方法使得我们的 LSNN 在预测系统演化时有效地抑制了累积误差。然后我们训练 LSNN 来学习 2:3 共振柯伊伯带天体在 25000 年的较长时间内的运动。结果表明，与我们之前的工作（Li et al. 2022）中构建的神经网络相比，有两个显着的改进：（1）雅可比积分守恒，（2）轨道演化的高精度预测。总的来说，我们认为设计的 LSNN 有潜力显着改善对更一般的哈密顿系统的长期演化的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种大步长神经网络（LSNN），通过分割时间序列数据学习哈密顿系统的辛演化，以提高长期预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络在预测哈密顿系统长期演化时易积累误差，且难以保持守恒量（如雅可比积分）。需改进方法以实现更精确的长期预测。
AI.method: 将时间序列（q_i, p_i）分割为多个分区，训练LSNN近似初始分区与其他分区间的生成函数，通过分区策略抑制误差累积。
AI.result: 在25000年时间尺度下，LSNN相较先前工作显著提升了雅可比积分守恒性与轨道演化的预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 设计的LSNN有望显著提升更广泛哈密顿系统的长期演化预测能力。

authors_text: Jianlong Yuan,Qian Qi,Fei Du,Zhibin Wang,Fan Wang,Yifan Liu
title: FAKD: Feature Augmented Knowledge Distillation for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: FAKD：用于语义分割的特征增强知识蒸馏
abstract: In this work, we explore data augmentations for knowledge distillation on semantic segmentation. To avoid over-fitting to the noise in the teacher network, a large number of training examples is essential for knowledge distillation. Imagelevel argumentation techniques like flipping, translation or rotation are widely used in previous knowledge distillation framework. Inspired by the recent progress on semantic directions on feature-space, we propose to include augmentations in feature space for efficient distillation. Specifically, given a semantic direction, an infinite number of augmentations can be obtained for the student in the feature space. Furthermore, the analysis shows that those augmentations can be optimized simultaneously by minimizing an upper bound for the losses defined by augmentations. Based on the observation, a new algorithm is developed for knowledge distillation in semantic segmentation. Extensive experiments on four semantic segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method can boost the performance of current knowledge distillation methods without any significant overhead. Code is available at: https://github.com/jianlong-yuan/FAKD.
summary: In this work, we explore data augmentations for knowledge distillation on semantic segmentation. To avoid over-fitting to the noise in the teacher network, a large number of training examples is essential for knowledge distillation. Imagelevel argumentation techniques like flipping, translation or rotation are widely used in previous knowledge distillation framework. Inspired by the recent progress on semantic directions on feature-space, we propose to include augmentations in feature space for efficient distillation. Specifically, given a semantic direction, an infinite number of augmentations can be obtained for the student in the feature space. Furthermore, the analysis shows that those augmentations can be optimized simultaneously by minimizing an upper bound for the losses defined by augmentations. Based on the observation, a new algorithm is developed for knowledge distillation in semantic segmentation. Extensive experiments on four semantic segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method can boost the performance of current knowledge distillation methods without any significant overhead. Code is available at: https://github.com/jianlong-yuan/FAKD.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们探索了语义分割知识蒸馏的数据增强。为了避免过度拟合教师网络中的噪声，大量的训练样本对于知识蒸馏至关重要。翻转、平移或旋转等图像级论证技术广泛应用于先前的知识蒸馏框架中。受到特征空间语义方向最新进展的启发，我们建议在特征空间中加入增强功能以​​进行有效的蒸馏。具体来说，给定语义方向，可以为学生在特征空间中获得无限数量的增强。此外，分析表明，可以通过最小化增强定义的损失上限来同时优化这些增强。基于观察，开发了一种新的语义分割知识蒸馏算法。对四个语义分割基准的大量实验表明，所提出的方法可以提高当前知识蒸馏方法的性能，而无需任何显着的开销。代码位于：https://github.com/jianlong-yuan/FAKD。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于特征增强的知识蒸馏方法FAKD，用于提升语义分割任务中学生模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏依赖图像级增强易受教师网络噪声影响，而特征空间中语义方向的增强可生成无限样本并优化损失上界，从而更高效地进行蒸馏。
AI.method: 在特征空间中引入语义方向生成无限增强样本，并通过最小化损失上界实现多增强样本的联合优化，开发新的知识蒸馏算法。
AI.result: 在四个语义分割基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在无需显著计算开销的情况下有效提升现有知识蒸馏方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: FAKD通过特征空间增强优化损失上界，在语义分割知识蒸馏中展现出高效性与有效性，为模型压缩提供新思路。
