search_text: FAKD: Feature Augmented Knowledge Distillation for Semantic Segmentation FAKD：用于语义分割的特征增强知识蒸馏 In this work, we explore data augmentations for knowledge distillation on semantic segmentation. To avoid over-fitting to the noise in the teacher network, a large number of training examples is essential for knowledge distillation. Imagelevel argumentation techniques like flipping, translation or rotation are widely used in previous knowledge distillation framework. Inspired by the recent progress on semantic directions on feature-space, we propose to include augmentations in feature space for efficient distillation. Specifically, given a semantic direction, an infinite number of augmentations can be obtained for the student in the feature space. Furthermore, the analysis shows that those augmentations can be optimized simultaneously by minimizing an upper bound for the losses defined by augmentations. Based on the observation, a new algorithm is developed for knowledge distillation in semantic segmentation. Extensive experiments on four semantic segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method can boost the performance of current knowledge distillation methods without any significant overhead. Code is available at: https://github.com/jianlong-yuan/FAKD. 在这项工作中，我们探索了语义分割知识蒸馏的数据增强。为了避免过度拟合教师网络中的噪声，大量的训练样本对于知识蒸馏至关重要。翻转、平移或旋转等图像级论证技术广泛应用于先前的知识蒸馏框架中。受到特征空间语义方向最新进展的启发，我们建议在特征空间中加入增强功能以​​进行有效的蒸馏。具体来说，给定语义方向，可以为学生在特征空间中获得无限数量的增强。此外，分析表明，可以通过最小化增强定义的损失上限来同时优化这些增强。基于观察，开发了一种新的语义分割知识蒸馏算法。对四个语义分割基准的大量实验表明，所提出的方法可以提高当前知识蒸馏方法的性能，而无需任何显着的开销。代码位于：https://github.com/jianlong-yuan/FAKD。 本文提出一种基于特征增强的知识蒸馏方法FAKD，用于提升语义分割任务中学生模型的性能。 Jianlong Yuan,Qian Qi,Fei Du,Zhibin Wang,Fan Wang,Yifan Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Carlos Alegria,Giordano Da Lozzo,Giuseppe Di Battista,Fabrizio Frati,Fabrizio Grosso,Maurizio Patrignani
title: Unit-length Rectangular Drawings of Graphs
title_zh: 单位长度矩形图画
comment: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
comments: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
abstract: A rectangular drawing of a planar graph $G$ is a planar drawing of $G$ in which vertices are mapped to grid points, edges are mapped to horizontal and vertical straight-line segments, and faces are drawn as rectangles. Sometimes this latter constraint is relaxed for the outer face. In this paper, we study rectangular drawings in which the edges have unit length. We show a complexity dichotomy for the problem of deciding the existence of a unit-length rectangular drawing, depending on whether the outer face must also be drawn as a rectangle or not. Specifically, we prove that the problem is NP-complete for biconnected graphs when the drawing of the outer face is not required to be a rectangle, even if the sought drawing must respect a given planar embedding, whereas it is polynomial-time solvable, both in the fixed and the variable embedding settings, if the outer face is required to be drawn as a rectangle.
summary: A rectangular drawing of a planar graph $G$ is a planar drawing of $G$ in which vertices are mapped to grid points, edges are mapped to horizontal and vertical straight-line segments, and faces are drawn as rectangles. Sometimes this latter constraint is relaxed for the outer face. In this paper, we study rectangular drawings in which the edges have unit length. We show a complexity dichotomy for the problem of deciding the existence of a unit-length rectangular drawing, depending on whether the outer face must also be drawn as a rectangle or not. Specifically, we prove that the problem is NP-complete for biconnected graphs when the drawing of the outer face is not required to be a rectangle, even if the sought drawing must respect a given planar embedding, whereas it is polynomial-time solvable, both in the fixed and the variable embedding settings, if the outer face is required to be drawn as a rectangle.
abstract_zh: 平面图$G$的矩形图是$G$的平面图，其中顶点映射为网格点，边映射为水平和垂直直线段，面绘制为矩形。有时，对于外表面，后一个约束会被放宽。在本文中，我们研究边缘具有单位长度的矩形绘图。我们展示了确定单位长度矩形绘图是否存在的问题的复杂性二分法，具体取决于外表面是否也必须绘制为矩形。具体来说，我们证明，当外表面的绘制不需要为矩形时，即使所寻求的绘图必须尊重给定的平面嵌入，该问题对于双连通图来说是 NP 完全的，而如果要求外表面被绘制为矩形，则在固定和可变嵌入设置中，该问题是多项式时间可解的。

AI.tldr: 研究图的单位长度矩形绘制问题，分析外面是否为矩形对问题复杂性的影响。
AI.motivation: 矩形绘制在图可视化中具有重要意义，单位长度约束增加了问题的挑战性，需明确外面约束对计算复杂性的影响。
AI.method: 通过复杂性理论分析，构造问题实例并证明NP完全性，同时设计多项式时间算法处理外面为矩形的情况。
AI.result: 当外面无需为矩形时，双连通图的单位长度矩形绘制问题为NP完全；若外面必须为矩形，则两种嵌入情况下均为多项式时间可解。
AI.conclusion: 外面矩形约束显著降低问题复杂性，为实际应用提供算法选择依据。

authors_text: Ashkan Pakzad,Mou-Cheng Xu,Wing Keung Cheung,Marie Vermant,Tinne Goos,Laurens J De Sadeleer,Stijn E Verleden,Wim A Wuyts,John R Hurst,Joseph Jacob
title: Airway measurement by refinement of synthetic images improves mortality prediction in idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis
title_zh: 通过细化合成图像进行气道测量可改善特发性肺纤维化的死亡率预测
comment: 11 Pages, 4 figures. Source code available: https://github.com/ashkanpakzad/ATN. Initial submission version, to be published in MICCAI Workshop on Deep Generative Models 2022
comments: 11 Pages, 4 figures. Source code available: https://github.com/ashkanpakzad/ATN. Initial submission version, to be published in MICCAI Workshop on Deep Generative Models 2022
abstract: Several chronic lung diseases, like idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF) are characterised by abnormal dilatation of the airways. Quantification of airway features on computed tomography (CT) can help characterise disease progression. Physics based airway measurement algorithms have been developed, but have met with limited success in part due to the sheer diversity of airway morphology seen in clinical practice. Supervised learning methods are also not feasible due to the high cost of obtaining precise airway annotations. We propose synthesising airways by style transfer using perceptual losses to train our model, Airway Transfer Network (ATN). We compare our ATN model with a state-of-the-art GAN-based network (simGAN) using a) qualitative assessment; b) assessment of the ability of ATN and simGAN based CT airway metrics to predict mortality in a population of 113 patients with IPF. ATN was shown to be quicker and easier to train than simGAN. ATN-based airway measurements were also found to be consistently stronger predictors of mortality than simGAN-derived airway metrics on IPF CTs. Airway synthesis by a transformation network that refines synthetic data using perceptual losses is a realistic alternative to GAN-based methods for clinical CT analyses of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis. Our source code can be found at https://github.com/ashkanpakzad/ATN that is compatible with the existing open-source airway analysis framework, AirQuant.
summary: Several chronic lung diseases, like idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF) are characterised by abnormal dilatation of the airways. Quantification of airway features on computed tomography (CT) can help characterise disease progression. Physics based airway measurement algorithms have been developed, but have met with limited success in part due to the sheer diversity of airway morphology seen in clinical practice. Supervised learning methods are also not feasible due to the high cost of obtaining precise airway annotations. We propose synthesising airways by style transfer using perceptual losses to train our model, Airway Transfer Network (ATN). We compare our ATN model with a state-of-the-art GAN-based network (simGAN) using a) qualitative assessment; b) assessment of the ability of ATN and simGAN based CT airway metrics to predict mortality in a population of 113 patients with IPF. ATN was shown to be quicker and easier to train than simGAN. ATN-based airway measurements were also found to be consistently stronger predictors of mortality than simGAN-derived airway metrics on IPF CTs. Airway synthesis by a transformation network that refines synthetic data using perceptual losses is a realistic alternative to GAN-based methods for clinical CT analyses of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis. Our source code can be found at https://github.com/ashkanpakzad/ATN that is compatible with the existing open-source airway analysis framework, AirQuant.
abstract_zh: 一些慢性肺部疾病，如特发性肺纤维化（IPF），其特征是气道异常扩张。计算机断层扫描 (CT) 上气道特征的量化有助于表征疾病进展。基于物理的气道测量算法已经被开发出来，但取得的成功有限，部分原因是临床实践中看到的气道形态的多样性。由于获得精确气道注释的成本很高，监督学习方法也不可行。我们建议使用感知损失通过风格转移来合成气道来训练我们的模型气道转移网络（ATN）。我们使用 a) 定性评估将我们的 ATN 模型与最先进的基于 GAN 的网络 (simGAN) 进行比较； b) 评估基于 ATN 和 simGAN 的 CT 气道指标预测 113 名 IPF 患者死亡率的能力。 ATN 被证明比 simGAN 更快、更容易训练。研究还发现，基于 ATN 的气道测量结果始终比 IPF CT 上基于 simGAN 的气道指标更能预测死亡率。通过使用感知损失细化合成数据的转换网络进行气道合成，是基于 GAN 的特发性肺纤维化临床 CT 分析方法的现实替代方法。我们的源代码可以在 https://github.com/ashkanpakzad/ATN 找到，它与现有的开源气道分析框架 AirQuant 兼容。

AI.tldr: 通过合成图像优化提升特发性肺纤维化（IPF）患者死亡率预测的气道测量方法
AI.motivation: 现有物理算法和监督学习方法在IPF气道测量中存在效果有限及标注成本高的问题，需更高效的方法
AI.method: 采用风格迁移与感知损失训练Airway Transfer Network（ATN）模型，合成气道图像，并与simGAN进行对比评估
AI.result: ATN模型训练效率更高，且其气道测量指标在IPF患者死亡率预测中表现更优
AI.conclusion: ATN为临床IPF CT分析提供了比GAN更优的合成数据替代方案，代码已开源

search_text: Airway measurement by refinement of synthetic images improves mortality prediction in idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis 通过细化合成图像进行气道测量可改善特发性肺纤维化的死亡率预测 Several chronic lung diseases, like idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF) are characterised by abnormal dilatation of the airways. Quantification of airway features on computed tomography (CT) can help characterise disease progression. Physics based airway measurement algorithms have been developed, but have met with limited success in part due to the sheer diversity of airway morphology seen in clinical practice. Supervised learning methods are also not feasible due to the high cost of obtaining precise airway annotations. We propose synthesising airways by style transfer using perceptual losses to train our model, Airway Transfer Network (ATN). We compare our ATN model with a state-of-the-art GAN-based network (simGAN) using a) qualitative assessment; b) assessment of the ability of ATN and simGAN based CT airway metrics to predict mortality in a population of 113 patients with IPF. ATN was shown to be quicker and easier to train than simGAN. ATN-based airway measurements were also found to be consistently stronger predictors of mortality than simGAN-derived airway metrics on IPF CTs. Airway synthesis by a transformation network that refines synthetic data using perceptual losses is a realistic alternative to GAN-based methods for clinical CT analyses of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis. Our source code can be found at https://github.com/ashkanpakzad/ATN that is compatible with the existing open-source airway analysis framework, AirQuant. 一些慢性肺部疾病，如特发性肺纤维化（IPF），其特征是气道异常扩张。计算机断层扫描 (CT) 上气道特征的量化有助于表征疾病进展。基于物理的气道测量算法已经被开发出来，但取得的成功有限，部分原因是临床实践中看到的气道形态的多样性。由于获得精确气道注释的成本很高，监督学习方法也不可行。我们建议使用感知损失通过风格转移来合成气道来训练我们的模型气道转移网络（ATN）。我们使用 a) 定性评估将我们的 ATN 模型与最先进的基于 GAN 的网络 (simGAN) 进行比较； b) 评估基于 ATN 和 simGAN 的 CT 气道指标预测 113 名 IPF 患者死亡率的能力。 ATN 被证明比 simGAN 更快、更容易训练。研究还发现，基于 ATN 的气道测量结果始终比 IPF CT 上基于 simGAN 的气道指标更能预测死亡率。通过使用感知损失细化合成数据的转换网络进行气道合成，是基于 GAN 的特发性肺纤维化临床 CT 分析方法的现实替代方法。我们的源代码可以在 https://github.com/ashkanpakzad/ATN 找到，它与现有的开源气道分析框架 AirQuant 兼容。 通过合成图像优化提升特发性肺纤维化（IPF）患者死亡率预测的气道测量方法 Ashkan Pakzad,Mou-Cheng Xu,Wing Keung Cheung,Marie Vermant,Tinne Goos,Laurens J De Sadeleer,Stijn E Verleden,Wim A Wuyts,John R Hurst,Joseph Jacob eess.IV,cs.CV,physics.med-ph

authors_text: Martin Pawelczyk,Tobias Leemann,Asia Biega,Gjergji Kasneci
title: On the Trade-Off between Actionable Explanations and the Right to be Forgotten
title_zh: 关于可操作的解释与被遗忘权之间的权衡
abstract: As machine learning (ML) models are increasingly being deployed in high-stakes applications, policymakers have suggested tighter data protection regulations (e.g., GDPR, CCPA). One key principle is the "right to be forgotten" which gives users the right to have their data deleted. Another key principle is the right to an actionable explanation, also known as algorithmic recourse, allowing users to reverse unfavorable decisions. To date, it is unknown whether these two principles can be operationalized simultaneously. Therefore, we introduce and study the problem of recourse invalidation in the context of data deletion requests. More specifically, we theoretically and empirically analyze the behavior of popular state-of-the-art algorithms and demonstrate that the recourses generated by these algorithms are likely to be invalidated if a small number of data deletion requests (e.g., 1 or 2) warrant updates of the predictive model. For the setting of differentiable models, we suggest a framework to identify a minimal subset of critical training points which, when removed, maximize the fraction of invalidated recourses. Using our framework, we empirically show that the removal of as little as 2 data instances from the training set can invalidate up to 95 percent of all recourses output by popular state-of-the-art algorithms. Thus, our work raises fundamental questions about the compatibility of "the right to an actionable explanation" in the context of the "right to be forgotten", while also providing constructive insights on the determining factors of recourse robustness.
summary: As machine learning (ML) models are increasingly being deployed in high-stakes applications, policymakers have suggested tighter data protection regulations (e.g., GDPR, CCPA). One key principle is the "right to be forgotten" which gives users the right to have their data deleted. Another key principle is the right to an actionable explanation, also known as algorithmic recourse, allowing users to reverse unfavorable decisions. To date, it is unknown whether these two principles can be operationalized simultaneously. Therefore, we introduce and study the problem of recourse invalidation in the context of data deletion requests. More specifically, we theoretically and empirically analyze the behavior of popular state-of-the-art algorithms and demonstrate that the recourses generated by these algorithms are likely to be invalidated if a small number of data deletion requests (e.g., 1 or 2) warrant updates of the predictive model. For the setting of differentiable models, we suggest a framework to identify a minimal subset of critical training points which, when removed, maximize the fraction of invalidated recourses. Using our framework, we empirically show that the removal of as little as 2 data instances from the training set can invalidate up to 95 percent of all recourses output by popular state-of-the-art algorithms. Thus, our work raises fundamental questions about the compatibility of "the right to an actionable explanation" in the context of the "right to be forgotten", while also providing constructive insights on the determining factors of recourse robustness.
abstract_zh: 随着机器学习 (ML) 模型越来越多地部署在高风险应用中，政策制定者建议制定更严格的数据保护法规（例如 GDPR、CCPA）。一项关键原则是“被遗忘权”，它赋予用户删除其数据的权利。另一个关键原则是获得可行解释的权利，也称为算法追索权，允许用户扭转不利的决定。迄今为止，这两个原则是否可以同时实施尚不清楚。因此，我们介绍并研究数据删除请求背景下的追索失效问题。更具体地说，我们从理论上和实证上分析了流行的最先进算法的行为，并证明如果少量数据删除请求（例如 1 或 2）需要更新预测模型，则这些算法生成的资源可能会失效。对于可微模型的设置，我们建议使用一个框架来识别关键训练点的最小子集，当删除这些点时，可以最大化无效资源的比例。使用我们的框架，我们凭经验证明，从训练集中删除只要 2 个数据实例就可以使流行的最先进算法输出的高达 95% 的资源失效。因此，我们的工作提出了关于“获得可诉解释的权利”与“被遗忘权”背景下的兼容性的基本问题，同时也提供了关于追索稳健性的决定因素的建设性见解。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在数据删除请求背景下，机器学习模型中'可操作解释权'与'被遗忘权'之间的冲突问题，分析数据删除对算法解释有效性的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着数据保护法规（如GDPR）的实施，用户享有数据删除权和算法解释权。但现有研究未明确两者能否共存，需分析数据删除是否会导致已生成的解释失效。
AI.method: 理论分析结合实证研究，通过构建框架识别关键训练样本，量化数据删除对模型预测和解释的影响，并验证少量样本移除对解释失效的显著性。
AI.result: 实验证明，移除仅2个训练样本即可使主流算法生成的95%解释失效，揭示了数据删除与解释鲁棒性间的强关联。
AI.conclusion: 两项权利存在根本性冲突，数据删除可能破坏已有解释的有效性，需重新审视算法设计与法规实施的兼容性，并关注模型鲁棒性影响因素。

authors_text: Yong Zhong,Hongtao Liu,Xiaodong Liu,Fan Bao,Weiran Shen,Chongxuan Li
title: Deep Generative Modeling on Limited Data with Regularization by Nontransferable Pre-trained Models
title_zh: 通过不可转移的预训练模型进行正则化的有限数据深度生成建模
abstract: Deep generative models (DGMs) are data-eager because learning a complex model on limited data suffers from a large variance and easily overfits. Inspired by the classical perspective of the bias-variance tradeoff, we propose regularized deep generative model (Reg-DGM), which leverages a nontransferable pre-trained model to reduce the variance of generative modeling with limited data. Formally, Reg-DGM optimizes a weighted sum of a certain divergence and the expectation of an energy function, where the divergence is between the data and the model distributions, and the energy function is defined by the pre-trained model w.r.t. the model distribution. We analyze a simple yet representative Gaussian-fitting case to demonstrate how the weighting hyperparameter trades off the bias and the variance. Theoretically, we characterize the existence and the uniqueness of the global minimum of Reg-DGM in a non-parametric setting and prove its convergence with neural networks trained by gradient-based methods. Empirically, with various pre-trained feature extractors and a data-dependent energy function, Reg-DGM consistently improves the generation performance of strong DGMs with limited data and achieves competitive results to the state-of-the-art methods. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/ML-GSAI/Reg-ADA-APA.
summary: Deep generative models (DGMs) are data-eager because learning a complex model on limited data suffers from a large variance and easily overfits. Inspired by the classical perspective of the bias-variance tradeoff, we propose regularized deep generative model (Reg-DGM), which leverages a nontransferable pre-trained model to reduce the variance of generative modeling with limited data. Formally, Reg-DGM optimizes a weighted sum of a certain divergence and the expectation of an energy function, where the divergence is between the data and the model distributions, and the energy function is defined by the pre-trained model w.r.t. the model distribution. We analyze a simple yet representative Gaussian-fitting case to demonstrate how the weighting hyperparameter trades off the bias and the variance. Theoretically, we characterize the existence and the uniqueness of the global minimum of Reg-DGM in a non-parametric setting and prove its convergence with neural networks trained by gradient-based methods. Empirically, with various pre-trained feature extractors and a data-dependent energy function, Reg-DGM consistently improves the generation performance of strong DGMs with limited data and achieves competitive results to the state-of-the-art methods. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/ML-GSAI/Reg-ADA-APA.
abstract_zh: 深度生成模型（DGM）需要数据，因为在有限的数据上学习复杂的模型会出现很大的方差并且很容易过度拟合。受偏差-方差权衡的经典观点的启发，我们提出了正则化深度生成模型（Reg-DGM），它利用不可转移的预训练模型来减少有限数据生成模型的方差。形式上，Reg-DGM 优化某个散度和能量函数期望的加权和，其中散度位于数据和模型分布之间，能量函数由预先训练的模型定义。模型分布。我们分析了一个简单但具有代表性的高斯拟合案例，以演示加权超参数如何权衡偏差和方差。理论上，我们在非参数设置中表征了 Reg-DGM 全局最小值的存在性和唯一性，并证明了其与基于梯度方法训练的神经网络的收敛性。根据经验，通过各种预先训练的特征提取器和依赖于数据的能量函数，Reg-DGM 持续提高了有限数据下强 DGM 的生成性能，并取得了与最先进方法竞争的结果。我们的实施可在 https://github.com/ML-GSAI/Reg-ADA-APA 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非迁移预训练模型的正则化深度生成模型（Reg-DGM），旨在解决有限数据下深度生成模型（DGM）的高方差和过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 深度生成模型在有限数据下易因高方差和过拟合导致性能下降，传统方法难以有效缓解此问题，需探索新的正则化策略。
AI.method: 通过优化数据分布与模型分布的散度及预训练模型定义的能量函数期望的加权和，利用非迁移预训练模型降低方差，并理论分析其全局最小值存在性及收敛性。
AI.result: 实验表明，Reg-DGM在多种预训练特征提取器和数据依赖能量函数下，显著提升有限数据下的生成性能，达到与最先进方法相当的水平。
AI.conclusion: Reg-DGM通过非迁移预训练模型的正则化有效平衡偏差与方差，理论与实验均验证其在有限数据场景下的有效性。

Inspired by the classical perspective of the bias-variance tradeoff, we propose regularized deep generative model (Reg-DGM), which leverages a nontransferable pre-trained model to reduce the variance of generative modeling with limited data. Formally, Reg-DGM optimizes a weighted sum of a certain divergence and the expectation of an energy function, where the divergence is between the data and the model distributions, and the energy function is defined by the pre-trained model w.r.t. the model distribution. We analyze a simple yet representative Gaussian-fitting case to demonstrate how the weighting hyperparameter trades off the bias and the variance. Theoretically, we characterize the existence and the uniqueness of the global minimum of Reg-DGM in a non-parametric setting and prove its convergence with neural networks trained by gradient-based methods. Empirically, with various pre-trained feature extractors and a data-dependent energy function, Reg-DGM consistently improves the generation performance of strong DGMs with limited data and achieves competitive results to the state-of-the-art methods. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/ML-GSAI/Reg-ADA-APA. 深度生成模型（DGM）需要数据，因为在有限的数据上学习复杂的模型会出现很大的方差并且很容易过度拟合。受偏差-方差权衡的经典观点的启发，我们提出了正则化深度生成模型（Reg-DGM），它利用不可转移的预训练模型来减少有限数据生成模型的方差。形式上，Reg-DGM 优化某个散度和能量函数期望的加权和，其中散度位于数据和模型分布之间，能量函数由预先训练的模型定义。模型分布。我们分析了一个简单但具有代表性的高斯拟合案例，以演示加权超参数如何权衡偏差和方差。理论上，我们在非参数设置中表征了 Reg-DGM 全局最小值的存在性和唯一性，并证明了其与基于梯度方法训练的神经网络的收敛性。根据经验，通过各种预先训练的特征提取器和依赖于数据的能量函数，Reg-DGM 持续提高了有限数据下强 DGM 的生成性能，并取得了与最先进方法竞争的结果。我们的实施可在 https://github.com/ML-GSAI/Reg-ADA-APA 上找到。 本文提出一种基于非迁移预训练模型的正则化深度生成模型（Reg-DGM），旨在解决有限数据下深度生成模型（DGM）的高方差和过拟合问题。 Yong Zhong,Hongtao Liu,Xiaodong Liu,Fan Bao,Weiran Shen,Chongxuan Li cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Johannes Blum,Yann Disser,Andreas Emil Feldmann,Siddharth Gupta,Anna Zych-Pawlewicz
title: On Sparse Hitting Sets: from Fair Vertex Cover to Highway Dimension
title_zh: 稀疏击球集：从公平顶点覆盖到高速公路维度
abstract: We consider the Sparse Hitting Set (Sparse-HS) problem, where we are given a set system $(V,\mathcal{F},\mathcal{B})$ with two families $\mathcal{F},\mathcal{B}$ of subsets of $V$. The task is to find a hitting set for $\mathcal{F}$ that minimizes the maximum number of elements in any of the sets of $\mathcal{B}$. Our focus is on determining the complexity of some special cases of Sparse-HS with respect to the sparseness $k$, which is the optimum number of hitting set elements in any set of $\mathcal{B}$. For the Sparse Vertex Cover (Sparse-VC) problem, $V$ is given by the vertex set of a graph, and $\mathcal{F}$ is its edge set. We prove NP-hardness for sparseness $k\geq 2$ and polynomial time solvability for $k=1$. We also provide a polynomial-time $2$-approximation for any $k$. A special case of Sparse-VC is Fair Vertex Cover (Fair-VC), where the family $\mathcal{B}$ is given by vertex neighbourhoods. For this problem we prove NP-hardness for constant $k$ and provide a polynomial-time $(2-\frac{1}{k})$-approximation. This is better than any approximation possible for Sparse-VC or Vertex Cover (under UGC). We then consider two problems derived from Sparse-HS related to the highway dimension, a graph parameter modelling transportation networks. Most algorithms for graphs of low highway dimension compute solutions to the $r$-Shortest Path Cover ($r$-SPC) problem, where $r>0$, $\mathcal{F}$ contains all shortest paths of length between $r$ and $2r$, and $\mathcal{B}$ contains all balls of radius $2r$. There is an XP algorithm that computes solutions to $r$-SPC of sparseness at most $h$ if the input graph has highway dimension $h$, but the existence if an FPT algorithm was open. We prove that $r$-SPC and also the related $r$-Highway Dimension ($r$-HD) problem are both W[1]-hard. Furthermore, we prove that $r$-SPC admits a polynomial-time $O(\log n)$-approximation.
summary: We consider the Sparse Hitting Set (Sparse-HS) problem, where we are given a set system $(V,\mathcal{F},\mathcal{B})$ with two families $\mathcal{F},\mathcal{B}$ of subsets of $V$. The task is to find a hitting set for $\mathcal{F}$ that minimizes the maximum number of elements in any of the sets of $\mathcal{B}$. Our focus is on determining the complexity of some special cases of Sparse-HS with respect to the sparseness $k$, which is the optimum number of hitting set elements in any set of $\mathcal{B}$. For the Sparse Vertex Cover (Sparse-VC) problem, $V$ is given by the vertex set of a graph, and $\mathcal{F}$ is its edge set. We prove NP-hardness for sparseness $k\geq 2$ and polynomial time solvability for $k=1$. We also provide a polynomial-time $2$-approximation for any $k$. A special case of Sparse-VC is Fair Vertex Cover (Fair-VC), where the family $\mathcal{B}$ is given by vertex neighbourhoods. For this problem we prove NP-hardness for constant $k$ and provide a polynomial-time $(2-\frac{1}{k})$-approximation. This is better than any approximation possible for Sparse-VC or Vertex Cover (under UGC). We then consider two problems derived from Sparse-HS related to the highway dimension, a graph parameter modelling transportation networks. Most algorithms for graphs of low highway dimension compute solutions to the $r$-Shortest Path Cover ($r$-SPC) problem, where $r>0$, $\mathcal{F}$ contains all shortest paths of length between $r$ and $2r$, and $\mathcal{B}$ contains all balls of radius $2r$. There is an XP algorithm that computes solutions to $r$-SPC of sparseness at most $h$ if the input graph has highway dimension $h$, but the existence if an FPT algorithm was open. We prove that $r$-SPC and also the related $r$-Highway Dimension ($r$-HD) problem are both W[1]-hard. Furthermore, we prove that $r$-SPC admits a polynomial-time $O(\log n)$-approximation.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑稀疏命中集（Sparse-HS）问题，其中给定一个集合系统 $(V,\mathcal{F},\mathcal{B})$，其中包含 $V$ 子集的两个族 $\mathcal{F},\mathcal{B}$。任务是找到 $\mathcal{F}$ 的命中集，使 $\mathcal{B}$ 的任何集合中的最大元素数最小化。我们的重点是确定 Sparse-HS 的一些特殊情况相对于稀疏度 $k$ 的复杂性，稀疏度 $k$ 是任何 $\mathcal{B}$ 集合中命中集合元素的最佳数量。对于稀疏顶点覆盖（Sparse-VC）问题，$V$ 由图的顶点集给出，$\mathcal{F}$ 是其边集。我们证明稀疏性 $k\geq 2$ 的 NP 难度和 $k=1$ 的多项式时间可解性。我们还为任何 $k$ 提供多项式时间 $2$ 近似值。 Sparse-VC 的一个特例是公平顶点覆盖 (Fair-VC)，其中族 $\mathcal{B}$ 由顶点邻域给出。对于这个问题，我们证明常数 $k$ 的 NP 难度，并提供多项式时间 $(2-\frac{1}{k})$ 近似值。这比 Sparse-VC 或顶点覆盖（在 UGC 下）的任何近似值都要好。然后，我们考虑从 Sparse-HS 导出的与高速公路维度相关的两个问题，即交通网络建模的图参数。大多数低高速公路维度图的算法计算 $r$-最短路径覆盖 ($r$-SPC) 问题的解决方案，其中 $r>0$，$\mathcal{F}$ 包含 $r$ 和 $2r$ 之间长度的所有最短路径，$\mathcal{B}$ 包含半径为 $2r$ 的所有球。如果输入图具有高速公路维度 $h$，则有一种 XP 算法可以计算稀疏性至多 $h$ 的 $r$-SPC 的解，但如果 FPT 算法是开放的，则存在。我们证明 $r$-SPC 以及相关的 $r$-Highway Dimension ($r$-HD) 问题都是 W[1]-hard 问题。此外，我们证明 $r$-SPC 承认多项式时间 $O(\log n)$ 近似。

AI.tldr: 本文研究稀疏击中集问题（Sparse-HS）及其在公平顶点覆盖和高速公路维度相关问题中的特殊情形，分析其计算复杂性与算法性能。
AI.motivation: 通过分析稀疏击中集问题在不同稀疏度参数下的复杂性，探索高效算法的可能性，尤其针对图论中的公平顶点覆盖和交通网络建模的高速公路维度问题。
AI.method: 采用NP难证明、多项式时间算法设计、近似算法分析，结合高速公路维度参数的XP算法与W[1]-难证明方法。
AI.result: 证明稀疏顶点覆盖问题在k≥2时NP难且k=1时可多项式求解，提供2-近似算法；公平顶点覆盖问题在常数k下NP难且存在(2−1/k)-近似；r-SPC问题在低高速公路维度图中XP可解但无FPT算法，且存在O(log n)近似。
AI.conclusion: 明确了稀疏击中集问题及其变体的复杂性边界，提出了多项式时间近似算法，并揭示了高速公路维度相关问题的计算难度与算法局限性。

authors_text: Vincent Cohen-Addad,Jason Li
title: On the Fixed-Parameter Tractability of Capacitated Clustering
title_zh: 关于能力聚类的固定参数可处理性
comment: Full version of the ICALP'19 paper (w/ same title, same authors)
comments: Full version of the ICALP'19 paper (w/ same title, same authors)
abstract: We study the complexity of the classic capacitated k-median and k-means problems parameterized by the number of centers, k. These problems are notoriously difficult since the best known approximation bound for high dimensional Euclidean space and general metric space is $Θ(\log k)$ and it remains a major open problem whether a constant factor exists. We show that there exists a $(3+ε)$-approximation algorithm for the capacitated k-median and a $(9+ε)$-approximation algorithm for the capacitated k-means problem in general metric spaces whose running times are $f(ε,k) n^{O(1)}$. For Euclidean inputs of arbitrary dimension, we give a $(1+ε)$-approximation algorithm for both problems with a similar running time. This is a significant improvement over the $(7+ε)$-approximation of Adamczyk et al. for k-median in general metric spaces and the $(69+ε)$-approximation of Xu et al. for Euclidean k-means.
summary: We study the complexity of the classic capacitated k-median and k-means problems parameterized by the number of centers, k. These problems are notoriously difficult since the best known approximation bound for high dimensional Euclidean space and general metric space is $Θ(\log k)$ and it remains a major open problem whether a constant factor exists. We show that there exists a $(3+ε)$-approximation algorithm for the capacitated k-median and a $(9+ε)$-approximation algorithm for the capacitated k-means problem in general metric spaces whose running times are $f(ε,k) n^{O(1)}$. For Euclidean inputs of arbitrary dimension, we give a $(1+ε)$-approximation algorithm for both problems with a similar running time. This is a significant improvement over the $(7+ε)$-approximation of Adamczyk et al. for k-median in general metric spaces and the $(69+ε)$-approximation of Xu et al. for Euclidean k-means.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了由中心数量 k 参数化的经典有能力 k 中值和 k 均值问题的复杂性。这些问题是出了名的困难，因为高维欧几里得空间和一般度量空间的最著名的近似界限是$ θ（\ log k）$，并且是否存在常数因子仍然是一个主要的悬而未决的问题。我们证明，在运行时间为 $f(ε,k) n^{O(1)}$ 的一般度量空间中，存在用于容量 k 中值的 $(3+ε)$ 近似算法和用于容量 k 均值问题的 $(9+ε)$ 近似算法。对于任意维度的欧几里得输入，我们为两个问题提供了一个 $(1+ε)$ 近似算法，具有相似的运行时间。这比 Adamczyk 等人的 $(7+ε)$ 近似有显着改进。对于一般度量空间中的 k 中值和 Xu 等人的 $(69+ε)$ 近似。对于欧几里德 k 均值。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了带容量约束的k-中位数和k-均值问题在参数k下的固定参数可解性，提出了更高效的近似算法。
AI.motivation: 带容量约束的聚类问题在高维欧几里得空间和一般度量空间中难以获得常数因子近似，现有算法的近似比存在较大差距，需改进算法效率。
AI.method: 设计了基于参数k的近似算法，在一般度量空间中实现(3+ε)和(9+ε)近似比，在欧几里得空间中实现(1+ε)近似比，时间复杂度为f(ε,k)n^{O(1)}。
AI.result: 在一般度量空间中，k-中位数近似比从7+ε提升至3+ε，k-均值从69+ε提升至9+ε；欧几里得空间下均达到1+ε近似比。
AI.conclusion: 该成果显著提升了带容量约束聚类问题的近似效率，尤其在欧几里得空间中接近最优，推动了固定参数可解性研究的发展。

search_text: On the Fixed-Parameter Tractability of Capacitated Clustering 关于能力聚类的固定参数可处理性 We study the complexity of the classic capacitated k-median and k-means problems parameterized by the number of centers, k. These problems are notoriously difficult since the best known approximation bound for high dimensional Euclidean space and general metric space is $Θ(\log k)$ and it remains a major open problem whether a constant factor exists. We show that there exists a $(3+ε)$-approximation algorithm for the capacitated k-median and a $(9+ε)$-approximation algorithm for the capacitated k-means problem in general metric spaces whose running times are $f(ε,k) n^{O(1)}$. For Euclidean inputs of arbitrary dimension, we give a $(1+ε)$-approximation algorithm for both problems with a similar running time. This is a significant improvement over the $(7+ε)$-approximation of Adamczyk et al. for k-median in general metric spaces and the $(69+ε)$-approximation of Xu et al. for Euclidean k-means. 我们研究了由中心数量 k 参数化的经典有能力 k 中值和 k 均值问题的复杂性。这些问题是出了名的困难，因为高维欧几里得空间和一般度量空间的最著名的近似界限是$ θ（\ log k）$，并且是否存在常数因子仍然是一个主要的悬而未决的问题。我们证明，在运行时间为 $f(ε,k) n^{O(1)}$ 的一般度量空间中，存在用于容量 k 中值的 $(3+ε)$ 近似算法和用于容量 k 均值问题的 $(9+ε)$ 近似算法。对于任意维度的欧几里得输入，我们为两个问题提供了一个 $(1+ε)$ 近似算法，具有相似的运行时间。这比 Adamczyk 等人的 $(7+ε)$ 近似有显着改进。对于一般度量空间中的 k 中值和 Xu 等人的 $(69+ε)$ 近似。对于欧几里德 k 均值。 本文研究了带容量约束的k-中位数和k-均值问题在参数k下的固定参数可解性，提出了更高效的近似算法。 Vincent Cohen-Addad,Jason Li cs.DS

authors_text: Giuseppe Di Battista,Walter Didimo,Luca Grilli,Fabrizio Grosso,Giacomo Ortali,Maurizio Patrignani,Alessandra Tappini
title: Small Point-Sets Supporting Graph Stories
title_zh: 支持图故事的小点集
comment: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
comments: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
abstract: In a graph story the vertices enter a graph one at a time and each vertex persists in the graph for a fixed amount of time $ω$, called viewing window. At any time, the user can see only the drawing of the graph induced by the vertices in the viewing window and this determines a sequence of drawings. For readability, we require that all the drawings of the sequence are planar. For preserving the user's mental map we require that when a vertex or an edge is drawn, it has the same drawing for its entire life. We study the problem of drawing the entire sequence by mapping the vertices only to $ω+k$ given points, where $k$ is as small as possible. We show that: $(i)$ The problem does not depend on the specific set of points but only on its size; $(ii)$ the problem is NP-hard and is FPT when parameterized by $ω+k$; $(iii)$ there are families of graph stories that can be drawn with $k=0$ for any $ω$, while for $k=0$ and small values of $ω$ there are families of graph stories that can be drawn and others that cannot; $(iv)$ there are families of graph stories that cannot be drawn for any fixed $k$ and families of graph stories that require at least a certain $k$.

We show that: $(i)$ The problem does not depend on the specific set of points but only on its size; $(ii)$ the problem is NP-hard and is FPT when parameterized by $ω+k$; $(iii)$ there are families of graph stories that can be drawn with $k=0$ for any $ω$, while for $k=0$ and small values of $ω$ there are families of graph stories that can be drawn and others that cannot; $(iv)$ there are families of graph stories that cannot be drawn for any fixed $k$ and families of graph stories that require at least a certain $k$.

We show that: $(i)$ The problem does not depend on the specific set of points but only on its size; $(ii)$ the problem is NP-hard and is FPT when parameterized by $ω+k$; $(iii)$ there are families of graph stories that can be drawn with $k=0$ for any $ω$, while for $k=0$ and small values of $ω$ there are families of graph stories that can be drawn and others that cannot; $(iv)$ 存在无法为任何固定 $k$ 绘制的图表故事系列以及至少需要特定 $k$ 的图表故事系列。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何用最小数量的点集支持图故事的绘制，确保序列中的所有图示均为平面且保持用户心理映射。
AI.motivation: 动态图可视化中需保持可读性和用户心理映射，要求顶点和边在生命周期内位置不变，同时序列图示需平面化。
AI.method: 通过分析点集大小与参数ω+k的关系，结合计算复杂性理论（NP难与FPT参数化）及构造性证明，探讨不同k值下图故事的可绘制性。
AI.result: （i）问题仅依赖点集大小；（ii）问题NP难但参数化FPT；（iii）存在k=0时可绘制的图故事家族，但小ω时存在不可绘制案例；（iv）某些图故事需固定k或特定k值。
AI.conclusion: 图故事的绘制需平衡点集规模与参数约束，部分场景可优化至k=0，但普遍情况下需根据ω和图结构确定最小k值。

authors_text: Dominik J. E. Waibel,Ernst Röell,Bastian Rieck,Raja Giryes,Carsten Marr
title: A Diffusion Model Predicts 3D Shapes from 2D Microscopy Images
title_zh: 扩散模型根据 2D 显微图像预测 3D 形状
abstract: Diffusion models are a special type of generative model, capable of synthesising new data from a learnt distribution. We introduce DISPR, a diffusion-based model for solving the inverse problem of three-dimensional (3D) cell shape prediction from two-dimensional (2D) single cell microscopy images. Using the 2D microscopy image as a prior, DISPR is conditioned to predict realistic 3D shape reconstructions. To showcase the applicability of DISPR as a data augmentation tool in a feature-based single cell classification task, we extract morphological features from the red blood cells grouped into six highly imbalanced classes. Adding features from the DISPR predictions to the three minority classes improved the macro F1 score from $F1_\text{macro} = 55.2 \pm 4.6\%$ to $F1_\text{macro} = 72.2 \pm 4.9\%$. We thus demonstrate that diffusion models can be successfully applied to inverse biomedical problems, and that they learn to reconstruct 3D shapes with realistic morphological features from 2D microscopy images.
summary: Diffusion models are a special type of generative model, capable of synthesising new data from a learnt distribution. We introduce DISPR, a diffusion-based model for solving the inverse problem of three-dimensional (3D) cell shape prediction from two-dimensional (2D) single cell microscopy images. Using the 2D microscopy image as a prior, DISPR is conditioned to predict realistic 3D shape reconstructions. To showcase the applicability of DISPR as a data augmentation tool in a feature-based single cell classification task, we extract morphological features from the red blood cells grouped into six highly imbalanced classes. Adding features from the DISPR predictions to the three minority classes improved the macro F1 score from $F1_\text{macro} = 55.2 \pm 4.6\%$ to $F1_\text{macro} = 72.2 \pm 4.9\%$. We thus demonstrate that diffusion models can be successfully applied to inverse biomedical problems, and that they learn to reconstruct 3D shapes with realistic morphological features from 2D microscopy images.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型是一种特殊类型的生成模型，能够从学习的分布中合成新数据。我们引入了 DISPR，这是一种基于扩散的模型，用于解决从二维 (2D) 单细胞显微镜图像预测三维 (3D) 细胞形状的逆问题。使用 2D 显微镜图像作为先验，DISPR 可以预测真实的 3D 形状重建。为了展示 DISPR 作为数据增强工具在基于特征的单细胞分类任务中的适用性，我们从分为六个高度不平衡类别的红细胞中提取形态特征。将 DISPR 预测中的特征添加到三个少数类中，将宏 F1 分数从 $F1_\text{macro} = 55.2 \pm 4.6\%$ 提高到 $F1_\text{macro} = 72.2 \pm 4.9\%$。因此，我们证明扩散模型可以成功地应用于逆生物医学问题，并且它们学会从 2D 显微图像中重建具有真实形态特征的 3D 形状。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于扩散模型的DISPR方法，通过二维显微图像预测三维细胞形状，并用于提升单细胞分类任务中不平衡数据集的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在解决从2D显微图像重建3D细胞形状的逆问题时存在不足，尤其在处理高度不平衡分类任务时需要更有效的数据增强手段。
AI.method: 构建扩散模型DISPR，以2D显微图像为条件生成3D形状重建结果，并将生成的形态特征作为数据增强手段融入单细胞分类任务。
AI.result: 在六类不平衡红细胞数据集上，向三个少数类添加DISPR生成特征后，宏F1分数从55.2±4.6%提升至72.2±4.9%。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型可有效解决生物医学逆问题，DISPR能生成具有真实形态特征的3D重建结果，并显著提升不平衡数据集的分类性能。

Adding features from the DISPR predictions to the three minority classes improved the macro F1 score from $F1_\text{macro} = 55.2 \pm 4.6\%$ to $F1_\text{macro} = 72.2 \pm 4.9\%$. We thus demonstrate that diffusion models can be successfully applied to inverse biomedical problems, and that they learn to reconstruct 3D shapes with realistic morphological features from 2D microscopy images. 扩散模型是一种特殊类型的生成模型，能够从学习的分布中合成新数据。我们引入了 DISPR，这是一种基于扩散的模型，用于解决从二维 (2D) 单细胞显微镜图像预测三维 (3D) 细胞形状的逆问题。使用 2D 显微镜图像作为先验，DISPR 可以预测真实的 3D 形状重建。为了展示 DISPR 作为数据增强工具在基于特征的单细胞分类任务中的适用性，我们从分为六个高度不平衡类别的红细胞中提取形态特征。将 DISPR 预测中的特征添加到三个少数类中，将宏 F1 分数从 $F1_\text{macro} = 55.2 \pm 4.6\%$ 提高到 $F1_\text{macro} = 72.2 \pm 4.9\%$。因此，我们证明扩散模型可以成功地应用于逆生物医学问题，并且它们学会从 2D 显微图像中重建具有真实形态特征的 3D 形状。 本文提出基于扩散模型的DISPR方法，通过二维显微图像预测三维细胞形状，并用于提升单细胞分类任务中不平衡数据集的性能。 Dominik J. E. Waibel,Ernst Röell,Bastian Rieck,Raja Giryes,Carsten Marr cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Seung Hyun Lee,Gyeongrok Oh,Wonmin Byeon,Sang Ho Yoon,Jinkyu Kim,Sangpil Kim
title: Robust Sound-Guided Image Manipulation
title_zh: 强大的声音引导图像处理
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.00007
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.00007
abstract: Recent successes suggest that an image can be manipulated by a text prompt, e.g., a landscape scene on a sunny day is manipulated into the same scene on a rainy day driven by a text input "raining". These approaches often utilize a StyleCLIP-based image generator, which leverages multi-modal (text and image) embedding space. However, we observe that such text inputs are often bottlenecked in providing and synthesizing rich semantic cues, e.g., differentiating heavy rain from rain with thunderstorms. To address this issue, we advocate leveraging an additional modality, sound, which has notable advantages in image manipulation as it can convey more diverse semantic cues (vivid emotions or dynamic expressions of the natural world) than texts. In this paper, we propose a novel approach that first extends the image-text joint embedding space with sound and applies a direct latent optimization method to manipulate a given image based on audio input, e.g., the sound of rain. Our extensive experiments show that our sound-guided image manipulation approach produces semantically and visually more plausible manipulation results than the state-of-the-art text and sound-guided image manipulation methods, which are further confirmed by our human evaluations. Our downstream task evaluations also show that our learned image-text-sound joint embedding space effectively encodes sound inputs.
summary: Recent successes suggest that an image can be manipulated by a text prompt, e.g., a landscape scene on a sunny day is manipulated into the same scene on a rainy day driven by a text input "raining". These approaches often utilize a StyleCLIP-based image generator, which leverages multi-modal (text and image) embedding space. However, we observe that such text inputs are often bottlenecked in providing and synthesizing rich semantic cues, e.g., differentiating heavy rain from rain with thunderstorms. To address this issue, we advocate leveraging an additional modality, sound, which has notable advantages in image manipulation as it can convey more diverse semantic cues (vivid emotions or dynamic expressions of the natural world) than texts. In this paper, we propose a novel approach that first extends the image-text joint embedding space with sound and applies a direct latent optimization method to manipulate a given image based on audio input, e.g., the sound of rain. Our extensive experiments show that our sound-guided image manipulation approach produces semantically and visually more plausible manipulation results than the state-of-the-art text and sound-guided image manipulation methods, which are further confirmed by our human evaluations. Our downstream task evaluations also show that our learned image-text-sound joint embedding space effectively encodes sound inputs.
abstract_zh: 最近的成功表明可以通过文本提示来操纵图像，例如，通过文本输入“下雨”将晴天的风景场景操纵为雨天的同一场景。这些方法通常利用基于 StyleCLIP 的图像生成器，该生成器利用多模式（文本和图像）嵌入空间。然而，我们观察到，此类文本输入通常在提供和合成丰富的语义线索方面遇到瓶颈，例如区分大雨和雷暴雨。为了解决这个问题，我们主张利用一种额外的形式，即声音，它在图像处理方面具有显着的优势，因为它可以传达比文本更多样化的语义线索（生动的情感或自然世界的动态表达）。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，首先用声音扩展图像-文本联合嵌入空间，并应用直接潜在优化方法来基于音频输入（例如雨声）操纵给定图像。我们广泛的实验表明，我们的声音引导图像处理方法比最先进的文本和声音引导图像处理方法产生了语义和视觉上更合理的处理结果，这得到了我们的人类评估的进一步证实。我们的下游任务评估还表明，我们学习的图像-文本-声音联合嵌入空间有效地对声音输入进行编码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于声音引导的图像编辑方法，通过扩展图像-文本联合嵌入空间并结合音频输入实现更精确的图像操控。
AI.motivation: 现有文本引导的图像编辑方法在语义表达上存在瓶颈，难以区分复杂场景（如暴雨与雷雨），而声音能传递更丰富的动态语义信息。
AI.method: 将声音模态嵌入图像-文本联合嵌入空间，通过直接潜空间优化方法，基于音频输入（如雨声）对图像进行编辑。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在语义合理性和视觉质量上优于现有文本及声音引导方法，人类评估和下游任务验证了声音嵌入空间的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 声音引导的图像编辑方法能有效编码音频输入，生成更符合场景语义的编辑结果，拓展了多模态嵌入空间的应用边界。

authors_text: Chengjie Yuan,Yunlei Shi,Qian Feng,Chunyang Chang,Zhaopeng Chen,Alois Christian Knoll,Jianwei Zhang
title: Sim-to-Real Transfer of Robotic Assembly with Visual Inputs Using CycleGAN and Force Control
title_zh: 使用 CycleGAN 和力控制通过视觉输入实现机器人装配的模拟到真实传输
abstract: Recently, deep reinforcement learning (RL) has shown some impressive successes in robotic manipulation applications. However, training robots in the real world is nontrivial owing to sample efficiency and safety concerns. Sim-to-real transfer is proposed to address the aforementioned concerns but introduces a new issue called the reality gap. In this work, we introduce a sim-to-real learning framework for vision-based assembly tasks and perform training in a simulated environment by employing inputs from a single camera to address the aforementioned issues. We present a domain adaptation method based on cycle-consistent generative adversarial networks (CycleGAN) and a force control transfer approach to bridge the reality gap. We demonstrate that the proposed framework trained in a simulated environment can be successfully transferred to a real peg-in-hole setup.
summary: Recently, deep reinforcement learning (RL) has shown some impressive successes in robotic manipulation applications. However, training robots in the real world is nontrivial owing to sample efficiency and safety concerns. Sim-to-real transfer is proposed to address the aforementioned concerns but introduces a new issue called the reality gap. In this work, we introduce a sim-to-real learning framework for vision-based assembly tasks and perform training in a simulated environment by employing inputs from a single camera to address the aforementioned issues. We present a domain adaptation method based on cycle-consistent generative adversarial networks (CycleGAN) and a force control transfer approach to bridge the reality gap. We demonstrate that the proposed framework trained in a simulated environment can be successfully transferred to a real peg-in-hole setup.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度强化学习（RL）在机器人操纵应用中取得了一些令人印象深刻的成功。然而，由于样本效率和安全问题，在现实世界中训练机器人并非易事。模拟到真实的传输旨在解决上述问题，但引入了一个称为现实差距的新问题。在这项工作中，我们为基于视觉的装配任务引入了从模拟到真实的学习框架，并通过使用来自单个摄像机的输入在模拟环境中进行训练来解决上述问题。我们提出了一种基于循环一致生成对抗网络（CycleGAN）的域适应方法和一种力控制转移方法来弥合现实差距。我们证明了在模拟环境中训练的所提出的框架可以成功地转移到真实的孔洞设置中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CycleGAN和力控的仿真到现实迁移框架，解决视觉输入的机器人装配任务中现实差距问题。
AI.motivation: 实际机器人训练存在样本效率低和安全风险，而Sim-to-real迁移面临现实差距挑战，需有效方法弥合仿真与真实环境差异。
AI.method: 采用CycleGAN进行视觉领域适应，结合力控策略迁移，利用单目视觉输入在仿真环境训练后迁移至真实装配场景。
AI.result: 所提框架成功实现仿真训练到真实插孔装配任务的迁移，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了视觉装配任务的现实差距问题，为仿真到现实迁移提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Amyra Meidiana,Seok-Hee Hong,Peter Eades
title: Shape-Faithful Graph Drawings
title_zh: 形状忠实的图形绘图
comment: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
comments: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
abstract: Shape-based metrics measure how faithfully a drawing D represents the structure of a graph G, using the proximity graph S of D. While some limited graph classes admit proximity drawings (i.e., optimally shape-faithful drawings, where S = G), algorithms for shape-faithful drawings of general graphs have not been investigated. In this paper, we present the first study for shape-faithful drawings of general graphs. First, we conduct extensive comparison experiments for popular graph layouts using the shape-based metrics, and examine the properties of highly shape-faithful drawings. Then, we present ShFR and ShSM, algorithms for shape-faithful drawings based on force-directed and stress-based algorithms, by introducing new proximity forces/stress. Experiments show that ShFR and ShSM obtain significant improvement over FR (Fruchterman-Reingold) and SM (Stress Majorization), on average 12% and 35% respectively, on shape-based metrics.
summary: Shape-based metrics measure how faithfully a drawing D represents the structure of a graph G, using the proximity graph S of D. While some limited graph classes admit proximity drawings (i.e., optimally shape-faithful drawings, where S = G), algorithms for shape-faithful drawings of general graphs have not been investigated. In this paper, we present the first study for shape-faithful drawings of general graphs. First, we conduct extensive comparison experiments for popular graph layouts using the shape-based metrics, and examine the properties of highly shape-faithful drawings. Then, we present ShFR and ShSM, algorithms for shape-faithful drawings based on force-directed and stress-based algorithms, by introducing new proximity forces/stress. Experiments show that ShFR and ShSM obtain significant improvement over FR (Fruchterman-Reingold) and SM (Stress Majorization), on average 12% and 35% respectively, on shape-based metrics.
abstract_zh: 基于形状的度量使用 D 的邻近图 S 来衡量绘图 D 表示图 G 的结构的真实程度。虽然某些有限的图类允许邻近绘图（即最佳形状忠实绘图，其中 S = G），但尚未研究一般图形的形状忠实绘图的算法。在本文中，我们提出了对一般图形的形状忠实绘图的第一项研究。首先，我们使用基于形状的度量对流行的图形布局进行广泛的比较实验，并检查高度忠实于形状的绘图的属性。然后，我们通过引入新的邻近力/应力，提出了 ShFR 和 ShSM，它们是基于力导向和基于应力的算法的形状忠实绘图算法。实验表明，在基于形状的指标上，ShFR 和 ShSM 比 FR (Fruchterman-Reingold) 和 SM (Stress Majorization) 获得了显着改进，平均分别提高了 12% 和 35%。

AI.tldr: 本文首次研究一般图的形状保真绘制方法，旨在通过形状度量评估和改进图的可视化效果。
AI.motivation: 现有算法仅适用于特定图类，缺乏对一般图的形状保真绘制方法，需提升图的可视化结构准确性。
AI.method: 提出ShFR（基于力导向）和ShSM（基于应力优化）算法，引入新的邻近力/应力计算，优化形状保真度。
AI.result: 实验表明，ShFR和ShSM在形状度量上分别比FR和SM提高12%和35%，显著优化绘制效果。
AI.conclusion: 本研究填补了形状保真绘制一般图的算法空白，提出的算法有效提升结构准确性，为图可视化提供新方法。

search_text: Shape-Faithful Graph Drawings 形状忠实的图形绘图 Shape-based metrics measure how faithfully a drawing D represents the structure of a graph G, using the proximity graph S of D. While some limited graph classes admit proximity drawings (i.e., optimally shape-faithful drawings, where S = G), algorithms for shape-faithful drawings of general graphs have not been investigated. In this paper, we present the first study for shape-faithful drawings of general graphs. First, we conduct extensive comparison experiments for popular graph layouts using the shape-based metrics, and examine the properties of highly shape-faithful drawings. Then, we present ShFR and ShSM, algorithms for shape-faithful drawings based on force-directed and stress-based algorithms, by introducing new proximity forces/stress. Experiments show that ShFR and ShSM obtain significant improvement over FR (Fruchterman-Reingold) and SM (Stress Majorization), on average 12% and 35% respectively, on shape-based metrics. 基于形状的度量使用 D 的邻近图 S 来衡量绘图 D 表示图 G 的结构的真实程度。虽然某些有限的图类允许邻近绘图（即最佳形状忠实绘图，其中 S = G），但尚未研究一般图形的形状忠实绘图的算法。在本文中，我们提出了对一般图形的形状忠实绘图的第一项研究。首先，我们使用基于形状的度量对流行的图形布局进行广泛的比较实验，并检查高度忠实于形状的绘图的属性。然后，我们通过引入新的邻近力/应力，提出了 ShFR 和 ShSM，它们是基于力导向和基于应力的算法的形状忠实绘图算法。实验表明，在基于形状的指标上，ShFR 和 ShSM 比 FR (Fruchterman-Reingold) 和 SM (Stress Majorization) 获得了显着改进，平均分别提高了 12% 和 35%。 本文首次研究一般图的形状保真绘制方法，旨在通过形状度量评估和改进图的可视化效果。 Amyra Meidiana,Seok-Hee Hong,Peter Eades cs.DS

authors_text: Yi Li,Wenjie Pei,Zhenyu He
title: SSORN: Self-Supervised Outlier Removal Network for Robust Homography Estimation
title_zh: SSORN：用于鲁棒单应性估计的自监督异常值去除网络
abstract: The traditional homography estimation pipeline consists of four main steps: feature detection, feature matching, outlier removal and transformation estimation. Recent deep learning models intend to address the homography estimation problem using a single convolutional network. While these models are trained in an end-to-end fashion to simplify the homography estimation problem, they lack the feature matching step and/or the outlier removal step, which are important steps in the traditional homography estimation pipeline. In this paper, we attempt to build a deep learning model that mimics all four steps in the traditional homography estimation pipeline. In particular, the feature matching step is implemented using the cost volume technique. To remove outliers in the cost volume, we treat this outlier removal problem as a denoising problem and propose a novel self-supervised loss to solve the problem. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real datasets demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms existing deep learning models.
summary: The traditional homography estimation pipeline consists of four main steps: feature detection, feature matching, outlier removal and transformation estimation. Recent deep learning models intend to address the homography estimation problem using a single convolutional network. While these models are trained in an end-to-end fashion to simplify the homography estimation problem, they lack the feature matching step and/or the outlier removal step, which are important steps in the traditional homography estimation pipeline. In this paper, we attempt to build a deep learning model that mimics all four steps in the traditional homography estimation pipeline. In particular, the feature matching step is implemented using the cost volume technique. To remove outliers in the cost volume, we treat this outlier removal problem as a denoising problem and propose a novel self-supervised loss to solve the problem. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real datasets demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms existing deep learning models.
abstract_zh: 传统的单应性估计流程由四个主要步骤组成：特征检测、特征匹配、异常值去除和变换估计。最近的深度学习模型打算使用单个卷积网络来解决单应性估计问题。虽然这些模型以端到端的方式进行训练以简化单应性估计问题，但它们缺乏特征匹配步骤和/或异常值去除步骤，而这些步骤是传统单应性估计流程中的重要步骤。在本文中，我们尝试构建一个深度学习模型，模仿传统单应性估计管道中的所有四个步骤。特别地，特征匹配步骤是使用成本体积技术来实现的。为了去除成本量中的异常值，我们将异常值去除问题视为去噪问题，并提出一种新颖的自监督损失来解决该问题。对合成数据集和真实数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的模型优于现有的深度学习模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SSORN模型，通过自监督方式实现传统单应性估计流程中的四个步骤，提升鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型常省略特征匹配或异常值去除步骤，而这两者对单应性估计至关重要。
AI.method: 采用成本体技术实现特征匹配，并设计自监督损失函数将异常值去除转化为去噪问题。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上实验表明，该模型优于现有深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 整合完整流程步骤并引入自监督机制可有效提升单应性估计的鲁棒性与准确性。

authors_text: Fengxiang He,Dacheng Tao
title: Super-model ecosystem: A domain-adaptation perspective
title_zh: 超模生态系统：领域适应视角
abstract: This paper attempts to establish the theoretical foundation for the emerging super-model paradigm via domain adaptation, where one first trains a very large-scale model, {\it i.e.}, super model (or foundation model in some other papers), on a large amount of data and then adapts it to various specific domains. Super-model paradigms help reduce computational and data cost and carbon emission, which is critical to AI industry, especially enormous small and medium-sized enterprises. We model the super-model paradigm as a two-stage diffusion process: (1) in the pre-training stage, the model parameter diffuses from random initials and converges to a steady distribution; and (2) in the fine-tuning stage, the model parameter is transported to another steady distribution. Both training stages can be mathematically modeled by the Uhlenbeck-Ornstein process which converges to two Maxwell-Boltzmann distributions, respectively, each of which characterizes the corresponding convergent model. An $\mathcal O(1/\sqrt{N})$ generalization bound is then established via PAC-Bayesian framework. The theory finds that the generalization error of the fine-tuning stage is dominant in domain adaptation. In addition, our theory suggests that the generalization is determined by a new measure that characterizes the domain discrepancy between the source domain and target domain, based on the covariance matrices and the shift of the converged local minimum.
summary: This paper attempts to establish the theoretical foundation for the emerging super-model paradigm via domain adaptation, where one first trains a very large-scale model, {\it i.e.}, super model (or foundation model in some other papers), on a large amount of data and then adapts it to various specific domains. Super-model paradigms help reduce computational and data cost and carbon emission, which is critical to AI industry, especially enormous small and medium-sized enterprises. We model the super-model paradigm as a two-stage diffusion process: (1) in the pre-training stage, the model parameter diffuses from random initials and converges to a steady distribution; and (2) in the fine-tuning stage, the model parameter is transported to another steady distribution. Both training stages can be mathematically modeled by the Uhlenbeck-Ornstein process which converges to two Maxwell-Boltzmann distributions, respectively, each of which characterizes the corresponding convergent model. An $\mathcal O(1/\sqrt{N})$ generalization bound is then established via PAC-Bayesian framework. The theory finds that the generalization error of the fine-tuning stage is dominant in domain adaptation. In addition, our theory suggests that the generalization is determined by a new measure that characterizes the domain discrepancy between the source domain and target domain, based on the covariance matrices and the shift of the converged local minimum.
abstract_zh: 本文试图通过领域适应为新兴的超级模型范式建立理论基础，首先在大量数据上训练一个非常大规模的模型，即超级模型（或其他一些论文中的基础模型），然后将其适应各种特定领域。超级模型范式有助于降低计算和数据成本以及碳排放，这对于人工智能行业，特别是大型中小企业至关重要。我们将超模型范式建模为两阶段扩散过程：（1）在预训练阶段，模型参数从随机初始扩散并收敛到稳定分布； (2)在微调阶段，将模型参数转移到另一个稳定分布。两个训练阶段都可以通过 Uhlenbeck-Ornstein 过程进行数学建模，该过程分别收敛到两个 Maxwell-Boltzmann 分布，每个分布都表征相应的收敛模型。然后通过 PAC-贝叶斯框架建立 $\mathcal O(1/\sqrt{N})$ 泛化界限。该理论发现，微调阶段的泛化误差在域适应中占主导地位。此外，我们的理论表明，泛化是由一种新的度量确定的，该度量基于协方差矩阵和收敛的局部最小值的偏移来表征源域和目标域之间的域差异。

AI.tldr: 本文从领域适应视角建立超模型范式的理论基础，将其建模为两阶段扩散过程，并通过数学框架分析其泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 超模型范式可通过减少计算和数据成本降低AI行业碳排放，尤其对中小企业具有重要意义，但其理论基础尚待完善。
AI.method: 将超模型训练过程建模为Uhlenbeck-Ornstein过程，通过PAC-Bayesian框架推导泛化界，结合协方差矩阵和收敛极小值偏移量化领域差异。
AI.result: 建立O(1/√N)泛化界，发现微调阶段误差主导领域适应，提出基于协方差矩阵和极小值偏移的领域差异新度量。
AI.conclusion: 理论揭示了超模型领域适应的关键因素，为优化训练策略和指导实际应用提供了理论依据。

An $\mathcal O(1/\sqrt{N})$ generalization bound is then established via PAC-Bayesian framework. In addition, our theory suggests that the generalization is determined by a new measure that characterizes the domain discrepancy between the source domain and target domain, based on the covariance matrices and the shift of the converged local minimum. 本文试图通过领域适应为新兴的超级模型范式建立理论基础，首先在大量数据上训练一个非常大规模的模型，即超级模型（或其他一些论文中的基础模型），然后将其适应各种特定领域。超级模型范式有助于降低计算和数据成本以及碳排放，这对于人工智能行业，特别是大型中小企业至关重要。我们将超模型范式建模为两阶段扩散过程：（1）在预训练阶段，模型参数从随机初始扩散并收敛到稳定分布； (2)在微调阶段，将模型参数转移到另一个稳定分布。两个训练阶段都可以通过 Uhlenbeck-Ornstein 过程进行数学建模，该过程分别收敛到两个 Maxwell-Boltzmann 分布，每个分布都表征相应的收敛模型。然后通过 PAC-贝叶斯框架建立 $\mathcal O(1/\sqrt{N})$ 泛化界限。该理论发现，微调阶段的泛化误差在域适应中占主导地位。此外，我们的理论表明，泛化是由一种新的度量确定的，该度量基于协方差矩阵和收敛的局部最小值的偏移来表征源域和目标域之间的域差异。 本文从领域适应视角建立超模型范式的理论基础，将其建模为两阶段扩散过程，并通过数学框架分析其泛化能力。 Fengxiang He,Dacheng Tao cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Zicheng Zhang,Wei Sun,Yucheng Zhu,Xiongkuo Min,Wei Wu,Ying Chen,Guangtao Zhai
title: Evaluating Point Cloud from Moving Camera Videos: A No-Reference Metric
title_zh: 从移动摄像机视频评估点云：无参考指标
abstract: Point cloud is one of the most widely used digital representation formats for three-dimensional (3D) contents, the visual quality of which may suffer from noise and geometric shift distortions during the production procedure as well as compression and downsampling distortions during the transmission process. To tackle the challenge of point cloud quality assessment (PCQA), many PCQA methods have been proposed to evaluate the visual quality levels of point clouds by assessing the rendered static 2D projections. Although such projection-based PCQA methods achieve competitive performance with the assistance of mature image quality assessment (IQA) methods, they neglect that the 3D model is also perceived in a dynamic viewing manner, where the viewpoint is continually changed according to the feedback of the rendering device. Therefore, in this paper, we evaluate the point clouds from moving camera videos and explore the way of dealing with PCQA tasks via using video quality assessment (VQA) methods. First, we generate the captured videos by rotating the camera around the point clouds through several circular pathways. Then we extract both spatial and temporal quality-aware features from the selected key frames and the video clips through using trainable 2D-CNN and pre-trained 3D-CNN models respectively. Finally, the visual quality of point clouds is represented by the video quality values. The experimental results reveal that the proposed method is effective for predicting the visual quality levels of the point clouds and even competitive with full-reference (FR) PCQA methods. The ablation studies further verify the rationality of the proposed framework and confirm the contributions made by the quality-aware features extracted via the dynamic viewing manner. The code is available at https://github.com/zzc-1998/VQA_PC.
summary: Point cloud is one of the most widely used digital representation formats for three-dimensional (3D) contents, the visual quality of which may suffer from noise and geometric shift distortions during the production procedure as well as compression and downsampling distortions during the transmission process. To tackle the challenge of point cloud quality assessment (PCQA), many PCQA methods have been proposed to evaluate the visual quality levels of point clouds by assessing the rendered static 2D projections. Although such projection-based PCQA methods achieve competitive performance with the assistance of mature image quality assessment (IQA) methods, they neglect that the 3D model is also perceived in a dynamic viewing manner, where the viewpoint is continually changed according to the feedback of the rendering device. Therefore, in this paper, we evaluate the point clouds from moving camera videos and explore the way of dealing with PCQA tasks via using video quality assessment (VQA) methods. First, we generate the captured videos by rotating the camera around the point clouds through several circular pathways. Then we extract both spatial and temporal quality-aware features from the selected key frames and the video clips through using trainable 2D-CNN and pre-trained 3D-CNN models respectively. Finally, the visual quality of point clouds is represented by the video quality values. The experimental results reveal that the proposed method is effective for predicting the visual quality levels of the point clouds and even competitive with full-reference (FR) PCQA methods. The ablation studies further verify the rationality of the proposed framework and confirm the contributions made by the quality-aware features extracted via the dynamic viewing manner. The code is available at https://github.com/zzc-1998/VQA_PC.
abstract_zh: 点云是三维（3D）内容最广泛使用的数字表示格式之一，其视觉质量可能会受到制作过程中的噪声和几何位移失真以及传输过程中的压缩和下采样失真的影响。为了应对点云质量评估（PCQA）的挑战，人们提出了许多 PCQA 方法，通过评估渲染的静态 2D 投影来评估点云的视觉质量水平。虽然这种基于投影的 PCQA 方法在成熟的图像质量评估 (IQA) 方法的帮助下取得了有竞争力的性能，但它们忽略了 3D 模型也是以动态观看方式感知的，其中视点根据渲染设备的反馈不断变化。因此，在本文中，我们评估移动摄像机视频的点云，并探索使用视频质量评估（VQA）方法处理 PCQA 任务的方法。首先，我们通过几个圆形路径围绕点云旋转相机来生成捕获的视频。然后，我们分别使用可训练的 2D-CNN 和预训练的 3D-CNN 模型从所选关键帧和视频剪辑中提取空间和时间质量感知特征。最后，点云的视觉质量由视频质量值表示。实验结果表明，该方法对于预测点云的视觉质量水平是有效的，甚至可以与全参考（FR）PCQA 方法竞争。消融研究进一步验证了所提出框架的合理性，并确认了通过动态查看方式提取的质量感知特征所做出的贡献。该代码可从 https://github.com/zzc-1998/VQA_PC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于移动摄像机视频的无参考点云质量评估方法，通过动态视角分析点云的视觉质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于静态2D投影的点云质量评估方法忽视了动态观看场景中视角持续变化的特点，无法准确反映真实视觉体验。
AI.method: 通过绕点云旋转摄像机生成视频，利用2D-CNN提取关键帧空间特征，3D-CNN提取视频片段时序特征，最终将点云质量映射为视频质量值。
AI.result: 该方法在预测点云质量等级上表现有效，且性能可与全参考PCQA方法竞争，消融实验证实了动态视角特征提取的合理性。
AI.conclusion: 动态视角下的视频质量评估框架显著提升了点云质量分析的准确性，为无参考PCQA提供了新思路。

authors_text: Luca Frittoli,Diego Carrera,Beatrice Rossi,Pasqualina Fragneto,Giacomo Boracchi
title: Deep Open-Set Recognition for Silicon Wafer Production Monitoring
title_zh: 用于硅片生产监控的深度开集识别
abstract: The chips contained in any electronic device are manufactured over circular silicon wafers, which are monitored by inspection machines at different production stages. Inspection machines detect and locate any defect within the wafer and return a Wafer Defect Map (WDM), i.e., a list of the coordinates where defects lie, which can be considered a huge, sparse, and binary image. In normal conditions, wafers exhibit a small number of randomly distributed defects, while defects grouped in specific patterns might indicate known or novel categories of failures in the production line. Needless to say, a primary concern of semiconductor industries is to identify these patterns and intervene as soon as possible to restore normal production conditions. Here we address WDM monitoring as an open-set recognition problem to accurately classify WDM in known categories and promptly detect novel patterns. In particular, we propose a comprehensive pipeline for wafer monitoring based on a Submanifold Sparse Convolutional Network, a deep architecture designed to process sparse data at an arbitrary resolution, which is trained on the known classes. To detect novelties, we define an outlier detector based on a Gaussian Mixture Model fitted on the latent representation of the classifier. Our experiments on a real dataset of WDMs show that directly processing full-resolution WDMs by Submanifold Sparse Convolutions yields superior classification performance on known classes than traditional Convolutional Neural Networks, which require a preliminary binning to reduce the size of the binary images representing WDMs. Moreover, our solution outperforms state-of-the-art open-set recognition solutions in detecting novelties.
summary: The chips contained in any electronic device are manufactured over circular silicon wafers, which are monitored by inspection machines at different production stages. Inspection machines detect and locate any defect within the wafer and return a Wafer Defect Map (WDM), i.e., a list of the coordinates where defects lie, which can be considered a huge, sparse, and binary image. In normal conditions, wafers exhibit a small number of randomly distributed defects, while defects grouped in specific patterns might indicate known or novel categories of failures in the production line. Needless to say, a primary concern of semiconductor industries is to identify these patterns and intervene as soon as possible to restore normal production conditions. Here we address WDM monitoring as an open-set recognition problem to accurately classify WDM in known categories and promptly detect novel patterns. In particular, we propose a comprehensive pipeline for wafer monitoring based on a Submanifold Sparse Convolutional Network, a deep architecture designed to process sparse data at an arbitrary resolution, which is trained on the known classes. To detect novelties, we define an outlier detector based on a Gaussian Mixture Model fitted on the latent representation of the classifier. Our experiments on a real dataset of WDMs show that directly processing full-resolution WDMs by Submanifold Sparse Convolutions yields superior classification performance on known classes than traditional Convolutional Neural Networks, which require a preliminary binning to reduce the size of the binary images representing WDMs. Moreover, our solution outperforms state-of-the-art open-set recognition solutions in detecting novelties.
abstract_zh: 任何电子设备中包含的芯片都是在圆形硅晶片上制造的，这些硅晶片在不同的生产阶段由检查机器进行监控。检查机检测并定位晶圆内的任何缺陷，并返回晶圆缺陷图（WDM），即缺陷所在的坐标列表，可以将其视为巨大的、稀疏的二值图像。在正常情况下，晶圆表现出少量随机分布的缺陷，而以特定模式分组的缺陷可能表明生产线中已知或新的故障类别。不用说，半导体行业的首要关注点是识别这些模式并尽快进行干预以恢复正常的生产条件。在这里，我们将 WDM 监控视为一个开放集识别问题，以准确地对已知类别中的 WDM 进行分类并及时检测新模式。特别是，我们提出了一种基于子流形稀疏卷积网络的晶圆监控综合管道，这是一种深度架构，旨在以任意分辨率处理稀疏数据，并在已知类别上进行训练。为了检测新颖性，我们定义了一个基于高斯混合模型的离群值检测器，该模型适合分类器的潜在表示。我们在 WDM 的真实数据集上进行的实验表明，通过子流形稀疏卷积直接处​​理全分辨率 WDM 在已知类别上比传统的卷积神经网络具有更好的分类性能，传统的卷积神经网络需要进行初步分箱以减小表示 WDM 的二进制图像的大小。此外，我们的解决方案在检测新颖性方面优于最先进的开放集识别解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于子流形稀疏卷积网络的深度开放集识别方法，用于硅晶圆生产中的缺陷地图（WDM）监测，旨在准确分类已知缺陷模式并检测新型缺陷模式。
AI.motivation: 半导体制造中需及时识别晶圆缺陷模式以避免生产异常，传统方法在处理高分辨率稀疏数据及新型缺陷检测上存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计子流形稀疏卷积网络直接处理原始分辨率WDM，结合高斯混合模型构建潜在空间的异常检测器，无需预处理降采样。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在已知类别分类准确率及新型缺陷检测性能上均优于传统卷积神经网络和现有开放集识别方案。
AI.conclusion: 提出的端到端监测框架有效解决了高分辨率稀疏数据处理与开放集识别难题，为晶圆生产缺陷监测提供了新思路。

search_text: Deep Open-Set Recognition for Silicon Wafer Production Monitoring 用于硅片生产监控的深度开集识别 The chips contained in any electronic device are manufactured over circular silicon wafers, which are monitored by inspection machines at different production stages. Inspection machines detect and locate any defect within the wafer and return a Wafer Defect Map (WDM), i.e., a list of the coordinates where defects lie, which can be considered a huge, sparse, and binary image. In normal conditions, wafers exhibit a small number of randomly distributed defects, while defects grouped in specific patterns might indicate known or novel categories of failures in the production line. Needless to say, a primary concern of semiconductor industries is to identify these patterns and intervene as soon as possible to restore normal production conditions. Here we address WDM monitoring as an open-set recognition problem to accurately classify WDM in known categories and promptly detect novel patterns. In particular, we propose a comprehensive pipeline for wafer monitoring based on a Submanifold Sparse Convolutional Network, a deep architecture designed to process sparse data at an arbitrary resolution, which is trained on the known classes. To detect novelties, we define an outlier detector based on a Gaussian Mixture Model fitted on the latent representation of the classifier. Our experiments on a real dataset of WDMs show that directly processing full-resolution WDMs by Submanifold Sparse Convolutions yields superior classification performance on known classes than traditional Convolutional Neural Networks, which require a preliminary binning to reduce the size of the binary images representing WDMs. Moreover, our solution outperforms state-of-the-art open-set recognition solutions in detecting novelties. 任何电子设备中包含的芯片都是在圆形硅晶片上制造的，这些硅晶片在不同的生产阶段由检查机器进行监控。检查机检测并定位晶圆内的任何缺陷，并返回晶圆缺陷图（WDM），即缺陷所在的坐标列表，可以将其视为巨大的、稀疏的二值图像。在正常情况下，晶圆表现出少量随机分布的缺陷，而以特定模式分组的缺陷可能表明生产线中已知或新的故障类别。不用说，半导体行业的首要关注点是识别这些模式并尽快进行干预以恢复正常的生产条件。在这里，我们将 WDM 监控视为一个开放集识别问题，以准确地对已知类别中的 WDM 进行分类并及时检测新模式。特别是，我们提出了一种基于子流形稀疏卷积网络的晶圆监控综合管道，这是一种深度架构，旨在以任意分辨率处理稀疏数据，并在已知类别上进行训练。为了检测新颖性，我们定义了一个基于高斯混合模型的离群值检测器，该模型适合分类器的潜在表示。我们在 WDM 的真实数据集上进行的实验表明，通过子流形稀疏卷积直接处​​理全分辨率 WDM 在已知类别上比传统的卷积神经网络具有更好的分类性能，传统的卷积神经网络需要进行初步分箱以减小表示 WDM 的二进制图像的大小。此外，我们的解决方案在检测新颖性方面优于最先进的开放集识别解决方案。 本文提出一种基于子流形稀疏卷积网络的深度开放集识别方法，用于硅晶圆生产中的缺陷地图（WDM）监测，旨在准确分类已知缺陷模式并检测新型缺陷模式。 Luca Frittoli,Diego Carrera,Beatrice Rossi,Pasqualina Fragneto,Giacomo Boracchi cs.CV

authors_text: Stefano Della Fiore,Marco Dalai,Ugo Vaccaro
title: Achievable Rates and Algorithms for Group Testing with Runlength Constraints
title_zh: 具有运行长度约束的组测试可实现的速率和算法
comment: 5 pages plus extra one reference page, accepted to the IEEE Information Theory Workshop (ITW 2022)
comments: 5 pages plus extra one reference page, accepted to the IEEE Information Theory Workshop (ITW 2022)
abstract: In this paper, we study bounds on the minimum length of $(k,n,d)$-superimposed codes introduced by Agarwal et al. [1], in the context of Non-Adaptive Group Testing algorithms with runlength constraints. A $(k,n,d)$-superimposed code of length $t$ is a $t \times n$ binary matrix such that any two 1's in each column are separated by a run of at least $d$ 0's, and such that for any column $\mathbf{c}$ and any other $k-1$ columns, there exists a row where $\mathbf{c}$ has $1$ and all the remaining $k-1$ columns have $0$. Agarwal et al. proved the existence of such codes with $t=Θ(dk\log(n/k)+k^2\log(n/k))$. Here we investigate more in detail the coefficients in front of these two main terms as well as the role of lower order terms. We show that improvements can be obtained over the construction in [1] by using different constructions and by an appropriate exploitation of the Lovász Local Lemma in this context. Our findings also suggest $O(n^k)$ randomized Las Vegas algorithms for the construction of such codes. We also extend our results to Two-Stage Group Testing algorithms with runlength constraints.
summary: In this paper, we study bounds on the minimum length of $(k,n,d)$-superimposed codes introduced by Agarwal et al. [1], in the context of Non-Adaptive Group Testing algorithms with runlength constraints. A $(k,n,d)$-superimposed code of length $t$ is a $t \times n$ binary matrix such that any two 1's in each column are separated by a run of at least $d$ 0's, and such that for any column $\mathbf{c}$ and any other $k-1$ columns, there exists a row where $\mathbf{c}$ has $1$ and all the remaining $k-1$ columns have $0$. Agarwal et al. proved the existence of such codes with $t=Θ(dk\log(n/k)+k^2\log(n/k))$. Here we investigate more in detail the coefficients in front of these two main terms as well as the role of lower order terms. We show that improvements can be obtained over the construction in [1] by using different constructions and by an appropriate exploitation of the Lovász Local Lemma in this context. Our findings also suggest $O(n^k)$ randomized Las Vegas algorithms for the construction of such codes. We also extend our results to Two-Stage Group Testing algorithms with runlength constraints.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了 Agarwal 等人提出的 $(k,n,d)$ 叠加码的最小长度界限。 [1]，在具有游程长度约束的非自适应组测试算法的背景下。长度为 $t$ 的 $(k,n,d)$ 叠加码是一个 $t \times n$ 二进制矩阵，使得每列中的任何两个 1 都由至少 $d$ 0 的游程分隔，并且对于任何列 $\mathbf{c}$ 和任何其他 $k-1$ 列，都存在一行，其中 $\mathbf{c}$ 具有 $1$，并且所有剩余的 $k-1$ 列具有 $ $0$。阿加瓦尔等人。用 $t=θ(dk\log(n/k)+k^2\log(n/k))$ 证明了此类代码的存在。在这里，我们更详细地研究这两个主要项前面的系数以及低阶项的作用。我们表明，通过使用不同的构造以及在这种情况下适当利用 Lovász 局部引理，可以对 [1] 中的构造进行改进。我们的研究结果还表明 $O(n^k)$ 随机拉斯维加斯算法用于构建此类代码。我们还将我们的结果扩展到具有游程限制的两阶段组测试算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在具有运行长度约束的非自适应群组测试算法中，(k,n,d)-超叠码的最小长度的界限，并提出了改进的构造方法和算法。
AI.motivation: 在群组测试中，运行长度约束可避免某些模式，提高测试效率。现有方法的系数和低阶项未被充分优化，需进一步改进。
AI.method: 通过改进构造方法并结合Lovász局部引理，优化主项系数及低阶项；设计随机化Las Vegas算法，并扩展至两阶段群组测试。
AI.result: 获得了更紧的码长界，提出O(n^k)随机算法，并将结果推广至带运行长度约束的两阶段群组测试。
AI.conclusion: 改进的构造和算法提升了群组测试在运行长度约束下的效率，为相关应用提供了理论支持与实用方案。

authors_text: Pierrick Pochelu,Clara Erard,Philippe Cordier,Serge G. Petiton,Bruno Conche
title: Weakly Supervised Faster-RCNN+FPN to classify animals in camera trap images
title_zh: 弱监督 Faster-RCNN+FPN 对相机陷阱图像中的动物进行分类
abstract: Camera traps have revolutionized the animal research of many species that were previously nearly impossible to observe due to their habitat or behavior. They are cameras generally fixed to a tree that take a short sequence of images when triggered. Deep learning has the potential to overcome the workload to automate image classification according to taxon or empty images. However, a standard deep neural network classifier fails because animals often represent a small portion of the high-definition images. That is why we propose a workflow named Weakly Object Detection Faster-RCNN+FPN which suits this challenge. The model is weakly supervised because it requires only the animal taxon label per image but doesn't require any manual bounding box annotations. First, it automatically performs the weakly-supervised bounding box annotation using the motion from multiple frames. Then, it trains a Faster-RCNN+FPN model using this weak supervision. Experimental results have been obtained with two datasets from a Papua New Guinea and Missouri biodiversity monitoring campaign, then on an easily reproducible testbed.
summary: Camera traps have revolutionized the animal research of many species that were previously nearly impossible to observe due to their habitat or behavior. They are cameras generally fixed to a tree that take a short sequence of images when triggered. Deep learning has the potential to overcome the workload to automate image classification according to taxon or empty images. However, a standard deep neural network classifier fails because animals often represent a small portion of the high-definition images. That is why we propose a workflow named Weakly Object Detection Faster-RCNN+FPN which suits this challenge. The model is weakly supervised because it requires only the animal taxon label per image but doesn't require any manual bounding box annotations. First, it automatically performs the weakly-supervised bounding box annotation using the motion from multiple frames. Then, it trains a Faster-RCNN+FPN model using this weak supervision. Experimental results have been obtained with two datasets from a Papua New Guinea and Missouri biodiversity monitoring campaign, then on an easily reproducible testbed.
abstract_zh: 相机陷阱彻底改变了许多物种的动物研究，这些物种以前由于栖息地或行为而几乎无法观察。它们是通常固定在树上的相机，触发时会拍摄一小段图像。深度学习有潜力克服根据分类单元或空图像自动进行图像分类的工作量。然而，标准深度神经网络分类器会失败，因为动物通常只代表高清图像的一小部分。这就是为什么我们提出了一个名为 Weakly Object Inspection Faster-RCNN+FPN 的工作流程来应对这一挑战。该模型是弱监督的，因为它只需要每个图像的动物分类标签，但不需要任何手动边界框注释。首先，它使用多个帧的运动自动执行弱监督边界框注释。然后，它使用这种弱监督训练 Faster-RCNN+FPN 模型。实验结果是通过巴布亚新几内亚和密苏里州生物多样性监测活动的两个数据集获得的，然后在一个易于重现的测试平台上获得。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督Faster-RCNN+FPN方法，用于自动分类相机陷阱图像中的动物，无需人工标注边界框。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习分类器因动物在图像中占比小而效果不佳，且人工标注边界框成本高，需开发弱监督解决方案。
AI.method: 利用多帧图像中的运动信息自动生成弱监督边界框，训练Faster-RCNN+FPN模型进行动物分类。
AI.result: 在巴布亚新几内亚、密苏里州数据集及可复现实验平台上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了相机陷阱图像分类的挑战，降低了标注成本，适用于实际生物多样性监测项目。

authors_text: Xinbiao Wang,Junyu Liu,Tongliang Liu,Yong Luo,Yuxuan Du,Dacheng Tao
title: Symmetric Pruning in Quantum Neural Networks
title_zh: 量子神经网络中的对称剪枝
comment: Accepted to International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2023
comments: Accepted to International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2023
abstract: Many fundamental properties of a quantum system are captured by its Hamiltonian and ground state. Despite the significance of ground states preparation (GSP), this task is classically intractable for large-scale Hamiltonians. Quantum neural networks (QNNs), which exert the power of modern quantum machines, have emerged as a leading protocol to conquer this issue. As such, how to enhance the performance of QNNs becomes a crucial topic in GSP. Empirical evidence showed that QNNs with handcraft symmetric ansatzes generally experience better trainability than those with asymmetric ansatzes, while theoretical explanations have not been explored. To fill this knowledge gap, here we propose the effective quantum neural tangent kernel (EQNTK) and connect this concept with over-parameterization theory to quantify the convergence of QNNs towards the global optima. We uncover that the advance of symmetric ansatzes attributes to their large EQNTK value with low effective dimension, which requests few parameters and quantum circuit depth to reach the over-parameterization regime permitting a benign loss landscape and fast convergence. Guided by EQNTK, we further devise a symmetric pruning (SP) scheme to automatically tailor a symmetric ansatz from an over-parameterized and asymmetric one to greatly improve the performance of QNNs when the explicit symmetry information of Hamiltonian is unavailable. Extensive numerical simulations are conducted to validate the analytical results of EQNTK and the effectiveness of SP.
summary: Many fundamental properties of a quantum system are captured by its Hamiltonian and ground state. Despite the significance of ground states preparation (GSP), this task is classically intractable for large-scale Hamiltonians. Quantum neural networks (QNNs), which exert the power of modern quantum machines, have emerged as a leading protocol to conquer this issue. As such, how to enhance the performance of QNNs becomes a crucial topic in GSP. Empirical evidence showed that QNNs with handcraft symmetric ansatzes generally experience better trainability than those with asymmetric ansatzes, while theoretical explanations have not been explored. To fill this knowledge gap, here we propose the effective quantum neural tangent kernel (EQNTK) and connect this concept with over-parameterization theory to quantify the convergence of QNNs towards the global optima. We uncover that the advance of symmetric ansatzes attributes to their large EQNTK value with low effective dimension, which requests few parameters and quantum circuit depth to reach the over-parameterization regime permitting a benign loss landscape and fast convergence. Guided by EQNTK, we further devise a symmetric pruning (SP) scheme to automatically tailor a symmetric ansatz from an over-parameterized and asymmetric one to greatly improve the performance of QNNs when the explicit symmetry information of Hamiltonian is unavailable. Extensive numerical simulations are conducted to validate the analytical results of EQNTK and the effectiveness of SP.
abstract_zh: 量子系统的许多基本属性都是由其哈密顿量和基态捕获的。尽管基态准备（GSP）很重要，但这项任务对于大规模哈密顿主义者来说通常是棘手的。量子神经网络（QNN）发挥了现代量子机器的力量，已成为解决这一问题的领先协议。因此，如何提高 QNN 的性能成为 GSP 的一个关键课题。经验证据表明，具有手工对称模拟的 QNN 通常比具有不对称模拟的 QNN 具有更好的可训练性，但尚未探索理论解释。为了填补这一知识空白，我们在这里提出了有效的量子神经正切核（EQNTK），并将该概念与超参数化理论联系起来，以量化 QNN 向全局最优的收敛性。我们发现，对称模拟的进步归因于它们的大 EQNTK 值和低有效维数，这需要很少的参数和量子电路深度来达到超参数化状态，从而允许良性损失景观和快速收敛。在 EQNTK 的指导下，我们进一步设计了一种对称剪枝（SP）方案，可以在哈密顿量的显式对称信息不可用时，自动从过度参数化和非对称的拟像中剪裁出对称拟像，从而大大提高 QNN 的性能。进行了大量的数值模拟来验证 EQNTK 的分析结果和 SP 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出对称剪枝（SP）方案，通过有效量子神经切线核（EQNTK）理论提升量子神经网络（QNN）在基态制备中的性能。
AI.motivation: 量子神经网络（QNN）在基态制备中表现优异，但对称结构的理论优势缺乏解释，且实际应用中常缺乏哈密顿量对称性信息。
AI.method: 提出EQNTK理论连接过参数化理论，分析对称结构的收敛优势，并设计SP方案自动从非对称结构中剪枝生成对称结构。
AI.result: 理论分析与数值模拟验证了EQNTK对对称结构优势的解释，SP方案在无显式对称性信息时显著提升QNN性能。
AI.conclusion: 对称剪枝通过EQNTK理论指导，在无需先验对称性知识的情况下，可有效优化QNN结构并加速收敛至全局最优。
