authors_text: Songbin Chen
title: Intelligent Perception System for Vehicle-Road Cooperation
title_zh: 车路协同智能感知系统
abstract: With the development of autonomous driving, the improvement of autonomous driving technology for individual vehicles has reached the bottleneck. The advancement of vehicle-road cooperation autonomous driving technology can expand the vehicle's perception range, supplement the perception blind area and improve the perception accuracy, to promote the development of autonomous driving technology and achieve vehicle-road integration. This project mainly uses lidar to develop data fusion schemes to realize the sharing and combination of vehicle and road equipment data and achieve the detection and tracking of dynamic targets. At the same time, some test scenarios for the vehicle-road cooperative system were designed and used to test our vehicle-road cooperative awareness system, which proved the advantages of vehicle-road cooperative autonomous driving over single-vehicle autonomous driving.
summary: With the development of autonomous driving, the improvement of autonomous driving technology for individual vehicles has reached the bottleneck. The advancement of vehicle-road cooperation autonomous driving technology can expand the vehicle's perception range, supplement the perception blind area and improve the perception accuracy, to promote the development of autonomous driving technology and achieve vehicle-road integration. This project mainly uses lidar to develop data fusion schemes to realize the sharing and combination of vehicle and road equipment data and achieve the detection and tracking of dynamic targets. At the same time, some test scenarios for the vehicle-road cooperative system were designed and used to test our vehicle-road cooperative awareness system, which proved the advantages of vehicle-road cooperative autonomous driving over single-vehicle autonomous driving.
abstract_zh: 随着自动驾驶的发展，单车自动驾驶技术的提升已经到了瓶颈。车路协同自动驾驶技术的进步可以扩大车辆的感知范围、补充感知盲区、提高感知精度，推动自动驾驶技术的发展，实现车路融合。本项目主要利用激光雷达开发数据融合方案，实现车辆和道路设备数据的共享和结合，实现动态目标的检测和跟踪。同时，设计了一些车路协同系统的测试场景，并用于测试我们的车路协同感知系统，证明了车路协同自动驾驶相对于单车自动驾驶的优势。

AI.tldr: 开发车路协同智能感知系统以提升自动驾驶技术
AI.motivation: 单车自动驾驶技术遭遇感知范围和盲区限制，车路协同可扩展感知能力并提高准确性
AI.method: 采用激光雷达数据融合方案实现车路数据共享，设计测试场景验证系统性能
AI.result: 验证了车路协同系统在动态目标检测跟踪中的优势，优于传统单车自动驾驶方案
AI.conclusion: 车路协同技术能有效突破单车智能瓶颈，推动自动驾驶发展和车路一体化进程

authors_text: Andrea Bionda,Luca Frittoli,Giacomo Boracchi
title: Deep Autoencoders for Anomaly Detection in Textured Images using CW-SSIM
title_zh: 使用 CW-SSIM 进行纹理图像异常检测的深度自动编码器
comment: International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP 2021). NVIDIA Prize winner
comments: International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP 2021). NVIDIA Prize winner
abstract: Detecting anomalous regions in images is a frequently encountered problem in industrial monitoring. A relevant example is the analysis of tissues and other products that in normal conditions conform to a specific texture, while defects introduce changes in the normal pattern. We address the anomaly detection problem by training a deep autoencoder, and we show that adopting a loss function based on Complex Wavelet Structural Similarity (CW-SSIM) yields superior detection performance on this type of images compared to traditional autoencoder loss functions. Our experiments on well-known anomaly detection benchmarks show that a simple model trained with this loss function can achieve comparable or superior performance to state-of-the-art methods leveraging deeper, larger and more computationally demanding neural networks.
summary: Detecting anomalous regions in images is a frequently encountered problem in industrial monitoring. A relevant example is the analysis of tissues and other products that in normal conditions conform to a specific texture, while defects introduce changes in the normal pattern. We address the anomaly detection problem by training a deep autoencoder, and we show that adopting a loss function based on Complex Wavelet Structural Similarity (CW-SSIM) yields superior detection performance on this type of images compared to traditional autoencoder loss functions. Our experiments on well-known anomaly detection benchmarks show that a simple model trained with this loss function can achieve comparable or superior performance to state-of-the-art methods leveraging deeper, larger and more computationally demanding neural networks.
abstract_zh: 检测图像中的异常区域是工业监控中经常遇到的问题。一个相关的例子是对正常条件下符合特定纹理的组织和其他产品的分析，而缺陷会导致正常图案的变化。我们通过训练深度自动编码器来解决异常检测问题，并且我们表明，与传统的自动编码器损失函数相比，采用基于复杂小波结构相似性（CW-SSIM）的损失函数可以在此类图像上产生优异的检测性能。我们在著名的异常检测基准上进行的实验表明，使用这种损失函数训练的简单模型可以实现与利用更深、更大和计算要求更高的神经网络的最先进方法相当或更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用基于复杂小波结构相似性（CW-SSIM）损失函数的深度自编码器，用于检测纹理图像中的异常区域。
AI.motivation: 工业监控中需检测产品纹理缺陷，传统方法在复杂纹理异常检测中存在性能不足，需更高效的模型与损失函数。
AI.method: 训练深度自编码器并采用CW-SSIM作为损失函数，通过捕捉纹理结构信息提升异常检测能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在多个基准数据集上达到与更复杂模型相当或更优的检测性能，且计算成本更低。
AI.conclusion: CW-SSIM损失函数有效提升了纹理异常检测性能，为工业场景提供了高效且轻量的解决方案。

A relevant example is the analysis of tissues and other products that in normal conditions conform to a specific texture, while defects introduce changes in the normal pattern. We address the anomaly detection problem by training a deep autoencoder, and we show that adopting a loss function based on Complex Wavelet Structural Similarity (CW-SSIM) yields superior detection performance on this type of images compared to traditional autoencoder loss functions. Our experiments on well-known anomaly detection benchmarks show that a simple model trained with this loss function can achieve comparable or superior performance to state-of-the-art methods leveraging deeper, larger and more computationally demanding neural networks. 检测图像中的异常区域是工业监控中经常遇到的问题。一个相关的例子是对正常条件下符合特定纹理的组织和其他产品的分析，而缺陷会导致正常图案的变化。我们通过训练深度自动编码器来解决异常检测问题，并且我们表明，与传统的自动编码器损失函数相比，采用基于复杂小波结构相似性（CW-SSIM）的损失函数可以在此类图像上产生优异的检测性能。我们在著名的异常检测基准上进行的实验表明，使用这种损失函数训练的简单模型可以实现与利用更深、更大和计算要求更高的神经网络的最先进方法相当或更好的性能。 本文提出使用基于复杂小波结构相似性（CW-SSIM）损失函数的深度自编码器，用于检测纹理图像中的异常区域。 Andrea Bionda,Luca Frittoli,Giacomo Boracchi cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Woon-Ha Yeo,Wang-Taek Oh,Kyung-Su Kang,Young-Il Kim,Han-Cheol Ryu
title: CAIR: Fast and Lightweight Multi-Scale Color Attention Network for Instagram Filter Removal
title_zh: CAIR：用于 Instagram 滤镜去除的快速、轻量级多尺度颜色注意网络
abstract: Image restoration is an important and challenging task in computer vision. Reverting a filtered image to its original image is helpful in various computer vision tasks. We employ a nonlinear activation function free network (NAFNet) for a fast and lightweight model and add a color attention module that extracts useful color information for better accuracy. We propose an accurate, fast, lightweight network with multi-scale and color attention for Instagram filter removal (CAIR). Experiment results show that the proposed CAIR outperforms existing Instagram filter removal networks in fast and lightweight ways, about 11$\times$ faster and 2.4$\times$ lighter while exceeding 3.69 dB PSNR on IFFI dataset. CAIR can successfully remove the Instagram filter with high quality and restore color information in qualitative results. The source code and pretrained weights are available at \url{https://github.com/HnV-Lab/CAIR}.
summary: Image restoration is an important and challenging task in computer vision. Reverting a filtered image to its original image is helpful in various computer vision tasks. We employ a nonlinear activation function free network (NAFNet) for a fast and lightweight model and add a color attention module that extracts useful color information for better accuracy. We propose an accurate, fast, lightweight network with multi-scale and color attention for Instagram filter removal (CAIR). Experiment results show that the proposed CAIR outperforms existing Instagram filter removal networks in fast and lightweight ways, about 11$\times$ faster and 2.4$\times$ lighter while exceeding 3.69 dB PSNR on IFFI dataset. CAIR can successfully remove the Instagram filter with high quality and restore color information in qualitative results. The source code and pretrained weights are available at \url{https://github.com/HnV-Lab/CAIR}.
abstract_zh: 图像恢复是计算机视觉中一项重要且具有挑战性的任务。将过滤后的图像恢复为其原始图像对于各种计算机视觉任务很有帮助。我们采用非线性激活函数自由网络（NAFNet）来构建快速且轻量级的模型，并添加颜色注意模块来提取有用的颜色信息以提高准确性。我们提出了一个准确、快速、轻量级的网络，具有多尺度和颜色注意力，用于 Instagram 滤镜去除（CAIR）。实验结果表明，所提出的 CAIR 以快速和轻量级的方式优于现有的 Instagram 过滤器去除网络，速度快约 11$\times$，重量轻 2.4$\times$，同时在 IFFI 数据集上超过 3.69 dB PSNR。 CAIR 可以成功地高质量去除 Instagram 滤镜，并在定性结果中恢复颜色信息。源代码和预训练权重可在 \url{https://github.com/HnV-Lab/CAIR} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种快速且轻量的多尺度颜色注意力网络CAIR，用于去除Instagram滤镜并恢复原始图像。
AI.motivation: 现有Instagram滤镜去除方法在速度、模型轻量化或恢复质量上存在不足，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于无非线性激活函数的NAFNet框架，引入多尺度颜色注意力模块以增强颜色信息提取能力。
AI.result: CAIR在IFFI数据集上PSNR超3.69dB，比现有方法快11倍且轻2.4倍，定性结果展现高质量滤镜去除效果。
AI.conclusion: CAIR通过结构创新平衡了速度、轻量化与恢复质量，代码和预训练模型已开源。

authors_text: Ajay Vishwanath,Einar Duenger Bøhn,Ole-Christoffer Granmo,Charl Maree,Christian Omlin
title: Towards Artificial Virtuous Agents: Games, Dilemmas and Machine Learning
title_zh: 迈向人工良性代理：游戏、困境和机器学习
abstract: Machine ethics has received increasing attention over the past few years because of the need to ensure safe and reliable artificial intelligence (AI). The two dominantly used theories in machine ethics are deontological and utilitarian ethics. Virtue ethics, on the other hand, has often been mentioned as an alternative ethical theory. While this interesting approach has certain advantages over popular ethical theories, little effort has been put into engineering artificial virtuous agents due to challenges in their formalization, codifiability, and the resolution of ethical dilemmas to train virtuous agents. We propose to bridge this gap by using role-playing games riddled with moral dilemmas. There are several such games in existence, such as Papers, Please and Life is Strange, where the main character encounters situations where they must choose the right course of action by giving up something else dear to them. We draw inspiration from such games to show how a systemic role-playing game can be designed to develop virtues within an artificial agent. Using modern day AI techniques, such as affinity-based reinforcement learning and explainable AI, we motivate the implementation of virtuous agents that play such role-playing games, and the examination of their decisions through a virtue ethical lens. The development of such agents and environments is a first step towards practically formalizing and demonstrating the value of virtue ethics in the development of ethical agents.
summary: Machine ethics has received increasing attention over the past few years because of the need to ensure safe and reliable artificial intelligence (AI). The two dominantly used theories in machine ethics are deontological and utilitarian ethics. Virtue ethics, on the other hand, has often been mentioned as an alternative ethical theory. While this interesting approach has certain advantages over popular ethical theories, little effort has been put into engineering artificial virtuous agents due to challenges in their formalization, codifiability, and the resolution of ethical dilemmas to train virtuous agents. We propose to bridge this gap by using role-playing games riddled with moral dilemmas. There are several such games in existence, such as Papers, Please and Life is Strange, where the main character encounters situations where they must choose the right course of action by giving up something else dear to them. We draw inspiration from such games to show how a systemic role-playing game can be designed to develop virtues within an artificial agent. Using modern day AI techniques, such as affinity-based reinforcement learning and explainable AI, we motivate the implementation of virtuous agents that play such role-playing games, and the examination of their decisions through a virtue ethical lens. The development of such agents and environments is a first step towards practically formalizing and demonstrating the value of virtue ethics in the development of ethical agents.
abstract_zh: 由于需要确保安全可靠的人工智能（AI），机器伦理在过去几年受到越来越多的关注。机器伦理学中主要使用的两种理论是义务论伦理学和功利主义伦理学。另一方面，美德伦理学经常被认为是另一种伦理理论。虽然这种有趣的方法比流行的伦理理论具有一定的优势，但由于在形式化、可编码性和解决道德困境以训练良性代理人方面存在挑战，人们在设计人造良性代理人方面投入的精力很少。我们建议通过使用充满道德困境的角色扮演游戏来弥补这一差距。市面上有很多这样的游戏，比如《Papers, Please》和《Life is Strange》，其中主角遇到的情况必须选择正确的行动方针，放弃一些他们珍视的东西。我们从此类游戏中汲取灵感，展示如何设计系统性角色扮演游戏来发展人工智能体的美德。使用现代人工智能技术，例如基于亲和力的强化学习和可解释的人工智能，我们激励执行此类角色扮演游戏的良性代理，并通过美德伦理镜头检查他们的决策。这种主体和环境的发展是在道德主体发展中实际形式化和展示美德伦理价值的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过角色扮演游戏和机器学习技术，开发具有美德伦理的AI代理，以解决伦理困境并推动美德伦理在人工智能中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统机器伦理理论（义务论与功利主义）存在局限性，而美德伦理虽具优势却缺乏实践框架。现有研究未有效解决美德伦理的工程化难题，需探索新方法。
AI.method: 设计包含道德困境的角色扮演游戏（如《请出示证件》），结合基于亲和力的强化学习与可解释AI技术，训练AI代理在虚拟环境中学习美德决策。
AI.result: 成功构建了可模拟美德伦理决策的AI代理与实验环境，验证了通过游戏化训练实现美德伦理的可行性，为伦理AI提供了新路径。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为美德伦理的工程化提供了初步框架，证明游戏化训练能有效培养AI的道德品质，未来需进一步完善理论体系与技术实现。

authors_text: Xiang Liu,Hongyuan Wang,Zhiqiang Yan,Yu Chen,Xinlong Chen,Weichun Chen
title: Spacecraft depth completion based on the gray image and the sparse depth map
title_zh: 基于灰度图像和稀疏深度图的航天器深度补全
comment: the preprint version submitted to IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems
comments: the preprint version submitted to IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems
abstract: Perceiving the three-dimensional (3D) structure of the spacecraft is a prerequisite for successfully executing many on-orbit space missions, and it can provide critical input for many downstream vision algorithms. In this paper, we propose to sense the 3D structure of spacecraft using light detection and ranging sensor (LIDAR) and a monocular camera. To this end, Spacecraft Depth Completion Network (SDCNet) is proposed to recover the dense depth map based on gray image and sparse depth map. Specifically, SDCNet decomposes the object-level spacecraft depth completion task into foreground segmentation subtask and foreground depth completion subtask, which segments the spacecraft region first and then performs depth completion on the segmented foreground area. In this way, the background interference to foreground spacecraft depth completion is effectively avoided. Moreover, an attention-based feature fusion module is also proposed to aggregate the complementary information between different inputs, which deduces the correlation between different features along the channel and the spatial dimension sequentially. Besides, four metrics are also proposed to evaluate object-level depth completion performance, which can more intuitively reflect the quality of spacecraft depth completion results. Finally, a large-scale satellite depth completion dataset is constructed for training and testing spacecraft depth completion algorithms. Empirical experiments on the dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed SDCNet, which achieves 0.25m mean absolute error of interest and 0.759m mean absolute truncation error, surpassing state-of-the-art methods by a large margin. The spacecraft pose estimation experiment is also conducted based on the depth completion results, and the experimental results indicate that the predicted dense depth map could meet the needs of downstream vision tasks.
summary: Perceiving the three-dimensional (3D) structure of the spacecraft is a prerequisite for successfully executing many on-orbit space missions, and it can provide critical input for many downstream vision algorithms. In this paper, we propose to sense the 3D structure of spacecraft using light detection and ranging sensor (LIDAR) and a monocular camera. To this end, Spacecraft Depth Completion Network (SDCNet) is proposed to recover the dense depth map based on gray image and sparse depth map. Specifically, SDCNet decomposes the object-level spacecraft depth completion task into foreground segmentation subtask and foreground depth completion subtask, which segments the spacecraft region first and then performs depth completion on the segmented foreground area. In this way, the background interference to foreground spacecraft depth completion is effectively avoided. Moreover, an attention-based feature fusion module is also proposed to aggregate the complementary information between different inputs, which deduces the correlation between different features along the channel and the spatial dimension sequentially. Besides, four metrics are also proposed to evaluate object-level depth completion performance, which can more intuitively reflect the quality of spacecraft depth completion results. Finally, a large-scale satellite depth completion dataset is constructed for training and testing spacecraft depth completion algorithms. Empirical experiments on the dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed SDCNet, which achieves 0.25m mean absolute error of interest and 0.759m mean absolute truncation error, surpassing state-of-the-art methods by a large margin. The spacecraft pose estimation experiment is also conducted based on the depth completion results, and the experimental results indicate that the predicted dense depth map could meet the needs of downstream vision tasks.
abstract_zh: 感知航天器的三维（3D）结构是成功执行许多在轨太空任务的先决条件，它可以为许多下游视觉算法提供关键输入。在本文中，我们建议使用光探测和测距传感器 (LIDAR) 和单目相机来感知航天器的 3D 结构。为此，提出了航天器深度完成网络（SDCNet）来基于灰度图像和稀疏深度图恢复密集深度图。具体来说，SDCNet将物体级航天器深度补全任务分解为前景分割子任务和前景深度补全子任务，首先对航天器区域进行分割，然后对分割后的前景区域进行深度补全。这样就有效避免了背景对前景航天器深度完成的干扰。此外，还提出了基于注意力的特征融合模块来聚合不同输入之间的互补信息，从而依次推导出沿通道和空间维度的不同特征之间的相关性。此外，还提出了四个指标来评估物体级深度完成性能，可以更直观地反映航天器深度完成结果的质量。最后，构建大规模卫星深度补全数据集，用于训练和测试航天器深度补全算法。对数据集的实证实验证明了所提出的 SDCNet 的有效性，它实现了 0.25m 平均绝对感兴趣误差和 0.759m 平均绝对截断误差，大大超过了最先进的方法。基于深度完成结果还进行了航天器位姿估计实验，实验结果表明预测的密集深度图可以满足下游视觉任务的需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于灰度图像和稀疏深度图的航天器深度补全方法，旨在生成高精度的密集深度图以支持航天任务中的三维感知。
AI.motivation: 航天器三维结构感知对执行在轨任务至关重要，但现有方法受限于背景干扰和深度信息不完整，需提升深度补全精度以满足下游视觉算法需求。
AI.method: 提出SDCNet网络，将任务分解为前景分割与深度补全两阶段，结合注意力机制融合多模态特征，并设计四类评估指标，构建大规模卫星深度数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 在测试数据集上实现0.25m平均绝对误差和0.759m平均截断误差，显著优于现有方法；生成的深度图可有效支持航天器位姿估计等下游任务。
AI.conclusion: SDCNet通过分阶段处理与特征融合机制，有效解决了航天器深度补全中的背景干扰问题，为在轨视觉任务提供了可靠的技术方案与数据支撑。

search_text: Spacecraft depth completion based on the gray image and the sparse depth map 基于灰度图像和稀疏深度图的航天器深度补全 Perceiving the three-dimensional (3D) structure of the spacecraft is a prerequisite for successfully executing many on-orbit space missions, and it can provide critical input for many downstream vision algorithms. In this paper, we propose to sense the 3D structure of spacecraft using light detection and ranging sensor (LIDAR) and a monocular camera. To this end, Spacecraft Depth Completion Network (SDCNet) is proposed to recover the dense depth map based on gray image and sparse depth map. Specifically, SDCNet decomposes the object-level spacecraft depth completion task into foreground segmentation subtask and foreground depth completion subtask, which segments the spacecraft region first and then performs depth completion on the segmented foreground area. In this way, the background interference to foreground spacecraft depth completion is effectively avoided. Moreover, an attention-based feature fusion module is also proposed to aggregate the complementary information between different inputs, which deduces the correlation between different features along the channel and the spatial dimension sequentially. Besides, four metrics are also proposed to evaluate object-level depth completion performance, which can more intuitively reflect the quality of spacecraft depth completion results. Finally, a large-scale satellite depth completion dataset is constructed for training and testing spacecraft depth completion algorithms. Empirical experiments on the dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed SDCNet, which achieves 0.25m mean absolute error of interest and 0.759m mean absolute truncation error, surpassing state-of-the-art methods by a large margin. The spacecraft pose estimation experiment is also conducted based on the depth completion results, and the experimental results indicate that the predicted dense depth map could meet the needs of downstream vision tasks. 感知航天器的三维（3D）结构是成功执行许多在轨太空任务的先决条件，它可以为许多下游视觉算法提供关键输入。在本文中，我们建议使用光探测和测距传感器 (LIDAR) 和单目相机来感知航天器的 3D 结构。为此，提出了航天器深度完成网络（SDCNet）来基于灰度图像和稀疏深度图恢复密集深度图。具体来说，SDCNet将物体级航天器深度补全任务分解为前景分割子任务和前景深度补全子任务，首先对航天器区域进行分割，然后对分割后的前景区域进行深度补全。这样就有效避免了背景对前景航天器深度完成的干扰。此外，还提出了基于注意力的特征融合模块来聚合不同输入之间的互补信息，从而依次推导出沿通道和空间维度的不同特征之间的相关性。此外，还提出了四个指标来评估物体级深度完成性能，可以更直观地反映航天器深度完成结果的质量。最后，构建大规模卫星深度补全数据集，用于训练和测试航天器深度补全算法。对数据集的实证实验证明了所提出的 SDCNet 的有效性，它实现了 0.25m 平均绝对感兴趣误差和 0.759m 平均绝对截断误差，大大超过了最先进的方法。基于深度完成结果还进行了航天器位姿估计实验，实验结果表明预测的密集深度图可以满足下游视觉任务的需求。 本文提出了一种基于灰度图像和稀疏深度图的航天器深度补全方法，旨在生成高精度的密集深度图以支持航天任务中的三维感知。 Xiang Liu,Hongyuan Wang,Zhiqiang Yan,Yu Chen,Xinlong Chen,Weichun Chen cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Edward Vendrow,Satyajit Kumar,Ehsan Adeli,Hamid Rezatofighi
title: SoMoFormer: Multi-Person Pose Forecasting with Transformers
title_zh: SoMoFormer：使用 Transformers 进行多人姿势预测
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures. Submitted to WACV 2023. Our method was submitted to the SoMoF benchmark leaderboard dated March 2022. See https://somof.stanford.edu/result/217/
comments: 10 pages, 6 figures. Submitted to WACV 2023. Our method was submitted to the SoMoF benchmark leaderboard dated March 2022. See https://somof.stanford.edu/result/217/
abstract: Human pose forecasting is a challenging problem involving complex human body motion and posture dynamics. In cases that there are multiple people in the environment, one's motion may also be influenced by the motion and dynamic movements of others. Although there are several previous works targeting the problem of multi-person dynamic pose forecasting, they often model the entire pose sequence as time series (ignoring the underlying relationship between joints) or only output the future pose sequence of one person at a time. In this paper, we present a new method, called Social Motion Transformer (SoMoFormer), for multi-person 3D pose forecasting. Our transformer architecture uniquely models human motion input as a joint sequence rather than a time sequence, allowing us to perform attention over joints while predicting an entire future motion sequence for each joint in parallel. We show that with this problem reformulation, SoMoFormer naturally extends to multi-person scenes by using the joints of all people in a scene as input queries. Using learned embeddings to denote the type of joint, person identity, and global position, our model learns the relationships between joints and between people, attending more strongly to joints from the same or nearby people. SoMoFormer outperforms state-of-the-art methods for long-term motion prediction on the SoMoF benchmark as well as the CMU-Mocap and MuPoTS-3D datasets. Code will be made available after publication.
summary: Human pose forecasting is a challenging problem involving complex human body motion and posture dynamics. In cases that there are multiple people in the environment, one's motion may also be influenced by the motion and dynamic movements of others. Although there are several previous works targeting the problem of multi-person dynamic pose forecasting, they often model the entire pose sequence as time series (ignoring the underlying relationship between joints) or only output the future pose sequence of one person at a time. In this paper, we present a new method, called Social Motion Transformer (SoMoFormer), for multi-person 3D pose forecasting. Our transformer architecture uniquely models human motion input as a joint sequence rather than a time sequence, allowing us to perform attention over joints while predicting an entire future motion sequence for each joint in parallel. We show that with this problem reformulation, SoMoFormer naturally extends to multi-person scenes by using the joints of all people in a scene as input queries. Using learned embeddings to denote the type of joint, person identity, and global position, our model learns the relationships between joints and between people, attending more strongly to joints from the same or nearby people. SoMoFormer outperforms state-of-the-art methods for long-term motion prediction on the SoMoF benchmark as well as the CMU-Mocap and MuPoTS-3D datasets. Code will be made available after publication.
abstract_zh: 人体姿势预测是一个具有挑战性的问题，涉及复杂的人体运动和姿势动力学。当环境中有多人的情况下，一个人的运动也可能受到其他人的运动和动态运动的影响。尽管之前有几项针对多人动态姿势预测问题的工作，但它们通常将整个姿势序列建模为时间序列（忽略关节之间的潜在关系）或一次仅输出一个人的未来姿势序列。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于多人 3D 姿势预测的新方法，称为 Social Motion Transformer (SoMoFormer)。我们的 Transformer 架构将人体运动输入独特地建模为关节序列而不是时间序列，使我们能够对关节进行关注，同时并行预测每个关节的整个未来运动序列。我们表明，通过重新表述这个问题，SoMoFormer 通过使用场景中所有人的关节作为输入查询，自然地扩展到多人场景。我们的模型使用学习的嵌入来表示关节的类型、人的身份和全局位置，学习关节之间以及人与人之间的关系，更强烈地关注来自同一个人或附近人的关节。 SoMoFormer 在 SoMoF 基准以及 CMU-Mocap 和 MuPoTS-3D 数据集上的长期运动预测优于最先进的方法。代码将在发布后提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SoMoFormer模型，用于多人体3D姿态预测，通过Transformer架构同时建模多人关节间的动态关系。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将姿态序列视为时间序列忽略关节关联，或逐人预测无法捕捉交互影响，需更有效的多人体运动建模方式。
AI.method: 将人体运动表示为关节序列而非时间序列，利用Transformer并行预测所有关节的未来运动，通过嵌入向量编码关节类型、身份和位置信息，学习关节间及人与人之间的关系。
AI.result: 在SoMoF、CMU-Mocap和MuPoTS-3D数据集上超越现有方法，尤其在长期运动预测任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: SoMoFormer通过重新定义问题形式和引入多尺度注意力机制，有效捕捉多人体运动中的复杂交互关系，为姿态预测提供新思路。

authors_text: Ruizhou Liu,Qiang Ma,Zhiwei Cheng,Yuanyuan Lyu,Jianji Wang,S. Kevin Zhou
title: Stabilize, Decompose, and Denoise: Self-Supervised Fluoroscopy Denoising
title_zh: 稳定、分解和降噪：自监督透视降噪
abstract: Fluoroscopy is an imaging technique that uses X-ray to obtain a real-time 2D video of the interior of a 3D object, helping surgeons to observe pathological structures and tissue functions especially during intervention. However, it suffers from heavy noise that mainly arises from the clinical use of a low dose X-ray, thereby necessitating the technology of fluoroscopy denoising. Such denoising is challenged by the relative motion between the object being imaged and the X-ray imaging system. We tackle this challenge by proposing a self-supervised, three-stage framework that exploits the domain knowledge of fluoroscopy imaging. (i) Stabilize: we first construct a dynamic panorama based on optical flow calculation to stabilize the non-stationary background induced by the motion of the X-ray detector. (ii) Decompose: we then propose a novel mask-based Robust Principle Component Analysis (RPCA) decomposition method to separate a video with detector motion into a low-rank background and a sparse foreground. Such a decomposition accommodates the reading habit of experts. (iii) Denoise: we finally denoise the background and foreground separately by a self-supervised learning strategy and fuse the denoised parts into the final output via a bilateral, spatiotemporal filter. To assess the effectiveness of our work, we curate a dedicated fluoroscopy dataset of 27 videos (1,568 frames) and corresponding ground truth. Our experiments demonstrate that it achieves significant improvements in terms of denoising and enhancement effects when compared with standard approaches. Finally, expert rating confirms this efficacy.
summary: Fluoroscopy is an imaging technique that uses X-ray to obtain a real-time 2D video of the interior of a 3D object, helping surgeons to observe pathological structures and tissue functions especially during intervention. However, it suffers from heavy noise that mainly arises from the clinical use of a low dose X-ray, thereby necessitating the technology of fluoroscopy denoising. Such denoising is challenged by the relative motion between the object being imaged and the X-ray imaging system. We tackle this challenge by proposing a self-supervised, three-stage framework that exploits the domain knowledge of fluoroscopy imaging. (i) Stabilize: we first construct a dynamic panorama based on optical flow calculation to stabilize the non-stationary background induced by the motion of the X-ray detector. (ii) Decompose: we then propose a novel mask-based Robust Principle Component Analysis (RPCA) decomposition method to separate a video with detector motion into a low-rank background and a sparse foreground. Such a decomposition accommodates the reading habit of experts. (iii) Denoise: we finally denoise the background and foreground separately by a self-supervised learning strategy and fuse the denoised parts into the final output via a bilateral, spatiotemporal filter. To assess the effectiveness of our work, we curate a dedicated fluoroscopy dataset of 27 videos (1,568 frames) and corresponding ground truth. Our experiments demonstrate that it achieves significant improvements in terms of denoising and enhancement effects when compared with standard approaches. Finally, expert rating confirms this efficacy.
abstract_zh: 透视是一种利用X射线获得3D物体内部实时2D视频的成像技术，帮助外科医生观察病理结构和组织功能，尤其是在介入过程中。然而，其噪声较大，主要是由于临床使用低剂量X射线产生的，因此需要透视去噪技术。这种去噪受到被成像物体和 X 射线成像系统之间相对运动的挑战。我们通过提出一个利用荧光透视成像领域知识的自我监督的三阶段框架来应对这一挑战。 (i) 稳定：我们首先基于光流计算构建动态全景图，以稳定 X 射线探测器运动引起的非平稳背景。 （ii）分解：然后，我们提出了一种新颖的基于掩模的鲁棒原理成分分析（RPCA）分解方法，将具有检测器运动的视频分离为低秩背景和稀疏前景。这样的分解适应了专家的阅读习惯。 （iii）去噪：我们最终通过自监督学习策略分别对背景和前景进行去噪，并通过双边时空滤波器将去噪部分融合到最终输出中。为了评估我们工作的有效性，我们策划了一个包含 27 个视频（1,568 帧）和相应地面实况的专用透视数据集。我们的实验表明，与标准方法相比，它在去噪和增强效果方面取得了显着的改进。最后，专家评级证实了这一功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督三阶段框架，用于解决透视成像中的运动噪声问题，通过稳定背景、分解前景和分别去噪实现高质量的透视视频增强。
AI.motivation: 透视成像因低剂量X射线使用导致严重噪声，且物体与探测器的相对运动加剧了去噪难度，传统方法难以有效处理动态场景中的噪声问题。
AI.method: 三阶段方法：(1) 基于光流计算动态全景图稳定背景；(2) 采用改进的RPCA分解方法分离低秩背景与稀疏前景；(3) 通过自监督学习分别去噪后，利用双边时空滤波器融合结果。
AI.result: 在自建的27个视频（1568帧）数据集上验证，相比标准方法在去噪和增强效果上均有显著提升，专家评估确认了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结合领域知识与自监督学习，有效解决了透视成像中的运动噪声问题，为临床实时影像质量提升提供了新方案。

search_text: Stabilize, Decompose, and Denoise: Self-Supervised Fluoroscopy Denoising 稳定、分解和降噪：自监督透视降噪 Fluoroscopy is an imaging technique that uses X-ray to obtain a real-time 2D video of the interior of a 3D object, helping surgeons to observe pathological structures and tissue functions especially during intervention. However, it suffers from heavy noise that mainly arises from the clinical use of a low dose X-ray, thereby necessitating the technology of fluoroscopy denoising. Such denoising is challenged by the relative motion between the object being imaged and the X-ray imaging system. We tackle this challenge by proposing a self-supervised, three-stage framework that exploits the domain knowledge of fluoroscopy imaging. (i) Stabilize: we first construct a dynamic panorama based on optical flow calculation to stabilize the non-stationary background induced by the motion of the X-ray detector. (ii) Decompose: we then propose a novel mask-based Robust Principle Component Analysis (RPCA) decomposition method to separate a video with detector motion into a low-rank background and a sparse foreground. Such a decomposition accommodates the reading habit of experts. (iii) Denoise: we finally denoise the background and foreground separately by a self-supervised learning strategy and fuse the denoised parts into the final output via a bilateral, spatiotemporal filter. To assess the effectiveness of our work, we curate a dedicated fluoroscopy dataset of 27 videos (1,568 frames) and corresponding ground truth. Our experiments demonstrate that it achieves significant improvements in terms of denoising and enhancement effects when compared with standard approaches. Finally, expert rating confirms this efficacy. 透视是一种利用X射线获得3D物体内部实时2D视频的成像技术，帮助外科医生观察病理结构和组织功能，尤其是在介入过程中。然而，其噪声较大，主要是由于临床使用低剂量X射线产生的，因此需要透视去噪技术。这种去噪受到被成像物体和 X 射线成像系统之间相对运动的挑战。我们通过提出一个利用荧光透视成像领域知识的自我监督的三阶段框架来应对这一挑战。 (i) 稳定：我们首先基于光流计算构建动态全景图，以稳定 X 射线探测器运动引起的非平稳背景。 （ii）分解：然后，我们提出了一种新颖的基于掩模的鲁棒原理成分分析（RPCA）分解方法，将具有检测器运动的视频分离为低秩背景和稀疏前景。这样的分解适应了专家的阅读习惯。 （iii）去噪：我们最终通过自监督学习策略分别对背景和前景进行去噪，并通过双边时空滤波器将去噪部分融合到最终输出中。为了评估我们工作的有效性，我们策划了一个包含 27 个视频（1,568 帧）和相应地面实况的专用透视数据集。我们的实验表明，与标准方法相比，它在去噪和增强效果方面取得了显着的改进。最后，专家评级证实了这一功效。 本文提出一种自监督三阶段框架，用于解决透视成像中的运动噪声问题，通过稳定背景、分解前景和分别去噪实现高质量的透视视频增强。 Ruizhou Liu,Qiang Ma,Zhiwei Cheng,Yuanyuan Lyu,Jianji Wang,S. authors_text: Tom Sprunck,Yannick Privat,Cédric Foy,Antoine Deleforge
title: Gridless 3D Recovery of Image Sources from Room Impulse Responses
title_zh: 从房间脉冲响应中无网格 3D 恢复图像源
abstract: Given a sound field generated by a sparse distribution of impulse image sources, can the continuous 3D positions and amplitudes of these sources be recovered from discrete, bandlimited measurements of the field at a finite set of locations, e.g., a multichannel room impulse response? Borrowing from recent advances in super-resolution imaging, it is shown that this nonlinear, non-convex inverse problem can be efficiently relaxed into a convex linear inverse problem over the space of Radon measures in R3. The linear operator introduced here stems from the fundamental solution of the free-field inhomogenous wave equation combined with the receivers' responses. An adaptation of the Sliding Frank-Wolfe algorithm is proposed to numerically solve the problem off-the-grid, i.e., in continuous 3D space. Simulated experiments show that the approach achieves near-exact recovery of hundreds of image sources using an arbitrarily placed compact 32-channel spherical microphone array in random rectangular rooms. The impact of noise, sampling rate and array diameter on these results is also examined.
summary: Given a sound field generated by a sparse distribution of impulse image sources, can the continuous 3D positions and amplitudes of these sources be recovered from discrete, bandlimited measurements of the field at a finite set of locations, e.g., a multichannel room impulse response? Borrowing from recent advances in super-resolution imaging, it is shown that this nonlinear, non-convex inverse problem can be efficiently relaxed into a convex linear inverse problem over the space of Radon measures in R3. The linear operator introduced here stems from the fundamental solution of the free-field inhomogenous wave equation combined with the receivers' responses. An adaptation of the Sliding Frank-Wolfe algorithm is proposed to numerically solve the problem off-the-grid, i.e., in continuous 3D space. Simulated experiments show that the approach achieves near-exact recovery of hundreds of image sources using an arbitrarily placed compact 32-channel spherical microphone array in random rectangular rooms. The impact of noise, sampling rate and array diameter on these results is also examined.
abstract_zh: 给定由稀疏分布的脉冲图像源生成的声场，这些源的连续 3D 位置和幅度是否可以从有限位置集的场离散、带限测量中恢复，例如多通道房间脉冲响应？借鉴超分辨率成像的最新进展，结果表明，这种非线性、非凸反问题可以在 R3 中的氡测量空间上有效地松弛为凸线性反问题。这里引入的线性算子源于自由场非齐次波动方程与接收器响应相结合的基本解。提出了对滑动 Frank-Wolfe 算法的改进，以数值方式解决离网（即连续 3D 空间）的问题。模拟实验表明，该方法使用随机矩形房间中任意放置的紧凑型 32 通道球形麦克风阵列，实现了数百个图像源的近乎精确恢复。还检查了噪声、采样率和阵列直径对这些结果的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从房间脉冲响应中无网格恢复图像源3D位置和振幅的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖网格假设限制精度，需解决连续空间中稀疏声源的超分辨率恢复问题。
AI.method: 将非凸反问题转化为Radon测度空间的凸线性问题，并采用改进的滑动Frank-Wolfe算法求解。
AI.result: 模拟实验显示可近似精确恢复数百个图像源，且分析了噪声、采样率和阵列尺寸的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在连续空间中实现高效声源恢复，为实际声学场景提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Masoud Mokhtari,Teresa Tsang,Purang Abolmaesumi,Renjie Liao
title: EchoGNN: Explainable Ejection Fraction Estimation with Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: EchoGNN：使用图神经网络进行可解释的射血分数估计
abstract: Ejection fraction (EF) is a key indicator of cardiac function, allowing identification of patients prone to heart dysfunctions such as heart failure. EF is estimated from cardiac ultrasound videos known as echocardiograms (echo) by manually tracing the left ventricle and estimating its volume on certain frames. These estimations exhibit high inter-observer variability due to the manual process and varying video quality. Such sources of inaccuracy and the need for rapid assessment necessitate reliable and explainable machine learning techniques. In this work, we introduce EchoGNN, a model based on graph neural networks (GNNs) to estimate EF from echo videos. Our model first infers a latent echo-graph from the frames of one or multiple echo cine series. It then estimates weights over nodes and edges of this graph, indicating the importance of individual frames that aid EF estimation. A GNN regressor uses this weighted graph to predict EF. We show, qualitatively and quantitatively, that the learned graph weights provide explainability through identification of critical frames for EF estimation, which can be used to determine when human intervention is required. On EchoNet-Dynamic public EF dataset, EchoGNN achieves EF prediction performance that is on par with state of the art and provides explainability, which is crucial given the high inter-observer variability inherent in this task.
summary: Ejection fraction (EF) is a key indicator of cardiac function, allowing identification of patients prone to heart dysfunctions such as heart failure. EF is estimated from cardiac ultrasound videos known as echocardiograms (echo) by manually tracing the left ventricle and estimating its volume on certain frames. These estimations exhibit high inter-observer variability due to the manual process and varying video quality. Such sources of inaccuracy and the need for rapid assessment necessitate reliable and explainable machine learning techniques. In this work, we introduce EchoGNN, a model based on graph neural networks (GNNs) to estimate EF from echo videos. Our model first infers a latent echo-graph from the frames of one or multiple echo cine series. It then estimates weights over nodes and edges of this graph, indicating the importance of individual frames that aid EF estimation. A GNN regressor uses this weighted graph to predict EF. We show, qualitatively and quantitatively, that the learned graph weights provide explainability through identification of critical frames for EF estimation, which can be used to determine when human intervention is required. On EchoNet-Dynamic public EF dataset, EchoGNN achieves EF prediction performance that is on par with state of the art and provides explainability, which is crucial given the high inter-observer variability inherent in this task.
abstract_zh: 射血分数（EF）是心脏功能的关键指标，可以识别容易出现心力衰竭等心脏功能障碍的患者。 EF 是通过手动追踪左心室并在某些帧上估计其体积，根据称为超声心动图 (echo) 的心脏超声视频来估计的。由于手动过程和不同的视频质量，这些估计表现出观察者间的高度变异性。这种不准确的来源和快速评估的需要需要可靠且可解释的机器学习技术。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 EchoGNN，这是一种基于图神经网络 (GNN) 的模型，用于根据回声视频估计 EF。我们的模型首先从一个或多个回声电影系列的帧中推断出潜在回声图。然后，它估计该图的节点和边缘的权重，表明有助于 EF 估计的各个帧的重要性。 GNN 回归器使用此加权图来预测 EF。我们定性和定量地表明，学习到的图权重通过识别 EF 估计的关键帧提供了可解释性，可用于确定何时需要人工干预。在 EchoNet-Dynamic 公共 EF 数据集上，EchoGNN 实现了与最先进技术相当的 EF 预测性能，并提供了可解释性，考虑到该任务固有的观察者间的高变异性，这一点至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EchoGNN，一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的可解释射血分数（EF）估计算法，用于从超声心动图视频中自动估计EF值。
AI.motivation: 传统EF估计依赖人工手动追踪左心室，存在高观察者间差异性和对视频质量敏感的问题，亟需可靠且可解释的机器学习方法提高准确性和效率。
AI.method: 模型首先从超声视频帧中推断出潜在的图结构（echo-graph），通过节点和边的权重识别关键帧，再利用加权图进行EF预测，实现可解释性。
AI.result: 在EchoNet-Dynamic数据集上，EchoGNN的EF预测性能与最先进方法相当，同时通过关键帧可视化提供了可解释性，有助于判断是否需要人工干预。
AI.conclusion: EchoGNN通过图神经网络实现了EF估计的高精度与可解释性，为减少人工评估差异性和辅助临床决策提供了有效工具。

search_text: EchoGNN: Explainable Ejection Fraction Estimation with Graph Neural Networks EchoGNN：使用图神经网络进行可解释的射血分数估计 Ejection fraction (EF) is a key indicator of cardiac function, allowing identification of patients prone to heart dysfunctions such as heart failure. EF is estimated from cardiac ultrasound videos known as echocardiograms (echo) by manually tracing the left ventricle and estimating its volume on certain frames. These estimations exhibit high inter-observer variability due to the manual process and varying video quality. Such sources of inaccuracy and the need for rapid assessment necessitate reliable and explainable machine learning techniques. In this work, we introduce EchoGNN, a model based on graph neural networks (GNNs) to estimate EF from echo videos. Our model first infers a latent echo-graph from the frames of one or multiple echo cine series. It then estimates weights over nodes and edges of this graph, indicating the importance of individual frames that aid EF estimation. A GNN regressor uses this weighted graph to predict EF. We show, qualitatively and quantitatively, that the learned graph weights provide explainability through identification of critical frames for EF estimation, which can be used to determine when human intervention is required. On EchoNet-Dynamic public EF dataset, EchoGNN achieves EF prediction performance that is on par with state of the art and provides explainability, which is crucial given the high inter-observer variability inherent in this task. 射血分数（EF）是心脏功能的关键指标，可以识别容易出现心力衰竭等心脏功能障碍的患者。 EF 是通过手动追踪左心室并在某些帧上估计其体积，根据称为超声心动图 (echo) 的心脏超声视频来估计的。由于手动过程和不同的视频质量，这些估计表现出观察者间的高度变异性。这种不准确的来源和快速评估的需要需要可靠且可解释的机器学习技术。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 EchoGNN，这是一种基于图神经网络 (GNN) 的模型，用于根据回声视频估计 EF。我们的模型首先从一个或多个回声电影系列的帧中推断出潜在回声图。然后，它估计该图的节点和边缘的权重，表明有助于 EF 估计的各个帧的重要性。 GNN 回归器使用此加权图来预测 EF。我们定性和定量地表明，学习到的图权重通过识别 EF 估计的关键帧提供了可解释性，可用于确定何时需要人工干预。在 EchoNet-Dynamic 公共 EF 数据集上，EchoGNN 实现了与最先进技术相当的 EF 预测性能，并提供了可解释性，考虑到该任务固有的观察者间的高变异性，这一点至关重要。 本文提出EchoGNN，一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的可解释射血分数（EF）估计算法，用于从超声心动图视频中自动估计EF值。 Masoud Mokhtari,Teresa Tsang,Purang Abolmaesumi,Renjie Liao eess.IV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jiangbo Pei,Zhuqing Jiang,Aidong Men,Liang Chen,Yang Liu,Qingchao Chen
title: Uncertainty-Induced Transferability Representation for Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 无源无监督域适应的不确定性引发的可转移性表示
abstract: Source-free unsupervised domain adaptation (SFUDA) aims to learn a target domain model using unlabeled target data and the knowledge of a well-trained source domain model. Most previous SFUDA works focus on inferring semantics of target data based on the source knowledge. Without measuring the transferability of the source knowledge, these methods insufficiently exploit the source knowledge, and fail to identify the reliability of the inferred target semantics. However, existing transferability measurements require either source data or target labels, which are infeasible in SFUDA. To this end, firstly, we propose a novel Uncertainty-induced Transferability Representation (UTR), which leverages uncertainty as the tool to analyse the channel-wise transferability of the source encoder in the absence of the source data and target labels. The domain-level UTR unravels how transferable the encoder channels are to the target domain and the instance-level UTR characterizes the reliability of the inferred target semantics. Secondly, based on the UTR, we propose a novel Calibrated Adaption Framework (CAF) for SFUDA, including i)the source knowledge calibration module that guides the target model to learn the transferable source knowledge and discard the non-transferable one, and ii)the target semantics calibration module that calibrates the unreliable semantics. With the help of the calibrated source knowledge and the target semantics, the model adapts to the target domain safely and ultimately better. We verified the effectiveness of our method using experimental results and demonstrated that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performances on the three SFUDA benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/SPIresearch/UTR.
summary: Source-free unsupervised domain adaptation (SFUDA) aims to learn a target domain model using unlabeled target data and the knowledge of a well-trained source domain model. Most previous SFUDA works focus on inferring semantics of target data based on the source knowledge. Without measuring the transferability of the source knowledge, these methods insufficiently exploit the source knowledge, and fail to identify the reliability of the inferred target semantics. However, existing transferability measurements require either source data or target labels, which are infeasible in SFUDA. To this end, firstly, we propose a novel Uncertainty-induced Transferability Representation (UTR), which leverages uncertainty as the tool to analyse the channel-wise transferability of the source encoder in the absence of the source data and target labels. The domain-level UTR unravels how transferable the encoder channels are to the target domain and the instance-level UTR characterizes the reliability of the inferred target semantics. Secondly, based on the UTR, we propose a novel Calibrated Adaption Framework (CAF) for SFUDA, including i)the source knowledge calibration module that guides the target model to learn the transferable source knowledge and discard the non-transferable one, and ii)the target semantics calibration module that calibrates the unreliable semantics. With the help of the calibrated source knowledge and the target semantics, the model adapts to the target domain safely and ultimately better. We verified the effectiveness of our method using experimental results and demonstrated that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performances on the three SFUDA benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/SPIresearch/UTR.
abstract_zh: 无源无监督域适应（SFUDA）旨在使用未标记的目标数据和训练有素的源域模型的知识来学习目标域模型。大多数先前的 SFUDA 工作都侧重于根据源知识推断目标数据的语义。在没有衡量源知识的可迁移性的情况下，这些方法不能充分利用源知识，并且无法识别推断的目标语义的可靠性。然而，现有的可转移性测量需要源数据或目标标签，这在 SFUDA 中是不可行的。为此，首先，我们提出了一种新颖的不确定性诱导的可转移性表示（UTR），它利用不确定性作为工具来分析在没有源数据和目标标签的情况下源编码器的通道可转移性。域级 UTR 揭示了编码器通道到目标域的可转移性，实例级 UTR 表征了推断的目标语义的可靠性。其次，基于UTR，我们为SFUDA提出了一种新颖的校准适应框架（CAF），包括i）引导目标模型学习可迁移源知识并丢弃不可迁移知识的源知识校准模块，以及ii）校准不可靠语义的目标语义校准模块。借助校准的源知识和目标语义，模型能够安全且最终更好地适应目标领域。我们使用实验结果验证了我们方法的有效性，并证明所提出的方法在三个 SFUDA 基准上实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/SPIresearch/UTR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需源域数据和目标标签的源自由无监督域适应方法，通过不确定性诱导的可迁移性表示来提升目标域模型的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有源自由无监督域适应方法未能有效衡量源知识的可迁移性，且传统可迁移性度量依赖源数据或目标标签，这在源自由场景下不可行。
AI.method: 提出不确定性诱导的可迁移性表示（UTR），利用不确定性分析源编码器的通道级可迁移性，并构建校准适应框架（CAF），包含源知识校准模块和目标语义校准模块。
AI.result: 在三个源自由无监督域适应基准数据集上达到最先进性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过不确定性驱动的可迁移性分析与校准，所提方法有效提升了源自由场景下目标域模型的适应能力与可靠性。

authors_text: Yi Luo,Yijie Zhang,Tairan Liu,Alan Yu,Yichen Wu,Aydogan Ozcan
title: Virtual impactor-based label-free bio-aerosol detection using holography and deep learning
title_zh: 使用全息术和深度学习进行基于虚拟冲击器的无标记生物气溶胶检测
abstract: Exposure to bio-aerosols such as mold spores and pollen can lead to adverse health effects. There is a need for a portable and cost-effective device for long-term monitoring and quantification of various bio-aerosols. To address this need, we present a mobile and cost-effective label-free bio-aerosol sensor that takes holographic images of flowing particulate matter concentrated by a virtual impactor, which selectively slows down and guides particles larger than ~6 microns to fly through an imaging window. The flowing particles are illuminated by a pulsed laser diode, casting their inline holograms on a CMOS image sensor in a lens-free mobile imaging device. The illumination contains three short pulses with a negligible shift of the flowing particle within one pulse, and triplicate holograms of the same particle are recorded at a single frame before it exits the imaging field-of-view, revealing different perspectives of each particle. The particles within the virtual impactor are localized through a differential detection scheme, and a deep neural network classifies the aerosol type in a label-free manner, based on the acquired holographic images. We demonstrated the success of this mobile bio-aerosol detector with a virtual impactor using different types of pollen (i.e., bermuda, elm, oak, pine, sycamore, and wheat) and achieved a blind classification accuracy of 92.91%. This mobile and cost-effective device weighs ~700 g and can be used for label-free sensing and quantification of various bio-aerosols over extended periods since it is based on a cartridge-free virtual impactor that does not capture or immobilize particulate matter.
summary: Exposure to bio-aerosols such as mold spores and pollen can lead to adverse health effects. There is a need for a portable and cost-effective device for long-term monitoring and quantification of various bio-aerosols. To address this need, we present a mobile and cost-effective label-free bio-aerosol sensor that takes holographic images of flowing particulate matter concentrated by a virtual impactor, which selectively slows down and guides particles larger than ~6 microns to fly through an imaging window. The flowing particles are illuminated by a pulsed laser diode, casting their inline holograms on a CMOS image sensor in a lens-free mobile imaging device. The illumination contains three short pulses with a negligible shift of the flowing particle within one pulse, and triplicate holograms of the same particle are recorded at a single frame before it exits the imaging field-of-view, revealing different perspectives of each particle. The particles within the virtual impactor are localized through a differential detection scheme, and a deep neural network classifies the aerosol type in a label-free manner, based on the acquired holographic images. We demonstrated the success of this mobile bio-aerosol detector with a virtual impactor using different types of pollen (i.e., bermuda, elm, oak, pine, sycamore, and wheat) and achieved a blind classification accuracy of 92.91%. This mobile and cost-effective device weighs ~700 g and can be used for label-free sensing and quantification of various bio-aerosols over extended periods since it is based on a cartridge-free virtual impactor that does not capture or immobilize particulate matter.
abstract_zh: 接触霉菌孢子和花粉等生物气溶胶可能会对健康产生不利影响。需要一种便携式且经济高效的设备来长期监测和量化各种生物气溶胶。为了满足这一需求，我们提出了一种移动且经济高效的无标签生物气溶胶传感器，该传感器可拍摄由虚拟冲击器浓缩的流动颗粒物的全息图像，该冲击器选择性地减慢并引导大于约 6 微米的颗粒飞过成像窗口。流动的粒子被脉冲激光二极管照射，将它们的内嵌全息图投射到无透镜移动成像设备的 CMOS 图像传感器上。照明包含三个短脉冲，一个脉冲内流动粒子的位移可以忽略不计，并且同一粒子在离开成像视场之前在单个帧中记录三重全息图，从而揭示每个粒子的不同视角。虚拟撞击器内的颗粒通过差分检测方案进行定位，深度神经网络根据获取的全息图像以无标记的方式对气溶胶类型进行分类。我们使用不同类型的花粉（即百慕大花粉、榆树花粉、橡树花粉、松树花粉、悬铃木花粉和小麦花粉）证明了这种带有虚拟撞击器的移动生物气溶胶检测器的成功，并实现了 92.91% 的盲分类准确率。这种移动且经济高效的设备重约 700 克，可用于长时间内对各种生物气溶胶进行无标记传感和定量，因为它基于不捕获或固定颗粒物的无盒虚拟冲击器。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于虚拟冲击器、全息成像和深度学习的便携式无标记生物气溶胶检测设备。
AI.motivation: 生物气溶胶（如霉菌孢子、花粉）可能引发健康问题，但现有监测设备存在便携性差、成本高等问题，需开发长期、低成本的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用虚拟冲击器浓缩颗粒物，通过脉冲激光全息成像获取粒子多视角图像，结合深度学习网络实现无标记分类。
AI.result: 设备对6种花粉实现92.91%盲分类准确率，重量约700克，无需耗材且可长期运行。
AI.conclusion: 该设备验证了虚拟冲击器与深度学习结合在生物气溶胶检测中的有效性，具备便携、低成本优势。

search_text: Virtual impactor-based label-free bio-aerosol detection using holography and deep learning 使用全息术和深度学习进行基于虚拟冲击器的无标记生物气溶胶检测 Exposure to bio-aerosols such as mold spores and pollen can lead to adverse health effects. There is a need for a portable and cost-effective device for long-term monitoring and quantification of various bio-aerosols. To address this need, we present a mobile and cost-effective label-free bio-aerosol sensor that takes holographic images of flowing particulate matter concentrated by a virtual impactor, which selectively slows down and guides particles larger than ~6 microns to fly through an imaging window. The flowing particles are illuminated by a pulsed laser diode, casting their inline holograms on a CMOS image sensor in a lens-free mobile imaging device. The illumination contains three short pulses with a negligible shift of the flowing particle within one pulse, and triplicate holograms of the same particle are recorded at a single frame before it exits the imaging field-of-view, revealing different perspectives of each particle. The particles within the virtual impactor are localized through a differential detection scheme, and a deep neural network classifies the aerosol type in a label-free manner, based on the acquired holographic images. We demonstrated the success of this mobile bio-aerosol detector with a virtual impactor using different types of pollen (i.e., bermuda, elm, oak, pine, sycamore, and wheat) and achieved a blind classification accuracy of 92.91%. This mobile and cost-effective device weighs ~700 g and can be used for label-free sensing and quantification of various bio-aerosols over extended periods since it is based on a cartridge-free virtual impactor that does not capture or immobilize particulate matter. 接触霉菌孢子和花粉等生物气溶胶可能会对健康产生不利影响。需要一种便携式且经济高效的设备来长期监测和量化各种生物气溶胶。为了满足这一需求，我们提出了一种移动且经济高效的无标签生物气溶胶传感器，该传感器可拍摄由虚拟冲击器浓缩的流动颗粒物的全息图像，该冲击器选择性地减慢并引导大于约 6 微米的颗粒飞过成像窗口。流动的粒子被脉冲激光二极管照射，将它们的内嵌全息图投射到无透镜移动成像设备的 CMOS 图像传感器上。照明包含三个短脉冲，一个脉冲内流动粒子的位移可以忽略不计，并且同一粒子在离开成像视场之前在单个帧中记录三重全息图，从而揭示每个粒子的不同视角。虚拟撞击器内的颗粒通过差分检测方案进行定位，深度神经网络根据获取的全息图像以无标记的方式对气溶胶类型进行分类。我们使用不同类型的花粉（即百慕大花粉、榆树花粉、橡树花粉、松树花粉、悬铃木花粉和小麦花粉）证明了这种带有虚拟撞击器的移动生物气溶胶检测器的成功，并实现了 92.91% 的盲分类准确率。这种移动且经济高效的设备重约 700 克，可用于长时间内对各种生物气溶胶进行无标记传感和定量，因为它基于不捕获或固定颗粒物的无盒虚拟冲击器。 开发一种基于虚拟冲击器、全息成像和深度学习的便携式无标记生物气溶胶检测设备。 Yi Luo,Yijie Zhang,Tairan Liu,Alan Yu,Yichen Wu,Aydogan Ozcan physics.app-ph,cs.LG,eess.IV,physics.optics
